jutsu.name: Chakra Hands
jutsu.description: A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration or until you dismiss it as an action. The hand vanishes if it is ever more than 30 feet away from you or if you dismiss the jutsu. You can use your action to control the hand. You can use the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial. You can move the hand up to 30 feet each time you use it. The hand can't attack, activate chakra items, or carry more than 10 pounds.

jutsu.name: Chakra Pulse
jutsu.description: You create a forceful pulse of chakra that erupts from your body. Each creature within 5 feet of you, other than you, must make a Strength saving throw, being forced Prone on a failed save.

jutsu.name: Enhanced Defense
jutsu.description: You focus chakra into the top layer of your skin, providing your resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and slashing damage until the start of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Enhanced Resistance
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, Which you take when you fail a saving throw
jutsu.description: You focus chakra throughout your body reinforcing it to hostile effects. Roll a d20, using the result in place of your failed one. Once you cast this jutsu, you cannot do so again for 1 minute.
jutsu.higherLevels: Your skill with this jutsu increases as you gain levels. You no longer need Hand Seals (HS) to cast this jutsu at 5th level. You can cast this jutsu twice per 10 minutes at 11th level and you can cast this jutsu at no Action cost, when its trigger would allow it to be cast at 17th level.

jutsu.name: Enhanced Skill
jutsu.description: You focus chakra toward different parts of your body to enhance your ability to complete different tasks. When you make a skill check using a physical ability score (Strength, Dexterity or Constitution), you add+2 to that check.

jutsu.name: Escape Technique
jutsu.description: You use chakra to feel the knots of ropes chains, and other tools used to bind and restrain you. This helps you figure out the best course of escape while trapped. While Restrained or Grappled, you can roll Sleight of Hand in place of the normally required skill check or saving throw. On a success, you are able to slip out of the grapple or Restrained position, freeing yourself.
jutsu.higherLevels: Your skill with this jutsu increases as you gain levels. You no longer need Hand Seals (HS) to cast this jutsu at 5th level. You make your Sleight of hand check at Advantage at 11th level and you can cast this jutsu once per turn, on your turn at no Action cost at 17th level.

jutsu.name: Finger Carving Seal
jutsu.description: You focus chakra into the tip of your finger and use the accumulated heat and energy to apply worlds, letters and shapes of your choice, no longer than 20 words per action taken. These words can be applied to structures and constructs and deal no damage. These words can be applied to a willing creature, leaving a permanent scar in their skin with your writings.

jutsu.name: firecracker Flash
jutsu.description: You take a bundle of flash firecrackers, and use your chakra to light the wicks of each one before throwing them in an arc in front of you. Creatures standing in front of you in a 15-foot-wide space must make a Wisdom Save, giving you advantage on your next attack against them and disadvantage on their next attack on a failed save before the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Mending
jutsu.description: This jutsu repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken chain link, two halves of a broken key, a torn cloak, or a leaking wineskin. As long as the break or tear is no larger than 1 foot, you mend it, leaving no trace of the former damage.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: String Light Formation
jutsu.description: You use your chakra to create a sealing formation stretching from yourself to a target creature you can see within range, in a straight line. Target creatures must make a Charisma saving throw, reducing both your movement speed and the targets to 0 on a failed save. This can be used with others targeting the same creature, increasing the Save DC by +1 for each additional user. At the end of the target creatures turn, they remake their save.

jutsu.name: Advanced Transformation
jutsu.description: An advanced form of the transformation technique. When cast you transform your body into a physical object such as a weapon or object of Small or Medium size. While transformed into an object you take on its physical properties and function as this object. If transformed into a weapon you also take on its weapon properties. Others can wield and use you as a weapon so long as you maintain concentration on this jutsu. You cannot transform into any object that separates into multiple pieces, disconnects or has multiple moving mechanical parts, such as an electric fan or a Safe. If you do, these additional pieces or functions do not work or cannot be moved by any means. While transformed you cannot move or act. You are aware of your immediate surroundings and can hear as normal, but are unable to cast jutsu or make attacks of any kind while transformed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. When Cast at B-Rank you can transform into large or smaller objects.

jutsu.name: Alarming Technique
jutsu.description: You set a chakra seal that expands 30 feet across the ground or surface it is placed on and it releases a very faint and mostly undetectable aura of chakra in a 30-foot cube. Until the Jutsu ends, an alarm alerts you whenever a creature touches or enters the Seals area. When you set the seal, you can designate creatures that don't set off the alarm. You can also choose to make the alarm mental or audible.

jutsu.name: Arms of Buddha
jutsu.description: You focus your chakra throughout your body, culminating in a golden buddha forming around you and making multiple strikes with its 100 arms. As an Action, on each of your turns, you can make a melee ninjutsu Attack against a creature no more than 10 feet away from you that you can seem dealing 4d8 bludgeoning damage on a hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase the damage of this jutsu by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of attacks you can make with this jutsu by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you gain a special reaction called Fists of Peace, which you can take when you take damage, reducing the damage taken by 5d8. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the damage this jutsu deals and the damage reduction of Fists of Peace by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Beast Imitating Art: Bat/Snake
jutsu.description: You inscribe into your scroll the image of a rodent with wings and a long body, an odd mix of a bat and serpent infusing chakra into it as it exits your scroll into a space within range, summoning the Ink Bat/Snake. The Ink Bat/Snake has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section. You may command the Ink Bat/Snake as a bonus action on your turn. The Ink Bat/Snake may take an appropriate reaction if able, such as attack of opportunity. The Ink Bat/Snake uses your Ninjutsu Attack bonus for its attacks and your Save DC for all of its effects save DC's.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Beast Imitating Art: Reptile
jutsu.description: You inscribe into your scroll the image of a Reptile with hooves and a long and stout head like a Deer, an odd mix of a Lizard and Deer infusing chakra into it as it exits your scroll into a space within range, summoning the Ink Reptile. The Ink Reptile has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section. You may command the Ink Reptile as a bonus action on your turn. The Ink Reptile may take an appropriate reaction if able, such as attack of opportunity. The Ink Bat/Snake uses your Ninjutsu Attack bonus for its attacks and your Save DC for all of its effects save DC's.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Beast Imitating Art: Pidgeon
jutsu.description: You take your scroll and begin to write a message of any length that you can conceivably write within a 10 minute or less time span. Once complete, the writings manifest into the form of a bird of your description and now carry themselves. You can also cast this jutsu targeting a message already written of 25 words or less. The bird you create has 1 hp and an AC of 15. You then specify a location that you have previously visited and a recipient who matches a general description. You can also then give the bird a letter, scroll, tag, or similarly small object to deliver to this creature. The construct travels for the duration of the jutsu towards the location, covering no more than 50 miles per 24 hours. When the bird arrives, it turns back into the message when provided a scroll to be placed on and delivers any packages to the creature you described. The bird will only release the object to the creature you specified or if killed. The creature dissipates into non-staining ink when the message is delivered or it is killed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and duration increases by 24 hours. When casting this jutsu at B-Rank or Higher, the bird becomes large in size and is capable of carrying two medium size creatures on its back.

jutsu.name: Beast Imitating Art: Rats
jutsu.description: When you cast this jutsu you draw a horde of rats into your scroll. After 1 minute the picture is finished and the rats come to life scattering around. After a 10-minute delay, you can make a Ninshou check. Based on your level of success, you become aware of a variety of things within a 1-mile radius. DC 10: You become aware of structures that are not hidden within range. This does not inform you of their specific location or size, only their general direction. DC 15: You become aware of any non-hidden creatures within range. This does not inform you of their specific location or even the type of creature they are, only their general direction. DC 20: You become aware of hidden structures within range. DC 25: You become aware of the size of Structures and the types of creatures within range. DC 30: You become aware of hidden creatures.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, increase the range of this jutsu to 2 miles. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the range of this jutsu to 3 miles.

jutsu.name: Beast Imitating Art: Retrieval Hawk
jutsu.description: You hurriedly draw an image of a hawk to retrieve something for you. The hawk breaks out of your scroll and attempts to retrieve an object no more than 10 pounds and bring it to a destination of your choosing within range. The hawk has a fly speed of 45ft, AC of 15 and 1 hp. The hawk must stay within the range of this jutsu from the caster at all times and does not require the caster's actions to command aside from its initial creation. The destination of delivery can be changed as a bonus action on the casters turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the hawks speed by 10 feet, and this jutsu's range by 30 feet.

jutsu.name: Body Camouflage
jutsu.description: You coat the body of a creature you touch in chakra and begin to imitate the color and texture of the area around them blending in like a chameleon. For the duration, they gain a Rank of Mastery to Stealth checks.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and you can target one additional creature for each rank and they gain the benefits of this jutsu as well. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, increase the bonus granted to each creature to two Ranks of Mastery.

jutsu.name: Body Flicker
jutsu.description: You gain a mastery of movement, allowing you to cover much greater distance in a shorter amount of time. Until the end of your turn, you gain a +20 bonus to your speed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the bonus to speed by +10. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, while moving you become invisible and only when ending your movement, declaring an attack or casting a jutsu do you become visible. Making an attack after ending invisibility from this jutsu does not grant advantage.

jutsu.name: Thunderous Screech
jutsu.description: You manifest chakra around your tongue and throat as you use it to vibrate and magnify all sound escaping your mouth. You then release a stunning scream in an attempt to incapacitate all that hear it. All creatures in a 30-foot cone originating from you must make a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d6 bludgeoning damage and are Deafened until the end of their next turn on a failed save or half as much on a successful save. Constructs and Structures have disadvantage on this save. Additionally, any traps such as explosives, trap doors or pressure plates that are within this jutsu's range are triggered.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, on a failed save affected creatures become Dazed. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the size of the cone by +10 Feet. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, on a failed save, affected creatures lose concentration on all jutsu they are concentrating on. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank or higher, Constructs and structures are treated as if they are Vulnerable to this jutsu's damage.

jutsu.name: Chakra Bolt
jutsu.description: You manifest a sphere of pure chakra which is fired at a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 force damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can select +1 additional creature to target with this jutsu's attack.

jutsu.name: Chakra Leaping
jutsu.description: You focus chakra into your legs, increasing your jumping strength astronomically. Until the end of this turn, Double your jumping height.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, the duration of this jutsu becomes 1 minute. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, the duration becomes 1 hour.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Chakra Mark
jutsu.description: You create a chakra seal and attempt to place it on a creature, object or structure you are able to touch. Object/Structure. As a bonus action, by touching the object or structure, you mark it. Creature. When you score a hit with a melee or ranged attack, you are able to mark a creature. This does not work if another creature, construct or structure intercepts the attacks damage. You are aware of a marked creature, object or structure while within 1 mile of it. You are only aware of the chakra seal and cannot discern who or what is marked and the general direction of it. When taking the Search skill action, you gain a +2 bonus to find or track a marked creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is Cast at C-Rank or higher, increase its duration to 10 minutes. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, this jutsu's duration becomes 1 Hour. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, the bonus to checks made to find or track a marked creature increases to +4. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, its duration becomes 8 Hours.

jutsu.name: Chakra Shield
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description: You manifest a swirling barrier of chakra around you protecting you from the triggering attack. You gain 12 Temporary Hit points which last until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the temporary hit points you gain by +4.

jutsu.name: Chakra Skin
jutsu.description: You coat yourself in a Protective aura of chakra, protecting you from damage. When you cast this jutsu, you lose the benefits of any Armor you are wearing, utilizing this Jutsu's AC calculation for its duration. Your AC becomes 13 + your Intelligence Modifier + Half of your proficiency Bonus. This jutsu ends if you dismiss it as a Bonus action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you gain 8 Temporary hit points, which can be replenished as a Bonus action on your turn. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the AC this Jutsu grants by +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the AC this Jutsu grants by +2, instead of +1.

jutsu.name: Darkvision
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into your eyes, allowing you the ability to see in the dark. For the duration, you 60ft of Darkvision.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you can select +1 creature other than yourself to benefit from this jutsu's effects. For every rank about C-Rank you cast this jutsu, increase the number of creatures you can bestow this jutsu's effects by +2.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Crown of Shining Stars
jutsu.description: You force your palms together before pointing them towards the sky, pulling down or manifesting star like constructs that encircle you in any description you desire. As part of casting this jutsu, you may select 4 spaces within 60 feet of you that you can see, firing a star into each. You may not select the same space more than once. Stars radiate 10-feet of bright light and an additional 10-feet of dim light, dissipating at the beginning of your next turn. Objects, creatures and structures in the selected spaces where a star is directed take 1d12 force damage. A creature, object or structure occupying multiple spaces in which a star has fallen, takes the damage of each of these stars no more than twice per casting. As an action on following turns, you may select two more spaces, sending stars to occupy them, after which they dissipate at the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase the number of spaces you may select by +2 when both casting and spending your action on following turns. If this jutsu is Cast at B-Rank or higher, when you cast this jutsu or spend your Action on subsequent turns you can choose to instead target up to 2 creatures within 60-feet that you can see, making a ranged ninjutsu attack, dealing 4d12 force damage on a hit. The space the target creature is in radiates light as if a star was directed to occupy the space. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you can increase the number of spaces selected or creatures that can be targeted by +2. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank its duration becomes Concentration, up to 10 minutes.

jutsu.name: Ink Clone
jutsu.components: HS, CM, CS, NT (Vial of Ink)
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into the ink as you then infuse a chakra seal into it. You conjure a clone of yourself made of ink. They look, sound and act as you describe. The cost of these clones cannot be reduced below half. An Ink clone has 1 Hit point and can be no farther than 90 feet from you. It can walk, talk and interact with things but it cannot declare an attack. This clone acts at the end of your turn. As a bonus action you can command the clone to attack. When you do it pretends to weave hand seals to cast a jutsu targeting a single creature within 60 feet of it. The target creature makes a Wisdom (Insight) Check vs your Ninjutsu Save DC. On a failure, they become distracted by the clones antics. A creature distracted in this manner grants the next attack targeting it advantage and they are treated as surprised against this attack.

jutsu.name: Lock/Release
jutsu.description: You place a chakra seal on a closed door, window, gate, chest, or other entryway, and it becomes locked for the duration. You and creatures you designate when the jutsu is used can open the object normally. You can also set a password that when spoken within 5 feet of the object releases the jutsu for 1 minute. This jutsu also works inversely allowing you to attempt to lock pick using your chakra alone. Make an Intelligence (Chakra Control) check vs the Locks DC as if you are picking a lock using a Security kit. If you fail using this jutsu, the lock jams.

jutsu.name: Oppressive Aura
jutsu.description: You begin to exert chakra into an oppressive aura around yourself with enough intensity to be seen by the naked eye and even move loose materials such as dirt, leaves, and water droplets. Creatures who are within 10 feet of you upon activation of this jutsu must make a Strength saving throw to not be pushed to their knees and become Prone for the duration, becoming unable to stand while inside the aura. Creatures knocked Prone by this jutsu remakes their saving throw at the beginning of their turn to end the effect. If you, or an affected creature moves outside of the aura, the jutsu's effect ends on them immediately. A creature affected by this jutsu, who ends or escapes its effects, cannot be affected again until the end of their next turn.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Mobility Bind
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark a person with the seal of binding. A creature within range, must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save the target creature is Restrained for the duration and gains 1 rank of Sealed. A creature Restrained by this jutsu remakes their save at the end of each of their turns.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of targets by +1. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, it can be cast as a Reaction, when you see another creature casting a Jutsu with a Mobility (M) component. When Cast this way you can only target one creature and the jutsu ends at the end of that creatures turn.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Block
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you make when you or a willing creature you can see are targeted or would make a saving throw against a jutsu with the Fuinjutsu keyword
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to manifest a seal of protection. When you or a willing creature would be the target of, or would make a saving throw or skill check against, any jutsu with the Fuinjutsu keyword you enact a defensive ward meant to protect until the beginning of your next turn. They gain a +2 bonus to their AC and saving throws against jutsu with the Fuinjutsu keyword & when they would make a skill check vs a jutsu with the Fuinjutsu keyword, they gain a +2 bonus to their Ninshou skill check.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase your AC and saving throw bonus to +3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank or higher, increase your AC and saving throw bonus to +4.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Fracturing Splinter
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark a person with the seal of descension and then shatter it causing a fracture in their internal balance of Yin and Yang. A creature you can see within range, must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save the target creature takes 2d8 Force damage and 2d8 Chakra damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and both damage types by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, on a failed save, affected creature gains 1 rank of Sealed. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of creatures you can target by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, on a failed save, an affected creature becomes unable to make Hand Seals (HS) until the beginning of their next turn.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Lock
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark an object with a seal of objection. You must select either an unattended object or a creature you can see within range who is holding an item. If an unattended item it is instantly bound to the surface it is currently resting on. If a creature holding an object, that creature must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save the object the target is holding is Sealed and bound to the nearest surface within range; be it the floor, a wall, or ceiling. For the jutsu's duration the item remains bound to that surface unable to be moved by any means. As an Action, a creature within 5 feet of the Sealed object may attempt to remove the seal by making an Intelligence (Ninshou) check vs your Ninjutsu save DC. On a successful save they break the seal freeing the item.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the range by 30 feet.

jutsu.name: Sensing Technique
jutsu.description: You are able to knead chakra in such a way that you can begin to sense other creature's chakra signatures clearly when you try. You can only cast this jutsu on your turn, and casting it does not cost action economy. When this jutsu is cast, for the duration, you gain access to a special action called Sense Chakra. This special action can be gained and used in addition to other special actions you gain and use. This special action counts as a Constitution and Wisdom based Skill-Action. Sense Chakra. You can make a Perception check using either Constitution or Wisdom vs the Passive Chakra control (Chakra control bonus + 10) of all creatures within 30 feet of you. On a success, you gain the benefit of the Chakra Sensing special sense against them for the duration until they either have 0 chakra or they make and succeed their Suppress Chakra skill action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the range of the Sense Chakra skill action by 30ft.

jutsu.name: Striking Shadow Snake
jutsu.description: You summon a snake under your command that that originates from a location of your choice on your body. These snakes can follow a multitude of commands; Shadow Snake Bite. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature you can see up to 20 feet away. On a hit, you deal 2d8 Poison damage they must make a Strength saving throw, being Grappled by your snakes on a failed save. A Grappled creature remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, breaking the grapple on a success. Snake Terrain. You can ignore difficult terrain if it originates from the ground, as your snakes helps you traverse the area.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage from Shadow Snake Bite by +1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of creatures you can target with Shadow Snake Bite, by +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the number of creatures you can target with Shadow Snake Bite, by +1.

jutsu.name: Shadow Shuriken Technique
jutsu.description: You throw a single weapon, when you do, you quickly multiply it, creating dozens copies of it while in transit. Creatures within this jutsu's range must make a Dexterity saving throw taking the thrown [Weapons damage] + 3d6 on a failed save, or half as much on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If you cast this jutsu at C-Rank or higher, you can choose to attach a paper bomb to the weapon before cloning it. If you do, change the damage type to Fire and all affected creatures make their saving throw with a -1 penalty. If using a paper bomb of Greater quality or higher, the damage die increases by 1 step, and constructs and structures treats this damage as if they were vulnerable to it. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher while using a paper bomb, the save penalty becomes -2 and creatures who fail are also Dazed. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank while using a paper bomb, the save penalty becomes -3 and if using a paper bomb of superior quality or higher, the damage die increases by 2 steps, and constructs and structures makes their saves at disadvantage, if any.

jutsu.name: Substitution Technique
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: You are able to more quickly utilize the substitution technique allowing you a swifter escape with smaller margins for error. When you would take damage from an attack you may increase your AC by +2 against the triggering attack and all subsequent attacks until the beginning of your next turn. If this bonus would cause the attack to miss, you may move up to half of your movement away. If you activate this jutsu as a result of making a saving throw, you must still make the saving throw even if your movement would move you to the outside of an effects range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase the AC bonus to +3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you may choose to attach a highly explosive paper tag to the object you are swapping places with. If you do, regardless if a creature hits you or not, you may move up to your full movement way, as the tag explodes, forcing all creatures within 20 feet of the space where you cast this jutsu to make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a success. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the AC bonus to +4. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the damage of the explosive tag by 2d6.

jutsu.name: Summoning Technique
jutsu.description: You must have formed a Blood Contract with a Sage Tribe found in the Summoning Jutsu section in order to successfully cast this jutsu. You do not gain a Blood contract with a sage tribe by learning this jutsu. Follow the rules laid out in that section. You summon a Sage Beast of a rank equal to the rank you cast this jutsu. If a creature refuses or cannot be summoned, only the technique's base chakra cost is spent. It appears where the user chooses. You can command it by spending your bonus action, once per turn. You can communicate with the creature and it will only listen to you in combat. You can direct it to perform the following actions: Attack (Unarmed, Weapon, or Cast a Jutsu Jutsu), Dash, Dodge, Help or Perform a Skill-Action using a skill it is proficient in.. When commanded, the creature can move up to its speed and it gains a Sage Action, which allows it to use any of its actions, abilities, or jutsu, once per command. The summoned creature must remain within 120 feet of the summoner. All sage creatures can speak common. Once you summon a sage creature, recasting this jutsu only allows you to summon or unsummon the same sage creature at no additional chakra cost. You can summon one unique sage creature using this jutsu per long rest.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, you summon a corresponding creature equal in level and rank to the Rank used upon activation.

jutsu.name: Beast Imitating Art: Predator
jutsu.description: You draw a picture of a Predator with fangs, claws and other primal markers of your choice, infusing chakra into it as it exits your scroll and standing in a space of your choice within range, summoning the Ink Predator. The Ink Predator has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section You may command the Ink Predator as a bonus action on your turn. The Ink Predator may take an appropriate reaction if able, such as attack of opportunity. The Ink Predator uses your Ninjutsu Attack bonus and Save for all of its attacks and effect save DC's
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Beast Senses
jutsu.description: You touch a willing beast. For the duration of the jutsu, while you are in contact with the willing beast, you gain the special senses or sensory features of the beast you touch for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you no longer need to be in contact with the beast you gained the special senses from, for the whole duration.

jutsu.name: Chakra Tentacles
jutsu.description: You create squirming tentacles of chakra that fill a 20-foot cube on a surface that you can see within range. When a creature enters the affected area for the first time or starts its turn there, they must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they take 3d6 bludgeoning damage and are Restrained for the duration. A creature Restrained by this jutsu takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage at the beginning of each of its turns. A creature Restrained by this jutsu can use its action to remake it's saving throw. On a success, it free's itself.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 the damage by 1d6 and the cube size by 5ft.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Darkness
jutsu.description: You imbue your chakra seal to conjure a field of darkness. You throw your seal at a point you choose within range. The chakra-based darkness spreads from the seal, to fill a 15-foot radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with Darkvision or Chakra Sight can't see through this darkness, and light created using an effect or jutsu of C-Rank or lower cannot illuminate it. If the point you choose is on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the darkness emanates from it and moves with it. If any of this jutsu's area overlaps with an area of light created by a jutsu of B-Rank or higher this darkness is dispelled.

jutsu.name: Lion Mane: Needle Jizo
jutsu.description: You activate the roots of your hair causing your hair to grow at a heightened rate and granting you full control over your hairs movements. For the duration of this jutsu you can use the following abilities granted by this jutsu. 1 Action. Wrap. You command your hair to lash out grabbing a creature you can see within 15 feet of you. Make a melee ninjutsu attack. On a success, you restrain them. A Restrained creature makes strength saving throw, escaping on a success. On your turn, as a Bonus action, you can move the Restrained creature anywhere within 15 feet of you as if you were dragging them. 1 Reaction. Needle Cap. As a reaction to taking damage your hair wraps around your body and harden with spiked, needle-like hair armor. Each time the triggering creature and each creature thereafter makes a melee attack against you while within 10 feet of you, they take 3d6 piercing damage, until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage of Needle Cap by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of creatures you can target with Wrap by +2 and creatures who take damage a result of Needle Cap gains a rank of Bleed. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the range of Wrap to 30 feet and Needle Cap now affects all creature within a 10-foot radius centered on you each time you are targeted by a melee attack.

jutsu.name: Hiding in Shadow Technique
jutsu.description: As a part of the requirements to cast and maintain this jutsu a creature or object within range must be casting a shadow. You select a creature, structure or objects shadow within range and slip inside of it becoming Unseen for the duration. If a creature would attempt to search for you, they take a -4 penalty to those checks. While you are hidden in a creatures shadow, you can still be damaged by effects that would affect the space they are in. For the duration of this jutsu, you can see and hear from the shadow but cannot act, speak, or move. When the creatures shadow moves, you move along with it. You may end this jutsu early as a bonus action expelling yourself from the shadow appearing in the closest space near the target that can hold you. If the target would lose their shadow by any means, this jutsu immediately ends as you appear in the closes space near the target that can hold you.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Sealing Weapon
jutsu.description: You touch a weapon an imbue it with your chakra and it begins to float within range and does so for the duration or until you dismiss this jutsu. When you cast this jutsu you can move the weapon 20 feet an make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature within 5 feet of it. On a hit, the target takes the 2d8 of the weapon's damage type. As a bonus action on your turn, you can move the weapon up to 20 feet and repeat the attack against a creature within 5 feet of it. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, on a hit the affected creature must make a Charisma save, gaining 1 rank of Sealed. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, this jutsu has a +1 bonus to its critical threat range and the affected creature makes their saving throw at disadvantage. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, on a critical hit target gains 5 ranks of Sealed on a failed save

jutsu.name: Rasengan
jutsu.description: You collect chakra into your hand generating a powerful sphere of spiraling chakra to strike an enemy with. Manifesting this sphere of spiraling and spinning chakra requires your full focus. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature within range. On a hit, you deal 5d8 force damage and the target makes a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they are knocked back 30ft becoming Dazed and Concussed. This jutsu only ends on a successful hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 3d8 and the knock back distance by 10 feet. If this Jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, its casting time becomes 1 Action and you may also add a nature release keyword, changing this jutsu's damage type to match the nature release you currently can use. You gain the following benefits depending on the Nature Release chosen: Earth: The target takes earth damage gains the Weakened condition. Wind: The Rasengan gains a range of 60 feet and you can instead make a ranged ninjutsu attack targeting a creature within that range. On a hit, the target takes wind damage and the Rasengan expands. All Creatures, except the original target, in a 10-foot radius centered on the original target must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking the damage of this jutsu as well on a failed save. Fire: The target takes fire damage and 2 ranks of Burn, and all creatures in a 30-foot cone behind the target creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 1 rank of Burn on a failed save. Water: The target creature takes cold damage and makes their saving throw at disadvantage. On a failed save, they are knocked back twice the distance, taking falling damage if they hit a solid surface. Lightning: The target takes lightning damage, the attack has advantage and on a failed save, the gain 2 ranks of Shocked.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Splinter
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark a person with the seal of prevention and then shatter it causing a fracture in their internal balance of Yin and Yang. A creature you can see within range, must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save the target creature takes 3d8 Chakra damage, gains 1 rank of Sealed and is unable to make Hand Seals (HS) until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is Cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of creatures you can target by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, increase the ranks of Sealed to 2. If this jutsu is Cast at S-Rank, increase the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Chakra Dispel
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to end a jutsu with the seal of Dispis. Choose any creature, object, or chakra-based effect you can see as you mark it with your chakra seal. You then Dispel any Ninjutsu or Genjutsu currently affecting it of a rank less than the rank this jutsu was cast at. If the target has ranks of Sealed, Sealed you can remove up to two ranks with this jutsu's casting. If the Jutsu is of a rank equal to this jutsu, you must make a Ninshou skill check vs the DC of the jutsu effect you are targeting. If the jutsu is of a rank higher than this jutsu, you make the check at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Circle of Defiance
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to end a jutsu with the seal of resistance. For this jutsu's duration, as a bonus action you may select one willing creature within range. That creature gains 2d8 temporary hit points, until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the amount of temporary hit points by 1d8 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Hex
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark a creature you can touch with the seal of pestilence. You do not need to spend chakra to maintain Concentration on this jutsu. You touch a creature, and that creature must make a Charisma saving throw, gaining the special Hexed condition for this jutsu's duration on a failed save. When a creature becomes Hexed, select which hex they are afflicted with as part of the hex. A Hexed creature is treated as having 1 rank of Sealed for effects that interact with it. Disable. Choose one Ability Score. While cursed, the target has disadvantage on ability checks, skill checks and saving throws made with that ability score. Death. At the beginning of a cursed creatures turn, they remake their saving throw, taking 3d10 necrotic damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. This increases by 1d10 for every rank about C-Rank. Unluck. While cursed, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls against you. Hopelessness. A Cursed creature is overwhelmed with despair for the duration. During this time, it can't attack or target any creature with harmful abilities, jutsu or attacks. Stolen Sense. While cursed, the target loses all special senses it has. Variable Curse. At the GM discretion, you may choose an alternative curse effect, but it should be no more powerful than those described above. The DM has final say on such a curses effect.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you can remove concentration on this jutsu, if you do, its duration becomes 10 minutes. If you choose maintain concentration, its duration becomes 24 hours. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu has a duration of Permanent (Until dispelled) if using any of the above curse effects.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Inanimate Puppet
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark an object you can see with the seal of false life. This jutsu creates false life. A creature from nothingness. A servant formed from the world around you. Choose a pile of rocks, dried bones, leaves, wood or any other inanimate objects that you can reach while casting this jutsu, and summon 1 Inanimate Puppet found in the Summon Stat Blocks section. You can spend an additional 6 Chakra to summon 1 additional Inanimate Puppet, up to a max of 4 puppets in total. You can command all of your Inanimate Puppets as a bonus action. You can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one. Alternatively, you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature only defends itself against hostile creatures. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Mark of Finding
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark yourself with the seal of clairvoyance. You do not need to spend chakra to maintain Concentration on this jutsu. When you cast this jutsu select one creature or location that you have seen or can clearly describe. When you do for the duration of this jutsu, you know the General direction of this creature or location so long as it is within your Jutsu's radius. This seal does not give you absolute knowledge on the creatures or locations, coordinates, but only what direction they are in relation to you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the radius of this jutsu by 1 Mile

jutsu.name: Shadow Clone Technique
jutsu.description: An advanced version of the Clone Genjutsu that creates a solid clone using only chakra called a Shadow Clone. When a Shadow Clone is killed, it sends its most recent experiences within the last minute as thoughts and images to its Summoner. A creature looking at a Shadow Clone with chakra sight cannot tell that it is not a real person unless otherwise specified. When this jutsu is cast, by spending 6 chakra, you summon one Clone. You can spend 4 additional chakra to summon 1 additional Clone. You can spend 4 additional chakra in this way to summon additional Clones up to 3 times per casting. All Shadow Clones act at once and attempt to perform the same command given. If commanded to perform the help action, they can only help the caster. Shadow Clones have non-enhanced versions of your weapons. Weapons your Shadow Clone is summoned with that has the ammunition property cannot be given to anyone. Shadow Clones summoned outside of combat, can exist up to 1 mile away. If they would enter combat, they are immediately dispelled. Casting this jutsu while you have an active Clone dispels all currently active Clones. If this jutsu is cast while out of combat, its duration instead becomes 1 hour. If combat would begin, their duration shifts to 1 minute.
jutsu.higherLevels: . For each rank above C-Rank, increase the number of clones you can create with this jutsu by +1. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of Jutsu Slots your Clones have by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the number of Jutsu Slots your Clones have by +1 and for every 2 Shadow Clones you have active at once, increase your AC by +1.

jutsu.name: Bestial Art: Hunter
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark yourself with the seal of wolves. Your voice, figure, and temperament becomes bestial in nature. You grow fur of any color of your choice covering your arms, and your hands become large claws with ironlike nails. For this jutsu's duration, you gain the following benefits; Your Strength Score becomes 22 or your Dexterity becomes 18 (your choice). Your unarmed damage die becomes 2d8 Slashing damage and can use whichever ability score was modified by this jutsu as the ability modifier for your unarmed attack calculations. You gain a +20 bonus to movement speed. Attacks of Opportunity you make are at advantage. When you take the attack action, you can make two attacks instead of one, if you cannot already. If you already can, then you instead make one additional unarmed attack.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you cannot be seen by Chakra Sight nor can you be sensed by effects that can sense Chakra. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, its duration becomes 1 minute, without the need for Concentration.

jutsu.name: Kagura's Mind Eye
jutsu.description: You force open your minds 3rd Eye greatly increasing your perceptive abilities 10-fold. This jutsu does not cost chakra to maintain concentration. When this jutsu is cast, for the duration, you gain access to the Third Eye Opening ability. This counts as a Constitution and Wisdom based Skill-Action. Third Eye Opening. As a Bonus action, you open your third eye gaining 120ft of Chakra sight, Chakra Sensing and the following benefits; You can identify if a creature, object or structure has been affected by a jutsu within the last 24 hours. Advantage on the See Through lies skill action. You can see if chakra has been used within the past 24 hours and can associate it with a creature if you have sensed them before. You can track creatures exclusively by their chakra alone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, increase the range of Third Eye Opening's special senses to 1-Mile and the duration of this jutsu becomes Concentration, up to 10 minutes. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, it no longer requires concentration.

jutsu.name: Life Transference
jutsu.description: You sacrifice some of your health to mend other creatures' injuries. You take 4d8 necrotic damage which can't be reduced in any way, and one creature you can reach regains a number of hit points equal to twice the necrotic damage you take.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the necrotic damage you take by 2d8.

jutsu.name: Non-detection
jutsu.description: For the duration, you suppress a creatures chakra which erases their presence and hides them from other Sensory jutsu. The target must be a willing creature or an object. The target can't be sensed or seen by the Chakra Sight or Chakra Sensing special sense as a result of jutsu cast at an equal rank or lower. If a creature would gain either of these senses as a result of a feature or trait, this jutsu only works on creatures who is of a level equal or lower than the casters.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, this jutsu can now affect structures and small locations no larger than 30 feet by 30 feet. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, it can affect locations no larger than 100 feet by 100 feet.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Banishing Seal
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to send them away with the seal of banishment. Choose one creature you can see within range as you force them to make a Charisma saving throw or be sent to a pocket dimension of your creation. On a failed save they are banished to this pocket dimension. While banished, they are Incapacitated and unaware of things occurring in the current dimension. When this jutsu ends, they are summoned back into the same space they were originally banished from and gain 2 ranks of Sealed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Circle of Authority
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark yourself with the seal of domination. You then exude a 20-foot radius sphere of authority that other creatures must abide by. This radius follows you. For this jutsu's duration, anytime a hostile creature in this jutsu's radius would make a saving throw against a jutsu you or an allied creature cast, they immediately take a -2 penalty to their roll.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the radius by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Commune
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark yourself with the seal of relation. You reach out into the void. Calling upon the spirit of a single deceased spirit, with whom you have a connection with, be it ancestral, legacy, ideals, historical, or antagonistic. The DM allow other forms of relation as well. You summon the spirit to the material plane and ask it three questions that can be answered with a yes or no. You must ask your questions before the jutsu ends. You the most correct answer possible from to the spirits knowledge. The spirit is not omniscient, so you may receive unclear or uncertain answers, if a question lies beyond the spirits knowledge. In a case where a one-word answer could be misleading or contrary to the spirits interests, the DM may offer a short phrase as an answer instead. A spirit cannot be summoned this way more than once per month.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Curse of the Prey
jutsu.description: You attempt to impose the qualities of a single weak bestial creature. Select one creature within your reach. The target must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, they gain one of the following bestial qualities. Swallows Endurance: The creatures bones begin to feel hollow and brittle as their heart begins to beat furiously as their blood begins to thin. For the duration, they have a -2 penalty on all constitution saving throws, skill checks and ability checks. Additionally, they cannot take the Dash Action and cannot gain additional speed by any means. Mites Strength: The creatures muscles begin to grow weak and unable to carry weight. They gain a -2 Penalty to their Strength saving throws and melee attacks made. Sloth's Grace: The creatures reflexes are shot as they become unable to move gracefully or even carry themselves correctly. They gain a -2 penalty to their Dexterity saving throws and ability checks and ranged attacks made. They also spend their full movement standing from Prone. Rhinoceros Splendor: The creatures vision, auditory perception and sense of smell becomes dull and weak as they gain a -2 Penalty to their Wisdom ability checks and saving throws. Their visual range is cut in half and they cannot hear things more than 30 feet away from them. Turkey's Cunning: The creatures ability to think through complex matters and concepts becomes muddled. They find it hard to remember simple Hand Seals, colors and even their left from their right. They gain a -2 Penalty to their intelligence saving throws and ability checks. They cannot concentrate on more than 1 Jutsu, and the Base Concentration check DC becomes 17.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Dimensional Pocket
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to tear open a rift in the fabric of reality, marking out a small space in the void for yourself with the seal of distortion. As a part of the casting of this jutsu, you must mark a representative space no larger than a 20-foot cube with chakra seals, doing this dictates the exact size of your pocket dimension. If this jutsu casting time is interrupted, the jutsu ends and you must restart the process from scratch. After successfully casting this jutsu, you create a room in the void, unable to accessed without jutsu that can traverse through dimensions or teleport ignoring space all together. This room is one of your design and can look however you describe it. While inside this dimension, you are no longer on the material plane. You are unaware of what's going on, on the material plane. You cannot communicate with or locate people on the material plane. If you exit your room, stepping into the void, you are instantly shunted to a random location on the material plane. This can be anywhere from another country, to the bottom of the ocean, or even 10,000 feet in the sky. This room produces no sound and cannot be found by normal means. You can freely access your room, by spending 10 minutes weaving hand seals and materializing a gate which takes you directly to this room. The room has 4 walls, and can only ever be 1 floor. It has a single door, which cannot be locked by normal means, which leads to a short bridge feeding into a chakra gate which takes you back to the material plane from the exact location you entered to your room from originally.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Displacement Sealing Trap
jutsu.description: You draw a circle up to a 10-foot diameter circle on the ground inscribed with shinobi sigils that link your location to another location, in which you previously cast this jutsu. You must have cast this jutsu, previously marking the space on the ground where the teleportation effect sends creatures affected by this jutsu. Only you or a trigger you set can trigger this sealing circle. Once activated all creatures in the circle are immediately teleported to the exact location within 10 feet of its exact coordinates.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Divination Technique
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to peer through the fabric of time, diving future events with the seal of perception. You must ask a single question concerning a specific goal, event or activity to occur within 7 days. The DM offers as truthful a reply as possible. The reply might be a short phrase, a cryptic rhyme or an omen. You hear the aforementioned in your own voice as if you are speaking to a future version of yourself. This jutsu doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of certain jutsu, or the loss or gain of a companion. You cannot peer into the future this way more than once per week.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Gift of the Apex
jutsu.description: You begin to gain qualities of a single bestial creature. Granting you chakra projections that enhance your physical traits. Select one of the following beasts to gain traits from. Bears Endurance: You gain advantage on constitution saving throws and the Kuma Fortitude reaction. Kuma Fortitude. As a reaction to making a saving throw to resist a Physical, Elemental or Sensory condition, your bestial projection protects you from the worst of it. Select one condition type that can have more than 1 rank and you reduce the number of ranks you would gain of that condition type, by 1. Bull's Strength: You gain advantage on Strength saving throws and the Bulls Rush attack as you grow chakra construct horns. Bulls Rush. In place of an attack made as part of the attack action, you attempt to gore an enemy. Make an unarmed attack against a creature within 5 feet of you dealing 2d12 + Strength Piercing damage. They also have to make a Strength saving throw vs the damage result, being knocked Prone on a failure. Cat's Grace: You gain advantage on Dexterity Saving Throws and feline claws made of chakra letting you perform the Cats Pounce attack. Cats Pounce. When you would take the attack action, you can use this attack before or after one of your normal unarmed attacks are made, once per turn. Make an unarmed attack that deals 2d8 + your Dexterity modifier in slashing damage. On a hit the target must also make a Dexterity saving throw vs the damage result, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failure Eagle's Splendor: You gain advantage on Wisdom Saving Throws and the Eagle Eye ability. Eagle Eye. As a bonus action, you can perform the Search skill action, viewing things in full clarity up to 500 feet away as long as there are no obstructions as if you were only 1 foot away from it Fox's Cunning: You gain advantage on Intelligence Saving Throws and can concentrate on one additional jutsu. Lions Presence: You gain advantage on Charisma Saving Throws and the Tora Growl ability. Tora Growl. As part of attempting to perform the Coerce, Demoralize, or Make an Impression skill actions you cannot make them at disadvantage and affected creatures making contested checks make their checks with a -2 penalty

jutsu.name: Summoning: Rashomon
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature would take damage or make a saving throw.
jutsu.description: You bite your finger drawing blood before using it as a catalyst to summon Rashomon, 60 feet tall, 30 Feet wide, and 5 feet thick gate made of iron, brick, chakra and other materials. This wall is erected standing straight upward. If you are in an area that cannot fit Rashomon, this jutsu will fail. When summoned, Rashomon intercepts all damage you or an allied creature in range would take. Rashomon has 100 Hit points and is resistant to all damage. Rashomon has 25 AC and remains where it was summoned for 1 minute or its hit points are reduced to 0. If Rashomon's Hit points are reduced to 0 it disappears and cannot be summoned again until you complete a long rest.

jutsu.name: Tobirama's Private Sanctum
jutsu.description: You make an area within range secure. This area is a cube that can be as small as 5 feet to as large as 100 feet on each side. This jutsu lasts for the duration, or until you use an action to dismiss it. When you cast this jutsu, you decide what sort of security it provides, choosing no more than 2 of the following; Sound can't pass through the barrier at the edge of the warded area. The barrier of the warded area appears dark and foggy, preventing vision (including Darkvision) through it. Sensors created by Jutsu with the Sensory Keyword can't appear inside the protected area or pass through the barrier at its perimeter. Nothing can teleport into or out of the warded area. Dimensional travel is blocked within the warded area.

jutsu.name: Warding Seal
jutsu.description: When you cast this jutsu, you inscribe a harmful seal either on a surface (such as a section of floor, a wall, or a table) or within an object that can be closed to conceal the seal (such as a book, a scroll, or a treasure chest). If you choose a surface, the seal can cover an area of the surface no larger than 10 feet in diameter. If you choose an object, that object must remain in its place; if the object is moved more than 10 feet from where you cast this jutsu, the seal is broken and this jutsu ends without being triggered. The seal is nearly invisible, requiring an Investigation or Ninshou check vs your ninjutsu save DC to find it. You decide what triggers the seal when you cast the jutsu. For seals inscribed on a surface, the most typical triggers include touching or stepping on the seal, removing another object covering it, approaching within a certain distance of it, or manipulating the object that holds it. You can further refine the trigger so the jutsu is activated only under certain circumstances or according to a creature's physical characteristics (such as height or weight). You can also specify creatures that don't trigger the seal, such as those who say a certain password. When you inscribe the seal, you can store a Ninjutsu or Genjutsu of B-Rank or lower in the seal by casting it as part of creating the seal. The jutsu must target a single creature or an area. The jutsu being stored has no immediate effect when cast in this way. When the seal is triggered, the stored jutsu is cast. If the jutsu has a target, it targets the creature that triggered the seal. If the jutsu affects an area, the area is centered on that creature. If the jutsu summons hostile creatures or creates harmful objects or traps, they appear as close as possible to the intrude and attack it. If the jutsu requires concentration, it lasts until the end of its full duration. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the rank of a Sealed Jutsu by 1. (B>A>S)

jutsu.name: Beast Imitating Art: Oni Twins
jutsu.description: You draw a picture of two Oni, Demons of your description. Infusing chakra into it as it exits your scroll and standing next to you. You summon two construct Ink Oni's. The Ink Oni's has the following Statistics using your Ninjutsu attack bonus and Save DC for anything that requires an attack or saving throw; You may command both Ink Oni's as a bonus action on your turn. Each Ink Oni may be commanded to perform different actions. The Ink Oni's may take an appropriate bonus actions or reactions if able.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of Oni's you summon by +1.

jutsu.name: Excellent Chakra Spears
jutsu.description: You create eight spears of highly condensed chakra that you then launch simultaneously. All creatures in a 60-foot cone originating from you, must make a Dexterity Saving throw, taking 9d6 damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.

jutsu.name: Flying Thunder God - Flash
jutsu.description: In order to cast this jutsu you must have a creature marked with the Sealing Art: Chakra Seal ninjutsu, that you cast. You telepathically become aware of all creatures, objects and structures marked with Sealing Art: Chakra Seal and choose which one you want to focus on. By spending 10 feet of your remaining movement on your turn, you teleport into a space adjacent to the creatures, object or structure marked, as close as possible to the actual seals placement, so long as they are within 1 mile of you. This teleportation happens before any other effect is applied. Once per turn, if you would teleport within 5 feet of a hostile creature, you have advantage on the next attack roll made against the creature until the end of your next turn. You can teleport this way to a seal twice, after which, the seal is dispelled.

jutsu.name: Flying Thunder God - Barrier
jutsu.castingTime: Reaction, which you take when a creature marked with the Sealed Art: Chakra Seal ninjutsu casts a jutsu that deals damage with an effect that is visible.
jutsu.description: In order to cast this jutsu you must have a creature marked with the Sealing Art: Chakra Seal ninjutsu, that you cast. You telepathically become aware of all creatures, objects and structures marked with Sealing Art: Chakra Seal and you reshape the seal on the triggering creature, in an attempt to divert the harmful effect. Initiate a Clash check with the triggering creature. On a success, you teleport the harmful effect to another marked creature, object or structure within 1 mile of you. The target seal that had the harmful effect teleported to it, is dispelled. On a failure, you do not suffer the effects of a failed clash.

jutsu.name: Flying Thunder God - Reverse Seal Summoning
jutsu.description: In order to cast this jutsu you must have a creature, object or structure marked with the Sealing Art: Chakra Seal ninjutsu, that you cast. You select up to 6 willing creatures with a chakra seal, meant as a companion for the Sealing Art: Chakra Seal. As part of casting this jutsu, you and all marked creatures within 10 feet of you, teleports to the creature, object or structure marked with the Sealing Art: Chakra Seal so long as it is no more than 10 miles away. You and each creature teleport, and begin occupying spaces within 15 feet of actual seals placement. The target seal you teleported to is then dispelled.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, reduce the casting time of this jutsu down to 1 Action.

jutsu.name: Forcecage
jutsu.description: You impart a scroll with your chakra seal, which conjures an immobile, cube shaped prison composed of chakra, which springs into existence, surrounding a point you choose within range. The prison can be a cage or box, choose one. Cage. The Cage forms a prison with walls 20-feet long and 10 feet tall on each side, but the top and bottom of the prison is solid. The cage has bars with a 1-inch gap that allows vision within the prison. Box. The box is a completely enclosed area with walls 10-feet long and 10 feet tall on each side, with no way to see inside. While inside creatures have total cover and cannot be harmed from outside effects. Regardless of the shape of the prison, it has the same statistics; Each wall has an AC of 10, 15 DR, and 120 Hit points. Each wall has resistance to damage, unless it's the result of a jutsu. Creatures within the parameter of the prison cannot teleport without making a Charisma saving throw vs your Ninjutsu save DC. This jutsu cannot be dispelled by effects, from effects of a rank lower than S-Rank.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, hit points by 20.

jutsu.name: Negative Emotion Sensing
jutsu.description: Description: This is a perfected sensory ninjutsu based on the principles from "Kagura's Mind Eye". This jutsu digs further instead targeting a creature's emotions to track and keep notice of them from up to 100 feet away. You are able to immediately tell the emotional state or intentions of a creature within range. A Creature who attempts to hide these emotions must make a Deception check against your Ninjutsu Save DC. You can sense discomfort, enjoyment, anger, and even killing intent.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Tethered Essence
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into a chakra seal as you attempt to mark two creatures (excluding yourself) with the seal of mirrors. Select two creature you can see within range. Each creature must make a Charisma Saving throw. They make this save at disadvantage if they are within 30 feet of each other. Either creature can willingly fail the save. If either creature saves, the jutsu has no effect. If both saves fail, the creatures are linked for the duration, regardless of the distance between them. When damage is dealt to one of them, the same damage is dealt to the other one. If hit points are restored to one of them, the same number of hit points are restored to the other one. If either of the tethered creatures is reduced to 0 hit points, the jutsu ends on both. If the jutsu ends on one creature, it ends on both.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Tobirama's Sword
jutsu.description: You conjure a sword-shaped place of spatial distortion that hovers within range. It lasts for the duration. When the sword appears, you make a melee ninjutsu attack against a target of your choice within 5 feet of the sword. On a hit, the target takes 10d6 force damage and gains 1 rank of Sealed. Until the jutsu ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to move the sword up to 60 feet to a spot you can see and repeat this attack against the same target or a different one. If this jutsu scores a critical hit, the target instead gains 5 ranks of Sealed.

jutsu.name: Touch of Death
jutsu.description: You come close and begin to touch a willing creature you can reach. This touch can be in the form of a grab, kiss, or hug. When you do, you immediately become aware of all Nature affinities the creature has if any. The target creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, you begin to suck the life directly from them, dealing 12d6 necrotic damage or half on a success. You regain hit points equal to the amount of damage done. If you reduce a creatures hit points to 0 as a result of this jutsu they immediately die and are unable to be revived by any means. If you attempt to cast this jutsu on an unwilling creature, you make a melee ninjutsu attack. On a hit, you then attempt to drain their chakra as normal. Additionally, if you reduce a creatures Hit points to 0 as a result of this jutsu, you are temporarily able to steal their nature release from them, if they have any. Until you complete a long rest, you randomly gain one of the target creatures nature release and one random jutsu of C-Rank or lower, that requires that nature release that they knew. You cannot learn additional jutsu of the stolen nature release unless you already have the chosen nature affinity. If you would gain another nature release as a result of this jutsu, you instead replace the previous nature release and jutsu known.

jutsu.name: Chakra Distortion Field
jutsu.description: A 10-foot radius invisible sphere of chakra distortion. This area is divorced from chakra that makes up the world. Within the sphere, Ninjutsu or Genjutsu can't be cast, and chakra items become mundane. Until the jutsu ends, the sphere moves with you, centered on you. Ninjutsu, Genjutsu and other chakra-based effects except those created by an S-Ranked Artifact or Class Mod are suppressed in the sphere and can't protrude into it. Chakra spent to cast a suppressed jutsu is lost. While an effect is suppressed, it cannot take effect, but the time it spends suppressed counts against its duration. Targeted Effects. Jutsu and other chakra effects such as Flame bolt or Doubled Pain, that target a creature or an object in the sphere have no effect on that target. Areas of Chakra. The area of another jutsu or chakra effect such as fireball, can't extend into the sphere. If the sphere overlaps an area of chakra, the part of the area that is covered by the sphere is suppressed. For example, the winds created by Wall of wind are suppressed within the sphere, creating a gap in the wall if the overlap is large enough. Jutsu. Any active jutsu or other chakra effect on a creature or an object in the sphere is suppressed while the creature or object is in it. Chakra-Enhanced items. The properties and abilities of chakra items are suppressed in the sphere. For example, a +1 Katana in the sphere functions as a non-chakra enhanced katana.

jutsu.name: Plane Shift
jutsu.description: You and up to eight willing creatures who are touching each other are transported to a different location that you've placed a Chakra seal prior or have at least been to once before, if on another dimensional space. If another dimensional space, you are teleported to random coordinates someone on the given plane.

jutsu.name: Reaper Death Seal
jutsu.description: You summon the reaper of souls. Along with casting this jutsu you target a Restrained or Incapacitated creature within range. The reaper of death reaches through you, using your soul as a glove reaching into the grabbed creature and pulls their souls out Immediately killing them. The user of this jutsu also dies after the jutsu has concluded both of their souls being Sealed into the belly of the reaper of souls. Neither creature killed as a result of this jutsu can be revived by any means.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Gate of the Afterlife
jutsu.description: You and all casters infuse chakra into chakra seals as you attempt to tear open the gates of hell with the seal of the ever after. For 8 Hours a day, for 1 Year, you and no less than 10 Casters, work together adding, reinforcing and manifesting chakra seals designed to open a portal to the afterlife. If this casting is interrupted by having chakra seals destroyed or a caster dying, the jutsu fails having to be recast from scratch. Once completed, this jutsu creates a 2-way portal to the afterlife. Living creatures who pass through this gate into the world of the afterlife can remain there for no longer than a number of hours, equal to their level. If they remain any longer their material bodies disintegrate as only their souls remain, unable to cross back over onto the material plan as a living creature ever again. A Spirit who finds this gateway, can cross over into the material plane and can possess any creature of equal or lower level than they were in life. If the creature attempts to possess a creature of lower level than it, then it completely dominates their mind and body, kicking out their spirit. The spirit has access to all features, jutsu and abilities they had access to in life and any jutsu, features and abilities the original body had access too. The spirit that was kick out of that body is sucked into the afterlife, taking the place of that escaped Spirit. If the creature attempts to possess a creature of equal or higher level than it, then the target of possession makes a Charisma save vs the Level + Proficiency of the creature. On a success, they resist. On a failure, their spirits are kicked out of their body.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Impure World Destruction
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into chakra seals as you attempt to tear into the underworld with the seal of the consecration. You summon a coffin to act as a gateway to the underworld. The coffin springs open, as shadow tendril-like hands launch forward piercing the body a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack. On a hit, you deal 10d10 necrotic damage. If this jutsu reduces a creature to 0 Hit points, their soul is torn from their body as it is Sealed within the coffin. Moving forward, until there is not a soul bound to the coffin, whenever you would cast this jutsu, you instead summon an undead construct of the creature you originally killed using this jutsu. The construct acts at the end of your turn, and follows your command. It can speak freely but cannot willingly act in a way counter to any action you provide it. The construct has half as many hit points it had in life, can cast jutsu and use clan features it had in life using your chakra instead. A construct summoned this way can only remain summoned for 1 minute before being pulled back into the coffin at the end of the duration to be saved for later use. A construct that is killed while summoned does not return to the coffin, instead relinquishing the soul that was bound to it.

jutsu.name: Sealing Art: Void
jutsu.description: You infuse chakra into chakra seals as you attempt to tear into the underworld with the seal of the emptiness. You select a 30-foot radius sphere within range, creating a sphere of emptiness, where the material plane and the space inside the sphere are of different dimensional make ups. For the jutsu's duration, the sphere and any place within 100 feet of it are difficult terrain, and non-Chakra enhanced objects fully inside the sphere are shunted to the space in-between dimensions if they aren't being worn or carried. When the sphere appears and at the start of each of your turns, until the jutsu ends, unsecured objects within 100 feet of the sphere are pulled towards the spheres center, ending in an unoccupied space as close to the center as possible. A creature that starts its turn within 100 feet of the sphere must make a Charisma saving throw or be pulled straight towards the spheres center, ending in an unoccupied space as close as possible to the center. A creature that enters the sphere for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there takes 10d8 force damage and is Restrained until it is no longer in the sphere. If the sphere is in the air, the Restrained creature hovers inside the sphere. A creature can use its action to make a strength saving throw, ending this Restrained condition on itself or another creature in the sphere that it can reach.
