A creature who is reduced to 0 hit points by this jutsu is shunted into the space in-between dimensions, along with any items it was wearing or carrying.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Virtue
jutsu.description: You touch one willing creature, imbuing it with vitality. If the target has at least 1 hit point, it gains 4 temporary hit points. These temporary hit points are lost at the end of the creature's next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: This Jutsu's strength increases as you increase in level. The temporary hit points gained increases by +2 at 5th Level (6), 11th level (8), 17th level (10)

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Acid Armor
jutsu.description: You manifest acidic chakra in the form of a highly dangerous aura of chakra that intercepts attacks for you and harms those who would try to touch you. You gain 10 temporary hit points. Each time a creature deals damage to you with a melee attack, they take 6 acid damage while you have temporary hit points granted by this jutsu. Additionally, while you have temporary hit points granted by this jutsu, you can spend your Bonus action to perform an Acid Tail attack. Acid Tail. Make one melee ninjutsu attack. Compare the result of your attack against all creatures in a 15-foot cone, originating from you. Each affected creature takes 2d6 + 6 acid damage and must make a Constitution Saving throw being Corroded on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the temporary hit points by 5 and the acid damage dealt by the armor by 3 and the Acid Tail by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Corroding Blast
jutsu.description: You manifest acidic chakra in the form of a powerful beam meant to melt through everything in its path. All creatures in a 30-foot long, 5-foot-wide line originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, affected creatures become Corroded, takes 3d6 Necrotic or Acid damage (Your choice) and at the beginning of an affected creature's next turn, they take 3d4 damage of the same type. Constructs and structures made of earth, metal or wood are treated as if they are vulnerable to this jutsu's damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the initial damage by 1d6 and the lingering damage by 1d4. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can change this jutsu's range to Self (30-Foot Cone). If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank affected creatures who fails their saving throws takes the lingering damage at the beginning of each of their turns until they spend a Full Turn Action to remove the Acid.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Acid String
jutsu.description: You manifest acidic chakra in the form of barbed wires, enough to fill a 20-foot cube originating from you. For the duration, creatures, excluding you, who would begin their turn or enter for the first time on their turn, the affected area, they take 7 acid damage and an additional 7 acid damage for every 5 feet they would move through the affected area. A creature cannot take damage from the same space more than once per round.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the size of the affected area by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Acid Whips
jutsu.description: You manifest acidic chakra in the form of whips of acid designed to grapple and melt into your foes. As an action on each of your turns, you can make two ranged ninjutsu attack, dealing 2d6 acid damage on a hit against a creature you target within range. Once per Creatures you hit must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they become Grappled by you and your acid whips for the duration. A creature Grappled by your acid whips takes 1d12 acid damage at the beginning of each of their turns.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks you make by +1. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase the damage a Grappled creature takes at the beginning of their turns by +1d12. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, a Grappled creature suffers a-2 penalty to their AC. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the damage a Grappled creature takes at the beginning of their turns by +1d12. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank increase the range of this jutsu to 30-feet.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Acidic Cleanse
jutsu.description: You learn to bend acidic substances to your will, molding and manipulating them like puppets on a string. All creatures within 15 feet of you who are under the effects of the Corroded condition has their condition ended, as you collect all of the left-over acid into a ball above your head. The ball floats for up to 1 minute or until used. The next time you would cast a jutsu that would deal acid damage you can spend the ball of acid, upcasting the jutsu by 1 rank at no cost, ignoring upcasting limitations.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Adept Healing
jutsu.description: You cover your hands in chakra that glows with a warm green hue, reactivating a creature's cells reproductive process closing their wounds. This jutsu is unique unto itself in that it can be cast in one of three variations with each taking more time to cast than the last. This jutsu has no effect on Undead or constructs. 1 Action: When cast, this Jutsu's range becomes Touch and an affected creature regains a number of hit points equal to 3d8. 1 Bonus Action: When cast, this jutsu range becomes Self (15-f00t radius) and all creatures of your choice in range regains 8 hit points. 1 Full-Turn Action: When cast, this jutsu's range becomes Self (30-f00t radius) and all creatures of your choice in range regains 3d8+4 hit points
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and healing by +1 dice. If you do not roll dice for healing when casting this jutsu, you instead increase the healing by +4.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Necrosis
jutsu.description: You infused Medical Chakra on your hands as you putrefy it. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature you can reach. On a hit, the target takes 2d12 Necrotic damage. Creatures that are treated as Plants or comprised of water are treated as vulnerable against this jutsu's damage. Affected creature(s) must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save old wounds begin to open and their muscles and bones bend as they are disarmed of any object they are holding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can choose to turn this jutsu's range into Self (20-Foot Radius) originating from a point on the space you occupy. All creatures, excluding the caster in range must make their Constitution saving throw taking this jutsu's damage and are disarmed on a failed save or half as much on a successful save. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank all affected creatures with 100 or less hit points are immediately killed. Once you kill at least one creature with this jutsu in this way, you cannot upcast it to this rank again until you complete a Full-Rest.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Corrupt Missile
jutsu.description: You begin to generate a mass of twisted medical release chakra designed to be fired like a missile, bolt or beam. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack targeting one creature you can see in range. On a hit you deal 3d8 poison damage and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Envenomed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu its cast at C-Rank or higher, On a hit a creature damaged by this jutsu suffers a 1d4 penalty to their next attack roll or skill check until the end of their next turn. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, if the affected creature would regain hit points, they instead regain 0 hit points. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Ray of Sickness
jutsu.description: You collect medical release chakra into your hands and Fire a ray of sickening energy that lash out towards a creature within range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack against a target within range, on a hit the target takes 3d8 poison damage and must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save it is also Envenomed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Corrupted Weapon
jutsu.description: You touch a weapon, coating it in a vile poison. For the duration, [Weapon damage] this weapon deals becomes either Poison or Acid which you decide when this jutsu is cast. Additionally, this weapon deals +1d6 damage twice per turn. Once per turn a creature damaged by this weapon must make a Constitution saving throw gaining a rank of Envenomed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you can choose to instead inflict Corroded in place of Envenomed. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or Higher, increase the bonus damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or Higher, when cast its range becomes Self (15-Foot radius) and all willing creatures can select one weapon they have to be affected by this jutsu's benefits. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank increase the ranks of Envenomed to 2.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Corruption
jutsu.description: You begin to generate a surge of twisted medical release chakra designed spread like a curse, draining all creatures in range. Select a point you can see within range. You manifest a 5-foot radius field of corruption. At the beginning of each of your turns for the duration, the size of the field grows by 5 feet. All creature who begins their turns within the affected area or first enter the affected area on their turns, must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save creatures take 3d12 necrotic damage and no damage on a successful save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Detect Poison & Disease
jutsu.description: For the duration, you can sense the presence and location of poisons, poisonous creatures and diseases within 120 feet of you. This jutsu can penetrate most barriers, but is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, increase the distance you can sense with this jutsu to 1 Mile. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the distance you can sense with this jutsu to 10 miles.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Ensnaring Strike
jutsu.description: The next time you hit a creature with a melee or ranged weapon or unarmed attack before this jutsu ends, you inject chakra into your enemy's muscles attempting to restrict their movements. The target must make a Strength saving throw or be Restrained until the end of their next turn. A large or larger creature has advantage on the saving throw. While Restrained by this jutsu, the target takes 1d8 poison damage at the start of each of its turns.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Goodberry
jutsu.description: With fine chakra control, you can touch up to 5 fruits or nuts that are then infused with medical release chakra for the duration. A creature can use its action to eat any of the 5 affected food items. Eating a food infused with this jutsu restores 1 hit point and provides enough nourishment to sustain a creature for one day. A creature cannot benefit from this jutsu more than twice per long rest. The infused food loses its potency if they have not been consumed within 24 hours of casting this jutsu.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Grim Mask
jutsu.description: You weave summoning seals together and infuse them with medical release chakra manifesting the mask of the Reaper of death. Attacks you make deal an additional +2 necrotic damage for the duration. If you would deal damage to a creature who has ranks of an Elemental or Physical condition, then this jutsu's additional damage instead becomes a +4. If an attack you make scores a critical hit, you may double this jutsu's damage bonus.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Grim Siphon
jutsu.description: You weave summoning seals together and infuse them with medical release chakra manifesting the hand of the Reaper of death. Select one creature you can see within range, that creature must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, you deal 4d6 necrotic damage and the affected creature gains +1 rank of Sealed. If the target has ranks of an Elemental or Mental condition, they make their saving throw at disadvantage. Until the end of your next turn, attacks you make against the target have a +1 bonus to their critical threat range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of targets by +1.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Grim Weapon
jutsu.description: You weave summoning seals together, infusing an echo of the Reapers black chakra and have it coat a weapon you are holding. For the duration, the weapon you affected by this has its damage die become 1d12 Necrotic damage. If a creature you dealt damage to with this weapon would regain hit points before the end of their next turn, they instead take Necrotic damage equal to the amount of hit points they would regain. This can trigger once before the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, a creature cannot gain temporary hit points until the end of their next turn. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, a creature regaining hit points, can trigger the necrotic damage twice.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Healing Elixir
jutsu.description: You use your medical kit to assist in creating a healing elixir which is contained in a simple vial that appears in your hand. The elixir retains its potency for the duration or until its consumed. As an action, a creature can drink the elixir or administer it to another creature. The drinker regains 4d6+6 hit points and immediately removes 2 ranks of the Bleeding or Envenomed condition.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. When you cast this Jutsu at B-Rank, the drinker instead regains 4d8+12 Hit points and immediately ends the Envenomed, Dazed or Weakened conditions or removes 4 ranks of the Bleeding condition. When cast at S-Rank, the drinker regains 4d12+24 and ends any single condition excluding Exhaustion, Prone, or Invisible.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Honey Bee Technique
jutsu.description: You summon a large swarm of construct bees made of poisonous medical release chakra that swarm and sting a single target that you can see within range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack. On a hit, you deal 2d6 Poison damage and the target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save the targets joints begin to seize up for the next minute. At the beginning of the target creatures turn they roll 1d12. On a roll of 1 or 2 the pain keeps them from moving Stunning them until the end of their turn. The target remakes the constitution save at the end of each of their turns ending this on a success. A Jutsu or effect that ends the Envenomed condition can also end this condition.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6 and the number of targets by +1.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Poisonous Blast
jutsu.description: You mold medical release chakra in your belly to imitate the heat and power of the Fire release nature transformation, before releasing it as a blast of sickly green or dark purple chakra from your hands or mouth. All creatures in a 10-foot radius sphere centered on a point you can see within range, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, creatures take 2d8 poison damage and gain the Envenomed condition. On a successful save, creatures take half damage and no further effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d8 and the radius of the sphere by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Toxic Extraction
jutsu.description: You can manipulate any substance comprised of toxic materials or poisonous components, much like a water release master, bending water to their whims. As an action on your turn, a creature you touch can have the poison, toxins or venoms drawn out of them through their skin. The substance coalesces into a mote of poison which you can choose to place into a vial, retaining it for later use, or dispersing it harmlessly. The extracted poison retains its potency for the next 10 minutes and can be applied to a weapon or used as a component for another jutsu that requires it or a Poisoners kit.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Twisted Healing
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you see a creature regain hit points.
jutsu.description: You begin to generate a surge of twisted medical release chakra designed to reverse the effects of healing, even making it detrimental to do so. When you see a creature begin to mend their wounds, or have their wounds mended by another within range, you can swiftly prevent it. Roll 4d6, you reduce the amount of hit points regained by the result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the number of targets by +1, and the healing prevented by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Venom Shock
jutsu.description: You begin to generate a surge of medical release chakra and imitate the violent and un controllable currents of lightning release nature transformations. Select one creature you can see within range. The target creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they take 3d8 poison damage and gain the Envenomed condition or half as much on a successful save and no further effect. A creature Envenomed as a result of this jutsu suffers a -1 penalty to Strength saving throws for each rank of Envenomed they have.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d8

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Venomous Shards
jutsu.description: You mold medical release chakra in your hands to imitate the substance and structure of the earth release nature transformation, before releasing it as a quake of sickly green or dark purple crystalline structures from the ground itself. All creatures in a 15-foot cube originating from you, must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, creatures take 2d12 poison damage and have their movement speed reduced by 10 feet for the next minute. On a successful save a creature takes half damage and no further effect. A jutsu or effect that would end the Envenomed condition, can also remove this effect.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12 and the size of the cube by 5 feet. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank and above on a failed save this jutsu also inflicts the Envenomed condition. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank and above, on a failed save this jutsu also leaves the affected area as difficult terrain.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Wither and Bloom
jutsu.description: You begin to generate a surge of twisted medical release chakra designed to invoke life and death. All creature of your choice in a 10-foot radius sphere centered on a point you can see within range, must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they take 3d6 necrotic damage. Additionally, one creature of your choice within the chosen area regains 3d6 hit points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6 and the hit points regained by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Wounds
jutsu.description: You begin to generate a surge of twisted medical release chakra designed to tear open wounds and rend the flesh. Make a range ninjutsu attack against a creature you can see. On a hit, you deal 3d10 necrotic damage and forces them to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they gain 1 rank of Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d10 and the ranks of Bleed inflicted by +1.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Acidic Bolt
jutsu.description: You begin to generate acidic medical chakra and mold it into an arrow, lance or bolt. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack against a creature in range. On a hit you deal 4d6 acid damage. All creatures in a 15-foot cone originating from the target much make a Dexterity saving throw, being Corroded on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Infectious Acidic Blood
jutsu.description: You begin to generate acidic medical chakra and infuse it into a willing creature within range. When a willing creature would take bludgeoning, piercing or slashing damage before the end of your next turn, their body reacts by ejecting acidic blood. All creatures within 5 feet of the affected creature takes 12 acid damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 4. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can choose to force all creatures who take damage, to make a constitution saving throw. If they fail their save, they are infected with a malignant collection of acidic chakras, resulting in Filth Fever. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, creatures who fail their saving throw can also fall under the effects of Mind Fire in addition to other infections caused by this jutsu. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, creatures who fail their saving throw can also fall under the effects of Seizing Doom.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Aid
jutsu.description: You imbue a chakra seal with medical release chakra before placing it on up to three creatures within range. Each target hit point maximum and current hit points increase by 10 for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and a targets hit points increase by an additional 10.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Aura of Life
jutsu.description: You infuse medical chakra into yourself as you release it as an aura of supporting energy. For this jutsu's duration, anytime you or a non-hostile creature in this jutsu's radius would take damage from a hostile creature, they immediately regain 12 Hit points. This jutsu can trigger 5 times per casting, after which this jutsu ends immediately.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the maximum number of times this jutsu can trigger by +2.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Aura of Purity
jutsu.description: You infuse medical chakra into yourself as you release it as an aura of cleansing energy. You release a potent wave of medical release chakra. All creatures within range who are currently under the effects of a Mental or Sensory conditions as a result of a jutsu of equal rank or lower, has 1 rank of each condition type removed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. Listed conditions inflicted by jutsu of equal rank or lower are removed.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Chakra Needles
jutsu.description: You create needles formed from your chakra and launch them at a creature you can see within range. Make a ranged Ninjutsu check. Target creature takes 6d6 Necrotic damage on a hit and must make a constitution saving throw, losing 10 movement speed until the end of their next turn on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d6 and reduce target movement by 5.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Chakra Transfer
jutsu.description: You place your hand on a creature and share your chakra with them, transferring it to them. Spend a number of Chakra die up to your proficiency bonus. When you do roll the spent die, recording the result and adding your Constitution modifier. Transfer the result to a willing creature. Chakra die spent in this way cannot be regained until you complete a long rest. If the creature is affected by a Genjutsu, they gain advantage on their next saving throw.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Grim Blade
jutsu.description: You weave summoning seals together and infuse them with medical release chakra manifesting two hands of the Reaper of death. His hands reach into you and draw out a fragment of your spirit turning it into a temporary blade of necrotic power. The reaper makes a melee ninjutsu attack at a creature of your choice within range, even if you cannot see them, ignoring cover. If the target you select whom you cannot see, is not in range, the reaper instead randomly picks a creature itself from all available creatures in range. On a hit the reaper deals 4d8 necrotic damage and the affected creature must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, if they are gaining any dice-based bonuses, they must roll each bonus, taking necrotic damage based on the result of each.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 chakra and damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, on a failed save the target rolls their bonus dice twice. If this jutsu is Cast at S-Rank, you can target all hostile creatures in range, making a single attack against each.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Grim Legion
jutsu.description: You weave summoning seals together and infuse them with medical release chakra and a portion of your spirit, manifesting a summoning tag that you throw into a point you can see within range. From the chakra seal an echoing call of shadowy figures of your choice begin to manifest filling a 20-foot radius, which counts as difficult terrain. The creatures resemble once living entities you knew. Whenever a creature starts its turn in this jutsu's radius or enters it for the first time on its turn, the conjured shadows all strike. Affected creatures make a Strength saving throw, taking 2d12 necrotic damage and dragging them 5 feet towards the center of the radius. Creature who begin their turns within the radius of this jutsu have their speed reduced by half until the beginning of their following turn
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 chakra and the size of the cube by 5 feet and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Medical Aura
jutsu.description: Life preserving Medical Chakra radiates from you in an aura with a 15-foot radius. Until this jutsu ends, the aura moves with you, centered on you. Each non-hostile creature in the aura, (including you) has resistance to necrotic damage and becomes immune to the Bleeding condition. Additionally, a non-hostile, living creature regains 1 hit point when it starts its turn in the aura with 0 hit points. A creature can only regain hit points this way once per this jutsu's casting.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Play Dead
jutsu.description: You touch a willing creature putting it into a cataleptic state that is indistinguishable from death. For the jutsu's duration, or until you use an action to touch the target and dismiss this jutsu, the target appears dead to all outward inspection and to jutsu used to determine the targets status. The target is Blinded and Incapacitated, and its speed drops to 0. The target has resistance to all damage except psychic damage. If the target is diseased or Envenomed when you case this jutsu, or becomes diseased or Envenomed while under this Jutsu's effect, the disease and poison have no effect until this jutsu ends.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Poison Mist
jutsu.description: You ingest a vial of poison, and exhale it as a thick cloud of smoke of a color of your choice. Select a point you can see within range as a 20-foot radius cloud of poisonous mist fills the area, even bending around corners. Creatures within the mist has their vision obscured and cannot see more than 5 feet away. Creatures outside the mist cannot visually discern between creatures within it without a special sense, only being able to see vague shadowing outlines. The mist lasts for the Duration and when a creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save a creature that needs to breathe takes 2d10 poison damage and gains 1 rank of Envenomed or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature that fails their save by 5 or more begins to reeling and vomiting, losing the ability to take an Action until the end of their next turn. A light wind disperses the cloud after 2 rounds. A strong wind disperses it after 1 round.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Restorative
jutsu.description: Your hands glow with a warm blue hue as you touch a willing creature filtering out impurities and fixing debilitating conditions, they are suffering from with precise chakra control. Creatures suffering from an Elemental, Physical, Mental or Sensory condition from the use of a jutsu or effect of a rank, equal to or lower than what this jutsu was cast, are healed of one of those conditions, removing all ranks, if any.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. The number of conditions with a different name removed increases by +1.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Spore caller
jutsu.description: You begin to generate poisonous medical chakra and release it like an aura permeating from your skin. All creatures, excluding the caster, who would begin their turns in or first enter your, poisonous aura of spores, must make a constitution saving throw taking 4d6 poison damage and having the spores nest in their eyes blinding them until the end of their next turn. A creature who would be Blinded by this jutsu while already Blinded has the duration of the Blinded condition extended by 1 round.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, once per turn, a creature Blinded as a result of this jutsu who takes Bludgeoning, piercing or Slashing damage must make a Constitution saving throw, being Envenomed on a failed save. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher you can choose which creatures you want to be excluded from this jutsu's effects and also release it into a different shape, turning its duration into Instant and its range into a Self (30-Foot Cone). If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, creatures who fail their saving throw become Blinded for 1 minute. Remaking their saving throw at the end of each of their turns.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Transfer of Life
jutsu.description: You sacrifice your life for another. Select one creature who has been dead for no longer than 10 Minutes whom you can reach. This jutsu cannot be used by Clones, Constructs or Undead. When you do, you begin transferring all of your life energy into them. The creature regains all of its hit points equal to your current hit points. A creature revived as a result of this jutsu has all ranks of Exhaustion removed from them. Reduce your Maximum hit points to 0, which cannot be increased by any means.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Vampiric Touch
jutsu.description: Your hands glow with a shadowy aura of chakra. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature within your reach. On a hit, the target takes 4d10 necrotic damage and you regain hit points equal to half the amount of necrotic damage dealt. Until the jutsu ends, you can make the attack again on each of your turns as an action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Venomous Reflux
jutsu.description: You begin to generate poisonous medical chakra and release it, causing it to erupt under a creature you can see within range. Select one creature you can see within range. The target creature must make a constitution saving throw as poison erupts around them. On a failed save, they take 3d8 poison damage and cannot take reactions until the end of their next turn as they are coughing and hacking the poisonous gas back up trying to eject it from their bodies. On a successful save they take half damage and no further effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Wall of Bee's
jutsu.description: You weave together a mixture of summoning seals and summon forth a wall of angry, irrational and non-compromising bees. The wall is 5 feet thick, 10 feet high and up to 30 feet long. The wall must be continuous and at least 5 feet thick along its entire length. You select where the wall of bees appear and the entire length must be within your line of sight and within this jutsu's range from you. A creature that starts within the bee's wall or that gets within 5 feet of the wall of bees agitates the insects and are swarmed by them and must make a constitution saving throw against their assault. On a failed save they take 4d6 poison damage and are Incapacitated until the end of the current turn. On a successful save they take half damage and suffer no additional effects. A creature immune to poison damage automatically succeeds their saving throw and cannot be Incapacitated by this jutsu.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Body Pathway Derangement
jutsu.description: You coat your fingertips in chakra and attempt to strike an opponent at the nape of their neck sending a surge of chakra through their central nervous system mixing up signals from their brain to the rest of their bodies. Make a melee Ninjutsu Attack. On a hit, the target creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target creature's speed is halved, it takes a -2 Penalty to AC, automatically fails Dexterity saving throws and cannot use reactions. On its turn, it can either use an action or bonus action, not both. Regardless of the creature's abilities or jutsu descriptions, it can't make more than one attack during its turn. If the creature wants to use an action to make an ability save to end this effect, they must instead roll an Intelligence save.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Blood Rot Curse
jutsu.description: You weave necrotic chakra into a special wavelength, invisible to even creatures with Chakra sight. When you cast this jutsu roll all spent hit die. Recording the result. You touch a creature who's hit points are not full and bestow a curse. The cursed target must make a Charisma saving throw. You can attempt to bestow the curse in a concealed manner not revealing your intentions by making a Stealth check vs the targets passive insight. On a success, the target is unaware of the curse you placed on them. The curse takes effect immediately, for the next 24 hours (1 Day), the target cannot regain hit points except as a result of long or full rests, if and when they would take Acid, Poison or Necrotic damage, they take 2d4 additional damage of that same type. This jutsu can be dispelled by a Jutsu of B-Rank or higher that can dispel jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, their blood begins to turn to Acid. At the beginning of an affected creatures turn, they take 4d6 Acid damage for each rank of Bleeding they have.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Dead Heartbeat Technique
jutsu.description: When casting this jutsu, you must have fully intact corpse of a humanoid creature. You perform a type of surgery designed to induce a false heartbeat. At the conclusion of this jutsu's casting, the corpse begins to move at your behest. You must stay within 90 feet of the corpse while facilitating its temporary revival. All wounds, and damage the corpse had prior to this jutsu's casting remains. The corpse you use this on only retains their memories. They can regain their personalities if you instead extend this jutsu's casting time to 1 Week. The corpse cannot disobey you, and must not act in any way that would bring you harm. The corpse has 1 Hit points and calculates its AC as normal. It cannot cast jutsu, or use features by any means. The corpse remains active until you dismiss this jutsu as a bonus action or begin concentrating on any other jutsu or feature. A corpse can only be temporarily be brought back this way once ever using this jutsu.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Death Ward
jutsu.description: You draw your chakra seal onto a talesman or scroll and place it onto a creature other than yourself, granting it a measure of protection from death. The first time the target would drop to 0 hit points as a result of taking damage, the target instead stops at 1 hit point, and the jutsu ends. If this jutsu is still in effect when the target is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantly without dealing damage, excluding Exhaustion, that effect is instead negated against the target, and the jutsu ends.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Grim Calling
jutsu.description: You weave summoning seals together and infuse them with medical release chakra manifesting the head of the Reaper of death. It screeches a spectral wail that penetrates to the souls of most creatures, calling and pulling on their spiritual selves. All creatures within range must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, creatures take 6d8 necrotic damage, fall Prone, and ends concentration on any Jutsu they are concentrating on. If a creature has ranks of Mental or Sensory conditions, they make their save at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 chakra and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Investiture of Acid
jutsu.description: You draw out acidic chakra and infuse it into yourself, coating your entire body like armor. The acid does not harm you. For the duration, you gain the following benefits; You are immune to Acid damage. You have resistance to Bludgeoning, Piercing and Slashing damage. You have vulnerability to Earth damage. You can move across difficult terrain on solid ground without spending any extra movement, as you melt the obstructions in your path. The ground in a 10-foot radius around you is covered in acid, counts as difficult terrain for creatures other than you, and moves with you. You can use your action to blast a 15-foot cone of acid from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the cone must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature takes 4d8 Acid damage and becomes Corroded on a failed save or half as much and no further effects on a successful one.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Reconstructive Hand
jutsu.description: You coat your hand in cell manipulating Medical chakra. You can attempt to manipulate the cellular integrity of a creature's cells. As an action on your turn, you can touch a willing creature you can reach. When you do, you can jumpstart their cellular regenerative process. The creature regains hit points equal to 5d8 + 12. Alternatively, as an action you can attempt to touch a hostile creature you can reach. Make a melee ninjutsu attack. On a successful hit, they take 5d10 Necrotic damage and become compromised. A compromised creature must make a constitution saving throw at the beginning of each of their turns for the next minute. Any jutsu or affect that would remove a physical condition can remove the compromised condition on a creature. A compromised creature who succeeds three saving throws first, ends this condition. A compromised creature has their cells begin to fail and rupture. They suffer a -2 penalty to their AC, attack rolls, and Strength, Dexterity and Intelligence saving throws for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is Cast at A-Rank or higher, the affected creature increases the cost of Jutsu they cast by +2 for the duration as well. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, the penalty to AC, attack rolls and saving throws are increased to -4.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Revival
jutsu.description: You send a surge of healing chakra through a creature that has been dead for no more than 1 minute that didn't die of old age, isn't undead, and not missing its head. You make a Medicine skill Check vs DC (25 + 1 for every round the target has been dead.) The target returns to life with 1 Hit Point. Missing body parts are not returned. Internal organs are healed and regenerated. This jutsu cures all normal diseases affecting the creature when it dies. This jutsu does not remove ranks of Exhaustion a creature has accumulated prior to death. Once a creature has been revived in this way, they cannot be revived again in the same way for 30 days, as their body simply cannot handle the strain.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Strength of 100
jutsu.description: You use finely controlled chakra across your body, granting you strength of over 100 people. You gain the following benefits; Your strength becomes 20 for the Duration. Your jump height and distance are doubled. You gain Advantage on Strength & Constitution based ability checks, skill checks, and saves. Your [Unarmed damage Die] becomes 2d8. After you end this jutsu, you suffer the consequences of pushing your body to its limit. You gain disadvantage on Strength based ability and skill checks for the next hour or until you take a short rest.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Venom Sphere
jutsu.description: You begin to generate poisonous medical chakra and release it, creating a ball of poisonous, acidic liquid, that then rain of needles formed from it. Select a point in the air that you can see within range. You manifest a ball of acidic point, that begins to rain down needles made of poisonous acid filling a 30-foot cylinder. Each creature in the cylinder must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 3d6 poison and 3d6 acid damage on a failed save and half as much on a successful save. A creature that failed their save takes 3d4 poison and 3d4 acid damage at the start of their next turn. The ground this area affects generates poisonous thorns on the ground that lasts for 1 minute. Creatures who that enter the area of poisonous thorns takes 1d6 poison and 1d6 acid damage for each 5 feet they move through the affected area.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and both damage types by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Water to Acid
jutsu.description: You draw out acidic chakra and infuse it into a body of water that you can see. You convert a 15-foot cubes worth of water, into pure acid for the duration. Jutsu with the Water release keyword that would require a source of water, cannot use this pool of acid. If you would convert a pool of water into acid and there is water outside of this jutsu's area of effect, then creatures can still use water release ninjutsu that requires sources of water. Any creature that is in contact with the water when it turns to acid such as stand on top of it with the water walking technique immediately sinks down into it. Creatures who would begin their turn submerged in the acid takes 7d6 acid damage and must make a constitution saving throw, being Blinded and becomes Corroded on a failed save. When this jutsu would end, the acid turns back into normal water.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the size of the acid conversion doubles. (15>30>60)

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Aura of Power
jutsu.description: Intense chakra lashes out from you and coalesces in a soft radiance of blue light in a 10-foot radius around you. Allied creatures of your choice in the radius when you cast this jutsu have a +2 bonus on all saving throws against Ninjutsu. Hostile creatures within this radius have -2 penalty on saving throws against Ninjutsu.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Casualty Puppet
jutsu.description: As a part of the casting of this jutsu, you must have a creature who has been dead no longer than 10 minutes available to you. You place a chakra seal onto the corpses body. When you do you perform a ritual absorbing its memories fully into the seal, then placing the chakra seal on yourself. For this jutsu's duration, you gain access to all of the memories and Jutsu, that the creature knew. While you have the chakra seal attached to you, you cannot end this jutsu early. Your mind begins to feel hazy and clouded. At the beginning of each of your turns while in combat, or every minute while not in combat. You must make a Charisma saving throw vs a DC (Original Creatures Level + Their Proficiency Bonus). On a failed save, you act as they would until the end of their turn.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Corrosive Plume
jutsu.description: You mold acidic chakra into the shape of flower on a point that you can see within range. This flower then begins to grow and bloom at a violent rate. All creatures within 30 feet of the flower when it blooms must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 12d6 acid damage and becomes Corroded on a failed saving throw A creature who fails their saving throw, who has 5 ranks of Envenomed has vulnerability to acid damage from this jutsu. Armor, weapons and items that are not being held are immediately dissolved if they do not have a seal, or chakra-based effect of A-Rank or higher cast upon it or infused into it. Creatures reduced to 0 hit points as a result of this jutsu are dissolved into a mass of acidic goop, unable to be revived.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Grim Reality
jutsu.description: You weave summoning seals together and infuse them with medical release chakra manifesting the cloak, weapon and presence of the Reaper of death. He demands a large payment for you borrowing his power, so he takes it by stripping you of a large portion of your life force. You cannot end concentration of this jutsu on other creatures turn, instead only being able to end it, at the end of one of your own turns. Additionally, this jutsu cannot be dispelled or ended by other creatures jutsu, except by a jutsu of S-Rank. At the beginning of each of your turns, instead of spending chakra to maintain concentration, you must spend a Hit die. You don the cloak, and blade of the reaper. The Cloak of the reaper grants you an AC equal to your Ninjutsu save DC if your current AC is lower. The blade of the reaper is a construct weapon, in the form of either a tanto or scythe, which you choose when you cast this jutsu. If Tanto, the weapon deals 2d6 + Ninjutsu ability modifier necrotic damage, and scores a critical hit on a roll of 18~20. If scythe, the weapon deals 2d10 + Ninjutsu ability modifier necrotic damage, has reach 2, Deadly, and Two-Handed weapon properties. Regardless of the weapon chosen, as an action, you can make two melee ninjutsu attacks using the construct weapons. Jutsu, you cast with the Medical keyword, that has the Grim pre-fix Necrotic damage ignores resistance and immunity.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Healing Wave
jutsu.description: You clasp your hands releasing a shockwave of healing energy in a 30-foot radius sphere centering on you. You heal up to 8 creatures a total of 150 hit points being split evenly between them while also gaining advantage on saving throws and resistance to the next instance of damage they take, until the end of your next turn. If you would target less than 3 creatures with this jutsu, they can only recover up to 40 hit points each this way.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Regenerate
jutsu.description: You touch a creature and stimulate its natural healing ability. The target regains 2d10+10 hit points. For the duration of the jutsu, the target regains 10 hit point at the start of each of its turns so long as you end your movement adjacent to that creature. The targets severed body members (fingers, legs, tails, and so on), if any, are restored so long as you remained in contact for the dull duration. If you have the severed part and hold it to the stump, the jutsu instantly causes the limb to knit to the stump.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Wilt
jutsu.description: You infuse necrotic chakra into a surge of medical chakra, designed to suck the life from a target creature. You draw the life force of all creatures of your choice within range, that you can see. Each creature in the area must make a Constitution Saving throw. Construct and undead aren't affected. Plants, Celestials, and Demons make this saving throw at disadvantage. A creature takes 10d8 Necrotic damage and are marked with the seal of extraction for the next minute, or half as much damage and no additional effects on a successful save. A creature marked with the seal of extraction takes 5 additional Necrotic damage each time they would take damage from any source for the duration. Plants, Celestials, and Demons instead take 10 additional Necrotic damage each time they would take damage from any source for the duration. A creature marked with the seal of extraction can as an action attempt to remove the seal by making an Intelligence (Ninshou) check vs your Ninjutsu save DC, removing it early on a success. Plants, Celestials, and Demons make this skill check at disadvantage.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Strength of 1000
jutsu.description: In order to cast this jutsu you must currently be under the effects of 'Medical Release: Strength of 100' You have perfected the chakra control needed to go beyond the limits of Strength of 100, and found the most efficient way to enhance your physical strength beyond normal limits. When you cast this jutsu, its duration is for the remainder of "Medical Release: Strength of 100" and you no longer need to maintain concentration on Medical Release: Strength of 100. For the duration you gain the following benefits; Your [Unarmed damage Die] becomes 3d8. You regenerate hit points equal to 2d4+8 at the start of each of your turns. You gain the Distortion Impact and Critical Break abilities, which can be used once per turn each, in place of an attack granted by the Attack Action or used once in addition to a melee Taijutsu attack. Distortion Impact: As part of a melee Unarmed or Taijutsu attack, on a hit, all creatures of your choice within 20 feet of the target creature (excluding that creature) must make a Dexterity saving throw vs your Taijutsu (or Ninjutsu, your choice) save DC. On a failed save, they take your unarmed damage as the shockwave from the force of your impact echoes outward, or half as much on a success. Critical Break: As part of a melee Unarmed or Taijutsu attack, you strike with intense focus, making the triggering attack have a +2 bonus to its critical threat range. If you score a critical hit with this attack, you instead triple your unarmed damage dice. When this jutsu ends or you deactivate this jutsu, your body experiences a massive shock as you cannot recast this jutsu or jutsu with both the Medical keyword that requires concentration until you complete a Full-Rest.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Genocide
jutsu.description: You begin to generate corrupted medical chakra and infuse it with pure prejudice and malice towards a creature and their bloodline. Select the name of a Clan or a specific creature if you are unsure of their clan. The target must be of a level equal to or lower than your own as you Fire a blast of Necrotic chakra that cannot miss, so long as you can see them. The target must make a constitution saving throw. For every condition with a different name, they are under the effects of, they suffer a -2 penalty to their save. On a failure, the target takes 10d6+50 necrotic damage, or half as much on a successful save. At the beginning of the affected creatures turn, pass or fail, tendrils of necrotic chakra leap out from that creature, up to 100 feet, to all other creatures that share the targets clan, or bloodline based on what you chose. All such creatures, excluding the original target, must make the same saving throw, taking 50 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. At the beginning of a creature who fails their saving throws from the tendrils, more tendrils leap out from them with the same restrictions an additional 100 feet repeating the previous process, but excluding all creatures who were previously affected by the jutsu. This affect repeats until no other creatures who share the original targets clan or bloodline are within range of the tendrils.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Heal
jutsu.description: You manifest and release a torrent of Medical chakra that flows out from you into injured creatures of your choice. You cannot reduce the cost of this jutsu by any means. You restore up to 300 hit points, divided as you choose among any number of creatures that you can see within range. Creatures healed by this jutsu are also cured of all diseases and any effect that inflicts conditions, regardless of the effects restriction or limitation. This jutsu has no effect on undead or constructs. Once cast, this jutsu cannot be cast again until you complete a Full Rest.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Plague
jutsu.description: You begin to generate poisonous, venomous and toxic medical chakra and infuse it directly into the air itself. Yourself and 10 other creatures of your choice are immune to the effects of this jutsu. Once this jutsu is cast, it continues to permeate the affected area forever after casting. Dark green, purple and black clouds fill the air, as a foul smell of poison and toxins sail in the wind. A low moan can always be heard. Each creature who are under the clouds when this jutsu is cast must make a constitution saving throw. A creature who is already suffering from a disease or who is Envenomed makes their saves at a -5 penalty. On a failed save, a creature gains 5 ranks of the Envenomed condition and they are permanently Envenomed unless removed by a Jutsu with the medical keyword that removes conditions of S-Rank. This jutsu ignores immunity to the Envenomed condition and damage. A creature can never have their hit points reduced below 0 as a result of the Envenomed condition, instead forced to suffer until killed by other means. Creatures who come into contact with a creature who was Envenomed by this jutsu must make the save as if they were under the clouds of this jutsu when cast. A creature who would wake up from a rest of any type under clouds created by this jutsu must make a save as if they were under the clouds of this jutsu when cast. The affected area grows by 1 mile every month until this jutsu is dispelled. The clouds can only be dispelled by 3 castings of a Ninjutsu with the Fuinjutsu keyword cast at S-Rank targeting them from within 10 feet of the original space the jutsu was cast from.

jutsu.name: Medical Release: Supreme Poison Deity
jutsu.description: You mold poisonous into the form of a huge construct scorpion, known as the Supreme Poison Deity, formed entirely of poison, toxins and venom. This construct uses your Ninjutsu attack bonus and Save DC for effects that requires it. It rolls initiative as it has its own turns, using your Ninjutsu ability modifier + proficiency as its initiative. The Supreme Poison Deity has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Agonizing Thorn
jutsu.description: You generate Shards of earth and hurl them at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged Ninjutsu Attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 3d8 Earth damage and must make a Strength saving throw, becoming Bruised on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Bedrock Coffin
jutsu.description: You manipulate and mold the earth under your enemies to encase them in a coffin of stone. Target creature makes a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they are captured inside the coffin and are treated as Restrained and Grappled. On a success they dodge out of the way of the coffins collapsing form. On each of their turns thereafter, they can make a Strength saving throw to force their way out. If a creature attempts to attack the coffin to break it, the coffin is an Earthen Artifact, has an AC equal to your Ninjutsu Save DC, 25 Hit Points, Resistance to Cold damage and vulnerability to Lightning damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the number of creatures you can target by +1 and the hit points of the coffin by 10.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Bedrock Skin
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description: The Jutsu hardens the skin in response to taking damage. Reduce the damage you take until the beginning of your next turn by 8 (Excluding Lightning damage).
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduction by +2.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Dominus Banner
jutsu.description: You coat your weapon in earth chakra, before raising it above you and releasing its golden chakra into the shape of a banner, as a pulse of golden chakra enhances the weapons of your allies converting your defense into their offence. For the duration, one weapon you and each allied creature affected by this jutsu is wielding is enhanced by your golden earth chakra. Enhanced weapons deal an additional 1d4 Earth damage twice per turn and grants its wielder +2 damage reduction. If you or affected allied creatures let go of their weapon or it is taken from its original wielder, the golden chakra disperses.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the bonus damage to 2d4 and the damage reduction to +4. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the bonus damage to 3d4 and the damage reduction to +6.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Calcite Boons
jutsu.description: You create a surge of Earth Release Chakra and use it to amplify a willing creature you can see within range other than yourself. The target creature gains a bonus to their physical abilities from the following options; Stones Might. Their Strength becomes 18 if it is not already. Their Unarmed, Weapon, and Taijutsu Attacks deal an additional 1d6 Earth damage. Stones Swiftness. Their Dexterity becomes 18 for the duration if it is not already. They gain a rank of mastery with their Dexterity saving throws and their speed is increased by +20 feet
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you gain the Stones Power option. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher it can be cast targeting its caster. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you gain the Stones Tenacity option. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu instead affects all creatures of your choice within a 15-foot radius, centered on you when cast. Stones Power. Jutsu they cast are amplified by Earth chakra, boosting its damage by +2d8 Earth damage once per casting and gain a +1 bonus to its initial Save DC. Stones Tenacity. They gain advantaged on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saving throws, immunity to Physical conditions, excluding Grappled or Restrained and regains 2d6 + 4 hit points at the beginning of each of their turns, so long as they begin their turns with at least 1 hit point.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Earth Flow River
jutsu.description: You transform the surface in front of you into a mud river. The river created is a 30-foot cone, that sweeps creatures off of their feet and carries them to the end of the cone furthest away from the caster. Creatures in the path of the mud slide must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they are swept up and moved to the end of the stream, falling Prone being disarmed of any weapons or items they are holding and having their speed reduced by 10 feet until the end of their next turn. On a successful save, no effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the size of the cone by 5ft and the speed they are reduced by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Earth Spine Grudge
jutsu.description: You generate Shards of earth and levitate them around yourself, creating a field of stone debris to protect you. For the duration of this jutsu, ranged attacks are made as if you are under half cover, with the floating earth around you. Also, creatures of your choice treat all spaces within 10 feet of you as difficult terrain. This floating earth counts as a single Earthen Artifact while active.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Sand Binding
jutsu.description: Hooking and grasping arches of hardened sand stone sprout from the ground in a 20-foot cube starting from a point within range. For the duration, these earthen arches turn the ground into difficult terrain. Creatures cannot take the dash or dodge actions while within this area of difficult terrain. Creature(s) of your choice in the area when this jutsu is cast must make a Strength saving throw, being Restrained on a failed save until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, select one creature who failed their saving throw, they become Restrained for the duration by sand that covers their entire body. They also take 2d8 earth damage at the beginning of each of their turns. A Restrained creature can make a Strength saving throw to end the Restrained condition at the end of each of their turns. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, As a bonus action you can select one Restrained creature and collapse the sand holding them, dealing 6d8 earth damage. If you do, this jutsu immediately ends on them. If this jutsu is cast at A Rank or higher, all creatures who failed their saving throw are Restrained and at the beginning of their turns also takes 2d8 Chakra damage. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, when you spend your bonus action to collapse the sand, it affects all Restrained creatures.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Tectonic Stone Spears
jutsu.description: You choose a point you can see and cause a fountain of spiked earth molded from the ground filling a 20-foot cube, centered on the chosen point. Each creature in that area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 2d12 earth damage or half as much on a successful save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, on a failed save affected creatures also become Bruised. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the size of the affected area to a 30-foot Cube. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, the spikes of earth remain, occupying the affected area, as it becomes difficult terrain and heavily obscures all creatures in the affected area from each other and creatures outside the affected area and the area counts as a single Earthen Artifact. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can select a second point, causing this jutsu's effects to affect two different areas. A creature can only make a save as a result of this jutsu once per casting.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Geo Breastplate
jutsu.description: You create an aura of Earth Release chakra that permeates your body for the duration. This chakra acts as a breastplate of steel like material. For the duration your AC is Calculated as 13 + Your Intelligence (Or Constitution) + Half of your proficiency bonus, and you have 2 DR. This jutsu ends if you dismiss it as a Bonus action. You cannot gain the benefit of this jutsu if you are wearing Armor and This jutsu's effects end when you complete a short rest.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you gain +2 DR (damage reduction). If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the AC this Jutsu grants by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you gain an additional +2 DR (For a total bonus of +4). If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the AC this Jutsu grants by +2, instead of +1.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Geo Genesis
jutsu.description: You create a shard of shimmering earth, made of Earth Release Chakra. This shard can be any shape you chose and is any color you like. You then select a space you can see within range and throw the shimmering shard to the chosen space, which remains for the duration. While occupying this space, you can trigger the shard as part of casting a jutsu with the Earth release keyword, taking an attack with the attack action, or by spending a bonus action on following turns. When triggered, it erupts into a blooming flowerhead made of earth. All creatures within 10 feet of the shard must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, you deal 3d6 Earth damage and affected creatures become Bruised. On a successful save, they take half damage and no further effects. Once the shard blooms it sits unmoving on the ground and counts as an Earthen Artifact. Up to 3 medium-sized creatures may safely stand on the flower of earth as it rises up to 60 feet into the air at your command, no action required and remains suspended in the air for the duration.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Resonating Geo Isotoma
jutsu.description: You amplify constructs made of earth causing them to manifest an aura of Earth Release Chakra. Select an Earthen Artifact of your creation within range. All creatures of your choice within 30 feet of the chosen construct gains a +1 bonus to their AC, as you decrease their weight, increasing their speed. Additionally, hostile creatures of your choice within range who first enter or begin their turn in the radius must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save has a -1 penalty to their AC until they begin their turn outside of this jutsu's radius. If a creature who failed their save would exit and reenter the area, they do not remake their save, instead automatically being affected by the penalty. If they would exit and re-enter this jutsu's radius after previously passing, they must remake their saving throw. Regardless of either effect a creature is under as a result of this jutsu, it can be affected by no more than 2 different auras created by this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of Earthen Artifacts you can select by +1. Casting this jutsu at B-Rank, increase the AC bonus to +2. Casting this jutsu at S-Rank, increase the AC bonus to +3.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Geolocation
jutsu.description: You extend your chakra throughout the earth around you extending up to 30 feet from you. For the duration you gain tremor sense. Creatures who move under the surface that you are standing on are perceived by you with your tremor sense.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast at C-Rank Increase the duration to 1 hour. If cast at B-Rank; 8 Hours. If cast at A-Rank 24 Hours.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Golden Gems
jutsu.description: You solidify your Earth Release chakra into 2 small Shimmering Crystalline Gems. The Gems can be any color you choose and they float around you for the duration. You can spend your gems to enhanced other Earth release jutsu. By spending 1 Golden Gem, when you cast a Ninjutsu with the Earth Release keyword, you are able to enhance it in one the following ways: Reinforce: If the jutsu cast summons a construct or structure, increase its hit points by 2d8. Harden: If the jutsu cast would grant a creature temporary hit points, increase the THP gained by +8 Hit points. Solidify: If the jutsu cast would deal damage, increase the damage dealt by 1 damage die.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and you generate 1 additional Gem. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, increase Reinforces hit point bonus by 2d8, Harden's THP bonus by +8 and Solidifies bonus damage by +4. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank increase Reinforces hit point bonus by 4d8, Harden's THP bonus by +16 and Solidifies bonus damage by +8.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Headhunter Technique
jutsu.description: You sink into the ground and gain a burrow speed of 30 feet. You can burrow through earth and sand alike. If you run out of chakra while underground you emerge directly above where you are on the surface. You leave a single tunnel large enough for one person to fit through at a time. You have knowledge of how many people are on the surface directly above you in a 10-foot radius sphere centering on you. As an action on your turn, while burrowing under a creature you can attempt to drag them under leaving them submerged in the earth with only their head being exposed. Target creature makes a Dexterity saving throw to avoid being snatched into the ground and Restrained. Creatures who are Restrained by this jutsu can make a Strength saving throw at the end of each of their turns to escape the ground, ending the Restrained condition.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Jade Devotion
jutsu.description: You release a surge of earth release chakra that permeates you and your allies. All willing creatures of your choice within a 10-foot sphere centering on you, gain 3d6 temporary hit points and resistance to bludgeoning piercing and slashing damage so long as they have temporary hit points granted by this jutsu. Creatures who have temporary hit points granted by this jutsu count as Earthen Artifacts created by you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and temporary hit points by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Jade Screen
jutsu.keywords: Ninjutsu, Earth Release, Fuinjutsu, Barrier, Combination, Clash
jutsu.description: You summon two pillars of earth each 10 feet tall, and 2 feet thick. They each occupy a space that can hold them and must be within 30 feet of each other with no other structures directly in-between them. These pillars are structures of your design and cannot be moved once conjured. A film of earth release chakra is created between the two pillars in a straight line. This film and pillars share a pool of 30 hit points and has resistance to bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage. All attacks or jutsu from one side of your choice, that would pass through this film instead strike it reducing its hit points as if it was the original target. Once the hit points of the structure and film reaches 0, this jutsu immediately ends as the structure crumbles. All ranged attacks that would pass through the film of your choice, passes through harmlessly and increases the attacks range by 10 feet, and damage by 1 damage die. Combination: Increase the structures hit points by +10, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Mud Wave
jutsu.description: You churn the earth in front of you and blast it forward in a 20-foot cone. Creatures in the cone must make a Strength saving throw taking 2d10 earth damage and being Bruised on a failed save, and half as much damage and not additional effect on a successful save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d10 and the cone size by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Mausoleum Rock Technique
jutsu.description: You tear two large chunks of stones from the ground using the strength of your chakra alone, hurling them at different spaces. Select two points you can see in range. All creatures within 10 feet of the chosen points must make a Strength saving throw as you hurl two large boulders at them. The affected areas become difficult terrain as the stones crush the ground. On a failed save, affected creatures take 2d6 earth damage and become Bruised or half as much on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, select one additional point for this jutsu to affect. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the radius of the affected area to 15-feet. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher select one additional point for this jutsu to affect.. When this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the affected area to 20-feet.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Sandwich Technique
jutsu.description: Description: You conjure two large constructs of earth of your design on either side of a chosen point you can see in range and slam them into one another crushing everything in between. All creatures in a 20-foot Cube centered on the chosen point must make a Strength saving throw to resist being crushed. On a failed save, affected creatures take 2d12 earth damage and are Dazed on a failed Save or half as much damage on a success. If more than one creature is affected by this jutsu, on a failed save, all affected creatures become Bruised.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, you can select a second point you can see in range. A creature can only be affected by this jutsu once per casting. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, a creature that fails their saving throw by 5 or more is Stunned until the end of their next turn, instead of Dazed.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Rock Shuriken
jutsu.description: You mold and shape small stones into the shape of shuriken. When you do, you autonomously Fire them all off, one after another like bullets pelting and tearing through enemies. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack. On a hit, you deal 4d6 earth damage, reducing the affected creatures movement speed by -10.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6 and the speed penalty by -5.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Geo Stone Weapon
jutsu.description: You can encase a single arm in rock, enabling yourself to strike with hardened punches, while also protecting yourself from direct contact. For the duration of this jutsu, you add +1d6 to your [Unarmed damage] rolls up to twice per turn. For the duration of this jutsu one of your hands are occupied and cannot be used to make Hand Seals (HS) or use Chakra Seals (CS). Also, when you strike a creature with the encased arm, it does not count as direct contact with them. Alternatively, you can use the stone to create a weapon made from stone in a shape and design of your choice which you have proficiency with. The weapon has all properties of the original weapon, but it deals 1d6 of the weapons original damage type + 1d6 earth damage, in place of its normal damage die. If the weapon has the Light weapon property, its damage die instead becomes just 1d6 earth damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. When this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, increase the earth damage by 1d6. When this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the earth damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Crystalized Ascension
jutsu.description: You materialize Earth release chakra into the form of armor on a willing creature other than yourself for the duration. Target creature's gains a +2 bonus to their AC, gains 16 Temporary hit points and +4 damage reduction.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. When this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, increase the AC bonus by +1, temporary hit points by +8 and DR by +2. When this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the AC bonus by +2, temporary hit points by +16 and DR by +4.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Dark Rock
jutsu.description: You slam your palms into the ground as the immediate area becomes blackened. A single Earthen Artifact is erected from the ground at a point of your choice within range. The structure is black and cold to the touch and emanates a light obstructing aura. The Structure absorbs all light within 15 feet of it creating a blackened field that cannot be seen through to the other side. Creatures within that radius are immediately Blinded and cannot see while within the radius and cannot be seen by creatures outside the radius either. A creature who touches the structure can see through the blackened field as if it wasn't there at all and loses the Blinded condition so long as they remain within contact with the structure. The structure has an AC and hit point value equal to your Ninjutsu save DC. If the structure is destroyed the jutsu immediately ends.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Earth Clone
jutsu.description: A modified version of the Shadow Clone Technique that allows the user to create a solid construct from soil, rock and sand in their own image. The clone weights 6 times as much as the user and cannot swim (or drown). You can summon one Clone using this jutsu, treated as your Earth Clone. The Earth Clone must be standing on the same surface as you. The Earth Clone counts as an Earthen Artifact. The Earth Clone has 20 hit points and Immunity to Genjutsu based effects, Psychic & Poison damage, Resistance to Bludgeoning, Earth & Cold damage and Vulnerability to lightning damage. Creatures who have chakra sight can immediately tell the clone is made of earth and can distinguish the clone from the original. When command this clone to attack with a Clone Strike, it can make two attacks, instead of 1. The Earth Clone can only cast jutsu with the Earth Release.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the clones Hit points by 10.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Earth Dragon Bullet
jutsu.description: You spit up a puddle of mud from your stomach after molding chakra which transforms into a Dragon head that then opens its mouth and fires compressed balls of mud that are meant to cause concussive damage on impact.
