Make two ranged ninjutsu attacks targeting different creatures. On a hit the target takes 4d6 earth damage and must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save they are Staggered.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Geo Progeniture
jutsu.description: You weave hand seals as you can manifest multiple shards of shimmering earth, made of Earth Release Chakra. These shards can be any shape you chose and can shimmer in any color you like. You can create up to 3 shards using this jutsu with each one created costing 8 chakra. You then select a number of spaces you can see equal to the number of shards you create within range and throw one shimmering shard to each space. As an Action on your turn, you may trigger all the shards created by this jutsu, causing it to erupt into a blooming flowerhead made of earth. All creatures within 15 feet of a shard must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 4d8 Earth damage and being Dazed on a failed save or half as much on and no additional effects on a successful save. If a creature is within range or more than 1 shard, increase the damage dealt by 2d8 for each share they are near beyond the first. A creature who is within the range or more than one shard takes a -1 penalty to their saving throw for each additional shard they are within the range of beyond the first shard. A creature who is within the range of more than one shard makes only one saving throw, not three. A creature that fails this save by 5 or more instead becomes Stunned for a number of their turns equal to the number of shards they are within the range of. A creature who fails this save by 10 or more and are within the range of three shards becomes Petrified for 3 of their turns.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Guide to Resistance
jutsu.description: For the duration, you gain one of the following sets of defenses, pick one. Resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, slashing damage Resistance to Earth damage and Immunity to Cold damage

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Mud Wolf
jutsu.description: You focus on conjuring a beast made of pure earth release chakra. By fusing your earth release chakra with the surrounding dirt, earth and other earthen like minerals, you are able to conjure two mud wolves. Mud wolves are Earthen Artifacts. The Mud Wolf has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section and use your Ninjutsu attack bonus or Ninjutsu Save DC when an effect calls for it. You can command them as a Bonus action, and all wolves attempt to perform the same actions against either the same creature or different creatures determined by you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the number of Wolves you Summon by +1.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Rending Drill Fang
jutsu.description: You cover your forearm with a spinning drill made of stone. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature you can see in range dealing 6d6 Earth damage and inflicting Bruised. If this jutsu scores a critical hit, the earth drill splinters and explodes, tripling the damage dice, instead of doubling them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Rock Tank
jutsu.description: The user covers itself with earth, soil or sand and molds it into a rolling sphere that is then launched at a target in range, crushing them beneath its new weight. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature you can see within range propelling yourself towards the target creature and ending your movement occupying the targets space, if possible, dealing 4d8 Earth damage. The target also makes a Strength saving throw being knocked Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Sand Armor
jutsu.description: An extremely protective and dense layer of sand surrounds you and takes on the same texture and color of your clothes, skin and item blending in with your clothing perfectly. For the duration of this jutsu you gain 16 Temporary Hit Points. These Temporary Hit Points are resistant to Piercing, Slashing, Bludgeoning and Cold damage as the sand protects you. If you would take Lightning damage, this jutsu is dispelled, ending all of its benefits before calculating damage normally.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the Temporary Hit points by 8.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Sand Coffin Binding
jutsu.description: You call forth a collection of sand, dust and pebbles to surround and capture a creature you can see within range in order to crush it. The target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failure, target creature is Stunned and held 5 feet off the ground by this jutsu. They are surrounded by a mass of sand, dust and pebbles with 15 hit points. damage that would be dealt to him, instead harms the sand. If the masses hit points are reduced to 0, this jutsu ends early. As an action, on a following turn after capturing a creature in this jutsu, the user may compress a captured creature crushing them dealing 5d12 earth damage. At the end of a captured creatures turns they makes a Strength saving throw to escape regardless of being Stunned.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12 respectively

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Sandstorm
jutsu.description: You conjure a powerful localized spiraling vortex of earth, dust and sand around Earthen Artifacts. This localized storm is 10 feet wide and 15 feet tall. You can select one Earthen Artifact you can see in range. Creatures who begin their turn within the storms area, excluding the construct, must make a Strength saving throw taking 4d6 earth damage and being knocked Prone on a failed save. A creature in the radius of 2 or more storms is only affected by one at a time.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6 or the number of constructs you can target to conjure the storm around.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Terrashield
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or another creature you can see in range would take damage.
jutsu.description: You slam your open palm onto the ground creating a 10-foot tall, 5 foot wide and 1-foot-thick stone wall directly in front of the creature you are protecting granting them total cover. This wall acts as an Earthen Artifact occupying a space of your choice within 5 feet of the target, appearing right before an attack or jutsu would hit or harm them. It has 3d6+12 hit points, resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, slashing and cold damage and vulnerability to lightning damage. If the damage the wall receives would exceed its hit points, when you initially conjure, the original target take any remaining damage as normal and the wall is destroyed. The wall acts as a structure otherwise. It does not dissolve or vanish instead remaining until destroyed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the hit points of the wall by 1d6+4.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Tectonic Palm
jutsu.description: You place your palm onto any surface of earth and cause the earth to splinter, break, and shift. Selecting a point on a surface you can reach and shift and distort the earth in a 30-foot cube originating from you. All creatures in the affected area must make a Strength saving throw to avoid being crushed and slammed by the shifting earth. On a failed save affected creatures take 4d6 earth damage and affected area becomes difficult terrain. You can cast this jutsu targeting an area with difficult terrain due to uneven or damaged earth like ground, you can remove the difficult terrain at no cost. Casting this jutsu to remove difficult terrain does not cost chakra.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, its range can become 60-feet (20-foot radius) and can only originate from an Earthen Artifact within 60 feet, causing the chosen Earthen Artifact to release a 20-foot radius shockwave forcing creatures in the area to make their saving throw being affected by this jutsu's effect.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Bottomless Swamp
jutsu.description: You select a point you can see within range as a swamp-like pool begins to form, filling a 60 ft Cube. This mud pool is difficult terrain, cannot be traversed using water walking techniques, and prevents creatures from dashing or jumping. Creatures caught in the radius when this jutsu is cast, enters the radius for the first time on their turns, or begins their turns there must make a Strength saving throw and additional Strength saving throws at the beginning of each of their turns for the duration. Each consecutive failure imposes additional penalties and effects on the target creature(s). On a success a creature removes one of the failure conditions in the reverse order they received them. Each failed save deals 4d8 Earth damage to the affected creature. 1st failure. Their movement speed is reduced by 20-feet and they cannot gain bonuses movement speed for the duration. 2nd failure. Half of the creature's body is submerged and are Restrained by the thick untraversable mud. 3rd failure. They are dragged below the surface and counted as suffocating. They can survive a number of their turns equal to their constitution modifier, after which they begin Dying. If this jutsu ends while a creature is submerged, they are forced to the surface as the Swamp hardens over again.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Cradle of Jade
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take, when a creature other than yourself, that you can see within range would take damage.
jutsu.description: You surround a creature you can see within range with Earth Release Chakra in an attempt to protect them. When a you or a creature you can see within range would take damage, you can spend your reaction encasing them in chakra that quickly solidifies as Crystalline Jade right before impact. The Crystalline jade reduces the incoming damage by 10d6. The Crystalline jade has resistance to Cold damage, and Vulnerability to Lightning damage. The Crystalline jade does not protect against Genjutsu. The Crystalline jade then dissolves at the beginning of the affected creatures turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduction by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Earth-Style Wall
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Action or 1 Reaction, which you take when you or another creature you can see in range would take damage.
jutsu.description: You convert chakra into earth and spit it from your mouth, or use earth that's already present to quickly generate a large wall. The wall is 5 Feet Thick, 30 Feet Long and 25 Feet High and if the wall is generated within a creature's space, the creature is pushed to either side of the wall (Your choice). The wall can have any designs or shape you decide. The Wall has an AC of 20, 5d6+25 Hit Points, and 6 DR vs all damage excluding Lightning damage. This wall is also resistant to bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage that are not a result of a jutsu. This wall counts as an Earthen Artifact.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the walls hit points by 1d6+5.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Iron Skinned Spear
jutsu.description: You focus Earth Release chakra throughout one of your limbs until it darkens into a dark brown hue and gains the texture of solid stone. You then use this darkened ligament to strike at a creature with enough force to tear through almost anything. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature within range. On a hit, you deal 8d6 Earth damage and marking the creature with a mark of petrification. A creature marked this way makes Constitution saving throws at the beginning of each of their turns for the next minute. On a failure its skin begins to harden at the point of impact as their body begins to petrify. If the creature fails this saving throw three times their body fully hardens as they become Petrified turning fully into stone for the next 24 hours. If the target creature succeeds 3 saves, they reject the earth chakra from their body ending the effects of this jutsu. If this jutsu is used on a creature previously affected by this jutsu within 24 hours, they make each saving throw at advantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Lapis Dominion
jutsu.description: You release earth release chakra from your body touching everything within a 90-foot cube originating from you. When you cast this jutsu you erect walls of Lapis made of Earth Release chakra 30 feet high and 10 feet thick on the outside edges of this jutsu's range. These walls have a 20 AC, 60 hit points, and 8 DR. These walls cannot be traversed with wall walking abilities. Earth Release Jutsu you cast while within your jutsu's radius cost 2 chakra less to cast. When you cast this jutsu, select a number of creatures within your jutsu's range. Those creatures are immune to this jutsu effects. All other creatures who begin their turns in this jutsu's area or enter its area for the first time must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they are affected by a shift in gravity, as they gain 1 rank of Weakened and become unable to maintain concentration on a Jutsu that does not have the Earth release keyword until the end of their next turn.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Lazuli Tusk
jutsu.description: You generate an Earthen Artifact in the form of some tusked or horned creature of your description and manipulate it to ram into a target creature of your choice within range. Make a melee Ninjutsu Attack against a target creature within range, as the Earthen Artifact attempts to ram the target. On a hit, you deal 3d10 Piercing damage and 3d10 Earth damage. Once this jutsu ends, the Earthen Artifact stands in place occupying a 5-foot cube. The construct weighs 500 pounds, and can be used as partial cover. It counts as an Earthen Artifact of your creation while remaining as a part of the environment until destroyed or otherwise moved.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of Earthen Artifacts you summon. Each Earthen Artifact must target a different creature.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Stone Bamboo Shoot
jutsu.description: You conjure 4 reinforced spears of earth that all converge on a single creature you can see within range from 4 different points surround the target creature. Make a Ninjutsu Attack on the target creature dealing 5d12 Earth damage as they attempt to skewer the target. A 20-foot cube centering on the target creature becomes difficult terrain and creatures cannot take the dash, dodge or disengage actions while within an area of difficult terrain created by this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Unphased Rock
jutsu.description: You mark a single stone you are holding with chakra as you bind a piece of yourself to it for the duration. Select two Skill proficiencies or 1 Save Proficiency. This stone becomes imbued with that knowledge and experience for the duration. A creature who is holding this stone with one hand gains these proficiencies for the duration. While holding this stone they cannot make hand seals or use Chakra seals with the same hand holding the stone.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Added/Reduced Weight
jutsu.description: You use your chakra to temporarily manipulate the weight of something you touch. Objects and structures, you touch increase in weight drastically, increasing 10 times in total weight. Objects and structures you touch that occupy a space no larger than a 60-foot cube, cannot handle the strain of their own weight and begin to shatter and break shattering into super heavy rubble. If used on an unwilling creature they must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save their weight is doubled, and become Encumbered. Encumbrance gained in this way is treated as a Physical condition. At the end of an affected creatures turn, they make a Strength saving throw to end this Jutsu's effect on them. If used on a willing creature, you reduce their weight to 0 as they gain a 30-foot flying speed.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Crystal Arcanum
jutsu.description: You create a field of potent Earth Release Chakra that permeates through you and a number of Earthen Artifacts of your choice within range 30 feet of you. Select creatures of your choice within 30 feet of yourself or an Earthen Artifact affected by this jutsu, gain a layer of earth release chakra that solidifies into the shape of armor of your description. Select creatures gains 8d6 temporary hit points The temporary hit points you grant them has Immunity to Cold damage and resistance to bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Gravity Break
jutsu.description: You focus a large amount of chakra into a 40 wide and 100-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range. All creatures and objects that aren't anchored to the ground in the area begin to fall upward and reach the top of the area. A creature can make a Dexterity saving throw to grab onto a fixed object it can reach or anchor themselves to the ground using a weapon to stab into the ground or wedge themselves into place, thus avoiding the fall. If a creature prevents themselves from falling by using a weapon, they must make Strength saving throws at the beginning of each of their turns, falling upwards on a failure. If a solid object (such as a ceiling) is encountered in this fall, falling objects and creatures strike it just as they would during a normal downward fall. If an object or creature reaches the top of the area without striking anything, it remains there, oscillating slightly, for the duration. At the end of the duration, affected objects and creatures fall back down.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Diamond Bone Hardening
jutsu.description: You encase your body in stone armor as hard as iron. While you are not wearing armor, you gain 14 DR.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and your DR by +2. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, at the beginning of each of your turns, gain 2d6+4 temporary hit points.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Starfall Wake
jutsu.description: You manifest a series of shimmering shards of earth 300 feet in the air that floats above you until the end of your turn. As an Action or Reaction on your turn you can call down these shards to bombard a space you can see within range. A creature within 10 feet of the selected space must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 6d8 Earth damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. Once you cast this jutsu on your turn, you do not need to cast it again to use its effects with a different action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Stone Dragon
jutsu.description: You conjure a giant Stone construct made of earth, dust, soil, and sand forming a large Stone Dragon that obeys your commands. The Stone Dragon has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section and use your Ninjutsu attack bonus or Ninjutsu Save DC when an effect calls for it. You can command them as a Bonus action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the dragons hit points by 20.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Stone Needle
jutsu.description: You focus a large amount of chakra into a single thin but incredibly fast spear of earth that's 90 feet long and 5 feet wide. Creatures in range must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 9d10 earth damage, becoming Bruised, Staggered, and being knocked Prone on a failed save, or half as much damage and no further effects on a successful save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Moon fall
jutsu.description: Description: Upon Competition of your Jutsu's Hand Seals you manifest a single super huge Earthen Artifact 1 mile in the air. Spend chakra in multiples of 40 up to twice. For every 40 Chakra spent this way, the Gargantuan Moon like structure you manifest grows in size and affects a larger area when dropped. You cannot reduce the cost of this jutsu by any means. 40 Chakra: The Moon like structure falls on a point you can see within range crushing a space equal to a 30-foot sphere. Each creature within the affected area and could escape the area this jutsu effects either by movement, or a jutsu they know, makes a Dexterity saving throw. Creatures with no way to escape the affected area, instead makes a Constitution saving throw. Dexterity Saving throw. On a successful save, they are able to use their movement or a jutsu which could allow them to escape the sphere. On a failed save they take 14d6 earth damage. Constitution Saving Throw. On a successful save they take the result. On a failed save, they take double the result of 14d6 earth damage. All creatures who are within 30 feet of the sphere, excluding creatures who succeeded the previous saving throw must make a Strength saving throw as the shockwave from such a massive impact deals significant damage to the area. A creature takes 7d6 Bludgeoning & 7d6 Earth damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. 80 Chakra: The Moon like structure falls on a point you can see within range crushing a space equal to a 60-foot sphere. Each creature within the affected area and could escape the area this jutsu effects either by movement, or a jutsu they know, makes a Dexterity saving throw. Creatures with no way to escape the affected area, instead makes a Constitution saving throw. Dexterity Saving throw. On a successful save, they are able to use their movement or a jutsu which could allow them to escape the sphere. On a failed save they take 28d6 earth damage. Constitution Saving Throw. On a successful save they take the result. On a failed save, they take double the result of 28d6 earth damage. All creatures who are within 60 feet of the sphere, including creatures who succeeded the previous saving throw must make a Strength saving throw as the shockwave from such a massive impact deals significant damage to the area. A creature takes 14d6 Bludgeoning & 14d6 Earth damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Partial Assimilation
jutsu.description: You form a geometric shape using chakra to generate molecule sized earth particles. Anyone caught in this jutsu's radius begins to be atomized. Select a shape. All creatures in the affected area must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 9d12 Earth damage. If you would roll six or more 12's with this jutsu's damage die but did not kill affected creatures, they lose an appendage of your choice (Arm or Leg). If a creature is reduced to 0 hit points, they are turned to dust and are immediately killed. 60 -foot long, 5-foot-wide line 30-foot tall, 15-foot-wide cylinder 20-foot Cube.

jutsu.name: Earth Release: Star Shatter
jutsu.description: Description: You create a single star shaped earth structure 1 mile in the air before you cause it to shatter. Select a point you can see within range. All creatures of your choice within 120 feet of the selected point must make a Strength saving throw as the weight of a dying star is thrust upon them. On a failed save they are Stunned and knocked Prone as they become unable to move and find it hard to even breathe. A creature who begins their turn in this space, ends their turn in this space, or enters this space for the first time must make the Strength saving throw. A creature Stunned by this jutsu that begins or ends its turn in the affected area takes 6d12 earth damage. A Stunned creature makes a Strength Saving throw at the end of their turns and do not automatically fail as a result of being Stunned. On a successful save, they end the Stunned condition on themselves immediately.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Air Current Dance
jutsu.description: You whip air currents around your hands and generate a dust cloud, centered on a point of the space you are occupying. The radius this jutsu affects is heavily obscured and lasts for the duration or until a strong wind disperses it. Creatures with a special form of vision (Ex. Chakra Sight) are not affected by this jutsu.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Blades of the Wind
jutsu.description: You generate a strong breeze of slicing wind from swiping one of your limbs. A wave is created in a 20-foot cone originating from you. Creatures in range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d8 Wind damage, and gaining 1 rank of Bleed on a failed save, and only half damage on a successful save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, affected creatures must first make a Strength saving throw, being pushed back 20 feet in a straight line on a failed save. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, this jutsu's duration can become Concentration, up to 1 minute and its range becomes Self (20-Foot Radius Sphere). All who enter for the first time on a turn or begins their turn in this radius must remake their saving throws being affected by this jutsu as listed above. Additionally, creatures in range who fail their saving throws are thrown in a direction of your choice. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you can increase the size of this jutsu's Cone to 60-Foot Cone or the size of the Sphere to 30-Foot Radius Sphere. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, a creature who fails their saving throw doubles the distance moved to 40-feet and increases the ranks of Bleed they gain to 3 ranks.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Blurring Wind
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: Your body becomes blurred, shifting and wavering to all who can see you. When cast, the triggering attack rolls an additional d20, taking the lower result. For the duration, until the beginning of your next turn, hostile creatures have disadvantage on attacks against you. An attacker is immune to this effect if it doesn't rely on sight, as with blindsight.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Collective Gale
jutsu.description: You collect wind release chakra and infuse it into your Medical Release technique. One willing creature within range breathes in this Medically infused wind. For the duration a creature who has breathed this wind does not need to breathe, and if you would gain ranks of a Physical condition, you reduce the ranks gained by 1, for the duration. Additionally, when they would regain hit points, they regain an additional +4 Hit points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the bonus hit point regained by +4.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Counter breeze
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage from a Ninjutsu or Taijutsu.
jutsu.description: You create a condensed bubble of super dense air around you in an attempt to deflect incoming attacks. This barrier of wind has 2d8+5 hit points, and has resistance to Lightning damage and vulnerability to Fire damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the wind barrier hit points by 1d8

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Dust Wind
jutsu.description: You generate a strong wind from your lungs with a single breath. When you exhale you kick up a cloud of dust, dirt, and other loose debris in the target radius. Creatures who are in the affected range must make a Wisdom Saving throw. On a failed save, affected creatures are Blinded until the end of their next. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the size of the cone by 10ft

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Feather Fall
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you begin falling.
jutsu.description: You create a single high-pressure stream of air from either your hands or feet slowing your descent while falling by 60 feet per round until the jutsu ends. If you land before the ninjutsu ends, you take no falling damage and land on your feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and select 2 additional willing creatures for this Jutsu's benefits within 30 feet of you.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Gale Bomb
jutsu.description: You create a field of oppressive cutting wind that lashes out against creatures when they attempt Hand Seals (HS). Select a point you can see within range as a field of soft air begins to churn in a 10-foot radius. All creatures in the given radius that casts a jutsu with the Hand Sign (HS) component takes 2d6 Wind damage and must make a Constitution Saving throw gaining the Bleed condition on a failed save. As a bonus action on your turn, you may move the field up to 20 feet in any direction to a point you can see within range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, this jutsu gains the Swirl effect. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, this jutsu also triggers if a creature casts a Jutsu with the Mobility (M) component. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, if a creature casts a jutsu with both HS and M components it triggers once, for each property listed. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Gale Fists
jutsu.description: You coat your hands and feet in a layer of compressed wind release chakra. For the duration of this jutsu, when you take the attack action to make an unarmed attack, you can make a melee ninjutsu attack and your unarmed damage becomes 1d10 + ninjutsu ability modifier and deals wind damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, when you deal unarmed damage while this jutsu is active, you can force the affected creature to make a Strength saving throw, being pushed 20 feet on a failed saving throw. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, this jutsu's range becomes 10 feet and can be applied to a willing creature in range. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Gryphons Surge
jutsu.description: You create two wings made of wind release chakra that beats with enough force to feel like a tornado is passing through. Select a point connected to the space you are standing in as the burst of wind originates from this point. All creatures in a 20-foot radius, centered on this point must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked Prone and losing concentration on jutsu they are concentrating on, on a failed save Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you can choose which creature s this jutsu affects. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, all affected creatures in range with an Elemental condition makes their saving throw with a -2 penalty.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Lions Roar
jutsu.description: You weave Wind Release Chakra together, creating a thin veil of chakra in the shape of a Lion around you and other creatures of your choice in range. This chakra then collapses on the group granting all select creatures the listed benefits of the duration; Bonus +15 feet to speed. A rank of Mastery for Ninjutsu Attack Rolls.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase the bonus to speed to +25. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, all affected creatures deal a bonus +1d8 to damage they deal as a result of jutsu they cast, twice per turn. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, Ninjutsu attack rolls instead gain 2 ranks of Mastery. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, all affected creatures gain Immunity to the Dazed and Weakened conditions.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Palm Vortex
jutsu.description: You create a localized vortex of cutting wind. All creatures within range must make a Dexterity saving throw to avoid being horrendously slashed. On a failed save creatures take 2d6 wind damage and being pulled 5 feet closer to you or half as much on a successful save and no additional affects. If a creature is currently affected by any Elemental condition, you trigger residual elemental energies making their saving throw at disadvantage. A creature with an Elemental condition who fails their saving throw instead takes 4d6 wind damage or half as much on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Passing Typhoon
jutsu.description: You create a powerful current of strong winds in a 15-foot radius sphere, centering on you. This field of wind also follows you. For the duration, while within its area, it Deafens other creatures, extinguishes unprotected flames, becomes difficult terrain to creatures other than you and disperses vapors, gases and fogs that can be dispersed by strong winds. Additionally, ranged attacks have disadvantage if they pass into or out of the area of this jutsu.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Raging Gale
jutsu.description: You manifest a powerful torrent of wind, strong enough to lift and throw most creatures. Select a point you can see within range. A spiraling torrent of wind erupts upwards. All creatures within a 10-foot radius originating from the chosen point must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they are thrown 30 feet upwards and are then forcefully slammed back to the ground, taking 2d10 wind damage and are left Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, creature with ranks of an Elemental condition and fail their saving throw has the ranks of each of those conditions increased by +1.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Raging Vortex
jutsu.description: You encircle yourself and other willing creatures in range with potent Wind Release Chakra. For the duration, you magnify the targets physical capabilities with the following. Affected creatures gain a Rank of mastery to their Strength or Dexterity Saving throws (Pick one) and their movement speed is increased by +10 feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can select both Abilities to gain a rank of mastery for their saves. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank its duration becomes 1 minute, losing the need to concentration on it.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Second Wind
jutsu.description: You breathe in deeply filling your lungs and blood with chakra filtered oxygen accelerating its blood flow and slightly rejuvenating you. You recover 2d6+ Your Ninjutsu ability modifier hit points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and roll an additional 1d6.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Slicing Wind Bullet
jutsu.description: You create a small sphere of compressed air in the palm of your hand before launching it at a target creature that you can see within range. You Fire two bullets of air. You can direct the bullets at the same target or different ones. Make two ranged ninjutsu attack, dealing 2d6 wind damage and Once per turn an affected creature gains 1 rank of Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, affected creatures must make a Strength saving throw, being pushed 10 feet backwards on a failed save. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, it gains the Swirl effect. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the ranks of Bleed inflicted by +1. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Supporting Gale
jutsu.description: You create a compressed blast of air assisting you in with either a physical tasks or to disperse a hazardous mist or gas. When making a Strength, Dexterity or Constitution skill check or saving throw you can cast this jutsu to grant yourself a Rank of Master to the check or save. Alternatively, you can cast this jutsu to instantly dispel a gas or mist within 10 feet of you of a rank equal to or less than the rank this jutsu is cast at.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, you can instead gain 2 ranks of Mastery to the Check. If cast at S-Rank, you instead gain 3 ranks of mastery to the check.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Vacuum Rain
jutsu.description: You create a powerful updraft that sucks oxygen upwards robbing creatures of the ability to breathe within range. All casters of this jutsu create a 60-foot tall, 20-foot-wide cylinder that removes all air from inside of it replacing it with furiously rotating blade of Wind Release Chakra, centered on a point of your choice within range. All creatures within the cylinder must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they are slashed with blades of wind taking 2d6 slashing damage and 2d6 wind damage and are robbed of their air in their lungs as they begin suffocating. A Suffocating creature can only survive a number of rounds equal to their constitution modifier before passing out falling unconscious from the lack of air or half as much damage on a successful save. A creature makes this saving throw the start of each turn they begin within this cylinder. An unconscious creature can regain consciousness when another creature spends an action waking them. Creatures inside the cylinder cannot gain the benefits of an increase to movement speed and are treated as if they are in difficult terrain. Combination: Increase the damage dealt by 1d6 for each damage type and the width of the cylinder by 5-feet, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Violent Whirlwind
jutsu.description: You exhale a powerful stream of wind from your mouth. Creatures caught in the target area must make a Strength Saving throw. Creatures take 2d8 Wind damage and fall knocked Prone on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful save. Also, vapors, mists, gases and fogs that can be dispersed by strong winds are dispelled immediately.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, creatures who fail their saving throw also gain +1 rank of Bleed. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, the size of this jutsu's cone increases by +20 feet. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher this jutsu gains the Clash keyword and creatures who fail their saving throw are pushed backwards 20 feet. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, the size of this jutsu's cone increases by +20 feet.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Zephyr Strike
jutsu.description: You move like the wind with wind chakra spinning around you. For the duration, your movement doesn't provoke opportunity attacks and you gain a +20 bonus to your speed movement.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you gain a +1 bonus to AC for the duration. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you gain the Friction Break special action at the start of each of their turns for the duration. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you gain a +2 bonus to your Dexterity saving throws. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu's duration becomes 1 minute, losing the need to maintain concentration. Friction Break. This special action can be used to either make one additional Weapon Attack, Dash, or use an object action.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Bursting Compressed Air
jutsu.description: You conjure a spiraling vortex of wind chakra around a target creatures weapon. The target creature makes a Dexterity saving throw to avoid the collapse of the wind. On a failed save they take 3d6 slashing damage as they are sliced for holding the weapon. If they continue to hold their weapon, they must make another save at the beginning of their next turn. On a successful save they take half damage. After 3 failed saves the weapon they are holding can't shatters, destroying it and sending weapon shrapnel flying. Other Creatures within 10 feet of the exploding weapon taking 3d6 slashing damage. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Great Breakthrough
jutsu.description: You create a swirling vortex of air in front of you. You compress the air until the pressure explodes forward like a cannon in a straight line. Creatures in a 5-foot wide, 60-foot-long line must make a Strength saving throw. Creatures take 4d10 Wind damage and are thrown backwards 30 feet away are Dazed and Prone on a failed save. On a success they take half damage and no further effects. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase damage by 1d10 and knock back distance by 10ft.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Pressure Surge
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when an allied creature casts a jutsu.
jutsu.description: When you see an allied creature cast a jutsu, you create a tornado like mass that is released as a shockwave. All hostile creatures in a 60-foot cone, originating from you, must make a Strength saving throw or be pulled 20 feet towards your allied creature falling Prone and take 5d6 wind damage on a failed save or half as much and no further effect.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, this jutsu gains the Barrier keyword and the triggering creature gains a barrier of wind with a number of temporary hit points equal to the result damage this jutsu rolls. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, and initiates a Clash the triggering allied creature rolls their Clash check as well, and you can choose which result you want to use, yours or theirs. On a failure, only you suffer the effects of the clash.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Rakshasa Barrier
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take Earth, Fire, Cold, or Lightning damage
jutsu.description: You raise your hand and generate an intensely dense torrent of wind that circles around you, creating a bubble of wind that envelops your entire body. The barrier that envelops you has 2d12 + 6 hit points, resistance to Lightning damage and vulnerability to Fire damage. If this jutsu would reduce damage from any of the listed damage types below, it will trigger an additional effect. Creatures in 15-foot radius centered on you must make a Dexterity saving throw to resist its effects. Fire. All creatures make a saving throw becoming Burned on a failed save as the Fire spreads around you from your rotating bubble of wind. Lightning. All creatures must make a saving throw becoming Shocked on a failed save, as lightning jumps from you to other creatures around you. Cold. All creatures must make a saving throw becoming Chilled on a failed save, as the cold is spread to all creatures around you. Earth. All creatures must make a saving throw, gaining the Bleed condition on a failed save, as they are pelted with shrapnel of earth.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the barriers hit points by +6.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Recovering Breeze
jutsu.description: You create a field of medical chakra infused wind release chakra that pulses outward from you. All creatures of your choice within Range, excluding yourself, regains 4d6 hit points and removes the Weakened & Bruised conditions.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the amount healed by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Rotating Ferocious Wind
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you cast another Ninjutsu with the Wind Release keyword.
jutsu.description: You reinforce your Ninjutsu with additional buffeting gales of wind. The triggering Ninjutsu you cast gains a +2 bonus to its initial Saving throw DC.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Tearing Gale Palm
jutsu.description: You construct a large claw of your design made of semi-solid compressed wind chakra. You can attack with it targeting a single creature up to 30 feet away. Make a ranged ninjutsu Attack. Target Creature takes 5d6 Wind damage and the affected creature makes a Constitution saving throw, gaining 2 ranks of Bleed on a failed saving throw.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Vacuum Field
jutsu.description: You manifest a Seal of wind Release Chakra that glows in the air. The seal then triggers removing all oxygen and atmosphere from within a 30-foot radius, centering on you. You and all other casters are immune to this jutsu's effects. All creatures who begin their turns in this jutsu's range must make a Constitution Saving throw or begin immediately suffocating as they are robbed of their air in their lungs. A suffocating creature can only survive a number of rounds equal to their constitution modifier before passing out falling unconscious from the lack of air. An unconscious creature in this jutsu's radius takes 3d12 Necrotic damage. A creature who's hit points are reduced to 0 as a result of this jutsu internal organs explode while inside the body, making them unable to be revived unless those are restored. An unconscious creature can regain consciousness when another creature spends an action waking them. Fire & Lightning cannot exist within this field and if a jutsu with a Fire or lightning release keyword would have an effect that would cross into this fields jutsu's radius they are immediately dispelled. Combination: Increases the damage dealt by 1d12 and the size of the radius by 5-feet, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Vacuum Shield
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction which you take when you or another creature within range would take damage.
jutsu.description: You create a swirling vortex of air in front of you. You compress the air until the pressure implodes on itself creating a shockwave blocking attacks and reducing the lethality of attacks in your immediate area. All allied creatures in this jutsu's radius gain 20 Temporary Hit points from the oscillating flow of wind until the end of the current turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and temporary hit points by 5.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Wall of Wind
jutsu.description: A wall of strong wind rises from the ground at a point you choose within range. You make the wall up to 30 feet long, 15 feet high, and 1 foot thick. You can shape the wall in any way you choose so long as it makes one continuous path along the ground. The wall lasts for the duration. When the wall appears, each creature within its area must make a Strength saving throw. A creature takes 4d8 Wind damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The strong wind keeps fog, smoke, and other gases at bay. Small or smaller flying creatures or objects can't pass through the wall. Loose, lightweight materials brought into the wall fly upward. Arrows, bolts, and other ordinary projectiles launched at targets behind the wall are deflected upward and automatically miss. Large objects such as boulders and similar objects and attacks can penetrate it. Creatures in gaseous form can't pass through it. Fire ignites the Wall of wind leaving it as a massive wall of Fire. If this happens the caster of Wall of wind loses all control of it and counts as the jutsu ending.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Whirlwind Movement
jutsu.description: You generate a massive amount of wind chakra around your feet. You move so fast you teleport to a space you can see within range.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Whirlwind Spear
jutsu.description: You create a molded construct of wind release chakra that floats next to you. This construct can take the shape of any spear or piercing like object such as an arrow, lance, sword or anything you prefer. You then launch this construct in a straight line, piercing through all creatures in a 5-foot wide, 120-foot longline originating from you. All creatures in range must make a Dexterity Saving throw taking 5d6 wind damage on a failed Save or half as much on a successful one. The first creature your construct would pass through that has the Burned, Chilled, Corroded, Shocked or Envenomed condition has that condition exacerbated. That creature takes 2d10 Fire damage if they are Burned, cold damage if they are Chilled, acid damage if they are Corroded, lightning damage if they are Shocked or poison damage if they are Envenomed. On a successful save no additional damage is done. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6 and 1d10, respectively.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Wind Rider
jutsu.description: Description: You coat yourself in Wind Release Chakra. For the duration, you gain a 30ft flying speed, but at the end of your turn you begin to float down towards the ground, ending this movement within 1-foot of the ground. You cannot suffer falling damage or be knocked Prone as you are always carried by the wind to a safe landing. Additionally, you are always floating at least 1 feet off the ground for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you no longer need to end your movement within 1 feet of the ground. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, if you take the dash Action you gain an additional +60 fly speed until the end of the current turn.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Backlash Wave
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, when you would suffer the effects of or take damage from a Ninjutsu
jutsu.description: You create a vortex that spins counterclockwise just before an attack hits you. Make a contested Ninshou Check vs the jutsu save DC of the triggering jutsu. If you roll higher, the triggering jutsu's effect is dispelled and the caster of the jutsu takes the damage of their own Jutsu. On a failure, this jutsu is dispelled and you suffer the effects of the triggering jutsu as if you failed your saving throw or the enemy scored a critical hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu can be cast as a Reaction, when you or an allied creature within 30 feet of you would suffer the effects of or take damage from, a Ninjutsu. On success, the triggering creature suffers the effect of their jutsu as well.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Cherishing Breezes
jutsu.description: You inhale once, filling your lungs with Air that you mix medical release chakra. You then attempt to pass this air from your lungs into the lungs of another who have either died within the last minute or are dying. This can be done in a number of ways such as CPR, a kiss, simply manipulating the air to exit your lungs and enter the downed creatures. When you do, the dead or dying creature makes a Constitution Saving throw adding 2d4 to their roll vs a DC 15 + 1 for each round they have been dead. On a Success, they immediately end the dead or dying condition regaining consciousness with 1 Hit Point and a number of Temporary Hit points equal to three times their level. These Temporary hit points last for 10 minutes.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Divine Serial Waves
jutsu.description: You create a vortex where you can control the strength for the wind as it slices into its targets upheaving the ground upon impact from the force alone. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack targeting a creature you can see within range. On a hit target creature takes 8d6 wind damage and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw gaining 2 ranks of Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target with this jutsu by +1.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Gale Blade
jutsu.description: You create a thin blade of cutting wind that slices through everything in a continuous line. Select a space you can see within range. Then select a second space you can see within 60 feet of the first selected space. Draw a straight line in between both spaces. All creatures who the line passes through or by within 5 feet must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d6 wind damage and gaining 3 ranks of Bleed on a failed save or half as much and no additional effects on a successful one. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Multilayered Gale
jutsu.description: You wave your hands back and forth creating layers of wind that stack on top of one another creating a shield of wind. Your shield of wind is dense not allowing most things to pass through it. When you create your barrier of wind it has 30 Hit points. It occupies your space with you and protects you in all directions, ranged attacks targeting you are made at disadvantage. At the start of each of your turns you can spend a bonus action to restabilize this barrier regenerating 2d6 of the shields hit points. This barrier has a vulnerability to Fire damage, and resistance to Lightning damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the hit points of the barrier by 8.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Thumb of Destruction
jutsu.description: You generate a tornado that touches down on a point you can see within range. This Tornado is 120 feet tall and 30 feet wide. When this jutsu is cast, if its affected area overlaps with a creature, they must make a Strength saving throw, taking 8d8 wind damage on a failed save. All creatures, objects and structures, excluding casters of this jutsu, within the tornado's area make a Strength saving throw being sucked into the eye of this storm. On a failed save they are thrown to the top of this tornado for but a moment before the tornado compresses and fires all creatures within directly into the ground at sound breaking speeds. All creatures, objects and structures are immediately blasted into the ground taking triple falling damage as if they fell from 120 feet. Combination: Increases the damage dealt by 1d8 and the height of tornado 10-feet, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Vacuum Blade
jutsu.description: You exhale wind release chakra onto a weapon to increase its sharpness, range and lethality. This can even be used on your unarmed strikes creating lethal blades of wind extending from those strikes. Enhanced weapon or unarmed strike's deals an additional 2d8 wind damage twice per turn, its range is also increased by 10 feet. ranged weapons also damage all adjacent spaces around its target on a successful hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast at S-Rank, increase the damage of this jutsu by +1d8.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Vacuum Great Sphere
jutsu.description: You generate 2 large Spheres of wind chakra. Choose 2 points you can see in range. You send out two 20-foot radius spheres of wind, each centered on a chosen point that envelops all creatures in their effected areas. Creatures that begin their turn in these affected areas or who enter them for the first time on their turns, have their movement speed is reduced to 0 and they cannot breathe while inside the sphere. Creatures that begin their turn in an affected area, must make a strength saving throw. On a failed save, they gain 1 rank of Exhaustion. On a successful save, they regain half of their movement speed. Upon exiting the affected area or this jutsu having its effects ended, affected creatures recover from all ranks of Exhaustion this jutsu imposed on them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and select one additional space this jutsu affects.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Defiance Storm
jutsu.description: You throw a Chakra seal onto the ground before you release the chakra bound to it creating an aura of reinforcing wind release chakra. All creatures of your choice gain the benefits of this jutsu while inside this Jutsu's radius. For the duration select creatures within this jutsu's radius gain a rank of mastery to all Strength, Dexterity and Wisdom Saving throws.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Eye of the Storm
jutsu.description: You Create a powerful twisting cyclone of wind that seals yourself and all creatures in this jutsu's radius off from other creatures and effects from outside this jutsu's radius. Creatures outside this jutsu's radius cannot see into the opaque wall of twisting wind. A creature with Chakra sight when looking at the wall only sees a wall of chakra and cannot make out anything within. If a creature attempts to pass through the wall, they must make a Strength saving throw. On a successful save they pass through the wall. On a failed save they take 6d8 wind damage and are pushed back to the centermost space. This jutsu's walls, collectively share 200 hit points, with resistance to lightning damage, and vulnerability to Fire damage. While inside this jutsu's radius, electricity cannot be generated and Jutsu with the Lightning release keyword cannot be cast. If the wall takes cold damage from a Jutsu with the water release keyword, the walls becomes wreathed in water, gaining resistance to Fire damage.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Lions Fang Blade
jutsu.description: You mold wind Release Chakra to create a beast made purely of Wind Release Chakra, that has a design and look of your description that counts as large. Upon its creation, you command it to attack up to 6 creature, once each. Make a melee Ninjutsu attack for each creature it attacks within range as it leaps and assaults each creature. On a hit, you deal 8d6 wind damage. A creature that takes damage from this jutsu must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they gain 4 ranks of Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 2d6.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Neverending Breath
jutsu.description: You inhale a single breath, and using chakra you are able to reinvigorate that single collection of air as if it were a new breath. You no longer need to breathe for up to 10 hours. You cannot be suffocated or drowned. You gain immunity to jutsu with the Inhaled keyword and a +4 bonus to Constitution saving throws.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Splitting Breeze
jutsu.description: You mold wind Release Chakra to create a blade of wind release chakra that is so compressed it fits into the palm of your hand and the blade is so sharp, its able to cut through any defense put Infront of it. Make a melee ninjutsu attack, with a +2 bonus to its critical threat range, dealing 10d6 wind damage on a hit and forcing the affected creature to make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 5 ranks of Bleed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6 and its critical threat range by +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank and you score a critical hit with it, the resulting impact is enough to decimate not just its target, but all creatures surrounding it. All creatures within 20-feet of the original target (excluding the original target) must make a dexterity saving throw, taking 6d6 wind damage and gain 5 ranks of Bleed on a failed save.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Vacuum Wall
jutsu.description: Description: You create a vacuum of air around a willing creature in range. Until the beginning of your next turn. All melee and ranged attacks, targeting the affected creature, must roll 1d20 when they declare the attack. On a roll of 8 or greater, the attack is diverted to another random creature in range. Assign a number to each creature within the attacks range, excluding the original target, and the GM randomly decides which number is the new target.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Hurricane of Disaster
jutsu.description: You generate a category 6 hurricane that touches down with the sole intent of bringing nothing but ruin in its wake. This hurricane extends 250 feet into the air and has a 120-foot radius. This hurricane affects all creatures except its casters within its radius. At the end of each of your turns, it moves 90 feet in a random direction (Roll 1d8. 1: North, 2: North East, 3: East, 4: South East, 5: South, 6: South West, 7: West, 8: North West.). Creatures within this jutsu's area of effect must make a Strength saving throw being ripped from their current position and thrown 250 feet into the air taking 14d6 wind damage and being Restrained by the wind on a failed save. A creature thrown into the air may repeat their Strength Saving throw to escape this wind at the end of each of their turns, taking 14d6 wind damage on a failed save. On a successful save, they are able to end their restrained condition, and even fall to the ground taking no fall damage on a successful save. All structures in this jutsu's path automatically fail their saves and are destroyed as they are pulled into the hurricane's rotation. This hurricane lasts for 1 Minute as once cast it cannot be stopped or dispelled by its casters willingly. Combination: Increases the damage dealt by 2d6, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two.

jutsu.name: Wind Release: Tornado Explosion
jutsu.description: You create a spiraling cylinder of wind centered on yourself that has a 30 Foot radius and is 120 feet high. This cylinder appears for a moment and explodes, throwing everything in its affected area like rag dolls. All creatures, objects, structures, and constructs, in this jutsu's affected area of your choice, must make a Strength saving throw. Creatures that are flying, objects, structures and constructs makes their saving throw at disadvantage. On a failed save, the following occurs. Take 8d12 wind damage. Are thrown 120 feet in a random direction, and landing prone taking fall damage as if you fell from twice the distance thrown. Become Stunned until the end of their next turn. On a successful save, only take half of 8d12 wind damage and no further effects. Swirl. Creatures who would fail their saving throw, spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding the caster within 5 feet of them. Hostile creatures within 5 feet of the failing one gains 1 rank of all elemental conditions currently affecting it.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Blue Flame Dance
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: You generate a vacuum of chakra absorbing the heat from the surrounding area and create a layer of superheated chakra to protect yourself. You gain 4 Temporary hit points and resistance to the triggering instance of damage. If the triggering damage or any further attacks that target you are melee attacks and the triggering creature is no more than 10 feet away, the attacking creature takes 2d6 Fire damage for each attack, until the end of the current turn. If the triggering damage was cold, this jutsu is dispelled.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage dealt by 1d6 and the temporary hit points gained by +4. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, and the triggering damage type was Fire, you instead gain twice the number of temporary hit points. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, this jutsu can be cast as a reaction when you would see an allied creature within 30 feet of you take damage placing a shield of blue flame on them, instead granting them twice the temporary hit points this jutsu would grant you, until the end of the current turn. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, this jutsu's effects last until the beginning of your next turn. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu's casting time becomes Special, which you take when you or an allied creature takes damage. Casting this jutsu in this way no longer costs your reaction.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Blazing Ash Cloud
jutsu.description: You knead chakra in your lungs to create a cloud of ash, exhaling it, centering it on a point within range, as it fills a 20-foot radius that bends corners. The cloud remains until dispersed by a strong wind or dissipates naturally which takes 1 minute. The ash cloud is a heavily obscured area.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you can spend a bonus action or reaction to ignite the cloud, forcing all creatures within to make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6+4 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a success. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the damage this jutsu does by 1d6+1 for each rank above C-Rank. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, all creatures that fail their saving throw also gains 2 ranks of the Burned.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Phoenix Fire
jutsu.description: You spit forth 4 motes of flame. Make 4 ranged ninjutsu attacks against a creature in range. A single creature can be targeted by this jutsu no more than twice per casting. On a hit, the target takes 1d6+1 Fire damage. If you score at least two hits with this jutsu on the same target, they must make a Constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Burned.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks you can make with this jutsu by +2. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, if this jutsu would deal damage to a creature with at least 2 ranks of Burned, if they fail their saving throw, you can choose to trigger the Burned conditions damage. If you do, they lose all ranks afterwards. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can target a single creature up to 3 times, instead of twice. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can target a single creature up to 4 times, instead of twice.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Devastating Blaze
jutsu.description: You hold your hands out and Fire a sheet of flame from your hands. Each creature in a 20-foot cone must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d6+3 Fire damage and gain a rank of Shaken on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6+1. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, creatures who fail their save also gain +1 rank of Burned. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, this jutsu's range increases to a 40-foot cone. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the ranks of Burned inflicted to +2, instead of +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu's range increases to a 60-foot cone and any creature reduced to 0 as a result of this jutsu's damage is turned to ash from the intensity of the flames.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Crimson Spider
jutsu.description: You spew out Fire into a space you can see within range. The Fire then is shaped and molded into a Flame Spider, which can be commanded as a bonus action on your turn. The Flame Spider has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section and use your Ninjutsu attack bonus or Ninjutsu Save DC when an effect calls for it.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Demons Lantern
jutsu.description: You conjure multiple flames of chakra to surround you. These flames transform into faces of demons of your description. You shed bright light for 20 feet and dim light for another 10 feet. As a reaction, when a creature moves within 5 feet of you, you can force the target to make a Dexterity saving throw as these Demon lanterns attempt to strike the target. On a failed save, the target is set ablaze, gaining the Burned Condition.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Erupting Flame
jutsu.description: You Focus chakra into the target area and create a hot spot directly under a target creature you can see in range. The target must make a Dexterity saving throw or take 4d8+4 Fire damage and are Dazed on a failed save, or half as much on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Fireball
jutsu.description: You breathe a stream of Fire onto the target area which then expands into a ball of Fire burning all in its range. Select a point you can see as you breathe a stream of flame that expands into a ball of Fire filling a 10-foot radius sphere centering on the chosen point. All creatures in range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6+4 Fire damage and 1 rank of Burned on a failed save or half as much damage on a success save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6+1. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, flammable objects caught in the radius ignites if it isn't being worn or carried. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can change this jutsu's range to Self (60-Foot Line). If cast in this way the line is 10-feet wide. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can change this jutsu's range to Self (60-Foot Cone)

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Dragon Flame Bolt
jutsu.description: You breathe a bolt of dragon like flame at a target within range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack dealing 3d10+3 Fire damage on a hit, and forcing the effected creature to make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 1 rank of Dazzled on a failed save as the flash of heat and light overwhelms them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d10+1. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase the number of attacks you can make with this jutsu by +1. You must target different creatures with each attack. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the ranks of Dazzled inflicted by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, if you target a body of sitting water occupying a space no larger than a 15-foot cube, you evaporate all the water contained within. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the ranks of Dazzled inflicted by +1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Flame Coat
jutsu.description: You engulf a weapon in Fire chakra, coating it in a flame. If you let go of the weapon or it is taken from you, the Fire disperses. While you maintain concentration on this jutsu, you can engulf another weapon you are holding as a bonus action. Your weapon deals an additional 1d8 Fire damage, twice per turn. The Fire sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, its bonus damage increases to 2d8. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, its bonus damage increases to 3d8.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: White Flame Strike
jutsu.description: A vertical column of flame erupts upwards from the ground towards the sky in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10-foot wide, 20-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 3d6+3 Fire damage and gaining 1 rank of the Burned condition on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A flying creature makes their saving throw at disadvantage, and treats the damage they take from this jutsu as if they were vulnerable.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Flame Whip
jutsu.description: You conjure a flaming whip to strike at a creature you can see up to 20-feet away from you. Make a melee ninjutsu attack, dealing 2d10+2 Fire damage. The target must make a Dexterity saving throw, being pulled 10 feet towards you. If a creature who failed the saving throw ends their movement within 5 feet of you, they fall Prone and gain the Burned condition.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d10+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Fox Fire
jutsu.description: A Flickering flame appears in your hand. The flame remains there for the duration and harms neither you or your equipment. The flame sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. The jutsu ends if you dismiss it. You can also attack with the flame. As part of the Action used to cast this jutsu, you can make a ranged ninjutsu attack against a creature you can see within 30 feet of you. On a hit, the target begins to glow with a soft, warm, and glowing radiance. While glowing in this way, this jutsu's duration becomes until the end of your next turn, and creatures have advantage on melee attacks targeting the creature.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Green Fire
jutsu.description: You manifest an emerald-colored flame and mark a creature you can see within range with it. The target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, being marked by the emerald flame on failure. A marked creature, for the duration that fails a saving throw against a jutsu with the Fire Release keyword gains a rank of Shaken.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can attempt to mark up to 3 creatures instead of 1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu's range instead becomes Self(45-Radius) forcing all creatures of your choice to be affected by this jutsu.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Hellfire Rejection
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description: When you are hit by a creature that you can see, you release a brilliant burst of Fire chakra in a 15-foot sphere centered on a point of the space you are occupying. Creatures of your choice caught in the radius must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d8+3 Fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8+1. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, creatures who fail their saving throw gain 2 ranks of Shaken. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher you can increase the range of this jutsu to Self (30-foot Radius).

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Passionate Flames
jutsu.description: You manifest a fuchsia-colored flame and place it on a wounded creature you can see within range. Target creature rolls 2 Hit Die, spending one. When they do, they recover twice the result. After casting the target creature gains resistance to Fire damage until the end of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of Hit die rolled and spent by 1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Sanguine Weapon
jutsu.description: You manifest a sanguine-colored weapon of your description made from hardened Fire chakra. For the duration, you may spend your Action to make a Sanguine Weapon Attack. Sanguine Weapon Attack. Make a melee ninjutsu attack dealing 4d6+4 Fire damage on a hit.
