jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you can command your Sanguine weapon to move independent of you as it gains a 30-foot fly speed. If you do, it listens to your commands as a bonus action performing an Autonomous Sanguine Weapon Attack. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, your Sanguine Weapon Attack can attack twice, instead of once. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, as an Action while you are holding your Sanguine weapon, you can perform a Sanguine Pyronado Attack. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, your Autonomous Sanguine Weapon Attack can attack twice instead of once. Autonomous Sanguine Weapon Attack. Make a melee ninjutsu attack dealing 2d6+2 Fire damage on a hit. Sanguine Pyronado Attack. Make a melee ninjutsu attack vs the AC of each creature within 5 feet of you. On a hit, you deal 6d6+6 Fire damage on a hit.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Ember
jutsu.description: You manifest a highly flammable ember of Fire release chakra. You can throw this ember onto any unworn or held highly flammable material or substance causing it to immediately go up in flames. The fires created by this jutsu grow in size as normal Fire would and are not controlled by you. These flames are so hot they evaporate all water from sources that are not created by a Jutsu with the Water Release keyword of at least D-Rank or higher. These flames extinguish themselves after 10 minutes.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Wildfire
jutsu.description: You manifest a multicolored flame and Fire a stream of it towards a creature you can see within range. Target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they gain 2 ranks of the Burned condition, and take 1d12+1 Fire damage. On a successful save they gain 1 rank of burned and no further effects. If the target already had the Burned condition, on a failed save, you trigger the Burned conditions damage effect as if it were the start of that creature turn.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Burning Gaze
jutsu.description: You direct your gaze at an object or creature within range. Your eyes begin to glow a violent bright red and the target erupts into flames for the duration. An object begins to burn as flames engulf it. A creature must make a Dexterity saving throw gaining the Burned condition. While you are concentrating on this jutsu, creatures currently suffering from the Burned condition that you can see, cannot extinguish the fires that are burning them.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Dragon Flame Bombs
jutsu.description: You knead chakra in your stomach and superheat it until you exhale it from your gut at terrifying speeds, leading to you being unable to truly control its path. You Fire a Stream of superheated Fire in a 5-foot wide, 120-foot-long line directly in front of you. Creatures in its path must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 6d8+6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a success. Objects within 5 feet of the stream of Fire ignite if they are not being worn or held. The stream leaves behind a line of Fire from you to the end of the 120-foot path. The Fire remains for 1 minute or until extinguished.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Blue flame Seeds
jutsu.description: You manifest 2 gems made of Fire Release Chakra that feel hot to the touch. A creature can use its bonus action to eat one gem, eating a gem allows the consuming creature to spend up to 2 of their own Hit die, regaining hit points equal to the spent dice. They also gain a number of Temporary Hit points equal to 2d6 + 4. A creature can gain the benefits of this jutsu once every hour.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the temporary hit points by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Explosive Clone
jutsu.description: You conjure a clone comprised of Fire release chakra, made to look exactly like you called an Explosive Clone. When this jutsu is cast, by spending 9 chakra, you summon one Clone. You can spend 6 additional chakra to summon 1 additional Clone. You can spend 6 additional chakra in this way to summon additional Clones up to 3 times per casting. This clone cannot use Clone Strike and can only cast jutsu with the Fire Release keyword. When this clones hit points are reduced to 0, it detonates. Detonate. All creatures within 15 feet of the clone must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d6+5 Fire damage, gaining 1 rank of the Burned, are pushed back 10 feet and fall prone. On a successful save the they only take half damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Flame Armor
jutsu.description: You create a layer of superheated chakra over your skin. Seemingly setting yourself on Fire in any pattern you decide. You gain 12 temporary hit points. For the duration, while you have temporary hit points granted by this jutsu, you cannot be reduced below 1 temporary hit point as a result of wind damage, you gain resistance to Fire damage so long as you have temporary hit points granted by this jutsu and you gain immunity to the Burned conditions and melee attacks that strike you also deal 12 Fire damage to the attacker.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the temporary hit points gained and damage dealt by 4.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Flaming Seals
jutsu.description: This jutsu places a flaming seal on a willing creature other than yourself that you touch, creating a chakra connection between you and the target until the jutsu ends. Affected creatures gain a +1 bonus to all saving throws and resistance to Fire damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, increase the bonus by +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the bonus by +2.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Flaming Trap
jutsu.description: When you cast this jutsu, you inscribe a chakra seal that harms other creatures, either upon a surface (Such as a table, or a section of floor or wall) or within an object that can be closed (such as a book, a scroll, or a treasure chest) to conceal the chakra seal. If you choose a surface, the glyph can cover an area of the surface no larger than 10-feet in diameter. If you choose an object, that object must remain in place, if the object is moved more than 10-feet from where you cast this spell, the glyph is broken, and the spell ends without being triggered. The chakra seal is nearly invisible and requires a successful Intelligence (Investigation or Ninjutsu) check against your spell save DC to be found. You decide what triggers the chakra seal when you cast the jutsu. For seals inscribed on a surface, the most typical triggers include touching or standing on the seal, removing another object covering the seal, approaching within a certain distance of the seal, or manipulating the object on which the seal is inscribed. For chakra seals inscribed within an object, the most common triggers include opening that object, approaching within a certain distance of the object, or seeing or reading the seal. Once a chakra seal is triggered, it explodes in a 15-foot radius sphere, destroying the surface it is inscribed on, Creatures in radius must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 10d6+10 Fire damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. Afterwards the jutsu ends.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Heated Body
jutsu.description: You breathe a single deep breath, using your Fire Release chakra to increase the temperature of your body as you begin to radiate heat. For the duration you gain immunity to cold environmental conditions, and creatures who are within 10 feet of you gain advantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks in cold environmental conditions. Ice and rain begin to evaporate as it come in contact with you creating heated steam.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Heated Sight
jutsu.description: You enhance your vision to be able to see heat itself like a snake with infrared. Creatures and objects who produce any level of heat are outlined in varying colors of your own description with brighter meaning they are warmer and dimmer meaning they are cooler. Creatures whom are perceived in this way cannot gain the benefit of cover or be hidden from you unless they are heavily obscured by a physical object or structure. This allows you to perceive creatures hidden by steam, smoke, gas or even in darkness, but not through walls.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Heavenly Prison
jutsu.description: You take a chakra seal and imprint your chakra onto it, before attempting to bind it to a creature, forcing them to make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, the target creature is branded with a flaming chakra seal for the duration. While branded with this seal, creatures have extreme difficulty molding chakra. When the affected creature would cast a Ninjutsu or Genjutsu with the Chakra Molding (CM) component, They must make a Chakra Control check at disadvantage vs your Ninjutsu save DC. On a failure, they take 5d8 Fire damage. Creatures can make a Ninshou skill check as an action vs your Ninjutsu save DC to break the seal ending this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, its duration becomes 1 Hour. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, its casting time becomes 10 minutes and its duration becomes 1 Week. Affected creatures lose the ability to mold chakra for the duration. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, and its duration becomes Until Dispelled. Affected creatures lose the ability to mold chakra for the duration.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Searing Rush
jutsu.description: You conjure superhot globes of flame. These globes are so hot that they begin to boil the water out of the air itself. These globes combine to form a single super compressed globe of flame that explodes with such force as it fires a powerful beam of Flame that burns the air as it passes. All creatures in a 10-foot wide 90 feet long line originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save creature take 6d8+6 Fire damage and gain 3 ranks of Burned or half as much damage and no additional effects on a successful save. Combination: Increase the damage by 2d8+2, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: White Fire Ember
jutsu.description: You manifest a pale white-colored flame and use it to enhance your Fire Release Jutsu for the duration. For the duration, once per turn, jutsu you cast with the Fire release keyword rerolls all Attack rolls of 1~2, taking the second result. Also, Jutsu you cast with the Fire Release keyword rerolls all damage rolls of 1 or 2, taking the second result.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Controlled Burst Movement
jutsu.description: You create hyper pressurized embers of Fire on the soles of your feet or the palm of your hands. When this jutsu is cast and at the beginning of each of your turns, you gain the benefit of the Dash action. When you would move, you can choose to instead select a space within your movement speed and teleport to that location with extreme speed. This does not provoke attacks of opportunity and you can move vertically while active.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Crossfire
jutsu.description: You weave Hand Seals as you select one point you can see within range. The point you choose erupts with 4 different 5 feet wide, 30-foot-long beams of Fire, that shoots in different directions that all originate from the point you chose. No beam can Fire in the same direction. All creatures who are in the range of any beam fired must make a dexterity saving throw taking 8d6+8 Fire damage and gaining 3 ranks of Burned on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful save. Combination: Increase the damage dealt by 1d6+1 and the number of beams by +1, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Heat Snap
jutsu.description: You snap your fingers in an attempt to turn a burning target into dust. You can only target a creature currently under the Burned condition forcing them to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they take the maximum possible damage from the Burned condition.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, the snap can be heard by all burning creatures in initiative. If a creature with ranks of Burned has 100 or less hit points, it dies, turning to dust in a flash Fire. If a creature dies as a result of this jutsu in this way, you cannot cast this jutsu at S-Rank until you complete a Full-Rest.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Everflame Fruit
jutsu.description: You manifest a 1 apple sized gem of Fire infused with medical release chakra that feels scalding to touch, but doesn't actually burn its holder. You spend all of your Chakra Die, rolling and recording the result. A creature can use its bonus action to eat the gem. Eating a gem forces a creature to roll all of its Hit die, spending them all. A creature can also spend an action feeding this to a dead or dying creature who's been dead for no longer than 1 minute. The creature regains Hit points equal to the result of their Hit Die + The casters Chakra die roll. A creature can gain the benefits of this jutsu once per long rest.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Fire Wall
jutsu.description: You create a standing wall of Fire, 1 foot thick, up to 60 Feet long, and 20 feet tall. When the wall appears, each creature within its area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 5d10+5 Fire damage, or half as much damage on a successful save. This wall of Fire has 60 hit points, and regains hit points equal to the amount of wind or Fire damage it takes. It has vulnerability to cold damage. One side of the wall, selected by you when you cast this jutsu, deals 5d10+5 Fire damage to each creature that ends its turn within 10 feet of that side or inside the wall. A creature takes the same damage when it enters the wall for the first time on a turn or ends its turn there. The other side of the wall deals no damage.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Great Fire Cage
jutsu.description: You spend your entire turn focusing and weaving hand seals to achieve a state of absolute focus. You create a massive Cage of Fire capturing all inside the radius of the jutsu. Select a point you can see within range. A cage of flame manifests covering a 30ft cube centered on the chosen point. All creatures within the affected area are trapped inside the cage of Fire. Creatures attempting to cross the cages walls must make a Strength saving throw. On a Strength save failure, the target creature is pushed back 10 feet in a straight line and takes 4d10+4 Fire damage as they are unable to breach the cages perimeter. If a creature passes their Strength saving throw and is able to breach the perimeter, then they must make a constitution saving throw. On a failure, the target creature gains 2 ranks of Burn.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Heated Sun
jutsu.description: You create a globe of white-hot Fire on a point you select within range, that you can see. Creatures who begin their turns within 20 feet of the Globe must make a constitution saving throw, gaining two ranks of Weakened on a failed save. Flammable objects within 20 feet of it ignite, and metal begins to become too hot to touch causing those wearing or holding metal within range to take 6d6+6 Fire damage at the beginning of each turn they are in contact with it. As an action, you may move this globe 30 feet in any direction from its current placement.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase damage by 1d6+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Heavenly Flame
jutsu.description: Description: You compress Fire Release chakra onto the surface of your skin and release it when you strike a creature, creating a targeted explosion of white-hot flame. Make a melee ninjutsu attack, dealing 7d8+7 Fire damage as the Fire erupts on contact. The target creature must make a constitution saving throw, gaining 1 rank of the Burned and Weakened conditions.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the number of attacks it makes by +1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Investiture of Flame
jutsu.description: Flames race across your body, shedding bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet for the Jutsu's duration. The flames don't harm you or any allied creature. Until the jutsu ends, you gain the following benefits: You are immune to Fire & wind damage. Resistant to Bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage. Vulnerability to Cold damage. You can use your bonus action to create a 15-foot cone of Fire, extending from you in a direction you choose. Each creature in the line must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d10+3 Fire damage and gains the Burned condition on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Sunbeam
jutsu.description: You create a beam of brilliant white-hot light that flashes forth from you in a 5-foot-wide, 60-foot line. Each creature in the line must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 5d10+5 Fire damage and are Blinded until the end of your next turn. On a successful save they take half as much damage and no further effects. You can create a new beam of light as your action on any turn until this jutsu ends. For the duration, you shine bright light in a 30-foot radius and dim light for an additional 30 feet. This light is equivalent to sunlight.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Blazing Fervor
jutsu.description: You pump Fire Release Chakra through your veins, muscles, and even blood. When you do, for the duration, your Strength & Dexterity becomes 20. If either of these ability scores are already 20, they instead gain a +2 bonus. melee attacks that strike you deals 12 Fire damage to all creatures within 10 feet of you as you release a mass of heat from your body in response. Taijutsu attacks as a result of Jutsu you cast deal an additional 2d8+2 Fire damage, twice per turn. Taijutsu and Bukijutsu you cast gains the Fire Release Keyword and deals Fire damage instead of its listed type, if any.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Crimson Butterfly
jutsu.description: You manifest a swarm of Fire release constructs in the shape of butterflies. This swarm occupies a 60-foot cube centered on a point you can see within range and can occupy the spaces of multiple creatures as they flutter around them. Until the beginning of your next turn, creatures that move more than 5 feet, detonates the fluttering butterflies around them, being forced to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take Creatures caught in the explosion (including casters) make a Dexterity saving throw at disadvantage. On a failed save they take 8d6+8 Fire damage and having their movement speed reduced by 10. On a successful save they take half damage and no further effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the size of this jutsu by 10 feet and the damage by 1d6+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Delayed Fire Missile
jutsu.description: A beam of yellow light flashes from your hands, then condenses to linger in your hand as a glowing bead for the duration. When this jutsu ends, either because your concentration is broken or because you decide to end it, the bead blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame that spreads around corners. Each creature in a 20-foot radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes Fire damage equal to the total accumulated damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The jutsu base damage is 8d8+8. If at the end of your turn, the bead has not yet detonated, the damage increases by 4d8+4. As a bonus action, you can make a ranged ninjutsu attack throwing the bead at a creature or object causing it to detonate on a hit. On a miss the target creature gets advantage on its saving throw.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the base damage and damage increase by 1d8+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Fire Storm
jutsu.description: A storm made up of sheets of roaring flame appears in a location you choose within range. The area of the storm consists of up to ten, 10-foot cubes, which you can arrange as you wish. Each cube must have at least one face adjacent to the face of another cube. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. It takes 10d4+10 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. The Fire damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried. A creature in the area of more than one fiery storm is affected a maximum of once.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Great Fire Absorption
jutsu.description: You create a vacuum of chakra, absorbing lingering Fire from the surrounding area collecting it towards yourself converting it into chakra and using this new chakra to heal wounds. Lingering Fire or objects on Fire are all extinguished and it is absorbed into you. You heal 10 Hit points for every source of Fire occupying a 5-foot cube that is absorbed this way. Fire cannot be generated or maintained in the radius of this jutsu until the beginning of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Sunburst
jutsu.description: Brilliant sunlight flashes in a 60-foot radius centered on point you can see within range. Each creature in that light must make a constitution saving throw, taking 8d6+8 Fire damage and is Blinded for 1 minute on a failed save. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage and isn't Blinded by this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6+1.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Relentless Blaze
jutsu.description: You and all other casters, touch a creature who has been dead no longer than 10 minutes, infusing its body with Fire Release chakra, giving it a temporary spark of life fueled by you. The creature awakes with full Hit points and Chakra points. All jutsu they cast lose any other Nature Release Keywords and Gain the Fire Release Keyword in its place. All Class, or Clan features that would require a nature release keyword of any type works with Jutsu with the Fire release keyword. All damage they deal is counted as Fire damage and ignores resistance, and treats immunity as resistance instead. At the end of the 1-minute duration or if the creatures hit points is reduced to 0, they turn to ash as that spark of life goes out being unable to be revived by any means. Combination: Increase the revived creatures maximum hit points by +10, for every additional creature aiding in casting this jutsu, beyond the first two. If 10 or more creatures participate in this jutsu's casting, the affected creature is allowed to make a single DC 20 Constitution saving throw. On a success, they do not turn to ash, and are able to remain alive after this jutsu's 1 minute duration. On a failure, they turn to ash as normal.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Body of Dawn
jutsu.description: You coat your body in such a dense amount of Fire Release chakra that you emit a painfully bright Light. All creatures who can see within a 30-foot radius who don't spend a reaction to avert their gaze or are behind total cover when this jutsu is cast must make a Constitution saving throw, being Blinded on a failed save for this jutsu's duration. Once your chakra calms after casting, your body becomes like living flame. You gain immunity against Wind, Fire, bludgeoning, piercing and slashing damage and You gain vulnerability to Cold damage. When you would take Fire damage or suffer an effect cause by a jutsu with only the Fire release keyword, you instead regain hit points equal to half the amount of damage it would normally deal. If you enter water, you are surrounded by a 5-foot radius of steam and bubbles that grant you partial concealment but you also take 8d6 cold damage each round you remain in the water.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Rain of Stars
jutsu.description: Blazing orbs of Fire plummet to the ground at four different points you can see within range. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on each point you choose must make a Dexterity saving throw. The sphere spreads around corners. A creature takes 10d8+10 Fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A creature in the area of more than one fiery burst is affected a maximum of once.

jutsu.name: Fire Release: Phoenix Blessing
jutsu.description: You touch a willing creature, passing on your flame. A creature you touch regains a number of hit and chakra points equal to your maximum hit and chakra points respectively. They gain a number of Temporary hit points equal to their Maximum Hit points and a number of Temporary Chakra points equal to their Maximum Chakra points. You end all conditions on the target and they feel immediately revitalized, gaining Advantage on all ability checks, skill checks, saving throws, and attack rolls for the next minute. After this minute duration, your Maximum Hit & Chakra points become 0, and cannot be increased by any means.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Dolphin Break
jutsu.description: You manipulate your water release chakra to generate an aquatic beast of your choice that appears to ram into a creature you can see within range. Make a melee ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack. On a success you deal 3d6 cold damage and forcing the target creature to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they gain 1 rank of Chilled. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or increase the range to 45 feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. When you cast this jutsu at B-Rank the number of attacks you make becomes 2. When you cast this Jutsu at S-Rank the number of attacks you make becomes 3.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Healing Waters
jutsu.description: You collect a mass of water and impart chakra into it and begin to heal a willing creature you can touch with it. This dissolves the water being used into the healed creature as part of the healing process. Roll 2d10, healing the target creature by the total. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to also remove one of the following conditions; Bleed, Burned, Envenomed, Shocked or Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the healing by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Hidden Mist
jutsu.description: You conjure a cloud of water particles condensing into a large cloud of mist, centered on a point connected to your space. Creatures inside this cloud of mist cannot see more than 5 feet away from them, gaining disadvantage on Perception checks to see and attacks made while inside the cloud that rely on sight. Creatures outside the mist that rely on sight also have disadvantage when attacking other creatures who are inside the mist. Also, when this jutsu is cast, select one creature, whom you can see. That creature becomes Mist Marked. For the duration of this jutsu, a creature mist marked is always perceived by you while they are in the hidden mist, cannot benefit from being hidden while inside the hidden mist and you do not gain disadvantage on attack rolls against them. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to instead select an additional creature to be mist marked.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Mantis Wings
jutsu.description: You manifest wings of water that flutter at your command. Until the end of your turn, you gain a 30-foot fly speed. At the end of your current turn, if you have not landed, your wings slow down bringing you gently down onto whatever surface may be directly below you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. Casting this jutsu at B-Rank, gives it a Concentration, up to 1 minute duration. Casting this jutsu at S-Rank, gives it a Concentration, up to 10-minute duration at no additional chakra cost to maintain concentration.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Piranha Shark
jutsu.description: You manifest a medium sized bubble of water that you then summon a swarm of shark like piranhas within. The Water Shark has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section. You may command the Water Shark as a bonus action on your turn. The Water Shark may take an appropriate reaction if able, such as attack of opportunity. The Water Shark uses your Ninjutsu Attack bonus for its attacks and your Save DC for all of its effects save DC's.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Sensing Rain Tiger Sphere
jutsu.description: You collect a mass of water into a sphere from the surrounding area 5 feet in diameter. For the duration of this jutsu you can see movement and activity in a 500-foot radius centering on the sphere. This requires the creature who is moving, to disrupt some source of water (Puddles, bodies of water or rain). This movement or activity creates bubbles inside the sphere relative to the direction of the movement compared to the location of the sphere. If this jutsu is cast while it is raining, its affected radius becomes the size of the area affected by rainfall. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to remove Concentration from this jutsu. But if you do, the sphere remains in place and cannot be moved.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you create rain clouds centering on a point you can see up to 1 mile in the air that spreads and covers a 10-mile radius centering on that point. The rain clouds begin to pour down heavy rain lasting for up to 24 hours. For this duration, you subconsciously gain the benefit of this jutsu's original effect without the need for a sphere of water.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Sharks Maw
jutsu.keywords: Ninjutsu, Taijutsu, Water Release, Stable, Efficient
jutsu.description: You manifest a construct of water release chakra around your hands to take the shape of a sharks that clamp down and bite into targets for the duration. For the duration, as an action, you can make a melee ninjutsu (or Taijutsu) attack. On a hit, you deal 3d8 cold damage and forcing the target to make a Strength saving throw, being Grappled by the shark's head on a failed save. A creature Grappled by you this way takes 1d8 cold damage at the start of each of their turns as the sharks bite deeper into them. If you cast this jutsu while submerged underwater, the sharks grant you a swim speed of 60 feet and attacks made with this jutsu are at advantage. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or for the duration, if your melee ninjutsu attack result is 10 higher than the targets AC, its treated as a critical hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Syrup Water Shuriken
jutsu.description: You generate multiple shuriken made of sticky water. Make a ranged ninjutsu (or taijutsu) attack against a creature you can see within range, dealing 3d8 cold damage and forcing the affected creature to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they gain 1 rank of Chilled. If you score a critical hit with this jutsu the affected creature gains 2 ranks of Shaken. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to instead make an additional attack targeting another creature within range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Tsunami Mallet
jutsu.description: You manifest a construct of water release chakra in the shape of a large mallet, of your design and description that you use to make a melee ninjutsu (or taijutsu) attack against a target creature within range. On a hit, you deal 4d6 cold damage and the target creature must make a Constitution Saving throw, being Bruised on a failed save. If the target has ranks of an Elemental condition, they suffer a -2 penalty to their saving throw and this jutsu's damage die increases by 1 step. If a target of this jutsu is Grappled, this jutsu's damage die increases by 1 step. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to increase the damage die of this jutsu by 1 step.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. When you cast this jutsu at B-Rank the number of attacks you make increases by +1. When you cast this Jutsu at S-Rank the number of attacks you make increases by +2.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Viscous Water Mass
jutsu.description: You extract water from an area near a willing creature you can see within range creating a medium sized shield of water to protect them. The target increases their AC by +1, and gains +4 DR. If this jutsu would reduce Fire damage you instead double the DR granted by this jutsu. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can select +1 additional creature to gain this jutsu's benefits.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu Is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase the AC bonus by +1 and the DR by +2. If this jutsu is cast a B-Rank, the creature gaining the benefit of this jutsu can choose to end this jutsu's effect early on them when they take damage, but in exchange, gaining resistance to the triggering damage type. If this jutsu Is cast at A-Rank, increase the AC bonus by +2 and the DR by +4. If this jutsu Is cast at S-Rank, this jutsu instead affects all willing creatures of your choice within a 30-foot radius sphere.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Blending
jutsu.description: All willing creatures within range when this jutsu is cast and creatures that would begin their turns within range gain a +4 bonus to the Hide and Sneak skill actions until the end of your next turn as water bends the light around them hiding their presence. The jutsu ends on all affected creatures, if any of them attacks, casts a jutsu or physically interacts with another creature not under this jutsu's effects.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Breathing
jutsu.description: You filter Water as it enters your lungs, being able to breathe as if you were a fish. You can breathe in water as if you were breathing air.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase its duration to 1 Hour. If this jutsu is Cast at B-Rank or higher, its range instead becomes Self (10-Foot Radius) affected all willing creatures in range.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Cutting Water Claws
jutsu.description: You manifest a construct of water release chakra in the shape of two claws that surround your hands, of your design and description. For the duration, as an Action, you can choose to make a Spinning Claw attack or Slicing Water attack. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or increase the ranks of Bleed inflicted with Spinning Claw +1 or the number of creatures you can target with Slicing Water by +1. Spinning Claw. Make two melee ninjutsu attacks, comparing the result vs the AC of all targets of your choice within 5 feet of you. On a hit, you deal 2d6 cold damage and once per turn force affected creatures to make a Constitution Saving throw, gaining 1 rank of Bleed, on a failed save. Slicing Water. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack as you slash the air releasing blades of thin water to slice into opposing creatures up to 15-feet away. On a hit, you deal 2d6 slashing damage as the affected creature becomes sheathed in vibrating water until the start of your next turn. If the target moves or is moved at least 5 feet before the start of your next turn, it explodes, dealing 1d6 cold damage to the affected creature and all creatures of your choice within 5 feet of the original target.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage of both the attack and the explosion damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Formation Technique
jutsu.description: You generate a Pool of water from your stomach and expel it onto the ground in front of you filling a 5-foot cube covering the ground with enough water to step into submerging up to your knee. This pool holds dozens of gallons of water. You can use this puddle as a source of drinking water, lay a trap, or use it as a source for more complex Water Ninjutsu and it lasts for 1 minute before evaporating. You may use the water this Jutsu produces as a Source of Water up to two twice before the pool dries up.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of times you can use the pool as a source of water by +2. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, the size of the Pool is able to fill a 15-foot Cube. If Cast at S-Rank, the size of the Pool is able to fill a 30-foot cube.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Pillar Thrust
jutsu.description: You create a surge of water that erupts upwards from under a creature that you can see within range. This jutsu ignores cover. The target must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 2d10 cold damage and being Dazed on a failed save and half as much on a successful save and no further effects. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to affect all creatures within 5 feet of the target creature as well. A creature can only be affected by this jutsu once per casting.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the number of targets this jutsu can affect by +1 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Purification/Putrification
jutsu.description: You manipulate and mold chakra to reverberate through a source of fluid, be it mud, poisoned waters, or anything in between. Fluid up to 10 gallons that has your chakra moving through it becomes purified and turns into pure drinking water, free of all impurities or it becomes putrid, undrinkable and poisonous to drink (Your choice). If a fluid is manmade or special in any way, make a Ninshou Skill Check against the DM's set difficulty to see if you can purify/Putrefy it or not.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Shield
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage or make a saving throw.
jutsu.description: You create a floating wall of spiraling water, capable of pushing back creatures and blocking attacks. Increase your AC by +2 and gain 6 damage reduction until the beginning of your next turn. If this jutsu would reduce Fire damage from another jutsu, you instead initiate a Clash, and add 1d6 to your clash check. If you have a sufficient water source nearby, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to select another willing creature within 30 feet of you to also gain this Jutsu's benefit until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is Cast at C-Rank or higher, reduce the next instance of damage by an additional +2. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the AC bonus by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, reduce the next instance of damage by an additional +2. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the AC bonus by +2 and reduce the next instance of damage by an additional +2.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Whip
jutsu.description: You create a long whip of water by molding your chakra through it. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a target in range, dealing 2d6 cold damage and pull the creature 10 feet Closer and forcing the target to make a constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Chilled on a failed save. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or on a failed save, the target becomes Bruised.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6 and the distance of this jutsu by +10 feet.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Whisper
jutsu.description: You send bubbles made from Water Release chakra to fill the inner ear of your allies for the duration. All willing creatures within range can gain the benefits of this jutsu for the duration. Affected creatures who would make a Wisdom (Perception) gain a rank of mastery to this Check. Additionally, sound based environmental effects and Genjutsu with the Auditory keyword that force a saving throw of any type are made with a rank of mastery added to the saving throw.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Raging Bubble Tide
jutsu.description: You create a Ranging wave of sticky bubbles and spray it out in a cone in front of you creating a sticky and adhesive ground. Each Creature standing in the affected area, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save affected creatures take 2d8 cold damage and are Restrained in place until the end of their next turn. If you have a sufficient water source nearby, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to cast it as a bonus action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the size of the cone by 10 feet. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher creatures who fail their saving throw are first pushed back 10 feet before being Restrained in place. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the damage dealt by +2d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you can change the shape of this jutsu to be Self (60-Foot Line). If cast in this way all affected creatures make their saving throw with a -2 penalty. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the damage dealt by +2d8.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Drowning Bubble
jutsu.description: You conjure a bubble filled with water and send it towards a creature's head to enclose it within the bubble removing their ability to breathe unless they can breathe within water. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack against a creature within range. On a hit the creature begins to suffocate. While suffocating this way, its speed is halved and at the start of each of its turns it experiences oxygen deprivation taking 3d8 necrotic damage that ignores DR (damage reduction) and resistance. At end of an affected creatures turn, they make Constitution saving throw. On a success, this jutsu ends.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Deep Water Prison
jutsu.description: Description: You create a dense spiraling bubble of water around a creature, capturing them inside and restraining their precise movement. The target creature makes a Dexterity saving throw, being Restrained on a failed save. The user must maintain contact with the sphere holding the captive inside the sphere. Losing contact causes the jutsu to end immediately. A creature loses contact by being moved further than 5 feet away from the target. The sphere has an AC of 20, 10 hit points, and creatures captured inside the Sphere cannot make Hand Seals (HS) or make attacks and find it difficult to breathe. The sphere intercepts all damage meant for the target, except psychic damage, has vulnerability to earth damage, and once it reaches 0 hit points, this jutsu immediately ends. At the end of each of their turns they make a Strength saving throw. On a success they force their way out with brute force. The bubble containing a creature can be moved as an Action on behalf of the caster, as they drag it with them as part of their movement. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to make a captured creatures Saving throws to escape this jutsu at disadvantage.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Foul Legacy
jutsu.description: You manifest water chakra that bubbles up before you unleash it like a bursting bubble, as a pulse of sapphire blue chakra enhances the weapons of your allies. For the duration, one weapon you and each allied creature in range are wielding is enhanced by your sapphire water chakra. Enhanced weapons deal an additional 2d4 Cold damage twice per turn and each time a wielder deals damage to a hostile creature, they gain temporary hit points equal to the bonus cold damage this jutsu deals. If you or affected allied creatures let go of their weapon or it is taken from its original wielder, the sapphire chakra disperses and this jutsu ends on them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, the damage of this jutsu becomes 2d8, instead of 2d4.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Droplets of Change
jutsu.description: You solidify your Water Release Chakra into pure water that floats above your hand in the shape of a teardrop. This teardrop holds the power of change within. Select a willing creature within 30 feet of you to consume the special water. They gain the listed effect; Encourage. Gain 3d12 temporary hit points and a special action called Encouraged Momentum which they lose at the end of their next turn. Encouraged Momentum. On your turn, you can use this special action to take the following actions; Dash, Hide, Disengage, or Dodge. Cleanse. Regain 3d6 hit points and lose all ranks of one of the listed conditions; Bleeding, Burned, Chilled or Envenomed. Crush. Until the end of your next turn, Jutsu cast with the Water Release keyword gain a rank of Mastery to attack rolls, a +1 Bonus to initial save DC's and a +2 bonus to damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, you gain an extra effect you can choose from called Reflect. If cast at S-Rank, you can select two effects when this jutsu is cast. Reflect. Until the end of your next turn, the affected creature is enveloped in a barrier of water that intercepts all damage for the affected creature. The barrier has 6d8 hit points and resistance to Cold and Fire damage. It also has vulnerability to Earth damage. Each time the barrier is struct with an attack it fires a mote of high-pressure water at the attacking creature. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack. On a hit, it deals 4d8 cold damage.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Heavenly Mirror of Pain
jutsu.description: Description: You manifest a ring of water that creates a reflective film similar to that of a mirror. You first seal your reflection into the mirror, then select one creature whom you can see who is not obscured in any way within range. When you do, the target must make a Charisma saving throw, having their reflection bound to the mirror on a failed save. You can only have one instance of this jutsu active at a time. A creature whose reflection is bound to the mirror casts no reflection onto any reflective surface for the duration. For this jutsu's duration, when one creature whose reflection is bound to the mirror take damage, suffer a condition, or regain hit points, the other creature whose reflection is bound to the mirror takes half of the damage dealt, Half of hit points healed and Suffer the same conditions. A creature who is resistant or Immune to a damage type does not share this resistance or immunity to the other creature. (For Ex. If you have resistance to Lightning damage and would take 10 lightning damage, the other creature whose reflection is bound in the mirror takes 5 damage. You then apply your resistance to the Lightning damage reducing it by half down to 5.) This mirror solidifies and becomes a physical mirror for this jutsu's duration. Has 1 Hit Point with 10 AC. In order for this jutsu to persist a creature must be holding it, occupying one hand at all times, which cannot be used to hold other items or weapons. Once the mirror is broken or you dismiss this jutsu as a bonus action. If you do neither creature reflection remains Sealed into the mirror. Any Conditions that remains after the mirror is broken or is dispelled.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Hiding in Mist
jutsu.description: You begin to turn one willing creatures body into a water vapor mist. All equipment the creature is wearing transforms as well for the duration. While in this form, their only form of movement is flying. They gain 20 feet fly speed. It can enter and occupy the space of another creature and slip through tiny cracks wide enough for water vapor to fit through but it treats liquids as solid surfaces it cannot permeate. It has resistance to all damage, excluding Earth damage and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution Saving Throws. The creature can make Stealth checks to be seen as a common cloud of gas, mist or fog. While in this form of mist, they can't talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. They cannot attack or cast jutsu while in this form.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Hydra Scorpion
jutsu.description: You collect surrounding water to create a single Hydra stinger extending from your back. When you cast this jutsu you can make a melee ninjutsu attack and for its the duration you can use your bonus action to make a Hydra Stinger attack. Hydra Stinger. melee Ninjutsu attack against a creature within 15 feet, dealing 3d6 Cold damage On a hit. Once per turn, an affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, if the target would regain hit points or chakra points before the beginning of your next turn, it gains vulnerability against the next successful attack from this jutsu until the end of your next turn. You must have at least 1 Stinger available. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or this jutsu also deals 3d6 chakra damage on a hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, you manifest 3 stingers allowing you to take the Hydra Stinger Shield attack as a Reaction. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, you manifest 6 stingers allowing you to take the Hydra Stinger Swarm attack as an Action. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you manifest 9 Stingers allowing you to take the Hydra Stinger Symphony attack as an Action. Hydra Stinger Shield. As a Reaction to taking damage, you reduce the triggering damage by 4d8. Doing so spends 1 of your Stingers. If you have less than the needed Stingers you cannot use this, Action. Hydra Stinger Swarm. Make 3 melee ninjutsu attacks against a target up to 15 feet away, dealing 3d6 cold damage for each successful attack. Doing this spends 1 of your Stingers. If you have less than the needed Stingers you cannot use this, Action. Hydra Stinger Symphony. All creatures of your choice must make a Dexterity saving throw as all your stingers strike out slamming and stinging with aggressive focus repeatedly. On a failed save, affected creatures take 8d8 cold damage and gain a rank of Chilled or half as much damage on a success. Doing this spends 2 of your Stingers. If you have less than the needed Stingers you cannot use this, Action.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Medical Jellyfish
jutsu.description: You Conjure water into the shape of a jellyfish that floats in a space large enough for a small creature. This jellyfish uses the Medical Jellyfish stat block found in the Summon Stat Blocks section. You may command the Medical Jellyfish as a bonus action on your turn. The Medical Jellyfish may take an appropriate reaction if able, such as attack of opportunity. The Medical Jellyfish uses your Ninjutsu Attack bonus for its attacks and your Save DC for all of its effects save DC's
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Blessing of Poseidon
jutsu.description: You manipulate your water release chakra and coat your body in it creating a tangible armor. This armor grants you a series of effects as follows; You gain a 60-foot Swim Speed. You can breathe underwater as if breathing air. You gain 60 feet of tremor sense. Creatures who you deal cold damage to become Shaken until the beginning of your next turn. Attacks made underwater do not need to be rolled at disadvantage. Attacks you make while underwater retain their full range. Can make a Atlantean Trident attack in place of a weapon attack made with the attack action. Atlantean Trident (melee). melee Ninjutsu Attack, reach 5ft, Hit: 2d8 + Ninjutsu ability modifier cold damage. Atlantean Trident (ranged) ranged Ninjutsu Attack, reach 60ft, Hit: 1d8 + Ninjutsu ability modifier cold damage
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, Atlantean Trident attacks increases its damage by +1d8, have a +1 bonus to their critical threat range and when dealing cold damage to a creature with 2 or more ranks of Chilled can have their ranks changed to an equal number of ranks of Shaken. Ranks of Shaken applied in this way are treated as an Elemental condition.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Wall of Water
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Action, 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature in range takes damage.
jutsu.description: Description: You conjure up a wall of water on the ground at a point you can see within range. You can make the wall up to 30 feet long, 10 feet high, and 5 feet thick in any shape you want so long as each piece of wall is connected to another piece. The wall deforms and becomes a mass of water when the Jutsu ends, filling each space it occupied with water that can be used as a Source of water for Ninjutsu with the Water release keyword, once each. The wall's space is difficult terrain if creatures attempt to pass through it. The water wall intercepts all attacks, or jutsu that would target a creature on the other side of it. The wall has a 5d6 Hit points, with resistance to bludgeoning, slashing and Fire damage. The Wall has immunity to Cold damage and Vulnerability to Earth and Piercing damage. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to instead make creatures attempting to pass through the wall take 5d6 cold damage for every 5 feet they move through.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the hit points it has by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Absorption
jutsu.description: You place a sealing tag on one willing creature you can see within range. When you cast this jutsu, all Water sources the target is in contact with or adjacent to, is absorbed into them and is used to artificially enhance the targets' physical ability. If the target is next to a water source comparable to a lake, sea, or ocean this jutsu does not consume all of the water, but up to 1000 gallons. For the duration, the creatures Strength Score becomes 20 if it not already. If their strength score is already 20, it instead becomes 22. Their jump distance is doubled. They gain resistance to Bludgeoning damage and the first time each turn, that they would deal unarmed or weapon damage they deal additional damage equal to 2d10. When this jutsu ends, the creature becomes Weakened and Slowed until the end of their next turn as their body recovers from the over saturation of water in their system.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Piercing Water Bullet
jutsu.description: You knead chakra in your stomach and expel it in a large quantity of water towards a target creature. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack, dealing 4d8 cold damage, Pierce 6 DR If the target creature is a Construct, Structure or has the Barrier keyword, you treat it as if it is vulnerable to this jutsu's damage. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or the number of creatures you can target by +1.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, clash checks with this jutsu are made at advantage.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Clone
jutsu.description: You conjure a clone made of water similar to the Shadow clone technique but with far less power, known as a Water Clone. Water Clone's weigh half as much as the caster. When this jutsu is cast, by spending 8 chakra, you summon one Clone. You can spend 4 additional chakra to summon 1 additional Clone. You can spend 4 additional chakra in this way to summon additional Clones up to 3 times per casting. Water Clones can on cast ninjutsu with the Water Release keyword. Water Clones can concentrate on jutsu its casts for up to 2 rounds, before its concentration ends. Only 1 Clone can concentrate on a jutsu at a time.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, and the number of Clones you can summon by +1.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Bloody Mist Absorption
jutsu.description: An advanced variation of the Hidden Mist Technique. This variation requires the user to draw blood from themselves cutting their palm, reducing their current Hit points by 5. You release a crimson red mist that fills a 45-foot-cube originating from you. All creatures inside this mist are heavily obscured and cannot clearly see anything more than 5 feet away from them. You know the location of all creatures inside this red mist and all creatures except for you suffer the following effects. Creatures who start their turns inside the red mist, who have less than their max hit points lose 4 + Half of any Bleed damage they take, in chakra. Creatures cannot regain Hit points or remove stacks of Bleeding while inside the red mist.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Explosive Colliding Tsunami
jutsu.description: You expel a small ocean's worth of Water directly into your space covering a 60-foot radius centering on you. You stand on top of the water you are expelling, while creatures who are within 60 feet of you must make a Strength saving throw to resist being swept away. On a failure, they take 6d8 cold damage and are pushed 30 feet away while under the surface of the small ocean you've created. On a success, they remain floating above the surface, suffer no damage, but are still pushed away 15 feet from their current position. The water conjured by this jutsu maintains a depth of 120 Feet. This water can be used as a source of water for up to 15 Water Release Ninjutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, as an Action on subsequent turns after this jutsu's casting, all creatures, excluding yourself submerged within the water mass must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they are pulled 15 feet towards the centermost point of the water sphere and take 4d8 cold damage or only half as much damage on a failed save. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can choose to instead select a point you can see up to 120 feet away and draw a line to it from your current position. You collect the water into a 15-foot-wide vortex and Fire it towards that point. All creatures that this line passes through must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 12d6 cold damage and being pushed to the end of the line on a failed save or half as much on a success. At the end of the line, the water collects into a massive ball and forms a 60-foot radius sphere of water as the original effect of this jutsu details, that remains for 1 minute.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Heavenly Mirror of Hope
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage from an attack or as a result of a jutsu whose range is either a Line or Cone.
jutsu.description: You manifest a ring of water that creates a reflective film similar to that of a mirror. When you are targeted with a jutsu, you quickly raise this mirror showing your targets reflection. You manifest an exact duplicate of the triggering creature as this duplicate casts the same jutsu, forcing a Clash. This jutsu's cost becomes equal to twice the triggering creatures jutsu cost. On a successful Clash, you functionally cast the triggering jutsu, using your current position as part of the jutsu's calculations. If the jutsu would be a melee attack, the triggering creature is the only possible target. If the jutsu is a cone or a line, you must angle it so that the triggering creature is in the affected area. You use your jutsu's save DC's to calculate the Save DC of the reflected jutsu. On a failure, your mirror shatters, you suffer the effects of a Clash, and you are Stunned from the backlash until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Red Grudge Rain
jutsu.description: You manipulate the Water Release Chakra molding it until you create a cloud 1 mile in air. This cloud is then sent to hover over a creature you can see within range, and begins to rain down red rain, filling a 15-foot wide, 1-mile-tall Cylinder, centering on a point of the space the creature is in. All creatures who are within the radius are rained on and have their clothing soaked with this red rain that dulls their senses. For the duration when a creature within this jutsu's radius would make a saving throw to resist a jutsu with the Water release keyword, you may roll a d4 reducing their saving throws by the result. As a bonus action on your turn, you may move the cloud 30 feet raining on the new space.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost by 3 and the width of the cylinder by 10-feet. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, all creatures who begin their turn in this jutsu's affected area increase the cost of jutsu they cast by +4. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank or Higher, all creatures who begin their turn in this jutsu's affected area increase the cost of jutsu they cast by an additional +8.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Shark Bomb
jutsu.description: You manifest 2 constructs of floating water that form into Sharks of your description. They use the Water Sharks statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section. You may command all of the Water Sharks summoned as a bonus action on your turn. The Water Shark may take an appropriate reaction if able, such as attack of opportunity. The Water Shark uses your Ninjutsu Attack bonus for its attacks and your Save DC for all of its effects save DC's.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank the number of Sharks you summon are increased by +1.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Tsunami Bow
jutsu.description: You create a modified bow of solidified water that fires water from the same source. This Construct bow, for the duration, can be used as an Action to make 2 ranged ninjutsu attacks against a creature up to 120 feet away, that you can see. On a hit, you deal 3d12 cold damage. A target hit by this attack must make a constitution saving throw being Chilled on a failed save. Creatures who have not moves more than 5 feet since the end of your last turn, can be attacked with advantage. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to reduce an affected creature's speed by 15 feet, until the end of their next turn. If you drop this construct weapon it dissipates at the end of the turn. Thereafter, while the jutsu persists, you can use a bonus action to cause the construct to reappear in your hand.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If you cast this Jutsu at S-Rank, increase the damage of this jutsu by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Fang
jutsu.description: You create two spiraling drills of water around a target creature you can see within range. Target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d6 Cold damage, being knocked Prone and Dazed, on a failed save, or half as much damage and no further effects on a success. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to target an additional creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Needles of Death
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when a creature within 15 feet of you moves, or casts a Jutsu with the Hand Seal (HS) or Mobility (M) components.
jutsu.description: When a creature makes a sudden movement, you stomp the ground collecting a mass of water droplets from the ground and air, sharpening them into needles. The triggering creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 6d8 Cold damage and reducing their movement speed to 0 on a failed save and taking half as much damage on a successful one. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can instead make all hostile creatures of your choice, within 15 feet of you when you cast this jutsu, make the saving throw as if they are also targets, taking damage on a failed save or half as much on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Acid Permeation
jutsu.description: You collect water from the air, plants, and all sources that contain it as they form bubbles surrounding you in a 15-foot radius with you in the center. This radius moved with you. When you cast this jutsu, you designate any number of creatures you can see to be unaffected by it. An affected creature's speed is halved in the area, and when the creature enters the area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a Dexterity saving throw as the bubbles explodes like mines spreading freezing acid over the creature. On a failed save, the creature takes 6d8 Cold damage and becomes Corroded.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Falling Rain Needles
jutsu.description: You collect all water within 120 feet of you as it collects into the air creating storm clouds that can fill a 40-foot cube, centered on a point you can see within 120 feet of you that is at least 120 feet off of the ground. This jutsu fails, if you can't see a point in the air at least 120 feet off the ground, where the storm cloud could appear. When this jutsu is cast, choose a point you can see within range, a hail of sharpened water droplets, rain over an area, pulverizing everything within the affected area, forcing all creature affected to make a dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 7d6 cold damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. On each of your turns until the jutsu ends, you can use your bonus action to call down rain needles in this way again, targeting the same or a different point. If you are outdoors in stormy conditions when you cast this ninjutsu, the jutsu gives you control over the existing storm instead of creating a new one. Under such conditions the jutsu's damage increases by 1d6 and the cost to maintain this jutsu is reduced by 2.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Great Shark Bullet
jutsu.description: You manipulate your water release chakra molding it until you manifest a single gargantuan shark that you then launch at a creature within range, leaving a trail of devastation in its path. The shark is propelled in a straight line towards a single target creature. Make a ranged Ninjutsu Attack. On a success they take cold damage equal to 9d8, and must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, the shark slams its fangs into the target, leaving it Restrained and unable to cast jutsu that require Hand Seals (HS). All creatures the shark would pass through while traveling to the target creature would suffer some effect as well. Draw a line from yourself to the target. All creatures the line passes through makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d6 cold damage and are knocked Prone on a failed save or half as much on a successful on.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 2d8.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Dragon
jutsu.description: You expel a massive quantity of water or pull from a nearby source, conjuring a large Dragon of your description from water. The Dragon attempts to ram its target. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack, on a hit target creature 14d6 cold damage. The target creature must make a constitution saving throw, being Stunned until the end of the affected creatures next turn and knocked Prone on a failed save. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can choose to increase the damage die to a d8.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Severing Wave
jutsu.description: You cup your hands against your mouth releasing a torrent of highly pressurized water and using your chakra like a nozzle. You sweep your head from side to side targeting a cone area up to 60 feet in distance. Creatures caught in the radius of this jutsu must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d10 cold damage on a failed save. If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or you can force affected creatures to make a constitution saving throw, gaining 2 ranks of Chilled on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Drown
jutsu.description: You manipulate your water release chakra molding it until you reach a level of control so much so that you are able to forcibly turn air into water and vice versa as it is inhaled by other creatures. Select up to 7 creatures you can see within range. Each creature makes a Constitution saving throw. On a Failed save for the duration if they can breathe air, they instead can only breathe water. If they can breathe water, they can instead only breathe air. A creature who is currently in an environment in which they cannot breathe normally, they begin to Drown. While drowning this way, it can survive for a number of rounds equal to its constitution modifier (minimum of 1 round). At the start of its first turn after these rounds, it drops to 0 hit points and is dying. A creature who begins their turn dying after falling to 0 hit points as a result of this jutsu, they die. While drowning they cannot speak.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Giant Water Prison Dance
jutsu.description: You knead enough water in your stomach and release enough to fill a small ocean. You then control the water creating a massive ball of Water centered around you that extends up to a 60 radius. All Creatures in the radius are picked up by the wave of water and pulled into the water sphere. All Creatures inside the Water Sphere must make a Strength saving throw, being captured inside the sphere and unable to escape, on a failed save. When captured this way, the captured creature is considered to be underwater while inside the Water prison. When the User of this Jutsu moves, the water sphere moves with him. Creatures who succeed their strength save, can escape the Water prison if they can make it to the edge of the water sphere.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Supreme Water Lion
jutsu.description: You conjure a huge construct made of water & chakra forming a Supreme Water Lion, of your description. The Supreme Water Lion has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section and use your Ninjutsu attack bonus or Ninjutsu Save DC when an effect calls for it. You can command them as a Bonus action. You can as a bonus action on your turn, so long as you are in physical contact with this construct merge into its head. While you are merged in this way you have total Cover against attacks and other effects outside of the Lion.

jutsu.name: Water Release: Water Heavens Convergence
jutsu.description: You begin to feel the presence of all free-flowing water particles within 120 feet of you. For the duration you can control all water as if it was an extension of your body. You gain additional abilities you can use on your turn. Water Drill. As an action on your turn, you can make a ranged ninjutsu attack against a creature you can see within range dealing 9d12 cold damage as water surround and collapses over them. Water Armor. As a reaction to being hit with an attack you coat your body in a thick layer of solidified water to lessen the impact. You gain 30 temporary hit points until the beginning of your next turn. Watery Chains. As an action on your turn, you can have the surrounding water form chains as they attempt to capture a creature within range. The target must make a Strength saving throw being Restrained and gaining 3 ranks of Shaken while Restrained on a failed save. On their turns they can make a Strength saving throw to end this effect on them.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Banquet of Lightning
jutsu.description: You Place your palm on the ground and conduct a jolt of lightning that runs through it towards a target creature in range. This jutsu ignores line of sight and can go around corners. Target creature must make a constitution save, taking 3d6 Lightning damage and gaining 1 rank of Shaken on a failed save and only half damage on a successful one. Overcharge. A creature who fails their saving throw gain an additional rank of Shaken.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, its range becomes 60 Feet (10-Foot Cube) centered on a point within range. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, and a creature fails their saving throw, they lose the ability to make Hand Seals (HS) until the end of each of their next turn. Additionally, if you Overcharge this jutsu's range can become Self (60-Foot Cone).

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Charged Impulse
jutsu.duration: Till next Short Rest or initiative Roll.
jutsu.description: You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target can add 1d6 to the first initiative roll it makes for the duration. For the next minute after rolling initiative the target can, as a bonus action on each of its turns take the dash action, this jutsu then ends.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Guiding Bolt
jutsu.description: A flash of lightning erupts from your hands towards a creature of your choice within range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack against the target. On a hit the target takes 3d8 lightning damage, and the next attack roll made against the target before the end of your next turn has advantage, thanks to the streak of electricity guiding the next attack to the target. Overcharge. This jutsu instead becomes a 60 foot long, 5-foot-wide line. All creatures in range must make a dexterity saving throw, taking 3d8 lighting damage on a failed save or half as much on a success. If a creature affected by this jutsu was concentrating on a jutsu, they make their concentration check at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, if you score a hit, you can begin to maintain concentration on this jutsu. If you do, a surge of lightning rings out from you towards the target dealing 2d8 lightning damage to them as a bonus action on each of your turns and if the affected creature would make gain a jutsu based bonus while not concentrating on a jutsu, they take 2d6 lightning damage. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher and Overcharge it, all affected creature who fail their saving throw gain the Shocked condition.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Ball
jutsu.description: You generate multiple small floating globes of lightning chakra that you fire at a target. Make a ranged Ninjutsu attack. On a hit, the target creature takes 3d6 lightning damage. Once per casting, all creatures in a 60-foot, 5 feet wide line between you and the target creature must make a dexterity saving throw taking 2d6 lightning damage and gaining 1 rank of Shaken on a failed save and half as much on a success. Overcharge. You create a second set of lightning globes, and you must select a second creature to target with this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage dealt by 1d6 for both the attack and save effect.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Buckler
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra and mold it around a chakra seal until you form a shield made of Lightning. This jutsu cannot be ended as a result of a damage. The lightning shields you manifest sits on your arm and has a design of your description and grants you the Jolted Buckler reaction, which can only be take when you take damage. Jolted Buckler. You use your lightning Shield to deflect some damage you take. Reduce the damage you would take by 3d6. If the damage is reduced to 0, the triggering creature gains 1 rank of Shocked. If the triggering damage type is wind, reduce the amount of damage reduction by 1 dice.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduction by +4.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Claw
jutsu.keywords: Ninjutsu, Lightning Release, Taijutsu, Stable, Efficient, Clash
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra to generate claws of Lightning around your hands.
