For the duration, in place of an Attack made when you take the Attack action, you can make a Thunder Punch attack or as a Reaction to taking damage from a melee attack, make a Lightning Cross reaction. Overcharge. For the duration, you can also take the Panther Claw attack in the same way you would use Thunder Punch. Thunder Punch. Make a melee ninjutsu attack dealing 4d6 Lightning damage on a hit. If a target is Shocked you gain a rank of Mastery to the attack. Lightning Cross. As a reaction to taking damage from a melee attack, you can strike out at lightning speed with a powerful cross jab. Make a melee ninjutsu attack, dealing 5d6 lightning damage on a hit. Panther Claw. Make a melee ninjutsu attack. If the target has 2 or more ranks of Shocked, this attack is made with advantage and has a +1 bonus to its critical threat range. On a hit, you deal 6d6 Lightning damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, increase each abilities damage by 1d6. If this Jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, Thunder Punch and Lightning Cross each makes +1 additional attack as part of their ability. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase each abilities damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, abilities this jutsu has gain a +2 bonus to its critical threat range.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Reflex
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction which you take when you are forced to make a Dexterity saving throw.
jutsu.description: Your body becomes charged with lightning release chakra enhancing your reflexes to great heights. When you make a Dexterity saving throw you may roll at Advantage.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Repel
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction to being targeted by an attack or jutsu.
jutsu.description: You create a magnetic force field around yourself misdirecting attacks away from you. The triggering attack and all subsequent attacks have disadvantage when targeting you until the start of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Speed
jutsu.description: You coat your body in a film of lightning as you teleport up to your movement speed to an unoccupied space that you can see, appearing as a jolt of lightning when you end your movement.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Mark of Jolts
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra and mold it around a chakra seal until you form a Kanji of your own description and with its own meaning. This Kanji Floats at a point within 5 feet of you and can be moved up to 20 feet in any direction of your choice as a bonus action. Choose one of the following effects; Jolts: All creatures except you, within a 10-foot radius sphere centered on your Kanji takes 2d8 lightning damage at the end of each of your turns. Shocks: All creatures except you, within a 10-foot radius sphere centered on your Kanji that takes lightning damage must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 1 rank of Shocked on a failed save. Once this effect has triggered and inflicted the Shocked condition 3 times this jutsu immediately ends.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6 or the number of triggers by +1.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Retribution
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage (Except Psychic or Chakra damage)
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra and mold it to form a defensive instrument of your choice. When you would take damage, you gain +2 AC against the triggering attack and begin to build up retributive energy. Each time you take damage until the end of the current turn you build up energy. Count the number of times you take damage from now, until the end of the current turn building up lightning with each instance. At the end of the current turn, you discharge all of the built-up energy. All creatures within a 15-foot radius must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 2d6 lightning damage for each instance of damage counted or half as much on a successful save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the bonus to AC, to +3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher all creatures that fail their saving throw vs this jutsu also gain 2 ranks of Shocked.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Shock Whip
jutsu.description: You create a whip of lightning, and lash it at a target creature in range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack against a creature in range. On a hit, you deal 2d10 Lightning damage and they must make a Constitution saving throw being Grappled by you and are being pulled 10 feet on a failed save, or half damage on a successful save. Overcharge. A creature who fails their saving throw gains 1 rank of Shocked.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d10 and the range by 10ft. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, you can target one additional creature with this jutsu. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, a creature that fails their saving throw is now Restrained instead of Grappled.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Spark
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra to generate a spark of willpower from within a creature. A Creature you touch gains 1 Hit point and a number of temporary hit points equal to 2d6 + Your Ninjutsu ability Modifier. These Temporary hit points last for 1 minute. Additionally, the creature gains resistance to Lightning damage so long as they have Temporary hit points granted by this jutsu. Overcharge. The first time you would take lightning damage while benefiting from temporary hit points (THP) as a result of this jutsu, you instead gain bonus THP equal to half the damage dealt.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the temporary Hit points by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Static Sense
jutsu.description: You gain the ability to see electrical signals occurring in creatures or objects up to 300 Feet away. This penetrates up to 5-feet of nonmetal surfaces. You can tell when an object that works off of electricity, such as non-jutsu based communication systems, cameras, computers, and other technological devices are in active use, or are moving, and their general shape. You can tell when Creatures can generate electricity such as lightning release or as a natural phenomenon (eels, magnets, batteries etc.)

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Thunder Tempest
jutsu.description: A wave of electrical force sweeps out from you. Each creature in a 25-foot cone originating from you must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save a creature takes 4d4 Lightning damage are pushed back 10 feet and Shocked. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage. Overcharge. A creature who fails their saving throw has their initiative score reduced by 2, falling in the initiative order accordingly as a result. A creature can only have their initiative changed twice as a result of this effect.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 2d4 and knock back distance 5ft.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Absorb Lightning
jutsu.description: You create a similar charge of Lightning release chakra inside of you, gaining immunity to Lightning damage until the beginning of your next turn and you gain a number of temporary chakra equal to half the damage you take.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Aftershock
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you deal Lightning damage to a creature.
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra to generate a jolt of electricity in an attempt to multiply the effects of the lightning damage you deal. As a reaction, when you would deal lightning damage to a creature you cast the jutsu of the same rank you cast this jutsu that can only target the original creature, or targeting the same area.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Chidori
jutsu.description: This powerful assassination technique focuses lightning Chakra into one of your hands, which will be unable to hold items while charged, but can still be used to make hand seals without harm. You do not need to spend chakra to maintain concentration with this jutsu. The focus needed to manifest and cast this jutsu consumes your full focus. Make a melee Ninjutsu Attack on a target creature within range. On a hit, the target creature takes 5d10 Lightning damage and this jutsu ends. This Jutsu has a +1 critical threat range. If you have the appropriate critical threat range bonuses, this jutsu can score a critical hit on a 16-20.
jutsu.higherLevels: If this Jutsu is upcasted to B-Rank or higher, its casting time instead becomes 1 Action and its gains its ability to Overcharge. For each rank above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3, increasing the damage done by 2d10 and Critical threat range by +1. Overcharge. This jutsu evolves in power, becoming the Raikiri, gaining the following benefits until this jutsu ends; Bonus +20 speed, rank of Mastery to melee ninjutsu attacks, and on a critical hit, increases damage die by 1 step.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Jolt
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra to generate a spark of willpower from within a creature. A Creature you touch gains 5 Hit points and a number of temporary hit points equal to 4d8. These Temporary hit points last for 1 minute. So long as a creature have temporary hit points as a result of this jutsu, they gain a 10-foot bonus to their movement speed and a +2 bonus to their Dexterity saving throws. A dying creature who is affected by this jutsu gains an additional jolt of energy. Until the end of their next turn, they gain an additional Bonus action. Overcharge. Increase the die used to determine temporary hit points, by 1 step.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, temporary Hit points by 1d8 and +5 walking speed.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Chakra Armor
jutsu.description: You surround yourself, in dense lightning chakra in the form of armor of your description and color. This alteration of color also extends to other jutsu with the Lightning Release keyword you cast signifying your unique attributes gaining the listed benefits. For the duration, you enter an Overdrive state, granting you the following benefits; Gain a +1 Bonus to AC. Gain a +20 bonus to movement speed. Gain a Rank of Mastery in Dexterity Saves Overcharge. For the duration, you can take the dash action as a Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the movement speed bonus by +10. If you cast this jutsu at B-Rank or higher, your Overdrive state adds +1d10 Lightning damage to your unarmed, Ninjutsu and Taijutsu attacks, twice per turn, and the bonus to attacks now also apply to your unarmed attacks. If you cast this jutsu at A-Rank or higher, your Overdrive state grants you a +4 DR. This becomes +8 if applied to Earth or Lightning damage. If you cast this jutsu at S-Rank the Bonus to damage becomes +2d10 and the bonus to AC becomes +2.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning King's Mantle
jutsu.description: You radiate a powerful aura of lightning energy in an aura with a radius centered on you, enhancing the combat potential in yourself and friendly creatures. The aura moves with you. While in the aura, whenever a creature of your choice would deal their [Weapons damage], they add +1d6 Lightning damage to the result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the radius by 10 feet. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, their [Weapon damage], Penetrates 4 DR. Additionally, if you score a critical hit with a weapon enhanced by this jutsu, the target creature gains +1 rank of Shocked.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Rod
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra creating a lightning release construct lance, staff or polearm of your description that as an action can make a Lightning Strike Attack, bonus action to perform a Lightning Supercharge, or as a Reaction to taking damage perform a Lightning Guard. For the duration of this jutsu you do not need to spend chakra to maintain concentration on this jutsu. Lightning Strike Attack. Make a melee ninjutsu attack against a creature up to 10 feet away dealing 4d10 lightning damage on a hit. Lightning Supercharge. As a bonus action charge the Lance with more chakra. The next Lightning Strike Attack you make Pierces 6 DR. Lightning Guard. As a reaction to taking damage, you spin your weapon attempting to guard some of the force of the strike, gaining 6 DR vs incoming damage, except wind, until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, increase the damage this jutsu deals by 1d10 and the DR gained by +2S.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Step
jutsu.description: You teleport yourself to an unoccupied space you can see within range. Immediately after you disappear, a thunderous boom sounds, and each creature within 10 feet of the space you left and the space you appeared must make a constitution saving throw, taking 3d10 Lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. You can also teleport one willing creature of your size or smaller. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you cast this jutsu, and there must be an unoccupied space within 5-feet of your destination space for the creature to appear in; otherwise, the creature is left behind. Overcharge. A creature who fail their saving throw have is knocked Prone and is Blinded from the flash of lightning until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d10. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the distance you can teleport by +20 Feet. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, prior to teleporting you can select one creature you can see within range. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the distance you can teleport by an additional +20 Feet.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Wall
jutsu.description: You conjure your lightning release chakra until you create a wall of lightning that you can place on a solid surface or suspend midair. You can make the wall up to 30 feet long, 15 feet high and 1 foot thick, or a ringed wall up to 40 feet in diameter, 15 feet high, and 1 feet thick. This wall is opaque and lasts for the duration. When the wall appears, each creature within its area must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 4d8 lighting damage and becomes Shocked or half as much damage and no further effects on a successful save. On both sides of the wall each creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of it takes 4d8 Lighting damage and must make a Constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Shocked on a failed save. A creature takes the same damage and gains the same condition when it enters the wall for the first time or ends its turn there. The wall has 5d6 hit points and intercepts all attacks or affects that would need to pass through it to take effect. It has resistance to Earth damage and vulnerability to Wind damage.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Spider Web
jutsu.description: You create a Web like pattern on the ground out of Lightning chakra expanding outwards in a 15-foot cube originating from a point within range. Creatures who begin their turns or enters the webs space must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save affected creatures gain 1 rank of Shocked and are Dazed. Overcharge. A Shocked creature who begins their turn in the affected area takes 3d12 lightning damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, increase the size of the cube by 5 feet and damage dealt while overcharged by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Static Falcon
jutsu.description: You generate a mass of Lightning chakra and release it in the form of a bird. This bird then flies towards a target creature you can see within range, before it explodes, discharging electricity in a 15-foot cube with a loud thunderous boom. This thunderous boom can be heard up to 300 feet away. Creatures in the affected area must make a constitution save, taking 4d6 Lightning damage and becomes Dazed on a failed save, and half as much on a successful save. Overcharge. Increase the size of the affected area to a 25-foot cube.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Thunder Bolt
jutsu.description: You extend both of your hands into the air, releasing a mass of Lightning chakra into the sky creating thunder clouds. This jutsu can only be cast while there is no ceiling or obstruction above you. When this jutsu is cast and as a Bonus action on following turns, you can perform a Lightning Strike. Lightning Strike. Select a point within range that you can see and call down lightning striking all creatures in a 5-foot radius centered of the select point forcing them all to make a Dexterity Saving throw, dealing 2d12 Lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. A creature can only be affected by Lightning Strike once per turn. Overcharge. A creature who fails their saving throw, has their legs begins to seize up, reducing their walking speed to 5 feet, until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and select one additional target space. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the damage dealt by +1d12. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher creatures who fail their saving throw gain a rank of Shocked. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, a creature can be affected by a lightning strike up to twice per turn.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Thunder Bomb
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when a creature gains or would lose a rank of Shocked.
jutsu.description: You collect a surge of lightning into your fingertips as you pinpoint all creatures within your Jutsu's radius that are Shocked. All Shocked creatures within range can feel the Lightning chakra on them begin to react before it violently explodes creating audible sounds over 1000 feet away. Creatures with more than one rank of the Shocked Condition suffer greater impacts. Shocked creatures within range must make a Constitution saving throw taking lightning damage equal to the following based on the ranks of Shocked they have or half as much on a successful save. (1 Stack: 3d8, 2 Stacks: 4d8, 3 Stacks: 5d8, 4 Stacks: 6d8, 5 Stacks: 7d8) Creatures within 10 feet of a Shocked creature when this explosion happens makes a Dexterity saving throw taking half the damage on a failed save or no damage on a successful save. If a creature is Shocked and within 10 feet of another Shocked creature when this explosion occurs, they make their save at Disadvantage. A creature can be affected by no more than 2 explosions. The Shocked condition ends on all creatures within range regardless of passing or failing.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Beast Lightning
jutsu.description: You focus your lightning chakra, forming it into the shape of a land animal of your choice such as a Bear, a Panther, or Wolf. The Lightning Beast has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section. You may command the Lightning Beast as a bonus action on your turn. The Lightning Beast may take an appropriate reaction if able, such as attack of opportunity. The Lightning Beast uses your Ninjutsu Attack bonus for its attacks and your Save DC for all of its effects save DC's.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Chained Lightning
jutsu.description: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs towards a target of your choice that you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from the first target to as many as three other targets, each of which must be within 30 feet of the first target. A target can be a creature or an object that be targeted by only one of the bolts. A target must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d10 lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. Overcharge. Affected creatures gains one rank of the Shocked condition for each creature who previously failed their saving throws.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and one additional bolt leaps from the first target to another target.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: False Darkness
jutsu.description: You release a massive wave of lightning capable of disintegrating stone and creatures alike. Creatures in a 30-foot cone originating from you must make a constitution saving throw taking 5d6 lightning damage, are Blinded for 1 minute, on a failed save or half as much on a success. Creatures Blinded by this jutsu remake their saves at the beginning of each of their turns. Overcharge. On a failed save, affected creatures are also Deafened for the same duration they are Blinded.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6 and the size of the cone by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Lily
jutsu.description: You manifest your Lightning release until you create a floating flower made of Lightning. This flower sparkles and sparks harmlessly for but a moment before it detonates. Select a point you can within range for the flower to manifest. All creatures within 15 feet of the flower must make a Dexterity Saving throw. On a failed saving throw they take 3d12 Lightning damage and are Blinded until end of their next turn. On a successful save they gain 1 rank of the Shocked condition until the beginning of their next turn. Overcharge. The affected creatures chooses to either make their saving throw with advantage or disadvantage with the following caveats; Advantage. On a failure, they take 9d12 lightning damage and are Stunned until the end of their next turn. Disadvantage. No additional effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Spear
jutsu.description: You create a concentrated globe of lightning around your hand, and point it in a direction of your choice. A beam of lightning shoots at blinding speeds in a straight-line piercing through everything in its path. All creatures in a 5-foot wide, 60-foot-long line must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save affected creatures take 6d6 lightning damage and gain 2 ranks of Shaken. On a success, they take half as much damage and no further effects. Overcharge. A creature that fails their saving throw becomes Restrained in place until the beginning of your next turn as you hold them in place.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Penance
jutsu.description: You conjure lightning to amplify and bring out the last spark of willpower from within a fallen creature. A Creature you touch who has been dead no longer than 1 minute has their essence touched. Make a Ninshou Check vs DC (15 + 1 for every round the target has been dead.) On a success, they awake, gaining 1 Hit points and a number of temporary hit points equal to 6d10. These temporary hit points last for 1 minute. When the creature runs out of temporary hit points granted by this jutsu, they fall unconscious for 24 hours, unable to awaken by any means. A creature can be revived by this jutsu no more than once per full rest. So long as a creature have temporary hit points as a result of this jutsu, they gain a rank of Mastery to their Strength, Dexterity and Constitution saving throws and any damage they deal is instead Lightning damage that ignores resistance, and treats immunity as resistance.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Raging Storm
jutsu.description: You manifest lightning until it covering the body of an allied creature that is not yourself. The target creature is engulfed in a raging torrent of lightning. For this duration, damage they deal adds an additional 2d8 lightning damage, twice per turn. They also gain resistance to Earth and Lightning damage and a +20 bonus to their speed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of targets this jutsu can affect by +1.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Bang
jutsu.description: You focus Lightning chakra into a super compressed point on the tip of your finger, pointing it at a creature you can see in range, and releasing it in a single swift motion. The lightning explodes leaving your finger with an audible explosive boom, that shatters glass and other fragile but rigid material in a 500-foot radius. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack. On a hit, the target creature takes 9d12 Lightning damage. Overcharge. If you target a creature within 5 feet of you and make the ranged attack at disadvantage, increase your critical threat range by +3. If you score a critical hit, triple the damage die, instead of doubling it.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 2d12.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Clone
jutsu.keywords: Ninjutsu, Lightning Release, Clone, Clash, Fuinjutsu
jutsu.description: Description: A modified version of the Shadow Clone Technique that allows the user to create a clone but constructed from solid lightning. Lightning Clones have no measurable weight and explode if exposed to a body of water. Creatures who have chakra sight can tell the clone is made of lightning and can distinguish the clone from the original. When this jutsu is cast, by spending 16 chakra, you summon one Clone. You can spend 8 additional chakra to summon 1 additional Clone. You can spend 8 additional chakra in this way to summon additional Clones up to 3 times per casting. Lightning Clones have Immunity to Genjutsu, Psychic & Poison damage, It has a movement speed equal to your movement speed or 50-foot move speed. When Lightning Clones have 0 hit points, it Discharges. Discharge. All creatures within 20 feet of the clone must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 3 ranks of Shocked and being Dazed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the number of clones you can summon by +1.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Dragon
jutsu.description: Your chakra twists and forms into a long dragon made of pure lightning, This dragon flies in a straight line of your choice. This creature occupies a space 10 feet wide and extends up to 90 feet. Creatures in the path of this dragon must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d10 lightning damage and being Blinded and Deafened for the next minute on a failed save, or takes half as much damage on a successful save. Overcharge. The dragon remains on the field as a large lightning construct, using the Lightning Dragon stat block. The Lightning Dragon has its listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section and use your Ninjutsu attack bonus or Ninjutsu Save DC when an effect calls for it. You can command them as a Bonus action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Lightning Shield
jutsu.description: A powerful barrier of Lightning forms and protects you. Until the start of your next turn, you have a +5 AC, immunity to Lightning & Earth damage and Creatures targeting you with an attack while within 30 feet, must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining +3 ranks of Shocked on a failed save or +1 rank on a success.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Powerful Bullet Breath
jutsu.description: You exhale a storm of lightning from your mouth as easily as breathing. This storm covers a massive range and touches everything in a 30-foot cone, starting from you. All creatures in range must make a Constitution saving throw taking 7d8 lightning damage, being Dazed, Blinded, and Deafened until the end of their next turn and only half as much damage and no conditions on a successful save. Overcharge. Creatures who fail their saving throws by 5 or more are also Stunned until the end of their next turns.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Storm Breaker
jutsu.description: As a part of the requirements to cast this jutsu, you must be able to see storm clouds in the sky above you. You use Lightning Release chakra to manipulate the clouds causing them to fall to ground level. All creatures in a 120-foot radius, centering on a point you can see is plummeted into darkness as the thick storm clouds obstructs everyone's vision with thick opaque fog and gas. The storm clouds cannot be seen through from the outside. Creatures with Chakra sight, within the storm clouds radius, is Blinded by the massive volumes of chakra. Removing/Ending chakra sight, ends this blindness. For the duration, each time a creature takes lightning damage, lightning from the storm clouds is attracted to the damaged creature as a follow up lightning bolt is generated, forcing them to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take 6d6 lightning damage or half as much on a successful save. A creature can only be affected by this jutsu's lightning bolt once per turn.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Great Snake Lightning
jutsu.description: You collect lightning into two massive spheres covering each hand before compressing them into globes the size of golf balls. You then mold the chakra turning them into two snakes of your description that coil around one another, before flying towards a target of your choice that you can see within range. Make a ranged ninjutsu attack, dealing 11d12 lightning damage. On a hit, the Lightning then explodes outwards in a 10-foot radius centering on the target creature. All other creatures within 10 feet of the target must make a constitution saving throw, being Dazed and Confused on a failed save. Overcharge. You can select one additional creature to target, sending the second snake to the new targets location.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Kirin
jutsu.description: This jutsu requires an active thunderstorm to cast. You create an opposite magnetic pull from the thunder cloud calling upon all of the lightning that the cloud has built up onto a single space you can see within range. This attack affects an area in the shape of a cylinder 40 feet wide, and 500 feet tall, extending into the sky. Creatures in the range of the lightning Bolt must make a Dexterity saving throw. A flying creature makes their saving throw at disadvantage. On a failed save, affected creatures take 10d12 lightning damage, gains 5 ranks of Shocked and are Dazed until they are no longer Shocked on a failed Save and half as much damage on a successful one.

jutsu.name: Lightning Release: Railgun
jutsu.components: HS, CM, NT (A Small Metallic object)
jutsu.description: You infuse lightning natured chakra into the metallic object until electricity radiates off of it, sending sparks and jolts in random directions, up to 60 feet away. Electronic tools and appliances begin to overload and short-circuit if they are within 250 feet of you when you cast this jutsu. You create a circular barrel of Lightning release chakra to stabilize the metallic object as you fire it like a railgun causing unrivaled destruction to anything in its path. All Creatures, objects and structures in a 15-foot wide, 500-foot line must make a Dexterity saving throw. A Shocked creature makes their saving throw at disadvantage. On a failed a creature takes 9d10 lightning damage, is knocked Prone, becomes Dazed, and gains 2 ranks of Shaken. Objects and structures take the maximum possible damage. On a successful save, a creature takes half damage and is instead only knocked Prone and gains 2 ranks of Shaken. Overcharge. This jutsu ignores cover and creatures cannot make their saving throws with advantage.

jutsu.name: Feather Burst
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: A simple illusion of sight. When hit by an attack, the opponent sees you burst into black raven feathers reforming at your current location. When hit by a melee attack, roll 1d4 reducing damage taken by the result and move 10 feet away. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity.
jutsu.higherLevels: This Jutsu's proficiency increases as you increase in level rolling 1d4 when you reach 5th level (2d4), 11th level (3d4), 17th level (4d4).

jutsu.name: Flash
jutsu.description: A mix of firecrackers and Chakra to make the flash they produce 10 times more intense. Select a Space up to 30 feet away. Creatures within 5 feet of the space you select must make a Wisdom save. On a failed save, the next attack targeting them has advantage.

jutsu.name: Gaslight
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Action or 1 Reaction, which you take when you fail a Charisma based skill check.
jutsu.description: For the duration, you gain a +2 bonus with Charisma based skill checks directed at one creature that isn't hostile towards you that can hear you within range for the duration. If used as an Action, this jutsu's duration becomes Concentration, up to 1 minute. Once Cast in this way, it cannot be cast again as an Action for 10 minutes. If used as a Reaction, this jutsu's duration becomes 1 round and lasts until the end of your next turn and cannot be cast in this way again for 1 minute. If a creature succeeds any contested skill check or beats any Saving throws forced upon them as a result of a social encounter you are engaged in with them by 5 or more, then when the jutsu ends they realize that you used a jutsu to influence its mood if it doesn't fit your previous relationship.
jutsu.higherLevels: This Jutsu's skill reinforcement increases as you increase in level. The bonus this jutsu provides increases by +1 at 5th Level (+3), 11th level (+4), 17th level (+5)

jutsu.name: Bane
jutsu.description: You release a pulse of chakra targeting all hostile creatures within 30 feet of you causing them feel deep seeded regret or dread. All hostile creature of your choice within 30 feet of you must make a Charisma saving throw as their mind is wrought with negative thoughts. Success: No further effects. Failure: Affected creatures suffers a 1d4 penalty to all attack roll and saving throws it makes for the duration. Critical Failure: Same as failure and it cannot gain the benefit of jutsu that provide bonuses to it of the same rank or lower for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the radius by 10-feet. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher on a critical Failure, creatures treats rolls of 2 and lower as critical misses/failures. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, the Success effect becomes a Critical Success effect. The Failure Effect becomes a Success effect. The Critical Failure effect becomes a Failure effect and this jutsu loses the Critical failure state.

jutsu.name: Bless
jutsu.description: You release a pulse of chakra targeting all allied creatures within 30 feet of you causing them feel deep seeded Pride or ambition. Whenever an allied creature makes an attack roll or saving throw during this jutsu's duration, they can roll an additional 1d4 and add the number rolled to their Attack and Saving throws.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the radius by 10-feet.

jutsu.name: Cause Fear
jutsu.description: You awaken a sense of mortality in one creature you can see within range after releasing some potent aromas from incents you spread and use as the catalyst for your Genjutsu. A construct or undead is immune to this effect. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw. Success: Affected creature resists this jutsu's effect. Failure: Affected creatures gains a rank of Shaken, for this jutsu's duration. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but gains 2 ranks of Shaken.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, a creature Shaken by this jutsu must spend its movement and Action to move away from the caster, to the best of its ability. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the ranks of Shaken inflicted by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, Shaken creatures take 4d6 Psychic damage at the end of each of their turns. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the ranks of Shaken inflicted by +1.

jutsu.name: Compelled Duel
jutsu.description: You attempt to compel a creature into a duel. They see you as the only worthy foe in the area and will do everything they can to fight you and only you, while becoming indifferent towards other combatants. One creature that you can see must make a wisdom saving throw. Success: Affected creature ignores this jutsu and suffers no effects. Failure: Affected creature becomes drawn to you suffering a -1d6 penalty to all attacks rolls against creatures other than you for the duration. A compelled creature must remake their saving throw at the end of each of its turns to end this effect on them. This jutsu ends if you attack any other creature or if a friendly creature to you, would assist you in any way. Critical Failure: Affected creatures becomes drawn to you, becoming unable to target any other creature other than you for the duration. This jutsu ends if you attack any other creature or if a friendly creature to you would assist you.

jutsu.name: Confidence
jutsu.description: You select up to 3 willing creatures in range, that you can see, other than yourself, reinforcing their confidence in themselves, allowing them to act with little to no hesitation. For the duration, whenever a target creature makes an Ability or Skill check, they add 1d4 to the result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, the duration of this jutsu becomes Concentration, up to 10 minutes. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, the duration of this jutsu becomes 10 minutes, no concentration needed.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Animus
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to mentally disable the confidence and strengths of your foes. Select one creature you can see within range, forcing them to make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is Weakened, until the end of their next turn. Failure: Affected creatures with dice-based bonuses to their damage rolls, they instead treat those bonuses, as penalties, for the duration. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but they also make their attack rolls with disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Asperity
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to inject a sense of harshness towards allies, in your foes. Select one creature you can see within range, forcing them to make a Charisma saving throw. Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Failure: If the affected creature cast a jutsu that allows them to omit or exclude its allies, for every hostile creature they select, they must also choose one ally as a target as well, the selected ally counts as one of its choices. Once this effect takes place, this jutsu ends. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but this effect lasts for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Audacity
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to inject a sense of harshness towards allies, in your foes. Select one creature you can see within range, forcing them to make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature reduces the number of damage die they roll by 1. If multiple damage dice of different sizes are rolled, remove one of the largest until the end of their next turn. Failure: If an affected creature attacks a creature you are allied with, they are mentally forced to hold back, reducing the damage they deal by 1 damage die for the duration.. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but the damage die reduction becomes 2.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, increase the damage die reduction by +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the damage die reduction by +2.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Charming Dissonance
jutsu.description: You attempt to suppress strong emotions in up to 3 creatures who can see and hear you within range. You speak with a reverberating confidence that quells their fears, anger, and confusion. Up to 3 creatures you choose must make a charisma saving throw; A creature can choose to fail or Critically fail this saving throw if it wishes. Success: Affected creature resists this jutsu's effect. Failure: Affected creature has all ranks of Demoralized or Charmed suppressed as they are, for the duration, no longer under the effects of these conditions. If this jutsu ends while they are still having these conditions, those condition effects resume. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but also affected creatures loses all hostile desires for the duration. If the target is attacked or damaged this jutsu's effects immediately end on all affected creatures.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and select 1 additional creature.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Gall
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to inject a sense of impudence in your foes. Select one creature you can see within range, forcing them to make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature increases the cost of the next jutsu they cast by +4, before the end of their next turn. Failure: Affected creatures cannot upcast their jutsu for the duration. If they would attempt to do so, they still spend the chakra, but its effects remains its base rank. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but the affected creature must attempt to upcast their jutsu cast to the highest rank possible, spending the chakra as normal, but its effects remain as its base rank.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Hatred
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to mentally corrupt the feeling of happiness and stability in your foes. Select one creature you can see within range, forcing them to make an Intelligence saving throw. Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Failure: Affected creatures who would attempt to cast a jutsu as a reaction, that has the Interrupt keyword, must roll a d20. On a roll of 11 or higher, the jutsu they cast is, itself Interrupted and Dispelled before its effects are applied. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but on a roll of 6 or higher their jutsu is Interrupted and Dispelled.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Mind Mist
jutsu.description: You release a mist formed of illusory chakra as you suppress the targets mental combat potential. One creature of your choice within range must make a Wisdom saving throw. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Failure: Affected creature becomes Envenomed and Weakened for the duration. Critical Failure: Same a failure, and the affected creature also reduces their speed by 10 Feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and increase the ranks of either Envenomed or Weakened by +1.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Vitriol
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to mentally disable the physical strengths of your foes. Select one creature you can see within range, forcing them to make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is Weakened until the end of their next turn. Failure: Affected creatures suffer a -2 penalty to all Strength and Dexterity based attacks and gain a rank of Weakened for the duration. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but the attack roll penalty becomes -4.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Frenzy: Black
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to black out the thoughts of your targets, making it difficult for them to form coherent or even manageable thoughts. Select one creature you are aware of, that can hear you within range, forcing them to make a Wisdom saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is Confused until the end of their next turn. Failure: Affected creatures begins to suffer mental black outs. At the beginning of each of their turns, all creatures in the turn initiative, is treated as a hostile creature for them, and they cannot exclude creatures in the effect area of a jutsu or features effects. At the end of each of their turns, they remake their saving throw, ending this jutsu's effect on them on a success. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but they no longer remake their saving throw at the end of each of their turns for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Frenzy: Blue
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to inflict a fit of depressing madness causing your eyes to glow blue. Select one creature you are aware of, that can hear you within range, forcing them to make a Wisdom saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is Slowed until the end of their next turn. Failure: If the affected creature would make a saving throw for the duration, on a failed save, they after suffering the triggering jutsu's effects, they fall Prone and have their movement speed reduced by half, until the end of their next turn. Creatures remake their saving throw against this jutsu, at the end of each of their turns. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but their speed is instead reduced to 0.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Frenzy: Red
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to bring about a spiral of lustful insanity, causing their eyes to glow with a Magenta color. Select one creature you are aware of, that can hear you within range, forcing them to make a Wisdom saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is Confused until the end of their next turn. Failure: The first time the affected creature targets another creature, they become Charmed and treat that creature as the Compeller for the duration. While charmed in this way, this condition does not end if they are harmed and they remake their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending this effect on a success. Critical Failure: Same as failure, they now seek to aid or protect their Compeller for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Frenzy: Yellow
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, attempting to infuse a target within range, with an aspect of your madness, causing their eyes to glow green. Select one creature you are aware of, that can hear you within range, forcing them to make a Wisdom saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects, instead only becoming Concussed until the end of the next turn. Failure: Affected creatures succumbs to your aspect of madness. For the duration, if they would attempt to cast a Jutsu with a casting time of a Bonus Action, they must roll a 1d4. On a roll of 1 or 2, they fail to cast it as they lose focus with constant mutterings. At the end of each of their turns, they remake their saving throw to end this jutsu's effects, while still unaware it is affected by this Genjutsu. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but they instead must roll a 1d6, failing to cast normally on a roll of a 4 or lower.

jutsu.name: Heavily Worded Song
jutsu.description: You begin to recite a song of your choice that radiates illusory chakra that seeps into the psyche of creatures in range. Select the song you wish you recite when this jutsu is cast, each coming with its own set of effects for this jutsu's duration as they must make an Intelligence saving throw at the beginning of each turn they begin within this jutsu's radius. You can switch the tune at the beginning of each of your turns by spending a Bonus Action. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Failure: Affected creature suffers the songs effects. Critical Failure: Affected creature suffers the songs effects plus the critical bonus. Ancient Song. Hostile creatures who fail suffers a break of madness, attacking the closest creature to them on their turn until with lowest ranked jutsu. If they critically fail, they instead target themselves automatically scoring a hit. Painful Song. Hostile creatures who fail experience extreme pain, losing the ability to cast jutsu with the Mobility (M) component. If they critically fail, they also fall Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you use the Reversal Song. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you can use the War Song. Reversal Song. Hostile creatures who gain a bonus of any type from a jutsu, become unable to benefit from those bonuses. If they critically fail, those bonuses become penalties. War Song. Hostile creatures suffer a -2 penalty to AC and Saving throws. If they critically fail, the penalty extends to all rolls that include dice as well.

jutsu.name: Heroism
jutsu.description: All willing creatures in range is imbued with heroic bravery, becoming immune to either the Demoralized or Shaken condition, for the duration. Pick one when this jutsu is cast. Additionally, affected creatures gains 2d6+4 temporary hit points. When the Genjutsu ends, the target loses any remaining temporary hit points. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the temporary hit points gained by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Sanctuary
jutsu.description: You weave chakra creating a hazy ward of illusions protecting a creature within range against attack. Until this jutsu ends, any creature who targets the warded creature with an attack or a jutsu must first succeed a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature must choose a new target or lose the attack or jutsu. This ward does not protect against area effects, such as a Fire Release: fireball or any similar jutsu. If the warded creature makes an attack or casts a jutsu that affects a creature, this jutsu ends.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the number of creatures you target with this jutsu by +1.

jutsu.name: Semblance of Dread
jutsu.description: You morph your visage into that of a faceless monstrosity known as Nyarlathotep. This visage can be of your own description as this monstrosity has no known singular description. For the duration, any creature within 20 feet of you becomes unable to willingly move closer to you unless it makes a successful Wisdom saving throw at the start of its turn. Constructs and undead are immune to this effect. Additionally, you gain advantage on saving throws to resist the Demoralized or Shaken conditions.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the radius by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Soft Spoken Song
jutsu.description: You begin to hum a tune of your choice that radiates illusory chakra that seeps into the psyche of creatures in range. Select the melody you wish you recite when this jutsu is cast, each coming with its own set of effects for this jutsu's duration. You can switch the tune at the beginning of each of your turns by spending a Bonus Action. For the duration, you do not spend chakra to maintain this jutsu, instead you must spend a bonus action on subsequent turns to maintain it. Switching tunes also maintains this jutsu. Revitalized Tune. Willing allied creatures who begin their turns within range gain a rank of mastery on their next Saving throw before the beginning of your next turn. Revealing Tune. Genjutsu that would affect a Willing allied creature in range with the Auditory and Unaware Keywords, lose the Unaware keyword when affecting creatures benefiting from this jutsu. Restoring Tune. Willing allied creatures who begin their turn within range gain 1d6+4 temporary hit points, which last until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher you can use the Courageous Tune. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you use the Survival Tune. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you can use the War Tune. Courageous Tune. Willing allied creatures gain immunity to the Demoralized and Concussed conditions. Survival Tune. Willing allied creatures gains the benefits of the Dash and Disengage actions.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Abhorrent Apparition
jutsu.description: You weave a collection of hand seals conjuring a large incomprehensible monstrosity known as Mh'ithrha that hovers above you. Select a number of creatures that you can see and that can see you within range, equal to your proficiency bonus. Each selected creature can see this monstrosity as its visage and design goes against all things rational and sane. The selected creature must make an Intelligence saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature takes 2d8 psychic damage. Failure: Affected creature takes 4d8 psychic damage and before the end of your next turn, the next time the affected creature see's their allies cast a jutsu, it must spend its reaction to take the Attack action, with a weapon or unarmed attack whichever has the larger damage dice and can reach, against the triggering creature. If the target is not in the attacking creature range, they move up to 15 feet closer as part of the reaction. An affected creature remakes saving throws at the end of each of its turns, ending this jutsu on a success. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but the affected creature takes 7d8 psychic damage instead.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Alienation
jutsu.description: You manifest a pulse of illusory chakra that overwhelms a creature to make it difficult for them to communicate or be communicated with. Select one creature within range, who must make an Intelligence saving throw. Affected creatures remake their saving throw at the end of their turns ending this jutsu on a success. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature begins to see the world shift slightly becoming unable to take the dash or dodge actions until the end of their next turn. Failure: Affected creature loses the ability to communicated with or understand others for the duration and feels the world is closing in on it as it cannot take the Dash or Dodge actions and attacks or checks it makes are at disadvantage for the duration. Critical Failure: Same as failure and the affected creature suffers a mental break taking 3d12 psychic damage at the beginning of each of its turns.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, increase the number of creatures this jutsu can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Cajolery of Glamour
jutsu.description: A powerful Genjutsu, that puts a creature under an illusion only using words and speech. While in the Genjutsu, the target can be easily swayed by their will and self-assurance. Select a target creature you can see within range; the target must make a Charisma saving throw. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Failure: They are also more inclined to believe the worst-case scenario and are more willing to go against their better judgement and their own goals. Critical Failure: Affected creature suffers the effects of a failure and becomes paranoid of all other creatures excluding the caster for the duration.

jutsu.name: Corruption: Malfeasance
jutsu.description: You collect and build illusionary chakra, corrupting the thoughts of your targets, forming a psychological tumor in the back of their mind. Select one creature you can see within range, forcing them to make a Charisma saving throw. Success: Affected creature is able to resist most of this jutsu's effects. Failure: Affected creatures, for the duration begins to experience a growing mass of mental energy. At the beginning of each of their turns, they gain 2 Psychic Malignance, up to a maximum of 20. When this jutsu ends as a result of a successful saving throw or the duration expiring, all Psychic Malignance a creature has detonates, dealing 1d10 psychic damage for each Psychic Malignance a creature has when it detonates. A creature can choose to remake their saving throw, once on each of its turns, ending this jutsu on a success. Psychic Malignance is treated as a Mental Condition for its duration. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but creatures instead gain 3 Psychic Malignance.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of target creatures by +1.

jutsu.name: Mental Taunt
jutsu.description: You create a sound of attraction. Meant to force creatures to focus on you against their will. Select a creature within range and force them to make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Jutsu's effects. Success: If the affected creature makes an attack during their turn, they have disadvantage on this attack, unless they target you. Failure: Affected creature must target you with any jutsu they cast until the end of their next turn. Critical Failure: Same effect as failure, and they cannot cast jutsu or used features, effects or items that would heal them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Frenzy: Mind Burst
jutsu.description: You reach into the mind of one creature you can see within range. Make a ranged genjutsu Attack as you launch a psychic lance into the mind of the target. On a hit, the target takes 5d8 psychic damage and must make a Wisdom saving throw. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects. Failure: They become Berserked. Critical Failure: Affected creature falls Prone and falls into a bout of insanity becoming Berserked for the duration.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the number of targets by +1. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank or higher, increase the number of targets by +1.

jutsu.name: Phantom Dragon
jutsu.description: All creatures of your choice within 30 feet who are not blind when this jutsu is cast and at the beginning of each of their turns must make a Wisdom saving throw or risk seeing a vile draconic image of your description. Creatures whom can see the dragon, that you score a successful attack against, see the illusory dragon performing the attack itself. The affected creature suffers Draconic Madness until the end of their next turn. This unique condition is treated as a Mental. Draconic Madness. This effect applies the effects of 1 rank of Demoralize and 1 rank of Sealed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, Draconic Madness lasts for 1 minute or until removed.

jutsu.name: Shadow Monsters
jutsu.description: Select one creature you can see within range. The select creature must make a Wisdom Saving throw. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects. Failure: Affected creature becomes Berserk for the duration, seeing all of its allies become shadowy monsters in a horrific fashion of your description. Affected creature makes a Wisdom saving throw if they deal damage to one of their allies. On a success, they end the Berserk condition. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but you and up to 3 other creatures of your choice transform to it and begin to look like its allies as it mentally sees you as allied creatures for the duration. Affected creature makes a Wisdom saving throw with a d4 penalty if they deal damage to one of their allies. On a success, they end the Berserk condition.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Suggestion
jutsu.description: You suggest a course of activity (limited to a sentence or two) and use Genjutsu to influence a creature you can see within range that can hear and understand you. Creatures that can't be Compelled and creatures that are in combat initiative are immune to this effect. The suggestion must be worded in such a manner as to make the course of action sound reasonable. Asking the creature to stab itself, throw itself onto a spear, immolate itself, or do some other obviously harmful act ends the jutsu. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects and is aware you attempted to control it. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects. Failure: Affected creature immediately follows your suggestion. This jutsu lasts for 1 minute or until the target has completed a finite suggestion or the suggestion becomes harmful to the creature or has other obvious negative effects. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but the concentration duration becomes 1 hour.

jutsu.name: Zone of Truth
jutsu.description: You create a chakra filled zone that guards against deception in a 30-foot sphere centered on a point of your choice within range. Until the Genjutsu ends, a creature that enters the jutsu's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there must make a Charisma saving throw. You know whether each creature succeeds or fails on its saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects and you are unaware if it passed or failed the save. Success: Affected creature is able to resist some of this jutsu's effects but they still find it difficult to lie. They suffer a 1d4 penalty to Deception checks. Failure: Affected creature find it very difficult to speak any deliberate or intentional lies as they show a look of obvious discomfort and make Deception checks at disadvantage. Critical Failure: Affected creature becomes unable to speak if they would lie.

jutsu.name: Mind Prison
jutsu.description: This Genjutsu assaults and twists creatures' minds, spawning delusions and provoking uncontrolled actions. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range must make a Wisdom saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects and becomes immune to this jutsu until the end of its next turn. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects. Failure: Affected creature cannot take reactions and must roll a d10 at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior for that turn. Critical Failure: Same effect as failure, but affected creature instead must roll a d8.

jutsu.name: Effortless Paralysis
jutsu.description: You create a visual image of your own description that grabs and restrains a creature you can see within range. The target must make a Wisdom Saving throw. This jutsu has no effect on undead, constructs, plants, or Demons. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creatures mind is wounded, as they take 3d12 psychic damage. Failure: Affected creature becomes Stunned until the end of your next turn and takes 4d12 psychic damage. Critical Failure: Same effect as failure, but affected creature is Stunned for the duration and remakes its saves at the end of each of its turns or when it takes damage, ending this jutsu's effect on it, on a success.

jutsu.name: Frenzy: Cackle
jutsu.description: You collect and build all of your madness and instability and release it into an echoing wave that tears through the minds of creatures within range. All creatures, including yourself, in range must make an Intelligence saving throw. You make your saving throw at advantage. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature becomes Blinded until the end of the current turn as their madness blinds them. Failure: Affected creatures takes 4d12 psychic damage and becomes Blinded for the next minute, remaking saving throws at the end of each of their turns, ending this jutsu's effect on a success. Critical Failure: Affected creatures takes 6d12 psychic damage and becomes Blinded, Deafened, and incapable of smelling or tasting as they begin to laugh manically for the next minute, remaking their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, with a 1d4 penalty ending this jutsu's effect on a success.

jutsu.name: Maddening Shadows
jutsu.description: Illusory Darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 60-foot radius sphere until this jutsu ends. A creature with Darkvision or Chakra Sight can't see through this darkness. Shrieks, gibbering, and maddening laughter can be heard within the darkness. Whenever a creature starts its turn in the sphere, it must make a Charisma Saving throw Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Genjutsu's effects, taking only 3d8 psychic damage. Failure: Affected creature takes 6d8 psychic damage. A creature whose HP is reduced to 0 as a result of this jutsu has its HP instead reduced to 1. Critical Failure: Affected creature takes 8d8 psychic damage. A creature whose HP is reduced to 0 as a result of this jutsu has its HP instead reduced to 1 and they gain 5 ranks of Demoralized for the next 24 hours or until they have a Jutsu with the medical keyword of B-Rank or higher that can end the fear condition cast on them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Request of the Damned
jutsu.description: You issue a single command, no longer than 25 words, directed at a single creature whom you can see who's name you include in your command. If the creature can hear you, they must make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature becomes overcome with conflicting desires, becoming Confused, until the end of their next turn. Failure: Affected creature must commit their Action in an attempt to complete this task. The command must be something that can be completed within the next minute, otherwise this jutsu ends. Affected creature remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending this effect on a success. Critical Failure: Same as failure, but they instead only remake their saving throw when they take damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creature you can target with this jutsu by +1.

jutsu.name: Slow
jutsu.description: You alter the perception of time for up to 2 creatures of your choice in range. Each target must make an Intelligence saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature becomes Slow until the end of the next turn. Failure: Affected creatures becomes Slow for the duration and remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending this jutsu's effects on themselves. Critical Failure: Same as Failure, but they remake their saving throw with a -2 penalty.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of targets by 2.

jutsu.name: Unmistakable Fear
jutsu.description: You project a phantasmal Genjutsu image of all creatures' worst fears in a target area. Each creature in a 90 Foot Cube originating from you must make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature drops whatever it is holding. Failure: Affected creatures drops whatever it is holding and gains 2 ranks of Demoralized. For the duration, when a creature with ranks of Demoralized would take psychic damage, they take an additional 4d6 psychic damage. Critical Failure: Same as Failure, but affected creatures instead take 6d6 psychic damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Encroaching Darkness
jutsu.description: You cause menacing shadows to invade an area, centered on a point you can see within range. Creatures become unable to see Bright or dim light as it seems to vanish before their eyes. Any jutsu or effect of C-Rank or lower that would create light, does not produce visible light for creatures within range to see. Yourself and up to 3 creatures of your choice are immune to this jutsu's effects and are treated as if being concealed by darkness against creatures who are under this jutsu's effects. A creature can, on their turn as an Action, make a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, they can see through the darkness until the beginning of their next turn. If a jutsu of B-Rank or higher is cast within this jutsu's area of effect that produces light, this jutsu immediately ends.

jutsu.name: Dance Macabre
jutsu.description: Threads of dark chakra leap from your fingers into the ground as you conjure 4 Dark Phantasms. The Dark Phantasm has the listed statistics found on its stat block in the Summon Stat Blocks section and use your Genjutsu attack bonus or Save DC when an effect calls for it. You can command them as a Bonus action, with each following different or the same orders.

jutsu.name: Die
jutsu.description: You utter a word of absolute authority commanding a creature to attack itself with its most potent attack. Target creatures whom can see and hear you within range, must make a Charisma saving throw. Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this Jutsu's effects. Success: Affected creature is Confused until the end of their next turn. Failure: On the affected creatures next turn, they must cast a jutsu or make an attack of the caster's choice, targeting themselves. If commanded to perform an attack they do not know or are able to perform, they perform the last offensive damaging attack they used in combat, but on themselves. If they have not performed any damaging actions this combat, they instead take 8d10 psychic damage. Critical Failure: Same as Failure but affected creature automatically scores a critical hit against themselves on the first attack made.

jutsu.name: Lackluster Thoughts
jutsu.description: You speak unfocused words and statements of indecision into a chakra seal before you then attempt to implant them into the mind of a creature you can see within range. Select creature within range must make an Intelligence Save at the beginning of each of their turns. On a failed save, they instead spend their turn doing completely unproductive activities such as drawing in the sand fixing the straps on their armor, counting their kunai and shuriken or verbally planning out scenario's in elaborate 10 step plans. If a creature succeeds their Intelligence Save by 10 or more, this jutsu immediately ends on them and they become immune to this genjutsu for 1 hour.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures this jutsu can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Will Breaker
jutsu.description: You target creature(s) and attempt to break their will by planting seeds of doubt and despair deep into their mind. Select one creature you can see within range. The target must make either an Intelligence, Wisdom or Charisma save at the beginning of each of their turns (Your choice, this cannot be changed once selected). Critical Success: Affected creature is able to resist this jutsu's effects.. Success: Affected creature takes 7d8 psychic damage. Failure: Affected creature reduces the chosen Ability score by 1d4 for the duration. A creature whose ability score is reduced to 0 by this jutsu takes psychic damage equal to 14d8, this jutsu then immediately ends. A creature within 5 feet of the affected creature use its action to make a Wisdom (Illusions) check vs your Genjutsu Save DC. On a success, they tear the break this Genjutsu's hold on the affected creature immediately ending this jutsu. Critical Failure: Same as Failure, but instead they reduce the chosen ability score by 1d6.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures this jutsu can target by +2.

jutsu.name: Mental Clone
jutsu.cost: 19 Chakra a Week for 52 weeks consistently.
jutsu.description: This jutsu requires a living replacement body void of consciousness and 100 Chakra seals systematically placed around the replacement body. This jutsu creates an inert duplicate of a living creature's consciousness with all of its current memories and experiences as a safeguard against death. This Mental Clone is cultured over the course of 1 year, as the user would offer a portion of its chakra weekly to grow the psyche of the clone. You can only have one Mental Clone prepared at a time. You can choose to have the clone be a younger version of the subject. This culturing must be maintained consistently for at least a year. If the subject does not offer its chakra for more than 1 week, the culturing is prematurely stopped as the mental clone awakes with an insufficient amount of chakra as its own person and not linked to the original subject as intended. If this jutsu is completed successfully, at any time after the clone matures, if the original creature dies, its consciousness is transferred to the clone provided the consciousness isn't damaged and is able to transfer. The clone only retains the mental stats (Intelligence, Wisdom & Charisma) of the original subject and all of its knowledge at the point of this Jutsu's original start.

jutsu.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
jutsu.description: This genjutsu attracts or repels creatures of your choice. You target something within range, either a huge or smaller object or creature or an area that is no larger than a 200-foot cube. Then specify a kind of intelligent creature, such as Sage's beasts, Demons, or even Humans. You inject the target with an aura that either attracts or repels the specified creatures for the duration. Choose antipathy or sympathy as the aura's effect. Antipathy. The Genjutsu causes creatures of the kind you designated to feel an intense urge to leave the area and avoid the target. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must make a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened. The creature remains frightened while it can see the target or is within 60 feet of it. While frightened by the target, the creature must use its movement to move to the nearest safe spot from which it can't see the target. If the creature moves more than 60 feet from the target and can't see it, the creature is no longer frightened, but the creature becomes frightened again if it regains sight of the target or moves within 60 feet of it. Sympathy. The enchantment causes the specified creatures to feel an intense urge to approach the target while within 60 feet of it or able to see it. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must make a Wisdom saving throw or use its movement on each of its turns to enter the area or move within reach of the target. When the creature has done so, it can't willingly move away from the target. If the target damages or otherwise harms an affected creature, the affected creature can make a Wisdom saving throw to end the effect, as described below. Ending the Effect. If an affected creature ends its turn while not within 60 feet of the target or able to see it, the creature makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the creature is no longer affected by the target and recognizes the feeling of repugnance or attraction as magical. In addition, a creature affected by the genjutsu is allowed another Wisdom saving throw every 24 hours while the genjutsu persists. A creature that successfully saves against this effect is immune to it for 1 minute, after which time it can be affected again.

jutsu.name: Lions Presence
jutsu.description: You exude the courage of the infallible kings of the jungle. All hostile creatures within range must make a charisma saving throw.
