Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [Unarmed damage] and the target must make a constitution saving throw gaining 3 ranks of Weakened for the next minute. At the end of the targets turn, they can remake their saving throw to reduce the ranks of Weakened they have by 1.

jutsu.name: Phantom Mobility
jutsu.description: While you are gaining this jutsu's benefits; You can move through a creature's space while suffering no movement penalties and requiring no checks. When you take the dash action, you can do so as a bonus action and ignore difficult terrain. When water or wall walking, you move at your full speed.

jutsu.name: Rakshasa's Palm
jutsu.description: You build up chakra into the palm of your hand, until each time you flex your fingers the air crackles with thunderous booms. Make a melee taijutsu attack against a creature you can see within range, on a hit you deal your [Unarmed damage] + 6d4 and the target must make a Constitution saving throw being Dazed on a failed save until the end of their next turn. Finisher: Make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Unarmed damage] + 10d4. You treat Barriers and intercepting structures as vulnerable to this jutsu's damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 2d4. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, a creature that fails their saving throw become Bruised. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, if you make a clash check, add your unarmed damage die to the result. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, if you succeed a clash, the losing creature becomes Stunned until the end of their next turn.

jutsu.name: Rakshasa's Sole
jutsu.description: You build up chakra into the sole of your feet, until each step you take crushes the ground you walk on. For the duration, you gain a special reaction called Rakshasa's Sole, which you can take when you would make a Strength or Dexterity saving throw from a Ninjutsu or Taijutsu cast that has the shape of a Sphere, Cylinder, Cone or Line. Rakshasa's Sole. When you take this reaction, you perform a round house kick, striking the Jutsu initiating a Clash. You make this Clash check at advantage and can reroll 1's and 2's taking the second result. If you win the clash check, you deal damage equal to 3 times your Unarmed damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If you cast this jutsu at B-Rank if you win the clash check you instead deal 4 times your [Unarmed damage]. If you Cast this jutsu at A-Rank, if you win the clash check, you instead deal 5 times your [Unarmed damage]. If you cast this jutsu at S-Rank, if you win the clash check, you instead deal 6 times your [Unarmed damage].

jutsu.name: Rising Falcon
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you are falling or pushed at least 10 feet.
jutsu.description: You kick the air or another creature with enough force to propel your entire body in a different direction. If you choose to kick the air, you propel yourself up to 30 feet in any direction. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunities and if you would end this movement within 5 feet of a hostile creature you can perform a powerful sweeping kick by making a single melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 4d6. If you choose to kick another creature, you must pass through or by them as part of your fall or forced movement. Make a single melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Unarmed damage] +4d6, and propel yourself up to 30 feet in any direction. This movement cannot provoke attacks of opportunity and if you would end this movement within 5 feet of another hostile creature, you can perform a power sweeping kick by making another melee taijutsu attack targeting this creature, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 4d6.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of times you can propel yourself by striking a creature by +1.

jutsu.name: Royal Flush
jutsu.description: You begin to enhance the defensive potential of jutsu you cast for the duration. You begin to radiate chakra forming defensive layers of chakra gaining the following benefits. The number of Royal Shield charges you gain from jutsu that grant them, increases by +2. Taijutsu, you cast that increases your AC, increases that bonus by +1. Taijutsu you cast that grant you Temporary hit points, increase the temporary hit points gained by +1 dice.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, this jutsu gains the Efficient keyword. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, reduce the cost of Royal Guard by half.

jutsu.name: Safety Release
jutsu.description: An alternative version of the Body Pathway Derangement. You, instead of mixing up a creature's brain signals, you temporarily increase their efficiency. Select one creature, other than yourself that you can see and touch. The targets body experiences no direct changes, but their central nervous system carries signals significantly faster than previously gaining the following benefits; The creature's speed is increased by +10. +1d4 bonus to Dexterity Saving throws. So long as you can take an Action, you cannot lose the ability to or be prevented from making a Bonus Action or Reaction. Only 1 Creature can benefit from this jutsu at a time. If you cast this jutsu targeting another creature, the previous creature loses its benefits. Additionally, if the creature ever falls under the Shocked condition, this jutsu, immediately ends.

jutsu.name: Scattering Wave
jutsu.description: You inject your fist or foot with a surge of chakra that you use to strike the ground, creating a shockwave of force. All creatures within 15 feet of you must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they take your [Unarmed damage] + 3d6 and are pushed back to the edge of this jutsu's radius, into a space that can hold them. If the creatures are stopped from moving by a wall or structure, they take 1d6 damage for every 10 feet of movement they had left (min 1d6)
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6 and this jutsu's radius by +5 feet. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, all creatures of your choice within 5 feet of you become immune to this jutsu's effects.

jutsu.name: Seikuken Goitsu
jutsu.description: You must be in a Taijutsu Stance to cast this jutsu. You stand calm and still, emptying your mind and merging your Tin and Tang Chakras into an explosive fusion of your physical and spiritual abilities. You now control the entire radius within your arm's length, creating a spherical shield around you. For the duration, creatures who make a melee attack targeting you suffer a 1d4 penalty to their attack rolls. In addition, damage you deal to them as a result of a melee attack forces them to make a Constitution saving throw, once per turn as you efficiently and brutally break down their defenses with every strike. On a failed save, the target is Exposed until the beginning of your next turn. An exposed creature cannot gain bonuses to their AC or DR for the duration.

jutsu.name: Twin Heavenly Swallow
jutsu.description: You and the other casters perform a series of well-orchestrated strikes in sequence with one another back and forth with you performing the final strike. Each caster makes 2 melee taijutsu attacks against the target creature, dealing their [Unarmed Damage] + 1d12 on a hit. If each caster hits the target with 2 or more melee taijutsu attacks, then each caster can make one more melee taijutsu attack. If the final attacks are successful, the target takes each casters [Unarmed Damage] + 2d12 and are pushed 20 away, landing Prone. Combination: When this jutsu is cast, increase the number of attacks each caster makes by +1, for every caster beyond the second.

jutsu.name: Welter Move
jutsu.description: As a part of casting and benefiting from this jutsu, you must be in a Taijutsu Stance. If you are not, its effects immediately ends. When you move 10 or more feet before making a melee attack, you can cast this jutsu, granting yourself a +1 bonus your attack rolls and Dexterity saving throws. These bonuses last until the beginning of your next turn, stacking up to twice. Each time you cast this jutsu, you must move 10 or more feet and perform a melee attack targeting either the same or another creature. Creatures who's attack result would be equal to your AC counts as a miss for the duration. If you would succeed a Dexterity saving throw while gaining the benefit of this jutsu you take no damage and suffer no effects. Finally, the first time you would be hit by an attack while gaining the benefit of this jutsu, you lose its benefits.

jutsu.name: Whirlwind Death Drop
jutsu.description: You perform a spinning backwards kick followed by a devastating downward axe kick. Make two Taijutsu attack On a hit, each attack deals your [Unarmed damage] + 2d8. Finisher: you make three spinning kicks. Make three melee taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 2d8. If a creature is hit with at least two of your attacks, they must make a constitution saving throw, being Stunned until the beginning of their next turn on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Whirlwind Snap
jutsu.description: You perform a reverse round house kick. All creatures in a 15-foot cone originating from you must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they take your [Unarmed damage] + 2d6 and are pulled up to 10 feet closer to you into a space that can hold them and are Bruised, or half as much damage on a successful save. Until the end of the current turn, an allied creature within 15 feet of you, can target the triggering creature with a Taijutsu Finisher regardless of range, once per turn, using a Reaction.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6 and the cone size by +5 feet.

jutsu.name: After Image Technique
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, when you are targeted by an attack that you can see.
jutsu.description: You move fast enough to leave behind a duplicate of yourself purely from your movement speed alone. Right before a creature hits you, you instantly teleport up to half your speed to another space that can hold you, leaving behind a copy of yourself that dissipates when hit by the initial attack. If the triggering attack was a critical hit, you instead take the damage as if it were a normal hit.

jutsu.name: Asakujaku: Morning Peacock
jutsu.description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher targeting an airborne or falling creature. As a part of casting this jutsu, you must be gaining the benefits of at least the 5th Gate: Limit or higher, from the 8-Inner Gates: Seimon Taijutsu feat. Once this jutsu is cast, you cannot cast it again until you spend at least 10 minutes recovering from the strain it places on your body. You leap into the air in a distinctive stance and begin punching the enemy repeatedly, so quickly in fact that they are set ablaze by the sheer speed and friction which in turn, creates a peacock-like fan of flames around the target. Make a number of melee taijutsu attacks equal to your proficiency bonus dealing 1d6 damage on the first hit, then each successful hit after the first, increase damage die by +1. You cannot add your ability modifier to the damage dealt. If you Score at least 5 hits this way, at the conclusion of this jutsu, the target is slammed back into the ground and have to make a Constitution saving throw, being Stunned until the end of their next turn on a failed save.

jutsu.name: Breaker Fist
jutsu.description: You perform a full power strike, putting all of your weight and momentum behind this strike. If this jutsu is cast targeting a creature who is gaining the benefits of damage Reduction or Resistance, you ignore them for this jutsu's damage roll. Make a melee taijutsu attack dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 5d8. Finisher: on a hit, you instead deal your [Unarmed damage] + 7d8, and the target must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they are shaken as become Staggered until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Cherry Blossom Impact
jutsu.description: You amass enough chakra on the tips of your knuckles to completely obliterate a small home, choosing to instead strike a single creature with this monstrous impact. You store up chakra as you make a single, powerful strike releasing it on impact. Make a single melee taijutsu attack against a target in range. On a hit, the target takes your [Unarmed damage] + 4d12. The target also has to make a constitution saving throw being Dazed and Bruised. Finisher: if you successfully score a hit, all creatures, objects and structures touching the ground (excluding you) within 30 feet of the target, must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 6d6 Bludgeoning damage and falling Prone on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. The affected area becomes difficult terrain.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12 and 2d6.

jutsu.name: Titan Break
jutsu.description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher. You interlock your hands and perform a powerful strike to the targets core while both hands are imitating the bottom and top half of a dragons maw. Make two melee taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 3d8. For each successful hit the target must make a Strength saving throw. On each failed save, the target creature suffers a 1d4 penalty to their melee attacks, and skill checks that use Strength or Dexterity until the end of your next turn. Finisher: you instead my three melee taijutsu attacks.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Dragon Crush
jutsu.description: a part of casting this jutsu, you must target a creature who is Dazed or Stunned. Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 8d10 and forcing the creature to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, their condition persists, extending the duration of it by 1 round. Finisher: you instead can make two attacks.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Full House
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Action or Reaction, which you only take while airborne, falling at least 30 feet.
jutsu.description: While falling you change trajectory to instead come down diagonally against a creature within range. You come down aggressively with the force of a falling star. Move up to 30 feet towards a creature you can see within range, ending your movement within 5 feet of the target. Make a melee taijutsu attack dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 4d8. Finisher: you instead deal your [Unarmed damage] + 6d8 and all creatures within 10 feet of the target must make a Strength saving throw as the force of your kick cracks the air and creates an unprecedented shockwave. On a failed save the creatures are thrown 10 feet away into a space that can hold them.

jutsu.name: Heavenly Foot of Pain
jutsu.description: You put an enormous amount of chakra into the heel of your foot as you make a single downward kick. Make a Taijutsu attack against a target in range. On a hit target takes 7d10 Bludgeoning damage. Finisher: All surrounding creatures, objects and structures (excluding you), within 30 feet of the target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take half damage. If you deal damage to a Barrier this way, the barrier takes the full damage dealt and treats the damage as if it was vulnerable. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: King's Fang
jutsu.description: You ferociously attack a creature with the aggression and passion of a lion king. Make two melee taijutsu attacks targeting a creature you can see within range, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 2d6. On each successfully hit, the target must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save they are Bruised. Finisher: you instead deal your [Unarmed damage] +4d6 on each successful hit and on a failed save, they gain ranks of Shaken equal to the number of successful attacks made with this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the number of attacks you make by +1.

jutsu.name: Incursion of Clarity
jutsu.description: You release a surge of chakra throughout your body removing all impurities and assisting in recovering from physical debilitations. You can remove one of the following condition types currently affecting you Physical or Sensory and granting you advantage against the same condition for 1 minute.

jutsu.name: Leaf Earth Crush
jutsu.description: You slam your feet into the ground with the Passion of Youth TM, fragmenting and shattering the earth. All creature in in range must make a dexterity saving throw to dodge and avoid the spears of stone, metal or whatever materials the ground is made of. On a failed save, creatures take 3d8 piercing damage and are knocked 25 feet into the air, becoming airborne until the end of the current turn. The affected area becomes difficult terrain until cleared or restored.

jutsu.name: Leaf Gust
jutsu.description: You swipe your leg with enough force to create a localized shockwave strong enough to bludgeon creatures and objects in range while also blowing them away. Creatures and objects in a 30-foot cone originating from you must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked up 30 feet into the air on a failed save. An airborne creature cannot take a reaction to jutsu you cast with the Finisher keyword before the end of the current turn.

jutsu.name: Leaf Hot Wind
jutsu.description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher. You begin to perform a series of roundhouse kicks with enough force to ignite the air around your legs turning them into flaming kicks as your tear through everything in your path. Select a space within range that you can see and move to that location regardless of other creatures in your path. All creatures of your choice who you would pass through on your way to the location must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 3d6 Fire damage and gaining 2 ranks of the Burned condition on a failed save or only half damage and no further effects on a successful save. If you end your movement within 5 feet of a hostile creature, make a Taijutsu attack against target one creature, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 7d10 Fire damage. The target must make a Strength saving throw becoming Bruised on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage of your targeted attack damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Leaf Hurricane Bullet
jutsu.description: You strike with enough force to create a focused bullet of air pressure to strike at ranged targets. Make two ranged taijutsu attack, dealing 5d8 bludgeoning damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of ranged taijutsu attacks by +1.

jutsu.name: Machine Gun Punch!
jutsu.description: You perform a series of insanely fast strikes so fast that your fists grow hot from the resistance of the air around them. You lock yourself in place, and cannot move from the space you cast this jutsu in. Make 5 melee taijutsu attacks. On a hit, you deal [Unarmed damage].

jutsu.name: Maximum Entry
jutsu.description: You move at remarkable speeds vanishing like the wind. Choose up to 5 creatures you can see within range. Make a melee taijutsu attack against each target. On a hit, a target takes your [Unarmed damage] + 4d8 and becomes Bruised. You then teleport to an unoccupied space you can see within 5 feet of one of your targets you hit or missed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: One Man Front Lotus
jutsu.description: As part of the requirements of this jutsu, you must have at least the 1st Gate: Opening from the 8 Inner Gates: Seimon class feature active. You leap into the air before beginning to spin turning yourself into a drill with enough force to create spiraling wind and dust that trails you as you come crashing down into a target of your choice that you can see within range. Make a melee taijutsu attack against the target, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 5d6. All creatures within 10 feet of the target must make a Strength saving throw to avoid being thrown back 10 feet from the force. Finisher: you instead make a melee taijutsu attack against the target, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 8d6. Additionally, all creatures within 10 feet of the target must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked back 20 feet from the force, becoming Dazed from the force and falling Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Owl Drop
jutsu.description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must be hidden from the target of this Taijutsu. You leap downward over your target as your wrap your legs around their neck. You squeeze and twist, attempting to knock them out instantly. Make a melee taijutsu attack against the target to grapple them. On a success the target must make a constitution saving throw falling unconscious on a failed save. An unconscious creature remains unconscious for 10 minutes, or until they are moved, touched, take damage or are in the area of a Jutsu's effect.

jutsu.name: Pack Aggression
jutsu.description: You ferociously attack a creature with the aggression and ferocity of a pack of wolves. Make two melee taijutsu attacks targeting a creature you can see within range dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 2d6. On each successful hit, increase your next attacks critical threat range by +1 for this jutsu's duration. Finisher: you instead make three melee taijutsu attacks.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Passionate Dancing Leaf
jutsu.description: You are filled to the brim with the Passion of Youth TM, and you let it guide your movements. All creature in a 45-foot cone originating from you must make a dexterity saving throw to dodge and avoid the plethora of punches and kicks you throw out as you dance across the battlefield, before returning back to place in an instant. On a failed save, creatures take 5d6 bludgeoning damage and are knocked Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Piston Fist
jutsu.description: You make a basic strike against a target within range. As a part of the activation of this jutsu, make a Taijutsu attack. On a hit you deal your [Unarmed damage] + 6d4 as a surge of chakra erupts from your joint forcing the attack deeper. Finisher: you instead make a melee taijutsu attack with a +2 bonus to your critical threat range, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 9d4.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by +2d4.

jutsu.name: Predators Fang
jutsu.description: You take both of your hands and shape them into a serpent's open maw with its fangs showing before you perform a series of strikes meant to break an enemy down. Make three melee taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 2d8. For each successful hit the target must make a Strength saving throw. On each failed save, the target creature suffers a -1 penalty to their strength or dexterity ability scores for the next minute. A creature whose ability score is penalized in this way can spend a full-turn-action to readjust themselves, restoring their ability scores back to normal.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks by +1.

jutsu.name: Quaking Leg
jutsu.description: You make a basic strike against a target within range. As a part of the activation of this jutsu, make a Taijutsu attack. On a hit, the target take your [Unarmed damage] and gains 2 ranks of Weakened. Additionally, the affected creature is unable to take reactions until the end of the current turn.

jutsu.name: Rabbit Boss Stomp
jutsu.description: You kick with the force of 10,000 rabbits stomping someone to death. Make one melee taijutsu attacks targeting a creature you can see within range dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 6d8 and all creatures in a 30-foot cone originating from the target creature must make a Strength saving throw suffering the residual shockwave taking 6d8 bludgeoning damage on a failed save or half as much on a success. The affected area behind the original target creatures becomes difficult terrain as the ground shatters and collapses from your kick. Finisher: you instead deal [Unarmed Damage] + 9d8 and.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d8 or 1d12.

jutsu.name: Star Shower
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Action, which you can only take while airborne, falling, or jumping at minimum 30 feet vertically.
jutsu.description: While falling you strike the air, creating pockets of force that strike like bullets, pelting the ground. Select a space you can see in range. All creatures in a 20-foot cube originating from this space must make a dexterity saving throw taking your [Unarmed damage] + 6d8 bludgeoning damage and being Staggered on a failed save. The area affected by this jutsu becomes cracked and riddled with fist sized craters and imprints becoming difficult terrain.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d8 and the size of the cube by 5-feet

jutsu.name: Steel Knuckle
jutsu.description: You perform a series of high-powered strikes with full intention to cause harm, break bones and crush your enemies. Make a two melee taijutsu attacks. On a hit, you deal your [Unarmed damage] + 3d12 and force the target to make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, you knock them back a number of feed equal to 10 x your strength ability modifier. If you knock a creature away from you with any attack granted by this jutsu, you gain bonus movement speed up to the number of feet you knocked the target away, which you can only use to move to a space within 5 feet of the target that can hold you. If they strike a solid surface that's less than 5 feet thick, they tear through it if they have at least 10 or more feet remaining to be knocked back, taking 4d6 bludgeoning damage for each surface they go through.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12 and 1d6

jutsu.name: Still Earth: Reverb
jutsu.description: You can see stiffness in the joints of your friends and can release that tension with a single joint adjustment. This jutsu cannot have its cost reduced by any means. Select one willing creature other than you, who you can reach as you press their bodies joints into place with firm but gentle motions. When you do release a buildup of tension and stress within them. Affected creatures experience a bliss of resistance free movement for the duration granting them a bonus +10 to movement speed and +1 to AC, Strength and Dexterity saving throws. Additionally, for the duration the affected creature gains an additional use of any 1 clan feature with a use limitation or 1 additional spendable resource. If this additional resource isn't spent by the end of the duration it is lost. (Ex. Speed Dice, Sharingan use limit etc.) A creature can only benefit from this jutsu once per long rest. Finally, if this creature is ever under the effects of the Weakened condition, this jutsu immediately ends.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, you can target up to two creatures, instead of one.

jutsu.name: Triple Double
jutsu.description: You support your allies by breaking your mutual enemies defenses, setting them up for a brutal finisher. Make a single melee taijutsu attack against a creature within range. On a hit, you deal your unarmed damage. You grant two allies within 15 feet of you an additional reaction, which they can only use to cast a Taijutsu with the Finisher keyword or a Bukijutsu with Chain or Bukijutsu with the Finisher keyword that has a casting time of 1 Action.

jutsu.name: Unpredictable Blows
jutsu.description: You sway in and out of combat, dancing around your opponent in a drunken stupor throwing them off, while also making it difficult to pint you down into any single space. While you are engaged with at least 2 hostile creatures, make one melee taijutsu attack against each hostile creature you are currently engaged with. On a hit you deal your [Unarmed damage] + 3d8. Each time you successfully hit a creature using this jutsu, you increase your AC by +1 until the beginning of your next turn, and that creature cannot make an opportunity attack against you until the beginning of their next turn. Additionally, you gain a +1 bonus to saving throws to resist being Physical conditions and a +10 bonus to movement speed until the end of the current turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Amphibious Gout
jutsu.description: You enter a highly mobile stance designed to allow you to assist all allies in martial combat. Until the beginning of your next turn, allied creatures (including yourself) who would attempt to make a melee taijutsu attack targeting a creature while both creatures are within 15 feet of you, you may add your unarmed damage die to their attack and damage rolls, as you support them and yourself, by bouncing around in the 15-foot radius supporting each strike and reinforcing each hit with one of your own. Additionally, until the beginning of your next turn, hostile creatures who would attempt to make a melee or range attack targeting any allied creatures (including yourself) within 15 feet of you, reduces any damage they do by twice your Taijutsu ability modifier.

jutsu.name: Combo Break
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage or fail a saving throw against a jutsu with the Combo keyword.
jutsu.description: This jutsu can be cast even if you cannot normally gain the benefits of a reaction. You raise your defenses in preparation of being the target of a Finisher. You treat all jutsu with the Finisher keyword as if it was not cast as a Finisher until the end of the current turn. If a jutsu can only be cast as a finisher, you are no longer a valid target, and if there are no other valid targets, the jutsu casting is interrupted and fails.

jutsu.name: Combo Extender
jutsu.description: As part of the requirements of this jutsu, you must have at least the 3rd Gate: Life from the 8-Inner Gates: Seimon Taijutsu feat. For the duration of your Gates, you gain a special action called Combo Extension. Combo Extension. This special action is regained for the duration of this jutsu, at the beginning of each of your turns. For the duration, this special action can be cast a Taijutsu with a Casting time of either an Action or Bonus Action or take the Dash action.

jutsu.name: Death Blossom
jutsu.description: You strike a downed creature in the chest, in an attempt to stop their beating heart with a single strike. Make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, the target must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they take 10d6 in necrotic damage which cannot be reduced by any means or half as much on a success. Finisher: On a failed save, affected creatures gain 5 ranks of Bleed.

jutsu.name: Disabling Blow
jutsu.description: You strike at your target's joints attempting to disable them for an extended period of time. Make a Taijutsu attack against each target within 5 feet of you, of your choice. Each target takes twice your [Unarmed damage] and have their movement speed reduced by half and forcing them to make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they gain +2 ranks of Weakened and become unable to take reactions against you. An affected creature can remake their saving throw at the end of each of their turns to gain the ability to take reactions.

jutsu.name: Draconic Drive
jutsu.description: As a part of the requirements of this jutsu you must have at least the 3rd Gate: Life from the 8 Inner Gates: Seimon Taijutsu Feat. You leap backwards into the sky as you release chakra from your spine creating jets of chakra that keep you in the air before propelling you downward towards a creature you can see in range. Make a melee taijutsu attack dealing your [Unarmed damage] +6d6. Regardless of a hit or miss, you create a shockwave originating from the same space of the original target emanating out in a 20-foot radius sphere. All creatures in this radius, excluding you, must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take 6d6 bludgeoning damage and becoming Dazed for 1 minute or half as much damage on a successful save.

jutsu.name: Final Lotus
jutsu.description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher. As part of the requirements of this jutsu, you must have at least the 5th Gate: Limit from the 8 Inner Gates: Seimon Taijutsu Feat. The target of this jutsu must be Restrained or Grappled. Make five Taijutsu attacks against the target. On a hit, you deal [Unarmed Damage] + 1d12. If all five attacks hit, you make a 6th attack. On a hit with the 6th attack, you deal 6d12 bludgeoning damage and knock the target Prone.

jutsu.name: Magnum Knuckle
jutsu.description: You enrich your arms and legs with chakra that increases combat prowess. For the duration, you have advantage on attack of opportunities, and twice per turn, your unarmed attacks deal an additional die of damage. Also, up to twice per turn, when you make an unarmed attack, target creatures must make a constitution saving throw or reduce their movement speed by 15 until the end of their next turn.

jutsu.name: Real Impact
jutsu.description: You reel back preparing to perform a rising uppercut with enough chakra to distort the area around you from the force of your attack alone. Make a melee taijutsu attack, on a hit you deal your [Unarmed damage] + 8d8 and all creatures, including the original target who are adjacent to you must make a strength saving throw. On a failed save they are thrown 30 feet into the air, becoming airborne. All other creatures excluding your original target, until the end of the current turn, can be targeted by your allies within 30 feet of you with a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu Finisher regardless of range, once per turn, using their reaction, ignoring its listed casting time. Finisher: on a failed save, the target instead takes 10d6 necrotic damage and suffers 5 ranks of Bleed.

jutsu.name: Supreme Pacification
jutsu.description: An advanced pacification technique meant to completely remove a creature from combat or prevent them from entering combat all together. As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must target a single creature putting all of your focus upon them. Make a single melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you immediately grapple and restrain the target. The target can spend their reaction to make an opposed Strength (Athletics) check to break free immediately ending this jutsu, remaining Grappled and Restrained on a failed check. On an affected creatures turn; they must spend an action to attempt to escape by making a Strength saving throw. While a creature is Grappled and Restrained this way, they cannot form hand seals (HS), perform the help action, or make any Strength of Dexterity skill checks. Additionally, they cannot speak or make verbal sounds as you have their mouth covered as well. After 5 rounds, a creature Restrained in this way, must begin to make constitution saving throws at beginning of each of their turns. On a failed save, they fall unconscious. While you are grappling a creature in this way, your movement speed is reduced by half, you cannot take the dash action, you cannot form HS, and you cannot concentrate on ninjutsu or Genjutsu.

jutsu.name: Supreme Violence
jutsu.description: You pump chakra through your body until you can puppet your body with your chakra alone allowing you to react with but a thought. As a part of the activation of this jutsu you cannot concentrate on any Ninjutsu or Genjutsu for the duration of this Taijutsu. For the duration you gain a bonus to your AC equal to half of Taijutsu modifier and you gain a special ability called Violent Reprisal. Violent Reprisal. When a creature would make a melee attack with you as their target, you can spend your reaction to cast a Taijutsu with the casting time of 1 action that makes no more than two attacks against the triggering creature

jutsu.name: Tenebrous Claw
jutsu.description: You perform a series of blows with enough speed, strength, and striking power to generate sparks of electricity with each blow. Make three melee taijutsu attacks against one creature you can see within range, dealing your [Unarmed damage] + 2d10. Finisher: you deal your [Unarmed damage] + 3d10 and a creature who is hit with at least one of these attacks, must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they become Bruised and gain 3 ranks of Dazzled.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10

jutsu.name: Tiger Lily
jutsu.description: You enter a state of serenity and gain impenetrable clarity of the world around you. For the duration you gain 60 feet of blind sight.

jutsu.name: Violent Leaf Adamantine-Strength Whirlwind
jutsu.description: Description: As a part of casting this jutsu, you must currently have at least the 4th Gate: Pain from the 8 Inner Gates: Seimon Taijutsu Feat. When you first enter at least the 4th gate, you can cast this jutsu, immediately moving up to 30 feet towards any hostile creature you can see. If you end your movement within 5 feet of the them, you perform powerful roundhouse kick. Make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit you deal five times your [Unarmed damage] and the target must make a strength saving throw. On a failed save they are thrown back a number of feet equal to your strength modifier times 20. If they strike a solid surface that's less than 5 feet thick, they tear through it if they have at least 10 or more feet remaining to be knocked back, taking 6d6 bludgeoning damage for each surface they go through.

jutsu.name: Violent Strangling
jutsu.description: With a sudden movement you grip a targets throat with such speed most don't get a chance to react. Make a melee taijutsu attack against the target. On a hit, the target is Grappled and Restrained. The target also cannot make hand seals as you hold one of their hands. The target also gains +1 rank of Exhaustion. At the end of each of the targets turns they gain +2 ranks of Exhaustion. As an Action, on each of the targets turns, they can make a Strength saving throw to escape your grip on a success. When a creature would escape this jutsu they lose all ranks of Exhaustion gained from this Jutsu

jutsu.name: World Breaker
jutsu.description: You strike the ground with such force that you destroy the surrounding area with little concern. All creatures in a 60-foot cube originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 10d10 bludgeoning damage as the surface is destroyed and pieces of the ground shoot out in random directions. The affected area is counted as difficult terrain and creatures that are greater than 10 feet from each other are heavily obscured from one another. Finisher: all creatures who fail their saving throw are Stunned until the end of their turns.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Black Nerium
jutsu.description: Description: You attempt to press a point on the base of a hostile creature's neck. When you do, you reverse their bodies blood flow completely throwing their heart off and causing blood vessels to explode. Make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, the target must make a Constitution saving throw at the beginning of each of their turns for the next minute. Each time they would fail their saving throw, they suffer a -1 penalty to their Strength, Dexterity and Constitution ability checks, skill checks, attack rolls and saving throws for the duration and suffer 5d6 necrotic damage which cannot be reduced or resisted by any means. A creature who would fail all 10 saving throws, dies. As every blood vessel in their body collapses. A creature who is targeted with a Jutsu with the medical keyword that would end conditions or restore hit points cast at S-Rank, has this jutsu's effect immediately end.

jutsu.name: Blue Rose
jutsu.description: Description: You enter a state of absolute passion and ambition. You gain a special action called Rose Action. You regain spent Rose Actions at the beginning of each of your turns for the duration. Rose Actions. This special action can be used for any jutsu, skill or feature that would spend a bonus action. You can use this special action, twice per turn.

jutsu.name: Crimson Skies
jutsu.description: Description: You punch skyward with enough force to ignite the air around you, sparking flames and cinder to erupt. This creates an updraft of flames made by pure kinetic friction. This in turn turns the sky red for any creature who is within 1 mile of you. This sudden change in atmospheric pressure creates a sudden shift in air pressure creating a massive cyclone that lasts for but a moment. All creatures (excluding you) within 45 feet of you must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they take 10d8 Fire damage from the spark of flames or half as much on a success Immediately after, all creatures in the same area must remake their saving throw. Creatures who failed their first saving throw makes this second saving throw at disadvantage. On a failed second saving throw, creatures are thrown 120 feet in a random direction taking 10d8 bludgeoning damage as they strike the ground or a solid surface. On a successful save, they take half damage and are instead thrown only 60 feet in a random direction.

jutsu.name: Daytime Tiger
jutsu.description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher. As part of the requirements of this jutsu, you must have at least the 6th Gate: View from the 8 Inner Gates Taijutsu Feat active. You take your palm and tap it with a closed fist creating a vortex of air pressure. Make a range Taijutsu attack. On a hit the target takes 10d12 bludgeoning and 10d12 force damage. Each creature within 30 feet around the target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. A target takes 10d10 Force damage on a failed save, or half on a successful one.

jutsu.name: Evening Elephant
jutsu.description: This jutsu can only be cast as a Taijutsu Finisher. This is the ultimate culmination of offensive Taijutsu. As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have the 7th Gate: Wonder from the 8 Inner Gates Taijutsu Feat active. Make 5 Taijutsu attacks against a target. Each attack you make is treated as a shockwave that affects all creatures in a 15-foot-wide, 60 feet line behind your initial target. On a hit, the target creature takes 4d10 bludgeoning damage.

jutsu.name: Hell On Earth
jutsu.description: As a requirement of casting this jutsu you must target a Prone creature. This jutsu can only be cast as a Finisher. You raise your hand to the sky, beckoning the heavens and projecting your essence of self. You create a direct fissure through the Prone target with a single blow. Make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal 8d12 +30 bludgeoning damage. Regardless of a hit or miss, all creatures, excluding you and the original target, must make a dexterity saving throw taking 8d8 + 15 bludgeoning damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success.

jutsu.name: Leaf Dragon God
jutsu.description: An Ultimate Taijutsu created by a legendary master. You perform an upward spin kick which quickly becomes a pressurized tornado that shapes itself into a dragon with long whiskers. Move yourself up to 120 feet in any direction even turning corners and up walls. All creatures who you pass within 5 feet of, must make a Strength saving throw being pulled into the tornado and thrown to the end of it landing 5 feet in front of where ever you end your movement, taking 12d8 bludgeoning damage and taking additional damage as if they were falling. On a successful save they only take half damage. Creatures take twice the amount of falling damage as a result of this jutsu. Creatures who fail the Strength saving throw must also succeed a constitution saving throw being slashed by the debris this Taijutsu picks up taking 6d8 slashing damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful save.

jutsu.name: Night Guy
jutsu.description: Description: As a part of casting this jutsu, you must currently have at least the 8th Gate: Death from the 8 Inner Gates Taijutsu feat. You begin to emit an enormous amount of red steam, known as the 'Steam of Blood', and your chakra manifests into a red burning beast of your description around your body. You then shout an activation word of your choice, before dashing forward with such force that space in front of your becomes distorted. You may select any creature or space you can see or within 120 feet of you. You move in as straight a line as possible. You move through all structures, environmental obstructions and anything similar as if you phase through them. You ignore barriers and structures that intercept damage or inhibit movement and the target cannot gain the benefits of a Reaction until the beginning of their next turn as you kick with the force required to distort time and space. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, at advantage, rerolling 1's and 2's. On a hit, the target must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they are immediately killed. On a successful save, they take deal 10d12 + 100 bludgeoning damage. At the conclusion of this attack, all of the blood in the users body is boiled out of them, forcing the end of their 8 Inner Gates.

jutsu.name: Red Lotus
jutsu.description: Description: You enter a state of absolute instinct and focus. You gain a special action called Lotus reactions. You regain spent Lotus reactions at the beginning of each of your turns for the duration. Lotus reactions. This special action can be used in place of any jutsu, skill or feature that would spend a reaction. You can spend this special reaction, twice per round.

jutsu.name: White Lily
jutsu.description: Description: You press a point on the base of a willing ally's spine. When you do, you release their bodies limited synapse response time, enhancing it, allowing an allied creature to move at the speed of thought. For the duration, the target gains 2 additional bonus action and reaction. The target of this jutsu cannot concentrate on any other jutsu for the duration. After one minute their body slows down, becoming Weakened for 1 hour. You cannot target yourself with this jutsu. If a creature benefiting from this jutsu gains 2 or more ranks of Shocked, they become Stunned until the end of their next turn. A creature cannot gain the benefits of this jutsu more than once per rest.

jutsu.name: Breath of Beasts: Fang
jutsu.description: You begin to collect and manifest chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The chakra begins to manifest in the form of any beast of your choice in any color that can be seen plainly by others. You begin to swing wildly and unpredictably, fueled by instinct and primal urges. Make two melee taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Weapons damage] with each. Chain 1: If you hit a single creature with both attacks, they must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked Prone on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and it's damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher increase the number of attacks by +1.

jutsu.name: Breath of Earth: Smash
jutsu.description: You begin to collect earth release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, magnifying its weight. You fool your opponent(s) into thinking you are striking and suddenly shift your attack into another angle. All creatures of your choice must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your weapons damage + 1d8 earth damage on a failed save, or half as much on a failed save. Chain 1: All creatures within range who have ranks of any Mental condition, suffers a -2 penalty to their saving throw.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can change the saving throw to a Strength save.

jutsu.name: Breath of Flame: Unknowing
jutsu.description: You begin to collect Fire release chakra until it transforms into gouts of flame that erupt from your weapon. You then dash towards your target and perform a single powerful swipe attempting to decapitate them in one strike. Select a creature you can see that you could reach using your full movement. Move into a space adjacent to the target creature within your movement range and make a single melee taijutsu attack against one creature you can see. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage +4d6 Fire damage. Chain 1: This attacks critical threat range increases by +1.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher you can target a second creature moving again into a space adjacent to that creature and making another attack with this jutsu's effect.

jutsu.name: Breath of Roses: Plum
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage, excluding from a Genjutsu.
jutsu.description: You begin to collect medical chakra until it creates a visage of a poisonous flowers falling around you. When you would take damage, you begin to make a series of rotating strikes to deflect as much damage as possible. Reduce the damage you would take by 2d8 and all hostile creatures adjacent to you must make a dexterity saving throw, taking 2d8 poison damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful save. Chain 1: You may add your [Weapon damage Dice] to the damage reduced.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduced and dealt by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, on a failed save, affected creatures gain a rank of Envenomed.

jutsu.name: Breath of Sound: Roar
jutsu.components: W (Any melee), NT (Any explosive tool), M
jutsu.description: You begin to collect chakra until it manifests into the shape of a sound note hovering over your eyes. All creatures in range, excluding yourself, must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they take your weapons damage + 1d6 and gain a rank of Dazzled on a failed save. Chain 1: A creature who fails by 5 or more gain a rank of Confused.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage of this jutsu by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can select a number of creatures to become immune to this jutsu's casting equal to your proficiency bonus.

jutsu.name: Breath of Thunder: Flash
jutsu.description: You begin to collect lightning release chakra until it sparks off of your weapon and body with violent jolts. Select a creature you can see within 30 feet and move into a space adjacent to the target creature within that range. Make a single melee taijutsu attack against the target creature. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage + 2d6 lightning damage. Chain 1: If the target creature has Temporary hit points, this attack gains a +2 bonus to its critical threat range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, select a second creature within 30 feet of the first target and move into a space adjacent to them making a second attack.

jutsu.name: Breath of Water: Surface
jutsu.description: You begin to collect and manifest water release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The water release chakra begins to transform into streams of water, capable of being seen and felt as you then move to strike with a powerful concentrated attack. Make a single melee taijutsu attack against one creature you can see. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage + 2d12 cold damage and the target must make a strength saving throw being Dazed on a failed save. Chain 1: This jutsu's attack roll cannot be made at disadvantage or with penalties to hit as a result of a condition or effect originating from a hostile creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher and the target of your attack has ranks of a Physical condition, you make your attack at advantage.

jutsu.name: Breath of Wind: Cutter
jutsu.description: You begin to collect wind release chakra until it spirals around the user's weapon creating whipping torrents of wind. You use this enhanced field of wind to propel you towards your enemy with a circular strike Make a melee taijutsu attack comparing its results against all creatures within your weapons range, dealing your weapons damage + 1d8 wind damage. Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Dexterity saving throw, on a failed save, this attack Pierces 4 DR.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d4.

jutsu.name: Crippling Strike
jutsu.description: You focus your weapons attack on crippling your enemy, to make them far less effective than they are currently. Make a Taijutsu attack based on the weapon used for this jutsu, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 2d10. On a hit, the target must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they are Weakened. Chain 1: You can make an additional attack targeting a different creature in range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Devils Gambit
jutsu.description: You take a bet fit for a devil. At the cost of enhancing your weapons lethality and accuracy you throw caution to the wind. Until the beginning of your next turn, the first weapon or Taijutsu attack made as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, is at advantage and you increase your weapons damage die by 1. But in exchange for this bet, all creatures first attack made targeting you is at advantage.

jutsu.name: Dragon Fly Dash
jutsu.description: You launch your weapon towards an allied creature you can see in range, ordering them to strike with it in your place. Select one willing creature you can see in range and you throw your chosen weapon to them. Until the end of the current turn, the weapon thrown retains all bonuses and effects as if you were wielding it. The target creature can spend their reaction to make one melee taijutsu attack, targeting a creature in their range, dealing the weapons damage +2d8 using their statistics and immediately return the weapon back to you as part of the same action. Chain 1: They can make an additional attack as part of their reaction.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Flying Swallow: Cross
jutsu.description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a different weapon in each hand that would qualify you for dual wielding. You make swinging cuts in a single stoke by swinging both of your weapons inward. Make two Taijutsu attacks, each can be vs a different enemy. On a hit, you deal [Weapons damage] + 1d10 Chain 1: The target must make a strength saving throw to avoid being disarmed of their weapon or item they are holding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d4.

jutsu.name: Flying Swallow: Spinning Top
jutsu.description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a different weapon in each hand that would qualify you for dual wielding. You spin like a top striking all creatures in your immediate vicinity. All creatures within your weapons range, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your weapons damage + 2d4 or half as much on a success. Chain 1: Creatures who failed their save also becomes Bruised.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Flying Swallow: Straight Line
jutsu.description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a weapon in both hands that meet this Bukijutsu component requirements. You dash in a straight line, up to 30 feet, moving through any hostile creatures space you come across, ending your movement in a space up to 30 feet away from you, in a straight line. Make two melee taijutsu attacks. All creatures, of your choice, whose space you passed through as a result of this jutsu count as targets for these two melee taijutsu attacks, comparing their results to each creatures AC. On a hit, you deal either of your [Weapons damage] Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Dexterity saving throw, being pulled with you, and ending their movement within 5 feet of the space you end your movement on.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Manipulated Tools: Binding Meteor
jutsu.description: You summon forth a weighted chain from your weapon scroll and use it to restrain multiple targets you can see within range. Make a melee taijutsu attack against up to three targets, who are within 30 feet of one another. On a hit you grapple them and chain them to each other. Creatures chained together and pulled to be within 10 feet of one another and cannot move more than 10 feet from one another while chained in this way. A creature chained by this jutsu can, as an action, make a Dexterity (Acrobatics) or (Sleight of Hand) check vs your Taijutsu save DC, escaping the chains on a success. Chain 1: A creature who fails this check makes it harder to escape for other chained creatures. All other chained creatures who attempt to escape after another creature has failed, suffers a -2 penalty to their check, until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Manipulated Tools: Blade Kick
jutsu.description: You summon forth series of swords, knives and spears that you kick and launch towards a creature to impale them. Make a range Taijutsu attack dealing 4d8 piercing damage and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failure. Chain 1: On a failed save, affected creature also has its movement speed reduced to 0 until the end of their turn when the summoned weapons are dispelled automatically.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Manipulated Tools: Blade Rain
jutsu.description: You unravel your weapon scroll in the air, and reflexively summon forth a series of swords, knives and spears that rain down bombarding a space you can see within range. All creatures in a 10-foot cube originating from a point you can see within range, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take 3d6 in piercing damage or half as much on a success. Chain 1: The affected area becomes difficult terrain until the end of your next turn. The first time a creature would walk through any affected space, they take 4 piercing damage from the scattered weaponry protruding from the ground.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Manipulated Tools: Blade Wall
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take, when you take damage.
jutsu.description: You unravel your weapon scroll in a circle around you as you summon a series of bladed weapons in retaliation. First, reduce the damage you would take by 3d6 and all creatures in a 10-foot radius centering on you must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take 3d6 piercing damage and the next attack they make, is at disadvantage or half damage on a successful save and no further effect. Chain 1: You can select the creatures affected by this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduction and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Paper Bomb Barrage
jutsu.description: You prepare a cluster of paper bombs which are consumed in the casting of this jutsu, in between your fingers on both hands and launch them at a single Target covering them in the prepared Bombs. A target you can see within range and all creatures within 10 feet of them, makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 8d4 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful one. Chain 1: Creatures who failed their save gain a rank of Burned.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can mark by +1.

jutsu.name: Still Pond, Racing River
jutsu.description: You hold your weapon in a perfect perpendicular stance as you wait for the moment to strike. First, mark a creature within range. Then, until the beginning of your next turn, when that marked creature would cast a jutsu or make an attack against a creature other than you while in your weapon's range, you strike out making a Taijutsu attack against the triggering creature based on the type of weapon you are wielding. On a hit you deal your [Weapon's damage] + 1d12.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Weapon Deflect
jutsu.castingTime: 1 reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description: You enter a defensive stance with your weapon parrying the incoming attack. You gain a +2 bonus to your AC until the end of the current turn. Additionally, you can increase your next weapon attacks damage by +2d6. Chain 1: This AC bonus lasts until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage increase by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Afterglow
jutsu.description: You take a reverse grip with your weapon and prepare to cut down everyone in your way. Select a space within range. You dash through at blinding speeds to that select location. This movement does not provoke attacks of opportunity. All creatures whom you pass through while on the way to the select location are the targets of your attacks. Make a single melee taijutsu attack, comparing the result against the AC of each creature you pass through while moving. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage die. You end your movement in the selected space. Chain 1: If the next Bukijutsu you cast has the Chain keyword, reduce its cost by 2. Chain 2: If the next Bukijutsu you cast forced any of the affected creatures to make a saving throw, they make their saving throw with a -2 penalty.

jutsu.name: Breath of Beasts: Devour
jutsu.description: You begin to collect and manifest chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The chakra begins to manifest in the form of any beast of your choice in any color that can be seen plainly by others. You begin to swing wildly and unpredictably, fueled by instinct and primal urges. Make two melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you your weapons damage + 1d8. If you made at least one successful hit, then the affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being Weakened on a failed save. Chain 1: Creatures who fail their saving throw, also have their speed reduced by half. Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw, are also Slowed until the end of their next turn. The Slowed condition is treated as a Physical condition when applied this way.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Breath of Earth: Bipolar
jutsu.description: You begin to collect earth release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, magnifying its weight. You spin with such power that anything standing in your way becomes a memory. Make a single melee taijutsu attack, comparing the result against creatures in your weapons range AC. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage + 2d6 earth damage. Chain 1: If your attack result is 5 or higher than the targets AC, you Pierce 4 DR. Chain 2: The affected creatures must make a Constitution saving throw, becoming Bruised on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, this attack is so fierce you gain +4 DR until the beginning of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Breath of Flame: Undulation
jutsu.description: You begin to collect Fire release chakra until it transforms into gouts of flame that erupt from your weapon. You spin striking all creatures within range attempting to decapitate them. All creatures of your choice must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take your [Weapons damage] + 2d6 Fire damage and are Dazed. On a successful Save you take half damage. Chain 1: Creatures who failed their save gain a rank of Bleed. Chain 2: Creatures who failed their save gain a rank of Burned.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduced by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the radius of this jutsu by +10 feet.

jutsu.name: Breath of Roses: Hanagoromo
jutsu.description: You begin to collect medical chakra until it creates a visage of a poisonous flowers falling around you. You unleash a single strike that bends, curves and twists around you as if you made multiple strikes at once. Make a melee taijutsu attack dealing [Weapon damage] + 4d6 and forcing the target to make a Constitution saving throw, being Weakened on a failed save. Chain 1: The next time the affected creature would spend chakra they take 2d6 + their spent chakra, in poison damage. Chain 2: Creatures who failed their save gain an additional rank of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage increased by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can make one additional attack, targeting a different creature in range.

jutsu.name: Breath of Sound: Score
jutsu.description: You begin to collect chakra until it manifests into the shape of a sound note hovering over your eyes. For the duration you do not spend chakra to maintain this jutsu, instead you must spend a bonus action to maintain it. Choose one of the following tempos when you cast this jutsu. You can the benefit of this tempo until the beginning of your next turn. At the beginning of each of your turns thereafter, you can select a different tempo if you would like. Moderato: You strike with great force to the strum of the battle. The first time each turn you would deal damage with an attack you make with a Bukijutsu with the Breath of Sound prefix; its damage is increased by +1 damage die. Allegretto: Breath of Sound Bukijutsu you cast has their save DC increased by +1. Vivacissimo: You speed yourself up to strike at the right time, when they are at the most vulnerable. You have advantage on the first melee weapon or Bukijutsu with the Breath of Sound prefix, each turn. Andante: You match your pace to your opponents to defend and parry perfectly against their every move. You gain a special reaction which can only be used when you would take damage, reducing the amount taken by an amount equal to your weapons damage.

jutsu.name: Breath of Thunder: Swarm
jutsu.description: You begin to collect lightning release chakra until it sparks off of your weapon and body with violent jolts. You surround the enemy with waves of arched lightning swift strikes and attack them from all directions. Make two melee taijutsu attacks using your weapon, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 1d8 lightning damage. If the target has the Shocked condition, you make your attacks with a +1 bonus to critical threat range. Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, being disarmed on a failed save and their weapon thrown 10 feet in any direction of your choice. Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage dealt by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, if the target has the Shocked condition, you make your attacks with advantage.

jutsu.name: Breath of Water: Wheel
jutsu.description: You begin to collect and manifest water release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon. The water release chakra begins to transform into streams of water, as you spin forward, attacking in a circular motion. Move into a space you can see within your movement speed range, then each creature of your choice, within your weapons range must make a Dexterity Saving Throw. On a failed save, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 1d10 Cold damage they gain 1 rank of Chilled or half as much damage on a successful save. A creature who makes a save that is Chilled or Dazed suffer a -2 penalty to their saving throw. Chain 1: If used near a sufficient source of water, reduce the chakra cost of this jutsu by 2 or your weapon gains +1 rank of the Reach property until the end of the current turn. Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw, gain an additional rank of Chilled.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Breath of Wind: Claws
jutsu.description: You begin to collect wind release chakra until it spirals around the user's weapon creating whipping torrents of wind. You lift your weapon upwards towards the right, above your head and unleashes four vertical strikes at once down on the enemy resembling claws. Make four melee taijutsu attacks against a single creature, record the number of successful hits. If you score at least one attack, you deal your [Weapons damage] +1d8 wind damage. For every attack that hits, beyond the first, you deal an additional 1d8 wind damage. If you roll a critical hit on any of these attacks, you increase the wind damage by 2d8. Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being thrown 20 feet in a direction of your choice (excluding up), on a failed save. Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, gaining 2 ranks of Bleed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks you can make by +1. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, Swirl. Affected creature spreads all Elemental conditions currently affecting them around to all creatures, excluding yourself within 5 feet. Hostile creatures within 5 feet the target gains 1 rank of all Elemental conditions currently affecting it.

jutsu.name: Brutal Block
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: You raise your weapon to block incoming damage at its source. You raise your weapons to guard yourself. Roll 2d6, and record the result. You reduce the triggering damage and the first damage taken each turn, until the beginning of your next turn, by the result. Chain 1: The next attack you make before the end of your next turn, increases its critical threat range by +1. Chain 2: A creature in your weapons range when you reduce damage, takes damage equal to the result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduced by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Chakra Edge
jutsu.description: You infuse your weapon with chakra reinforcing it. For the duration, the first time each turn you would deal damage with a weapon or Taijutsu attack, you increase your weapons damage die by +1.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, you instead increase your weapons damage die by +2.

jutsu.name: Flying Swallow: Flurry Guard
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a weapon in both hands that meet this Bukijutsu' s component requirements. You raise both of your weapons blocking an incoming flurry of attacks in a powerful guarded stance. You gain a +4 bonus DR vs damage you take from the triggering creature. Each additional time the triggering would deal damage to you before the beginning of your next turn, you gain an additional +2 DR. When the triggering creature's attacks or Jutsu concludes, you send all of that built up defense back at them. Make two melee taijutsu attacks, one with each weapon. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 1d6 + Total DR bonus gained as a result of this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Flying Swallow: Penetrate
jutsu.description: As a part of the activation of this jutsu, you must have a weapon in both hands that meet this Bukijutsu component requirements. You take your weapon and infuse chakra into the heels of your feet and use the increased power to penetrate whatever is in your way. Make two melee taijutsu attacks against up to two enemies within 5 feet of you dealing your weapons damage + 3d6, you do not add your ability modifier to damage. Affected creatures must make a constitution saving throw having their AC is reduced by 1d4 for each successful hit, until the end of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks by +1

jutsu.name: Guardian Knight
jutsu.description: You solidify your defenses and reinforce your position. For the duration, you gain bonus abilities or statistics based on the type of armor you are wearing; Light Guardian. While wearing light armor, you gain a +10 bonus to movement speed, and a +2 bonus to your Dexterity saving throws and as a reaction to taking damage, you can dodge out of the way of some of it, reducing incoming damage by your proficiency bonus. Moderate Guardian. While wearing medium armor, you gain a +1 bonus to your AC and increase your armors Reinforce value by +4, and as a reaction to seeing an allied creature within 20 feet of you take damage, you can move into an adjacent space next to them and aid them, granting them a +1 bonus to their AC, and a +2 bonus to their DR against the triggering damage. Heavy Metal. While wearing heavy armor, increase its Reinforce value by +6, and as a Reaction, to seeing an allied creature within 15 feet of you take damage, you can move into an adjacent space near them and intercept the damage, taking it as if you were the original target, and you can apply your current Reinforce value to it.

jutsu.name: Mikiri Counter
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you or an allied creature within 5 feet of you take damage from a melee attack
jutsu.description: You see a melee attack coming and your body doesn't allow it to proceed any further. You instinctively use your hand or feet to not only attempt to parry the attack, but to also drive the attack into the ground, getting it stuck and opening the triggering creature up to a counter attack. When you or an allied creature is hit with a melee attack, the affected creature gain a +4 bonus to their AC against the triggering attack. If the attack misses as a result, you can make a weapon attack against the hostile creature, dealing your [Weapons damage] on a hit. Chain 1: If you score a hit with your weapon attack, reduce the targets AC by 2, until the end of their next turn. Chain 2: You may make two attacks, against the triggering creature, regardless if they miss or not.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the counter attack damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Triple Windmill Blades
jutsu.description: You launch your prepared weapons into two different directions intentionally avoiding hitting your target then pulling on the battle wire to cause them to avert their direction and change trajectory. Target Creature has the wires circle them until the weapons land in the ground locking them into place. Target creature must make a Dexterity Saving throw being Restrained in place on a failed save. A creature Restrained by this jutsu can, as an action make a Strength check vs your Taijutsu save DC to escape, ending this jutsu's effect. Chain 1: On a failed save, the affected creature also takes 2d8 + your Taijutsu ability modifier, as they are struck by your launched weapon. Chain 2: On a successful save, the affected creature is Grappled until the beginning of their next turn.

jutsu.name: Viper's Retreat
jutsu.description: You take a step back and then push forward attempting to strike. Make a melee tattack against a creature in range, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 3d8 on a hit. Regardless, if your attack is successful or not, you can move up to 10 feet without provoking attacks of opportunity until the end of the current turn. Chain 1: You cannot make this attack with disadvantage. Chain 2: The affected creatures next attack is made at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Baton Pass
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Bonus Action after hitting an enemy with a weapon or Taijutsu attack
