jutsu.description: You quickly shift the momentum of the fight by creating an opening for an ally. You can give an ally within range an opening to spend their reaction to cast a Ninjutsu, Genjutsu or a Taijutsu with the Finisher keyword against the target creature.

jutsu.name: Breath of Earth: Justice
jutsu.description: You begin to collect earth release chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, magnifying its weight. Make 2 melee taijutsu attacks as you strike with a flurry of weapon attacks followed by manifestations of earth release chakra of your design. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 2d8 earth damage. An affected creature must make a Strength saving throw as you disable them on a failed save. A disabled creature cannot wield weapons or use hand seals (HS) for the next minute. A disabled creature remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the disabled effect on them on a success. Chain 2: If both attacks were successful against the same creature, they make their saving throw at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Breath of Flame: Rengoku
jutsu.description: You begin to collect Fire release chakra until it transforms into gouts of flame that erupt from your weapon. Select a space you can see within range that passes through one or more creatures in a 10-foot wide, 30-foot-long line, originating from you. You then move to a space at the end of this line that can hold you leaving behind a burning gout of flame in your wake. Make one melee taijutsu attack, comparing the result against the AC of all creatures whose space your line passes through. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] +6d6 Fire damage. If you score a critical hit with this attack, only one creature, of your choice suffers the effects of a critical hit. Chain 2: Your attack is so savage that the damage you deal ignores DR as a result of Jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, if you score a critical hit with this attack, all creatures suffer the effects of the critical hit.

jutsu.name: Breath of Roses: Futility
jutsu.description: You begin to collect medical chakra until it creates a visage of a poisonous flowers falling around you. Select one create you can see within range as you begin to imitate a throned stem striking them with each passing gesture. Make three melee taijutsu attacks with your weapon, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 2d6 poison damage. An affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Weakened and Envenomed on a failed save. Chain 2: If the affected creature would regain hit points or gain temporary hit points before the end of your next turn, that effect fails and they instead take additional damage equal to the hit points or temporary hit points they would gain.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Breath of Thunder: Kami
jutsu.description: You begin to collect lightning release chakra until it sparks off of your weapon and body with violent jolts. You make a singular forward slash as lightning forms an image of a beast of your description behind you. Move yourself into a space adjacent to a creature of your choice within range that can hold you and make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 4d10 lightning damage. If the target has any ranks of the Shocked condition, you make your attacks at advantage. Chain 2: Your attack is so swift, that your attacks ignore bonuses to AC as a result of Jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Breath of Water: Flux
jutsu.description: You begin to collect water release chakra until it transforms into streams of water, as you perform a series of attacks that shapes a dragon made of water. Select a number of creatures you can see within range. Move yourself into a space adjacent to the last creature chosen that can hold you. Make a melee taijutsu attack comparing the result against the AC of each creature. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 4d8 Cold damage. If any target has any ranks of the Chilled, or are Dazed, you make your attacks at advantage. (If you score a critical hit with this attack, only one creature, of your choice suffers the effects of a critical hit.) Chain 2: For each creature you reduce to 0 hit points, you gain +4 temporary hit points at the conclusion of this jutsu's effect, up to a max of 20 temporary hit points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Breath of Wind: Gusts
jutsu.description: You begin to collect wind release chakra until it spirals around the user's weapon creating whipping torrents of wind. You spin sideways, rotating your body in an uppercut motion, forcing the wind to create a massive and powerful arcing slash. All creatures of your choice in a 10-foot wide, 30-foot line originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 2d8 wind damage and 2 ranks of Bleeding on a failed save or half as much and no further effects on a success. Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw are thrown to the end of this jutsu's range, knocked Prone and are Dazed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Flying Swallow: Penultimate
jutsu.description: You perform a swift series of powerful and accurate strikes with both weapons. Before finishing by striking with both weapons simultaneously. Make two melee taijutsu attacks, with either weapon, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 1d10. If both attacks were successful, you attack one additional time dealing 3d10. Chain 2: Affected creature(s) must make a Constitution saving throw, becoming Bruised for each successful attack on a failed save or half as many on a successful save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage of the initial two attacks by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Nobunaga's Rage
jutsu.description: Your eyes glaze over with a wrathful roar. All hostile creatures within range must make a Wisdom saving throw to avoid being taunted by your aggressive demeaner. On a failed save, until the end of their next turn, they must target you with their offensive attacks of jutsu. Chain 2: A creature who fails their saving throw is also Demoralized.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the radius by +5 feet.

jutsu.name: Silent Killing
jutsu.description: As a part of the requirement for activating this jutsu, you must be Hidden from or Unseen by the target. You sneak towards them and strike from an unseen position at their most vital points. Make a Taijutsu Attack, with a +2 bonus to its critical threat range, dealing [Weapons damage] + 4d12 and you can immediately attempt to Hide again. Chain 2: You gain advantage on checks made to Hide.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the critical threat bonus by +1.

jutsu.name: Suicide Bombing
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when someone else takes any action.
jutsu.description: You open your clothing revealing a series of paper bombs all rigged to explode. You have enough time to speak a few more words before they all ignite and explode. All creatures within 30 feet of you must make a Dexterity saving throw at disadvantage. You automatically fail this save. On a failed save, you deal 14d6 Fire damage, or half as much on a failure.

jutsu.name: Twin Rising Dragons
jutsu.description: You grasp two of the scrolls with throwing weapons Sealed into them and unleash them in a double helix formation. As you leap, the scrolls create a field of thin but strong wires, allowing for you to float 30 feet above the ground, remaining airborne between them. For the duration, as an action, you can make up to 3 ranged taijutsu attacks, dealing 5d6 Bludgeoning, Piercing or Slashing damage (your choice). Chain 2: Once per turn, affected creatures must make a Constitution saving throw gaining a condition on a failed save based on the damage type dealt; Bludgeoning: Bruised, Piercing: Weakened, Slashing: Bleed
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank you can increase the number of attacks you can make with this jutsu by +1.

jutsu.name: Breath of Moon: Catastrophe
jutsu.description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon. Each swing creates distortions in the area, devastating the terrain and manifesting waves of force capable of obliterating everything in its path. All creatures in a 30-foot-cone, originating from you, must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d12 slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw gain 4 ranks of Bleed; Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, you can cast a Breath of Moon Bukijutsu using either your Action, Bonus Action or Reaction, ignoring its listed casting time.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Breath of Moon: Evening Palace
jutsu.description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon. Each swing creates distortions in the area, devastating the terrain and manifesting waves of force capable of distorting space, removing all in its way. Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 5d12. Chain 2: This attack ignores resistance, and treats immunity as resistance; Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, you can cast a Breath of Moon Bukijutsu using either your Action, Bonus Action or Reaction, ignoring its listed casting time.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Breath of Moon: Loathsome
jutsu.description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon. Each swing creates distortions, devastating the terrain and manifesting waves of force. You swing your weapon twice with such ferocity, that the space around you distorts removing the distance between you and another creature. Select a creature you can see within range as you cut through the distance, teleporting to a space adjacent to the target that can hold you. Make two melee taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 2d12. Chain 2: damage this jutsu deals cannot be reacted to. Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, you can cast a Breath of Moon Bukijutsu using either your Action, Bonus Action or Reaction, ignoring its listed casting time.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Breath of Moon: Moongazing
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon You swing your weapon in the shape of a crescent moon with the intent of deflecting some of the incoming damage. Roll your [Weapons damage] + 3d12, recording the result. Until the end of the current turn, you manifest a wall of force generated purely by the distortions your swings make. This wall of force has a number of hit points equal to the result and intercepts all damage. Chain 2: If this wall of force would intercept a melee attack, the triggering creature takes slashing damage equal to the walls hit points. Chain 3: When this wall is broken all creatures excluding you, within 10 feet of you takes slashing damage equal to the recorded result.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the walls hit points by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Breath of Moon: Moonswaths
jutsu.description: You collect and manifest a dark chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, curving it like a crescent moon. Each swing creates distortions in the area, manifesting into crescent moons that bombard an area with reckless abandon. Select up to 4 points you can see within range. All creatures within 5 feet of each point, must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 4d12 slashing damage on a failed save or half as much on a success. A creature can only be affected by this jutsu once per casting. Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw gains 3 ranks of Bleed. Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, you can cast a Breath of Moon Bukijutsu using either your Action, Bonus Action or Reaction, ignoring its listed casting time.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Chasing Fang
jutsu.description: You first launch a fist full of throwing weapons towards a target to break their focus. Make a ranged taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your thrown [Weapons damage] + 2d10, which is then follow up with a Powerful Swing. Then move into a space within range, adjacent to the original target creature. Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 2d10. Chain 2: Creatures hit by the ranged attack must make a Constitution saving throw, having their guard broken, reducing their DR by 6 until the end of the current turn. Chain 3: Creatures hit by the melee attack must make a Constitution saving throw, being Staggered on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Crescent Moon Dance
jutsu.description: You move with such speed you create 2 additional afterimages that move separately from you. Make 3 melee taijutsu attacks against a single target dealing your [Weapons damage] +2d8. Chain 2: Your afterimages remain as you swiftly bounce between locations. Until the end of your next turn, the next creature that target you, must roll a d20. On a roll of 11 or more, they target your afterimage, causing the attack or effect to miss entirely. Chain 3: Until the end of your next turn, when you take the Attack Action, you can make two additional attacks as part of that action as your afterimages attack alongside you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Fatal Blow
jutsu.description: As a part of casting this jutsu, your target must be Prone, Restrained or Incapacitated. Your target is unable to defend themselves as you strike them down with a fatal blow. The target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 8d10 and triggering all Elemental and Physical conditions that deal damage at once on a failed save. On a success, the target completely avoids your weapon as they move narrowly out of the way. Chain 2: This jutsu can be cast when targeting a non-Prone, Restrained or Incapacitated creature, but they make their save with advantage. Chain 3: A creature who fails their save is Stunned until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Sakura Twister
jutsu.description: You grip your weapon, crouch down and do a slight dash forward, twisting your entire body to execute a devastating slash. Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 10d8 and the target must make a Constitution saving throw, becoming Prone and Staggered on a failed save. Chain 2: On a successful hit, you bounce back, moving into a space of your choice within 20 feet and gain the benefits of the Dodge action. Chain 3: This attack is made against all creatures within the weapons range AC, applying its effects on a hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Shadow Rush
jutsu.description: You cloak yourself in a dark aura meant to accelerate your movement. You make a Dash towards your target creature in range, attempting to stab them first as you impact them then using their body as a Launch pad, jumping into the air directly after. First, move up to 60 feet in any direction towards a creature you can see within range, ending your movement within 5 feet of them. Next, make a melee taijutsu attack against the target creature, on a hit the target takes your weapons damage + 4d4.

jutsu.name: Breath of Sun: Fake Rainbow
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage.
jutsu.description: You begin to collect and manifest a bright chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, causing it to shine, like the rising sun. This chakra then begins to glow brightly with enough intensity to dispel any chakra based or natural darkness until the end of your current turn leaving a hazy illusion of all movement you make. Until the beginning of your next turn this hazy light released affects all creatures of your choice within 15 feet of you, imposing the following effects; Selected creatures suffers a -6 penalty to attacks made against you as their combat instincts are dulled. Select creatures cannot gain Jutsu based bonuses to their Attacks, Save DC's or AC. Chain 3: The next Bukijutsu you cast with the Chain keyword before the end of your next turn, can gain the benefits of any 2 Chain effects listed.

jutsu.name: Breath of Sun: Heat Haze
jutsu.description: You begin to collect and manifest a bright chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, causing it to shine, like the rising sun. This chakra then begins to glow brightly with enough intensity to dispel any chakra based or natural darkness until the end of your current turn leaving a hazy illusion of all movement you make. Make a melee weapon attack of any description of your choice. Regardless of the result of the attack, you automatically hit. You can roll to hit and declare the attack a hit or a miss, and the target can choose to react accordingly as they normally would. You deal your [Weapons damage] + 12d12. This jutsu cannot gain the benefits of a critical hit, damage dice multiplication or alteration effects. This jutsu cannot benefit from bonuses to damage. Chain 3: If the target creature is gaining a bonus as a result of a jutsu, regardless of the source, you can make a Standard Jutsu Ability Check using Martial Arts vs the rank of the effect. On a success, you dispel the effect, ending it immediately.

jutsu.name: Breath of Sun: Raging Sun
jutsu.description: You begin to collect and manifest a bright chakra until it laces the striking portion of your weapon, causing it to shine, like the rising sun. This chakra then begins to glow brightly with enough intensity to dispel any chakra based or natural darkness until the end of your current turn leaving a hazy illusion of all movement you make. Make two melee taijutsu attacks with reverence behind each swing. On a successful hit, you deal your weapons damage + 6d8. Chain 3: For each attack you miss you gain a +4 bonus to your AC against the first attack targeting you (up to a maximum of +8).

jutsu.name: Living Force
jutsu.description: You draw upon negative emotions allowing it to leak out and coalesce with your chakra turning it into strength. You make a single devastating swing with your weapon, with enough force to collapse the ground, and ignite the air ablaze around you. Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your weapons damage + 7d12 Fire damage. Creatures within 15 feet of you must make a dexterity saving throw, taking the damage dealt on a failed save or half as much on a success. Chain 3: For each creature that fails their saving throw, you regain 4 chakra, up to a maximum of this jutsu's cost.

jutsu.name: Shadowfall
jutsu.description: You generate a surge of chakra throughout your body preparing for a powerful burst of speed and power. You gain 3 additional actions as a part of the activation of this jutsu until the end of your turn, which you then gain 3 Exhaustions. These actions must be used to perform multiple Bukijutsu in a row.

jutsu.name: Sky Splitter
jutsu.description: You make a single swing with enough force to split to sky and the earth from the weight of your attack alone. All creatures in a 60-foot long, 10 feet wide line, originating from you, must make a Dexterity Saving Throw. On a failed save, affected creatures take your [Weapons damage] + 3d12 of your weapons damage on a failed save or half as much on a successful save. The ground tears open and leaves a 10-foot-deep crevasse from the force of your attack. Creatures who fail their saving throw also falls to the bottom of the crevasse. Chain 3: You can change the shape of this jutsu's affected area to a 60-foot cone.

jutsu.name: The Zone
jutsu.description: Your mind and body enter a state of clarity that can only be achieved through dedicated training and skill. As a part of the activation of this jutsu you cannot maintain concentration on any other jutsu for the duration. You gain the following benefits; Your Weapon and Taijutsu attack can't be reacted to, and treat damage immunity as resistance and ignore resistance. Your movement speed is doubled and your AC is increased by 2. You have advantage on Weapon and Taijutsu attack rolls and increase your Taijutsu save DC by +1 You cannot lose concentration on this jutsu as a result of failing a concentration check. You can end this jutsu early as a bonus action, and you may reactivate it as a bonus action, spending half of the initial cost. Once this jutsu ends you cannot use this jutsu again until you finish a full rest.

jutsu.name: Shinobi Cross
jutsu.description: You take a Powerful stance with no openings for attack. After activating this jutsu, attacks against you allows you to use a Bukijutsu with the casting time of 1 action, as a reaction.

jutsu.name: 1-Strike Slash
jutsu.description: You perform a wide arcing slash with your weapon, slicing into them with little wasted movement. Make a melee taijutsu attack using your weapon, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 3d6. On a hit, the target must also make a Constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Bleeding on a failed save. Chain 1: If your attack misses, you can attempt to remake the attack, but against a different creature in range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Arrow Notch Slash
jutsu.description: You slice into a creature in an instant slash, leaving no room for interference. Only the target creature can react to this jutsu. Make a melee Taijutsu Attack against a target creature in range. On a hit, you deal your weapon's damage+2d10. Chain 1: On a hit, you can choose to move 10 feet away from the target creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Blade of Sin: Sloth
jutsu.description: You seek to emulate the power of one of the Seven Deadly Sins of Humanity in your blade, imbuing the Sin of Sloth inside the edge. Make a melee taijutsu Attack against a creature in range. On a hit you deal your weapons damage+3d6. Chain 1: On a hit, the target creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, their initiative count is reduced by 2 as they lose the motivation to act as fast as before.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Danger Zone
jutsu.description: You quickly spin your weapon around you, using chakra to extend its range further. Your weapon gains +1 rank of Reach until the end of the current turn. All creatures within range must make a Dexterity Saving Throw. On failed save they take [Weapons damage] + 1d6 or half as much on a success. Chain 1: Creatures who failed their saving throw gain a rank of Bleeding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Grass-Cutting Strike
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon low, in an attempt to hobble the enemy. Male a melee Taijutsu Attack targeting a creature in range. On a hit you deal your weapons damage+3d8. Chain 1: Affected creatures speed is reduced by 20 feet until the end of their next turn as you cut at their ankles.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Great Dragon Shockwave
jutsu.description: You quickly raise and slice down with your blade with such force that it creates a shockwave. Make a melee Taijutsu Attack against a target creature in range. On a hit, you deal your weapon's damage+2d10. Chain 1: All other creatures excluding you and the target must make a Strength saving throw or be pushed 15 feet away from the original target.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Iaijutsu: Lion's Song
jutsu.description: Placing a single, sheathed sword upright and listening to the "breath" of your opponent, you rapidly unsheathe, attack while passing by your target, and then re-sheathe your sword. Make a melee taijutsu Attack against a creature in range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapon's damage] +3d8. Chain 1: If your attack result is 5 or more higher than your opponent's AC, they cannot take a Reaction until the end of the current turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Multipoint Strike
jutsu.description: You lash out with a flurry of attacks meant to completely overwhelm your enemy in the blink of an eye. You make a series of strikes leaving afterimages with each strike. Make a three melee taijutsu attacks. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage Die]. Chain 1: If you score a hit with at least two or more attacks, you increase your speed by +20 feet and the target creature cannot make an attack of opportunity against you until the end of the current turn..
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank, increase the bonus damage die by +2. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the bonus damage die by +4.

jutsu.name: Yosaku Cut
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon with enough force to create a lateral wave of cutting force. Creatures in a 15-foot cone originating from you, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save you deal your [Weapons damage] + 1d12 or half as much on a successful one. Chain 1: Creatures who are within 5 feet of you when you cast this jutsu make their save at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12 and the range by 5 feet.

jutsu.name: Soul Rend
jutsu.description: You aim your weapon to cut at the very soul of your opponent. You wind up your strike and then unleash it in one flurry. Make two melee taijutsu Attacks against a creature in range. On a hit, you deal [Weapon damage] + 1d12. Chain 1: This jutsu ignores Jutsu based Temporary Hit Points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: 1080 Psi Air Cannon
jutsu.description: You use the air itself to slash an enemy at a distance. You swing your blade and launch a compressed cross slash of air spiraling forward. Make a ranged taijutsu attack, targeting a creature within range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 2d6. Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failed save. Chain 2: Affected creature makes their concentration check at disadvantage and must make a Constitution saving throw, becoming Bruised on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank this jutsu is cast above C-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Crescent Moon Beheading
jutsu.description: You switch your weapon into a two-handed grip to the best of your abilities. You attack with your weapon with the ferocity to behead your enemy. Make a single melee taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d10 and the affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, on a failed save, you must roll 4d20. If you rolled four 20's, you immediately kill them as they are beheaded. Chain 1: You instead only need three 20's to behead the target and you can reroll 1 of the rolled d20 of your choice, once. Chain 2: If the affected creature has ranks of Bleed, for each rank, you can add one d4 to a single d20 rolled (up to a max of 5), adding it to the result of the d20, treating results of 20 or higher, as a 20.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d10 or the number of d20's rolled by 1.

jutsu.name: Disarming Riposte
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you would take damage from a melee attack.
jutsu.description: You use your weapon to get around your opponent's guard as they attack, and then bring it up in an attempt to disarm them, literally. You increase your ac by +4. If the triggering attack misses, you can make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + 3d8 and the triggering creature must make a Strength Saving throw. On a failed save, you disarm them of their weapon and take hold of it in an open hand. If you do not have a hand free, you throw it 10 feet in a direction of your choice. Chain 1: This can be used against a ranged attack as well, where if the triggering attack misses, you can make a ranged taijutsu attack, and throw their attack back at them, making the triggering creature the new target for the jutsu's attack and effects. Chain 2: A creature who has their weapon disarmed from them is also knocked Prone.

jutsu.name: Falling Blade
jutsu.description: You perform a single Powerful downward slash that slices through just about everything in your path. Make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 3d10 and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 2 of Bleed on a failed save. Chain 1: On a failed save, they also gain 1 rank of Weakened. Chain 2: If the affected creature has ranks of a Mental condition, you make the attack with a +2 bonus to hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Heaven Cutter
jutsu.description: You swipe your weapon upwards with enough force to create an updraft. Select a point you can see within 15 feet of you as your weapon swipe manifests cylinder of force, 5 foot wide, and 10-feet high. Creatures in this cylinder must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they are thrown upwards to the top of the cylinder. At the end of the current turn affected creatures and objects fall to the ground taking 2d6 bludgeoning damage and land Prone. Chain 1: Affected creatures are instead thrown 20 feet in a direction of your choice (excluding up) at the end of the turn. Chain 2: An allied creature who has a Taijutsu with the Finisher keyword, may cast it as a reaction, ignoring its normal casting time, gaining its Finisher effects.

jutsu.name: Reapers Swing
jutsu.description: As a requirement to activate this jutsu, you must be targeting a creature who is either; Grappled, Prone, Restrained, Stunned, or Unconscious. You swing your blade with such ferocity that the air and other materials or objects in its path doesn't recognize that it's been slashed. Make a melee taijutsu attack with a +1 bonus to its attacks critical threat range, dealing your weapons damage + 6d6. Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failed save. Chain 2: On a critical hit, you can make an additional attack targeting a different creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Serration Wave
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon in a wide arc meant to impede movement and lockdown your enemies. All creatures in a 20-foot cone originating from you must make a Dexterity Saving Throw. On a failed save they take your [Weapon's damage] +1d10 and lose 10-feet of their movement speed until the end of their next turn. On a success they take half damage and do not suffer any additional effects. Chain 1: An affected creature who is within difficult terrain makes their save at disadvantage. Chain 2: An affected creature who fails their saving throw is also knocked Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: for every rank above C-rank this jutsu is cast, increase the chakra cost by 3 and damage by 1d10

jutsu.name: Shockwave Slash
jutsu.description: You coat the ends of your weapon in chakra before swinging and creating a crescent shaped wave of sharp chakra that cuts through all enemies in its path. Targets in a 30-foot line that's 5-feet wide must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 2d4 and be pushed to the end of the line into a space that can hold it on a failed save, or half as much on a successful one. Chain 1: A creature who fails their saving throw is disarmed and knocked Prone. Chain 2: A creature with ranks of an Elemental condition makes this save with a -2 penalty.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 2d4.

jutsu.name: Sword Aura: Primary
jutsu.description: You begin to focus on the ability to create a Sword Aura. You send a controlled flood of chakra into your sword, the striking portion flaring a color of your choice. Select a primary color for your weapon to embody. Red. Your weapons damage type becomes Fire, and a creature who fails a saving throw as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, falls Prone from its explosive force. Blue. Your weapons damage type becomes cold, and a creature that fails a saving throw as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, reduces their speed by 10 feet, until the end of your next turn. Yellow. Your weapons damage type becomes lightning, constructs and structures are vulnerable to your [Weapon damage], and when a creature fails a saving throw as a result of a Bukijutsu you cast, they lose concentration on the lowest rank jutsu they are maintaining. If they are maintaining concentration on more than one jutsu of the same rank, they lose concentration on one at random.

jutsu.name: Amputation Punishment
jutsu.description: You leap over your opponent while hooking your blade being an enemy's limbs and pulling violently to sever them. Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your weapons damage + 4d8 and the target must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save the target loses mobility and function in one of their arms being unable to hold things, form hand seals or manipulate objects with it until the end of their next turn. Chain 2: On a critical hit, the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they lose mobility and function in their arms until they have it healed. A jutsu that removes conditions, cast at C-Rank or Higher can heal the targets arm(s), granting it mobility and function.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Blade Heart
jutsu.description: Your heart and your blade become one. As a bonus action on your turn or as a reaction to taking damage, you can assume your parrying stance until the beginning of your next turn gaining its benefits. While in this Parrying stance, you gain a +2 bonus to your AC and Dexterity saving throws. If you are disarmed this jutsu immediately end. Additionally, when you score a critical hit using your weapon with a weapon or Taijutsu attack, the target gains 1 rank of Bleed.

jutsu.name: Blade of Sin: Pride
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction when you take damage from a Weapon, Ninjutsu, Taijutsu or Bukijutsu
jutsu.description: You seek to emulate the power of one of the Seven Deadly Sins of Humanity in your blade, imbuing the Sin of Pride inside the edge. When you would take damage, roll your weapons damage+4d6 and reduce the damage by the rolled amount as you parry some or all of the impact. If you reduce the damage to 0, the triggering creature gains a rank of Demoralized. Chain 2: Your pride is so fervent that not even illusions are immune to your defense. This jutsu can also trigger when you take Psychic damage, reducing the damage as if this jutsu were a Genjutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage reduction by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher some of the impact can be redirected to hostile creatures. Hostile creatures of your choice within 5 feet of you take damage equal to half the result. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank and reduces the triggering damage to 0, then all hostile creatures within 20 feet of you becomes Demoralized.

jutsu.name: Dancer's Grace
jutsu.description: You unleash the fury of your blade as you spin, increasing in speed with each rotation. All creatures within your weapons range must make 2 Dexterity saving throws, taking your weapon's damage +2d10 on a failure and gaining 1 rank of Bleeding for each failure. Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throws are also knocked Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, and the number of Dexterity Saving throws needed by 1.

jutsu.name: Hazy Night
jutsu.description: You move with such fine control that nothing is wasted. Each movement leaves behind afterimages of your last movement. For the duration, Bukijutsu made with a weapon from the Blade Group that forces a target to make a saving throw, are always made with a -2 penalty.

jutsu.name: Ichimonji
jutsu.description: You take a solid form and perform 2 powerful slashes with enough force to leave a gash in the ground below the blade. The first slash is downward creating the gash in the ground, the second slash is upward creating a high-pitched singing sensation from the edge of the blade. Make two melee taijutsu attacks against a single creature dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d6 with each hit. If you successfully hit a creature with both attacks, you tear open their guard removing any chance they could defend themselves from you. A creature who is hit by both attacks, cannot gain Jutsu based bonuses to AC. Chain 2: Your strike cuts deeper. Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, reducing their AC by -2 until the end of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can make a third (3rd) attack. This jutsu's secondary effect still triggers if at least two attacks score a hit.

jutsu.name: Judgement Cut
jutsu.description: You take your weapon and coat it in your chakra, and use your raw skill to gauge the distance between yourself and your target. Select a point you can see within range. All creatures within 5 feet of this point must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking 5d8 Slashing damage on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Additionally, you can choose to spend an additional 6 Chakra to use this jutsu again targeting the same point, forcing all creatures to repeat the saving throw. You can do this twice per casting. Chain 2: Your Judgement is all encompassing and unmatched. Creatures who fail their saving throw also gain a rank of Bleed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, when you cast this jutsu, select a second point within range as you affect both areas simultaneously with this jutsu. A creature can only make saving throws vs this jutsu from a single affected area per casting.

jutsu.name: Three Thousand Worlds
jutsu.description: You focus on your blade, lacing it with enough chakra to becomes visible. Select one of the following effects to benefit from with your weapon for the duration; Weapon and Taijutsu attacks with this weapon cannot be made at disadvantage. damage this weapon deals ignores resistance. damage this weapon deals treats immunity as resistance. damage this weapon deals ignores Temporary Hit Points. Chain 2: Select two effects, instead of 1.

jutsu.name: Blade of Sin: Envy
jutsu.description: You seek to emulate the power of one of the Seven Deadly Sins of Humanity in your blade, imbuing the Sin of Envy inside the edge. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range. On a hit you deal your Weapons damage+6d8. If the target creature is benefiting from a jutsu based bonus to AC or DR they must make a Constitution Saving Throw. On a failed save the benefits they receive is transferred to you as they lose it until the beginning of your next turn. Chain 2: You can share your ill-gotten benefits. Select one willing allied creature within 20-feet of you. They gain the same transferred benefits as you until the end of your next turn. Chain 3: You can share the conditions you currently have with your enemies as they share their benefits with you. On a failed save, any conditions you may have, you transfer them to the affected creature, at the same time that you transfer their benefits to you. They retain these conditions until the end of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Infernal Slash
jutsu.description: You swing your blade from such a low angle it's almost as if it rose from the hells themselves. Make two melee taijutsu attacks against a target creature in range, dealing your [Weapons damage] +3d6 slashing damage. The shockwave of your attack generates enough friction to spark a flame. The target creature and all creatures of your choice within your weapons range must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 3d6 Fire damage or half as much on a success. If the original target makes their save, they take no damage. Chain 2: The flames erupts outward and burns hotter for the moment it exists. All creatures who fail their saving throw have their DR reduced by 4 until the end of your next turn. Chain 3: This jutsu can be cast as a Bonus Action. If cast in this way, you are set back to Chain 1. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this above A- Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Killer Bee
jutsu.description: You hold 5 of your weapons in the gaps between your armpits, the hinge joints of your arms and legs, and various other places; before placing a final Tanto in your mouth, leaving your hands completely free. This jutsu allows for quick and unpredictable attacks, that catch your enemies off-guard. While under the effects of this jutsu, you cannot concentrate on any other jutsu. This jutsu provides you the following benefits; melee weapon attacks you make cannot be reacted to. As a reaction you can deflect an attack against you, adding +5 to your AC against the triggering attack. If this would cause the attack to miss, you can make a melee weapon attack as a part of the same reaction, as long as the target is within range. As a bonus action, you can make 2 melee weapon attacks. As an action you can take the dash action and make 3 melee weapon attacks. As a full turn action, you make use of all of your weapons and strike with them. Make five melee weapon attacks, once with each weapon. If they all hit, the creature is Stunned until the end of their next turn. All of these benefits are only applicable while using Tanto. Switching to a different weapon or even holding a weapon that is not a Tanto will automatically end this jutsu.

jutsu.name: Quick Draw
jutsu.description: You take a withdrawn stance gripping your weapon and prepare for a powerful sweeping strike. You spend your turn preparing this attack until the beginning of your next turn. You cannot take a Bonus action the turn you use this jutsu or a reaction after using this jutsu. At the start of your next turn, you swing with all of your force, all creatures in front of you within 5 feet, must make a Dexterity saving throw at disadvantage, taking your [Weapons damage] + 5d12 damage. Chain 2: You can still take your Reactions. Chain 3: If a creature fails their saving throw by 5 or more, you can cast another Bukijutsu using the same weapon, of C-Rank or lower, with a casting time as 1 Action, as a Bonus Action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, at the start of your next turn, you can select a space within your movement range that can hold you and move into that space before this jutsu's effect triggers.

jutsu.name: Sword Aura: Secondary
jutsu.description: You must be under the effects of a Sword Aura: Primary to cast this jutsu. When you cast this jutsu, you end concentration of Sword Aura: Primary as this jutsu takes its place. At the beginning of each of your turns, select one of the listed secondary colors which your weapons color shifts to match, gaining the listed effects. Green: Your weapons damage type becomes either Cold or Lightning which you choose each time you deal damage with it. Additionally, a creature you deal damage to with this weapon reduces their speed by 10 feet until the beginning of your next turn and treats constructs and structures as vulnerable to its damage. Orange: Your weapons damage type becomes either Fire or Lightning which you choose each time you deal damage with it. Additionally, a creature you deal damage to with this weapon can be pushed 5 feet into a direction of your choice (except upwards) and treats constructs and structures as vulnerable to its damage. Purple: Your weapons damage type becomes either Fire or Cold which you choose each time you deal damage with it. Additionally, a creature you deal damage to with this weapon can be pushed 5 feet into a direction of your choice (except upwards) and reduces their speed by 10 feet until the beginning of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Black Blade
jutsu.description: As part of the requirements for casting this jutsu, your weapon must be under the effects of a jutsu that would provide it an increase to damage in any way, such as the jutsu Lightning Release: Lightning Kings Mantle, or Fire Release: Flame Coat, etc. You take your already enhanced weapon and funnel more powerful chakra within it, causing it to radiate intense black chakra before releasing it as a wave of black chakra filling a 60-foot cone. All creatures within range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapon's damage] + 4d12 damage of the damage type of the jutsu that buffs your damage and has their maximum hit points reduced by the damage dealt for the next minute on a failed save, or half much damage on a success. The maximum hit point reduction effect can be removed by a medical effect that removes conditions of A-Rank or higher. Chain 3: A creature that fails this saving throw by 5 or more is Stunned until the end of their next turn due to the intense shock from the force of the jutsu passes.

jutsu.name: Spiral Cloud Passage
jutsu.description: Description: You leap into the air while slashing relentlessly, Striking everyone and everything around your multiple times. Make 3 melee taijutsu attacks, comparing the result of your attacks to the AC All creatures of your choice within range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 4d6. If any of these attacks score a critical hit, then all creatures suffer the effects of the critical hit. Chain 3: If you score two or more critical hits as part of this Jutsu's casting, when you end your turn, you immediately take another one. You can gain the benefit of this chain effect, once every other turn.

jutsu.name: Sword Aura: Monochrome
jutsu.description: You must be under the effects of a Sword Aura: Secondary to cast this jutsu. When you cast this jutsu, you end concentration of Sword Aura: Secondary as this jutsu takes its place. At the beginning of each of your turns, select one of the listed monochrome colors which your weapons color shifts to match, gaining the listed effects. Black: Your weapons damage type becomes Necrotic. Additionally, damage your weapon deals cannot be healed for 1 minute unless by a S-Rank jutsu. White: Your weapons damage type becomes Psychic. Once per turn, when you deal damage to a creature with this weapon, they must make a Charisma saving throw becoming Inverted on a failed save.

jutsu.name: Branding Punishment
jutsu.description: You strike with your weapon leaving a lasting mark upon them so that they may remember your zeal. Make two melee taijutsu attack, on a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + 1d8. Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Constitution saving throw being Branded by your strike until the end of your next turn. While branded, the target creature is Bruised.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast at C-Rank or higher the weapon used gains 1 rank of Reach for this jutsu's casting. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the damage by +1d8 and the branded creature is branded for 1 minute or until they spend a full-turn action to remove the branding. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the damage by +1d8

jutsu.name: Bone Crusher
jutsu.description: You spin your flail and strike out as it wraps around your enemy's ligament and you pull attempting to crush their bones. Make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, the target creature is Grappled by you. You can choose to force the affected creature to make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they take your [Weapons damage] +2d4 and they become Bruised. Chain 1: Affected creature that fails their saving throw has their arm heavily damaged as they are disarmed of any weapons or items they are holding. They cannot hold items or weapons until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1. If this jutsu is cast at C-Rank or higher, creatures who fail their saving throw is also knocked Prone. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, affected creatures cannot cast jutsu with the Hand Sign (HS) component.

jutsu.name: Chain Pull
jutsu.description: You throw your weapon wrapping it around a target and pulling towards yourself. The target must succeed a Strength saving throw. On a failed save they become Grappled by you. At the end of the affected creatures turns, they can make a Strength saving throw to end the grapple effect on a successful save. Chain 1: You can target one additional creature in range.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the range of this jutsu by +5 feet.

jutsu.name: Dancing Fool's Dance
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon in a wide arc striking all creatures in the arc. Make a melee taijutsu Attack, comparing the result against each creature of your choice AC, within your weapons range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 2d4. Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they are knocked Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 2d4.

jutsu.name: Dancing Fool's Whip
jutsu.description: You violently whip your weapon with enough force to crack the ground from the impact. Select a point you can see within your weapons range. Creatures in a 5-foot radius of the chosen point must make a Dexterity saving throw as they are struck. On a failed save, the target takes your weapons damage + 1d10 or half as much on a successful save. Chain 1: A creature who failed their save also gains a rank of Bleeding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Iron Web Deflection
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description: You quickly defend yourself with your weapon to soften the blow. Reduce the damage you would take by an amount equal to your [Weapons damage]. Do not add any jutsu based bonuses to damage, to the result. Chain 1: You maintain the damage reduction effect until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage reduced by 2. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, if there is a solid structure within your Weapons range, after the triggering damage, you can move within 5 feet of the select structure, as your pull yourself out of the range of further attacks.

jutsu.name: Toads Whipping Tongue
jutsu.description: This jutsu does not cost chakra to maintain concentration on it. You enhance your weapon with chakra to extend its reach. For the duration, all Flail Weapons gain an additional rank of Reach. They also gain a +2 bonus on Disarm, Grapple and Trip attempts if they have the associated weapon property.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If cast at B-Rank or higher, they gain an additional rank of Reach.

jutsu.name: Wire Trap
jutsu.description: You lay your weapons striking portion onto the ground leaving it in place. When you cast this jutsu, select a point within your weapons range. All spaces within 10 feet of this space are treated as the Trigger Range. You must remain within 15 feet of this select space, or this jutsu ends with no effect. As a reaction on another creatures turn you can trigger this jutsu. All creatures within the Trigger Range must make a Dexterity saving throw. If their passive perception is lower than the DC, they make their save at disadvantage. On a failed save they are Grappled, knocked Prone and pulled up to 10 feet into a space of your choice.

jutsu.name: Warriors Zone
jutsu.description: You meticulously and encircle yourself with your flair until you manifest a zone of influence controlled entirely by you and your weapon. For the Duration, you gain +4 DR and creatures that would cross into a space that a radius the size of your weapons range would affect, they immediately take your [Weapons damage] + 1d6 once per turn. Chain 1: The first time on each of your turns for the duration that you declare a weapon attack using the same weapon used to cast this jutsu, you can make a second attack targeting a second creature as part of the same action.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the damage by 1d6. If cast at C-Rank or higher, you can choose which creatures take damage from this jutsu. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the DR bonus by +2. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher if you cast another Bukijutsu with the same weapon used to cast this jutsu that jutsu gains a rank of mastery to the attack. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank increase the DR bonus by +2.

jutsu.name: Abyssal Aura
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon slowly as it draws anxiety from those around you eliciting different effects based on which Chain rank you are in. Chain 1: All creatures in range, must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save the next time they take damage from a flail weapon or Bukijutsu that uses a Flail they gain 1 rank of Demoralized. Chain 2: All creatures in range, must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save the next time they take damage from a flail weapon or Bukijutsu that uses a Flail they gain 2 ranks of Concussed. Chain 3: All creatures in range, must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save the next time they take damage from a flail weapon or Bukijutsu that uses a Flail they gain 3 ranks of Dazzled.

jutsu.name: Sparking Flail
jutsu.description: You spin and flail your weapon striking every surface in range generating sparks, smoke and dust creating a thick and difficult to see-through haze. This haze originates from a point of the space you are occupying and occupies a radius up to your weapons range in size. This haze follows you and cannot be blown away by strong winds. Select one hostile creature you can see when you cast this jutsu. This creature cannot see through this haze and you are treated as being fully obscured visually against them. Creatures, their attacks and jutsu can still pass through this haze, entering and/or exiting it. Chain 1: On each of your turns, for the duration, your first weapon or Taijutsu attack has a +1 bonus to its Critical threat range. Chain 2: For the duration, when you score a critical hit, you gain invisibility and a +20-foot bonus to your movement speed until the end of the current turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target with this jutsu by +1.

jutsu.name: Chain Kill
jutsu.description: You whip your weapon into a frenzy, ready to strike down your foes in rapid succession. Make a melee taijutsu attack against an enemy within range. On a hit, you deal twice your [Weapon's damage] on a hit. If you reduce a creature to 0 hit points using this jutsu, you can move up to 10 feet, and make another attack against a creature of your choice within your weapons range, repeating this jutsu's effect. You can make additional attacks in this way, no more than once per casting. Chain 1: You don't need to reduce a creature's hit points to 0, to make an additional attack against a different creature. Chain 2: Each time you reduce a creature(s) hit points to 0 with this jutsu, you regain 2 Chakra points.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of additional creatures you can attack by +1.

jutsu.name: Dancing Fool Twister
jutsu.description: You whip your weapon with the strength to create a small twister at your command. All creatures in your weapon range in a sphere around you must make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they take your [Weapons damage+2d6] and are thrown 20-feet into a direction of your choice (excluding up) or half as much damage on a success and no further effect. Chain 1: A creature who is thrown falls Prone and suffers a 15-foot penalty to their speed until the end of their next turn. Chain 2: A creature who fails their saving throw is instead thrown 30-feet and suffers a 15-foot penalty to their speed until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Deflecting Flail
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage from a ranged attack.
jutsu.description: Just when a ranged attack would strike you, the striking end of your flail intercepts the strike as you try to reflect the attack back. Make a melee taijutsu attack, comparing the result to the triggering attacks result. If your attack roll is higher, the triggering creature takes your [Weapons damage] + the effect of the triggering attack. Chain 1: The triggering creature is also pulled 10 feet closer to you. Chain 2: If the triggering creature is within your weapons range, make your attack roll at advantage.

jutsu.name: Dancing Fool's Embrace
jutsu.description: You whip your weapon with the finesse to wrap around your enemies and bring them into a tight and lethal embrace. You do not need to spend chakra to maintain concentration of this jutsu. Select a point you can see in your weapons ranged. All hostile creatures in a 5-foot radius of the chosen point must make a Strength Saving Throw. On a failed save, they have been bound in some way, as your weapon cuts and digs deep into them as they take your [Weapons damage] or no damage of effect on a successful save. A creature who failed their saving throw has your weapon still bound to them and cannot move further than your weapons range away from you for the duration. Additionally, you cannot use the weapon used to cast this jutsu for attacks or other jutsu. As a Bonus action, while you have creature(s) bound by this jutsu, you can tighten the embrace, dealing 3d10 damage to all bound creatures using your weapons damage type.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage dealt as a bonus action by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Hurricane Flail
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon in a circle around you, striking at all around you and making it hard to even stand near you. All creatures withing a radius equal to your weapons range must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your [Weapons damage] + 2d6 damage and they fall Prone. On a successful save they take half damage and no further effects. Chain 1: Prone creatures must spend their full movement to stand back up. Chain 2: Prone creatures must spend their Action to stand back up.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Iron Web Dome
jutsu.castingTime: 1 reaction to you or ally in range takes damage
jutsu.description: You whip your weapon around at high speeds, creating a dome to defend against attacks. You can set the radius of this dome up to your weapons range. The Dome has an AC equal to your Taijutsu Save DC and hit points equal to twice your [Weapons damage] and intercepts all damage originating outside the dome. A creature who hits the dome with a melee attack and fails to break it takes damage equal to your [Weapon's damage]. Chain 1: An allied creature within the radius of the dome can spend their reaction on their turn to reinforce the dome, restoring a number of hit points equal to their [Weapon damage]. Chain 2: Hostile creatures that trigger a clash and succeeds, takes twice your [Weapons Damagte].
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the hit points of the dome by +4. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, the damage a creature takes increases by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, if the dome is broken, all creatures of your choice within 5 feet of the domes walls takes twice your weapons damage.

jutsu.name: Blue Moon
jutsu.description: You whip your weapon before channeling so much chakra into the end it looks like a blue moon at the end of your weapon. Make 2 melee Taijutsu attacks against a creature in range dealing your [Weapons damage] + 1d10. If both attacks are successful, you can make a third attack dealing 3d10 damage of your weapons type. Chain 2: You shift your momentum. Until the end of your next turn, you can use any Chain effect on the next Bukijutsu you cast with a Flail weapon. You maintain the Chain rank used.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the third attacks damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Branding Fury
jutsu.description: You lash out, striking many times in a controlled zone, leaving a lasting mark upon all in a given area reminding them of your zeal. Select a point you can see in range and make two melee taijutsu attacks comparing the result against all creatures of your choice AC within a 5-foot radius of the chosen point. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + 3d6 and all affected creatures are Branded by your strike until the end of your next turn. While Branded, allied creatures that target them with attacks cannot make their attacks with disadvantage. Chain 2: While branded, the target creature has 2 ranks of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank or higher, a branded creature is branded for 1 minute or until they spend a full-turn action to remove the branding. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, Branded creatures must make a Constitution saving throw at the beginning of each of their turns, being Dazed on a failed save and the wound radiates with unbearable pain.

jutsu.name: Demonic Culling: Eye Basket
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon with chakra and quickly surround your target within the spin. Select a point you can see in range as you surround the area with segments of your weapon before retracting it, collapsing it on all creatures within a 10-foot radius centered on the point. All creatures in range must make a Strength saving throw taking your [Weapons damage] +3d8 and are knocked Prone and Restrained on a failed save, and only half damage with no conditions on a success. At the start of a Restrained creatures turn, they remake the save, ending the conditions on a success. Chain 2: You can move all Restrained creatures 20 feet as a bonus action on your turn. They must remain within your weapons range otherwise; they break free automatically ending this jutsu's effect on them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8

jutsu.name: Earth Spider Sewing
jutsu.description: You lace an area with razor sharp wires less than a foot above ground level. Trapping, damaging, and hindering all creatures who aren't aware of them or their locations exactly. For the duration, select a space the size of a 60-foot cube to fill with razor sharp wires. Select creatures that you can see to be unaffected by this jutsu. For the duration, creatures who enter the radius of this jutsu move as if the area this jutsu inhabits is difficult terrain. Creatures who cast Jutsu with a Mobility (M) component, must make a Dexterity saving throw being Restrained by the wires as they get wrapped up inside of them on a failed save. Creatures who make weapon attacks must make a Strength saving throw, having their weapon caught on a wire and being unable to complete the attack on a failed save.

jutsu.name: Lashing Attack
jutsu.description: You make a series of attacks with your weapon, each one using the force of the last to deliver a greater blow. Make 3 melee Taijutsu attacks dealing your [Weapons damage] + 2d6. If at least two attacks score a hit on the same creature, they must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they are knocked Prone and must spend their full movement to stand back up. Additionally, while Prone in this way attacks from Flail weapon against the Prone creature are made with a +2 bonus to the damage dealt. Chain 2: A creature that fails their saving throw is also Staggered on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Rupture Gale Orb
jutsu.description: You whip your weapon into a sphere around you before you let it erupt out with a large burst. All creatures within your weapons range must make a Strength Saving throw. On a failure they are pulled 10 feet closer to you into a space that can hold. On a success they are able to resist being moved. All creatures whose movement ends within 5 feet of you is struck by the small gale around you, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d6 and are knocked Prone. Chain 2: You can select one creature to make this saving throw at disadvantage as all of your focus is on them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Stamina Strike
jutsu.description: Description: You whip your weapon before slamming it into the center of your enemy, looking to ruin their flow and stamina. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing your weapons damage+6d6 damage and the target creature must make a Constitution Saving Throw. If the attack is a critical hit, the target creature automatically fails this save. On a failed save, the target creature becomes Dazed and increases the cost of the next jutsu they cast before the end of your next turn, by +8. Chain 2: Select one additional creature to target with this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Crucifixion
jutsu.description: As a part of casting this jutsu, you must be in a forest, urban environment, or cavernous terrain. You pull your weapons chain, wires or connective pieces, revealing that you already have a target surrounded by it, that you can see within range. Select two creatures within range. Both must make a Strength saving throw, being Grappled, Restrained, unable to make hand seals (HS) and becoming Bruised on a failed save. They remake their saving throw at the end of each of their turns. Chain 2: You can select one creature to make this saving throw at disadvantage as all of your focus is on them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures affected by this jutsu by +1.

jutsu.name: Collateral damage
jutsu.description: You angle the weighted end of your Flail behind you before shifting your weight forward while maneuvering the flail around your side, sending a devastating arc of force towards an opponent, looking to remove them from the battle field in one fell swoop. Make a melee Taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapons damage] + 6d6 and they must make a Strength saving throw to resist being thrown a number of feet backwards equal to 10 x your Taijutsu ability modifier on a failed save. If the target collides with another creature, that creature must make a Dexterity Saving thrown, on a failure both creatures take 4d6 bludgeoning damage. On a success, the primary target still suffers 4d6 bludgeoning damage, but the second target only takes half. Chain 2: If the target creature currently has penalties to their speed, they make their Saving throw at disadvantage. Chain 3: Affected creatures that strike a wall are Staggered.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and both instances of damage by 1d6. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, if the target creature fails their saving throw by 5 or more, you may recast this jutsu at A-Rank, at 0 cost, but must target a different creature.

jutsu.name: Iron Grasp
jutsu.description: You lash out with your chained weapon, aiming to debilitate and restrain a foe within reach before presenting them to your allies to be maimed. Select a creature within range, make a contested grapple check where you can use your Taijutsu attack bonus in place of athletics, or whichever is higher. If a creature becomes Grappled by this jutsu, they take your [Weapons damage] + 2d6 you immediately move them anywhere within your weapon range. For each Ally that they pass by, that ally may take a reaction to take an attack of opportunity or cast a Bukijutsu of C-Rank or lower targeting the Grappled creature. Chain 2: Allied creatures that score a hit are inspired by your technique gaining a +2 bonus to their AC until the beginning of your next turn. Chain 3: Allied creatures can spend their reaction to cast any jutsu of C-Rank or lower, targeting the Grappled creature.

jutsu.name: Iron Vanguard
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, you take when you or an ally within range take damage
jutsu.description: You whip your flail into the air, rotating it at breakneck speeds until you create an impenetrable barrier of steel and chain. When you or an ally within range would take damage, you quickly leap into action by deflecting the incoming attacks. Allies gain +4 AC to the triggering attack, and +2 to AC for subsequent attacks until the beginning of your next turn. Chain 2: If an allied creature taking damage triggers this jutsu, reduce the triggering damage by an amount equal to your [Weapons damage] + 2d8. Chain 3: If the damage you take triggers this jutsu, redirect some of the triggering damage by an amount equal to you [Weapons damage] + 2d6. Reduce the damage taken by the result and then select another creature in range and make a melee taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapons damage] + the result to that creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the AC bonus by +1.

jutsu.name: Furious Meteor
jutsu.description: You channel all your stored energy into your flail before striking out with the force of a meteor. Make a melee Taijutsu attack dealing you [Weapons damage] + 8d6. The affected creature must make a Strength Saving throw, being knocked Prone and Restrained into the ground until the start of their next turn. Chain 2: You can make an additional attack but must target a different creature. Chain 3: This jutsu's attack gains a +2 bonus to its critical threat range. If it scores a critical hit, you regain the Chakra spent to cast it.

jutsu.name: Whip Like Strikes
jutsu.description: By levying the weight and tension brought on by the chain and the weapon your mastery over the flail allows you to change and react to the weapons path by flicking your wrist and altering its course in a dozen micro movements. Select a creature within range and make 4 melee taijutsu attacks against them with lightning swift strikes that crackle like lightning and boom like thunder dealing your [Weapons damage] + 1d12. Count every successful hit after the first. The affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, becoming Bruised. Chain 2: If any attack scores a critical hit the affected creature is knocked Prone. Chain 3: For each successful hit, you gain a +10-movement speed bonus and you can push the creature up to 10 feet straight away from you.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank you can make 1 additional attack as part of this jutsu's casting.

jutsu.name: Annihilation
jutsu.description: You raise your weapon above your head, swinging it in mighty arcs until the weapon becomes a blur of destructive force. You may move up to your movement speed and unleash a 30-foot cone of destructive force up to 3 times throughout that movement, originating from a point of a space you are moving through for each cone. All creatures in each affected area must make a Strength Saving Throw, being throw straight back 20 feet and taking you [Weapons damage] +2d12 and gaining 2 ranks of Concussed or only half as much damage, on a success. A creature can be affected by this Jutsu no more than twice. Chain 3: You treat Jutsu based structures and constructs as if they are vulnerable to this jutsu's damage. Additionally, if this jutsu deals damage to a Staggered creature, you extend the duration of the Staggered until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Branding Savagery
jutsu.description: You focus your relentless savagery into your flail and lash out at everything and everyone around you, striking with enough strength to shatter the ground, branding the entire area. All creatures of your choice within range, must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking you [Weapons damage] + 4d12 or half as much on a success. Regardless of a success or failure, all creatures whom you dealt damage to becomes Branded reminding them of your savagery. All Branded creatures cannot declare attacks or cast jutsu within the given area for the next minute, being forced to escape the affected radius in order to fight effectively or until they spend a full-turn action to remove the branding Chain 3: While branded, the target creature has 4 ranks of Sealed.

jutsu.name: Heartstopper
jutsu.description: Description: Your Flail strikes the enemy directly where their heart would be attempting to disrupt its rhythm. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature within range, On hit, the creature takes [Weapons damage] +7d10, additionally, the target must make a Constitution Saving throw. On a failure, the creature gains 3 ranks of Weakened and also becomes Staggered. Chain 3: A creature that fails their saving throw by 5 or more is Stunned until the end of their next turn. A creature that fails their saving throw by 10 or more is knocked unconscious for the next minute.

jutsu.name: 2-Point Penetrate
jutsu.description: You perform a double strike attacking at your opponent's shoulders or legs in an attempt to destabilize them. Make two melee taijutsu attacks dealing your [Weapons damage]. Chain 1: If a target is hit at least once, it must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, they suffer a 10-foot speed penalty for each successful attack, until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Achilles Heel
jutsu.description: You aim to hinder your enemy from harming your allies, so they instead target you. Select one creature you can see in range and take a combative stance meant to taunt them. Select creature gains disadvantage on attacks targeting creatures other than you until the end of their next turn. This jutsu ends early when you would deal damage, force a save to a creature other than the target or would use this jutsu again on another creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can deal damage to or force other creatures to make saving throws without this jutsu ending on the original target, so long as they would also be affected by the damage or also forced to make the same save.

jutsu.name: Dragon slayer thrust
jutsu.description: You charge a thrusting attack before lashing at with precise timing to deal a lethal blow to your enemy. You can move up to 10-feet towards the target and make a melee taijutsu Attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapon damage] +3d6. Chain 1: On a hit, affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, being Dazed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Dragonfly Landing
jutsu.description: Your jump up and then stab down with numerous thrusts. Make a melee taijutsu Attack against a target creature in range. On a hit you deal your [Weapon damage] +2d10. Chain 1: On a hit, affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked Prone on a failed save. You also land in their space. If they would attempt to stand while still sharing a space, you get an attack of opportunity.
