jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Enhanced Blocking
jutsu.description: You brace your weapon and enter a more guarded stance. For the duration, your Polearm type weapon gains the Blocking 2 weapon property. Additionally, you may add your Blocking property bonus to Strength or Dexterity saving throw you would make.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If you would cast this jutsu at B-Rank or higher, you can increase the ranks of Blocking by +1.

jutsu.name: Holes of Despair
jutsu.description: You thrust your weapon out from different angles as you seek to riddle your opponent with holes. Make two melee taijutsu Attacks dealing your [Weapons damage] on hit. Chain 1: If you score at least one attack, affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleeding on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, you can increase the number of attacks you make by +1.

jutsu.name: Impaler Stab
jutsu.description: You thrust your weapon into your enemy, and keep it there. Make a melee taijutsu Attack. On a hit deal your [Weapon damage] + 2d12. You then can choose to keep it impaled into the enemy. If you do, you cannot attack with that weapon or use it as part of other Bukijutsu. A creature impaled by your weapon is Grappled by you until they can escape. While they are Grappled you can use your bonus action to twist the weapon, dealing 2d12 piercing damage. A creature impaled by your weapon makes Strength saving throws at the end of each of their turns, to break the grapple. Alternatively, if they can escape your weapons range, they are no longer impaled by your weapon. Chain 1: A creature impaled by your weapon cannot take reactions.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the initial and bonus action damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Offensive Dodge
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, Which you take when you take damage from an attack.
jutsu.description: You take a reverse grip on your weapon and attempt to strike before you are struck. You gain a +2 bonus to AC against the triggering attack and you can make a melee taijutsu attack against the triggering creature. On a hit you deal your [Weapon damage] + 2d8. Chain 1: if you score a hit, you gain temporary hit points equal to the result of your weapons damage die.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the AC bonus to +3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the AC bonus to +4.

jutsu.name: Stone Form
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when another creature in range is taking a Reaction.
jutsu.description: If a creature in your weapons range would take a reaction, before their effect is applied, make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 3d8 and the affected creature must make a Strength Saving throw. On a failed save, the triggering jutsu is interrupted and its effects are dispelled, but the chakra is still spent. Chain 1: On a failed save the affected creature doubles the chakra spent.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Sundering Strike
jutsu.description: You swing your polearm, flooded with chakra meant to break an enemy's offensive posture. Make a melee Taijutsu Attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 3d6 on a hit and forcing them to make a Strength saving throw, gaining a rank of Weakened on a failed save. Chain 1: On a failed save the affected creature increases the cost of the next jutsu they cast by +4 as you inject the built-up chakra into their chakra network.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Yosaku Strike
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon with enough force to create a lateral wave of force. Creatures in a 15-foot cone originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save you deal your [Weapons damage] + 1d10 and they are knocked Prone on a failed save or half as much on a successful one.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Bounding Blossom
jutsu.description: Select a point within 20 feet of you that you can see, as you leap into the air and strike down with the butt of your polearm, scattering your foes and leveling the ground. You move to a space within 5 feet of the target point as you leap over and strike it. All creatures, excluding yourself, in a 15-feet radius centering on the chosen point, must make a Strength Saving Throw. On a failed save, they take 4d10 bludgeoning damage and are knocked Prone on a failed save, and half as much and no further effects on a successful save. Chain 1: You gain temporary hit points equal to your weapons damage until the beginning of your next turn. Chain 2: Creatures withing 5 feet of the select point, makes their save at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d10. If this jutsu is cast at A-Rank, creatures who fail also gain a rank of Weakened.

jutsu.name: Coiling Strike
jutsu.description: You can only cast this jutsu, if the previous action you took this turn was casting a Bukijutsu that dealt damage to at least one creature. Using the force from your previous attack, you coil around your weapon, compounding the force into another strike. You can move up to 10 feet into an unoccupied space you can see and make a melee taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 2d6. Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleed on a failed save. Chain 2: The affected creature is pushed 10 feet away from you. If they would strike a wall or other solid surface, they also fall Prone.

jutsu.name: Crescent Moon Penetration
jutsu.description: You grip your weapon with two-hands to the best of your abilities. You attack with your weapon with the ferocity to pierce straight through their heart. Make a single melee taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d10 and the affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, on a failed save, you must roll 4d20. If you rolled four 20's, you immediately kill them as you pierce straight through their heart. Chain 1: You instead only need three 20's to pierce the targets heart and you can reroll 1 of the rolled d20 of your choice, once. Chain 2: If the affected creature has ranks of Weakened, for each rank, you can add one d4 to a single d20 rolled (up to a max of 5), adding it to the result of the d20, treating results of 20 or higher, as a 20.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d10 or the number of d20's rolled by 1.

jutsu.name: Draupnir Javelin
jutsu.description: You trace the design of your polearm in chakra and create a shell of chakra over it. You then throw it towards a target in range. Make a ranged Taijutsu attack, dealing [Weapons damage] + 2d12 on a hit and they must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they are rooted to the ground, becoming Restrained, remaking the save at the start of their turns to end the condition. Chain 1: As a reaction, you can call back your weapon. Chain 2: If the target has ranks of an Elemental condition, the chakra shell surrounding it imitates that nature. Your weapon can deal an additional 1d6 of the associated conditions damage type when you deal [Weapon damage] with it for the next minute, or until it is no longer held by you, whichever comes first.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Hollow Silhouette
jutsu.description: As you spin your weapon and move towards the target you sidestep back and forth quickly into their blind spots, leaving only an outline of you to see. Make a contested Stealth check against the target creature's Perception. On a success you can immediately move to be within 5 feet of them and you gain advantage on the next attack roll you make against them this turn. On a failure you have disadvantage on the next attack roll against them this turn. Chain 1: The next [Weapons damage] rolled before the beginning of your next turn, is rolled twice, taking the higher result. Chain 2: After you deal [Weapons damage] before the end of the current turn, you can move up to your movement speed away from the affected creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the range by 10 feet.

jutsu.name: Murderous Stabbing link
jutsu.description: You perform a series of thrusts with your weapon with enough force to penetrate steel, sending powerful piercing shockwaves up to 30 feet in a straight line stopping at the first creature hit. All creatures in a 30-foot long, 5-foot-wide line, originating from you, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your [Weapons damage] + 2d10 and becomes Dazed or half as much damage on a success and no further effects. Chain 1: On a failed save, they are pushed 10 feet in the direction of the line created by this jutsu and falling Prone. Chain 2: On a failed save, affected creatures suffer a 20-foot speed penalty, until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10

jutsu.name: Spear Assault
jutsu.description: You thrust out with your weapon while also making afterimages of the weapon while moving forward. All creatures in a 15-foot cone, originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take [Weapons damage] + 1d12 and have their DR reduced by 4, until the end of their next turn. Chain 1: Increase the size of the cone by +5 Feet Chain 2: After your assault, you spin your weapon, gaining temporary hit points equal to the highest damage dealt by this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: All-In Attack
jutsu.description: You lead your allies to capitalize on a brief moment where the enemy is left completely open. To cast this jutsu you must have at least 1 ally within 30 feet who can cast a C-Rank or lower Taijutsu or Bukijutsu as 1 Action. All willing allies can spend their reaction as part of this jutsu's casting. First, you make a melee Taijutsu attack against the target creature, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 6d8 on a hit and if the affected creature has Jutsu based damage reduction, your attack gains a +2 to its critical threat range. Next, each allied creature in whatever order they decide spends their reaction to cast a Taijutsu or Bukijutsu they know with a casting time of 1 Action, targeting the same creature you targeted with your attack. If the affected creature has Jutsu based damage reduction, their attack gains a +1 to their critical threat range. Chain 2: Defense is part of a good offense. Yourself, and all allied creatures who case jutsu as part of this jutsu's effect gain 8 temporary hit points until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Dual Ring
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon around in a ring around you, extending it with your chakra to create two rings of death. All creatures within a 15-foot radius must make a Dexterity Saving Throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + [Weapons damage] and gaining a rank of Weakened on a failed save or take half damage on a success. Creatures within your weapons range make their save at disadvantage and if they fail their save, gain 2 ranks of Weakened instead of 1. Chain 2: Defense is part of a good offense. Roll your [Weapons damage], recording the result. You gain DR equal to the result until the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, increase the damage by [Weapons damage].

jutsu.name: Ocean Parting
jutsu.description: You slam your weapon down on its end with the force to part the ocean itself. Select a point on a space which your weapon can reach. All creatures within a 20-foot cube centered the chosen point must make a Strength Saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 3d10 on a failure and being knocked up 30 feet. All allied creatures within 10-feet of you when this jutsu is cast can spend their Reaction to cast a Ninjutsu or Genjutsu with a casting time of 1 Action targeting one of the affected creatures. Chain 2: Creatures who fail their saving throw are Dazed. If the Dazed creature takes damage from an allied creature as part of this jutsu's casting has the duration of the Daze increased by 1 round.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Sun Spear
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon fast enough to ignite the very air before stabbing forwards, looking to strike your foe with the fury of the sun. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range. On a hit your deal your weapons damage +4d8 Fire damage and on hit. All hostile creatures of your choice, excluding the original target, in a 15-foot cone originating from the target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking half the Fire damage rolled on a failure and none on a success. Chain 2: After striking you retain some of the kinetic heat on your weapon. You weapon deals +2d6 Fire damage the next time you deal damage with it before the end of your next turn, after which, the heat dissipates.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Witch Hunter
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon and reel back to deliver a deadly swing that would dismantle apart any foe. Make a melee taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing [Weapons damage] + 5d6. If the target of your attack has cast a Ninjutsu or Genjutsu since the end of your last turn, this attack gains a rank of Mastery. On a hit, if the target is concentrating on a Ninjutsu or Genjutsu they immediately lose concentration of it if it was cast at a rank lower than the rank this jutsu was cast at. Chain 2: The affected creature makes a Constitution saving throw gaining 1 rank of Sealed for every jutsu they were concentrating on when this jutsu was cast.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Benthic Descent
jutsu.description: You strike your foe into the air before quickly following up with a strike to slam them down. A target creature in range must make a Strength Saving Throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 4d6 and are thrown 20 feet into the air on a failure or half as much on a success. If launched airborne, you can make a follow up melee Taijutsu attack at advantage against the same creature, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d6 and inflicting the Bruised conditionas they fall Prone. Chain 2: Creatures Prone as a result of this jutsu must spend their full movement to stand. At Higher Ranks: For each rank you cast this above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, you can instead force all creatures in weapons range to make the Strength Saving Throw. You still only make a single attack but compare the result to each creatures AC.

jutsu.name: Afterimage Storm
jutsu.description: You spin, around striking any and everything that stands in your path. Make three Taijutsu attacks comparing the results vs the AC of all each creature in range. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + 3d6. Affected creatures must make a Strength Saving throw if they are struck at least once. If you crit with this attack all creatures make their saves at disadvantage. On a failed save, echoes of your weapon strikes repeat each blow as the affected creatures becomes Bruised. Chain 2: Creatures in range who are Prone when the attacks are made and fail their saving throw are Stunned until the end of their next turn. Chain 3: Your strike are so swift and aggressive that you maintain the momentum that each strike had, granting you a +20 bonus to your speed until the end of the current turn. Additionally, you can cast another Bukijutsu as a Bonus Action this turn with a Casting time of 1 Action. If cast in this way, that jutsu has its cost reduced by half.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Demon Hunter
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon with enough force to upheave gravel, stone and even water particles before swiping and maintaining the stance needed to hunt even demons with. Select one creature you can see in range. That creature becomes the Demon you are hunting for the duration. While in initiative with your Demon you gain a +20 bonus to your movement speed and damage you deal with your polearm against this Demon ignores Resistance and treats immunity as resistance. Additionally, when you cast a Bukijutsu with the same Polearm used to cast this jutsu, it gains a +1 bonus to its Save DCs and increases the range of its attacks by +5 Feet. Chain 2: You can select one additional Creature to be your Hunted Demon. Chain 3: If your hunted demon would trigger an attack of opportunity from you, you can make two weapon attacks against them as part of that attack of opportunity. If at least one score a hit, you regain the reaction spent to take the attack of opportunity.

jutsu.name: Moon-Fang Piercer
jutsu.description: You Stab your weapon through the air, creating shockwave after shockwave of force. Select one point you can see within range, all creatures within 10ft of it must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 2d12 damage and having their AC reduced by 2 on a failed save, half as much damage on a success. Chain 2: A creature that failed their saving throw cannot maintain concentration on Jutsu until the end of their next turn. Chain 3: You strike out and twirl your weapon defensively immediately after. Until the beginning of your next turn, you gain +6 DR.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above A-rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Nadegiri
jutsu.description: Description: You make an attack so fast and precise that the target does not notice it as happened until it is too late. Make a melee taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapon's damage] + 6d8. If the target of this jutsu is large or bigger, you make this attack at advantage. If your attack beats the creatures AC by 10 or more, you treat the attack as a critical hit. Chain 2: This jutsu's damage ignores a creature's Temporary hit points. Chain 3: If the target is large or bigger, the target cannot take a Reaction against this jutsu's damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank above B-rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at S-Rank, if the target is Large or larger, they treat damage from this jutsu as if they are Vulnerable.

jutsu.name: Overcomer
jutsu.description: Your weapon, your will and your drive are all that you have and you have learned to tap into them simultaneously, at will. For the duration, if you would make a Strength saving throw you gain a +1d4 bonus to the roll. Additionally, while your hit points are at half or less, at the beginning of each turn you gain 10 Temporary hit points and effects that would move you against your will fail. If the effect to move you occurs before or after damage, the damage is still applied if applicable, but you are not moved.

jutsu.name: Stanchion Sky Pillar
jutsu.description: You leap to the top of your polearm, standing and balancing atop it. Depending on how much you put into it, the slam will be gloriously savage. Choose the Actions you want to invest when this jutsu is cast. Action. Make a melee Taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 8d6 and you can leap to a space that can hold you up to 20 feet away. Action + Bonus Action. Same as an Action, but the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw being Staggered on a failed save. Action + Reaction. Same as an Action, but the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw becoming vulnerable to the next instance of damage from a creature other than yourself before the end of your next turn. Action + Bonus Action + Reaction. Same as Action, but the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw becoming Stunned on a failed save. Additionally, the Stunned creature becomes vulnerable to the next instance of damage they take from a creature other than yourself before the end of your next turn. Chain 2: When you land in your chosen space, if there are any hostile creatures adjacent to you, you can make a melee taijutsu attack targeting one of them, dealing your [Weapons damage] on a hit. Chain 3: If you invest your Action, Bonus Action and Reaction into casting this jutsu and the affected creature fails their saving throw, you regain your Action. If you use this regained action to cast a Jutsu you gain 2 ranks of Exhaustion.

jutsu.name: Razor's Swift
jutsu.description: You jab your weapon into your opponent's torso, then twirl it above your head at rapid speeds manipulating the air pressure around you, pulling nearby enemies in. Make a melee taijutsu attack, on hit, the target takes your weapons damage, then all creatures within your weapons reach+10 feet must a Strength saving throw. Creatures that fail take damage equal to your weapons damage die+5d8 and are pulled 15 feet toward you, or half as much damage on success with no additional effects.

jutsu.name: Bestowal
jutsu.description: You focus your chakra and inject it into your weapon. As a part of the activation of this jutsu make a melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapon's damage] + 4d6. Chain 2: On a hit, you coat your weapon in the blood of your opponent. For the duration, your weapon deals 2d6 bonus Necrotic damage on a hit, twice per turn and once per turn, triggers all Bleed ranks conditional damage a creature has. Chain 3: On a hit, you coat your weapon in the blood of your opponent. For the duration, your weapon deals 2d6 bonus Necrotic damage on a hit, twice per turn, and once per turn, on a hit, affected creatures must make a Strength saving throw, gaining a rank of Weakened on a failed save.

jutsu.name: Merciless Havoc
jutsu.description: You slam your weapon down into your opponent and quickly follow up with a flurry of strikes. Each swing creates a spectral visage of your weapon that passes through all enemies in front of you. Make 7 melee taijutsu attacks vs the AC of all targets in this jutsu's range. On hit, targets take your weapons damage die+2d8. A target that is hit by all 7 attacks is knocked Prone and has their movement speed reduced to 0 until the end of their next turn. These attacks cannot score a critical hit.

jutsu.name: 2-Cross Strike
jutsu.description: You perform a double striking slash with your weapon, attacking two different angles forming an "X" at the intersections of the attack. Make two melee taijutsu dealing your [Weapons damage]. Chain 1: Affected creatures must make a Strength saving throw, becoming Bruised on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury Stance
jutsu.description: You raise and spin your weapon before holding it into a stance meant to infuse your fury into it. While in this stance the first time each turn that your deal your [Weapons damage] you can gain Fury.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Rebound Swing
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Bonus Action, when you miss with a melee attack with a Bludgeoning weapon
jutsu.description: You quickly try to recover after your miss by pumping chakra into your arms to rebound the opposite way. You can remake the missed attack targeting the same creature. If you have Fury, you can spend it to reduce the cost of this jutsu by 2.

jutsu.name: Weapon Break
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage from a melee attack.
jutsu.description: You quickly react to being hit by using your weapon to catch the attacking weapon at a vulnerable angle. The creature who triggered this reaction must make a Dexterity saving throw, having their weapon break on a failed save. If the triggering creatures' weapon has Weapon Seals, it can only be broken by a weapon which has an equal or greater bonus to attack and/or damage rolls or an equal or greater ranked weapon enhancement seal. Chain 1: A creature whose weapon you break, can be targeted with a melee taijutsu attack as part of this reaction, dealing you [Weapons damage] + 2d8 on a hit.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Demonic Dance
jutsu.description: You spin around with your weapon, a dance-like attack that bewilders enemies. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, comparing the result against the AC of all creatures within your weapons range. On a hit, you deal your weapon damage+1d6. If you have Fury, you can spend it to increase this jutsu's critical threat range by +2. Chain 1: Affected creatures cannot make an opportunity attack against you, until the beginning of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Knee Breaker
jutsu.description: A series of low strikes at an opponent's lower body with the intent to ruin their legs. Make 2 melee taijutsu Attacks at a target creature in range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapon damage]. If you hit a creature twice with this jutsu, they are knocked Prone. Chain 1: Affected creatures that is knocked Prone from this jutsu must spend its full movement to stand up.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Monkey King's Stance
jutsu.castingTime: Special (When you deal damage with a bludgeoning weapon)
jutsu.description: Description: You channel the energy from the strike into your weapon and hold that energy in a passive state as it builds up, much like the Monkey King himself. You can cast this jutsu when you deal damage with your weapon to take the stance, and its effects change depending on the circumstances you release the jutsu. You can only maintain this jutsu until the end of your next turn, after which, it ends. Action: You leap up and bring your weapon down on the head of your enemy. Make a melee Taijutsu Attack against a creature in your weapons range. On a hit, you deal your weapon's damage +3d8 and the target creature must make a Strength saving throw, becoming Concussed on a failed save. Bonus Action: You dash to the side and make a wide strike at the legs of your opponent. A target creature within 10 feet of you must make a Strength Saving throw, being knocked Prone on a failure.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the Action damage 1d8.

jutsu.name: Monkey Kings Fang
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon above your head before swinging it at a target, at a downward angle and following with the butt end of the weapon. Make two melee taijutsu attacks dealing your weapons damage + 1d6. Chain 1: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Concussed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks made by +1.

jutsu.name: Monkey Kings Tail
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon around your body before locking it behind your back using both of your hands and performing a sideways spin, slamming it into all creatures in front of you. Make a melee taijutsu attack against a creature you can see within range dealing your weapons damage + 3d6. Chain 1: If your weapon has ranks of the Reach property, it may reach beyond striking one creature and instead striking multiple creatures in a 5-foot-wide line, with the length of it being determined by however many ranks of Reach it has. For every rank of Reach your weapon has, it extends 5 feet in a straight line. All creatures, excluding your original target, who is in this extended range, must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your weapons damage on a failed save or no damage on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Blunt Force Connection
jutsu.description: You take a stance that allows you to place all of your weight behind your attack. Make a melee taijutsu attack against a target creature. On a hit, you deal your weapons damage + 4d8 and the target must make a Strength saving throw, falling Prone on a failed save. Chain 1: A 15-foot cube originating from you becomes difficult terrain. Chain 2: A creature that fails their saving throw, becomes Bruised.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Bolting Sakura
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description: You close your defenses as you guard your body with your weapons. You gain a +4 bonus to your AC against the triggering attack and all attacks made against you until the beginning of your next turn. Additionally, each time a creature makes a melee attack against you for the duration, you can make a melee taijutsu attack against a creature in your weapons range, dealing your [Weapon damage] + 2d6 on a hit. If you have Fury, you can spend it to grant an allied creature within your Weapons range a +2 bonus to their AC until the beginning of your next turn. Chain 1: Affected creature is disarmed on a hit. Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, becomes Bruised on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Centipede Dance
jutsu.description: You perform a series of brutal and efficient strikes with your weapon in an attempt to cripple and debilitate the target. Make two melee taijutsu attacks against a creature you can see within range, with your weapon. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + 1d10. If you hit with at least one of your attacks the affected target must success a Strength Saving throw. On a failed save, the target gains a rank of Weakened as you dislocate multiple bones in the targets body. Chain 1: A creature who fails their saving throw gains an additional rank of Weakened. Chain 2: Constructs and structures are vulnerable to this jutsu's damage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Earth Breaker
jutsu.description: You slam your weapon into the ground with enough force to upheave the earth. Select a point within your weapons range. All creatures within 10-feet of the chosen point, except for you, must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 4d8 bludgeoning damage and is knocked Prone on a failed save or half damage and no additional effects on a success. Chain 1: Creatures who fall Prone must spend their full movement to stand up form this jutsu. Chain 2: Creatures who failed their saving throw reduce their AC by 2, until the beginning of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Grand Slam
jutsu.description: You enter the stance of a batter and swing your weapon towards your target making a Taijutsu melee attack. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 4d10 and the affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being knocked back 40 feet away from you. If you have Fury, you can spend it to first move up to 20 feet before making your attack. This movement does not trigger attacks of opportunities. Chain 1: This attack has a +1 bonus to its critical threat range. Chain 2: On a critical hit, the affected creature cannot take a reaction until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast above C-rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Monkey Kings Arrogance
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon around yourself with enough force to create updrafts and powerful winds. But all of the weapon spinning is mostly for show as you then use your weapon to launch your allies like missiles towards a creature of your choice helping them crash into them. Select up to two allied and willing creatures within your weapons range. They are thrown up to 30 feet, into a space of their choice. If they would end this movement within 5 feet of a hostile creature, they can spend their reaction to cast a Jutsu that requires a melee attack, that has a casting time of 1 Action, targeting the hostile creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast above C-rank, increase the cost by 3 and the distance you can throw them by +10 feet.

jutsu.name: Monkey Kings Cunning
jutsu.description: You spin your weapon around in a series of distracting twirls before you strike your targets arm and leg joints disabling their mobility and striking power. Make two melee taijutsu attacks using your weapon, dealing your weapons damage + 1d12. Affected creatures must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save they gain a rank of Weakened. Chain 1: Affected creature is also pushed 10 feet, in a direction of your choice, except upwards. Chain 2: A creature who failed their saving throw gain an additional rank of Weakened.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Blunt Force Trauma
jutsu.description: You swing your weapon looking to release as much kinetic force into this strike as possible, cracking the ground you're standing on and even superheating the air via friction alone. Make a melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 3d12 and forcing the target creature to make a Constitution saving throw on a hit. On a failed save, the affected creature is pushed back 40-feet in a straight line and becomes Bruised. If you score a critical hit, on a failed save the affected creature is instead Stunned. If you have Fury, you can spend it to treat your Chain Rank as 2, regardless of your current Chain rank. Chain 2: On a failed save if the affected creature is turned into a short-range missile. Creatures that the target creature passes through while being pushed, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they are picked up and pushed along the same trajectory as the original creature. At the end of the original creature's movement, all picked up creatures are knocked Prone and become Dazed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Castle Crasher
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when a creature you deal damage to summons a creature, construct or structure to intercept the damage you deal or if the target creature gains temporary hit points.
jutsu.description: You feint out of your attack and pivot to instead slam your weapon to break down whatever wall was thrown against you. If they summoned an interposing creatures, structure or construct, make a melee Taijutsu attack targeting the interposing structure, construct or creature, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d10 with a +4 bonus to its critical threat range. If they gained THP, you have disadvantage on this attack roll. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage + 4d12 with a +2 bonus to its critical threat range. If you reduce the Construct or Structures Hit points to 0 or reduce the target creatures temporary hit points to 0, you can make one additional weapon attack as part of this jutsu's casting. Chain 2. Constructs and Structures treat this jutsu's damage as if they were vulnerable to it.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, damage by 1d10 or 1d12 respectively.

jutsu.name: Eclipse
jutsu.description: You brace your weapon for increased impact force as your weapon sits firmly grasped in both hands. For the duration, once per turn when you deal your [Weapons damage] with a Bukijutsu and weapon attack, the affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, gaining 1 rank of Weakened on a failed save. Chain 2. Creatures who fail their saving throw by 5 or more are also Dazed.

jutsu.name: Heaven Earth Impact
jutsu.description: You raise your weapon to the heavens and swing it down through the very crust of the earth. Make a melee taijutsu attack at disadvantage as you telegraph the attack from how much power you put into the attack. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + [Weapons damage] + 2d6 and the affected creature must make a Strength Saving Throw, becoming Prone and Restrained into the ground. At the end of each of their turns, they can remake the Strength saving throw to end the Restrained condition. Chain 2. As part of making your attack, select a point on the space your target is occupying. All creatures, excluding yourself within 10 feet of the chosen point must make a Strength saving throw or be push 20-feet backwards and falling Prone.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Monkey Kings Crown
jutsu.description: You twirl your weapon around yourself, building up momentum and kinetic energy in an attempt to strike an opponent's head with enough force to crush steel and shatter stone. Make one melee taijutsu attacks using your weapon, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d12 and forcing the affected creature to make a Strength saving throw. On a failed save, they gain 3 ranks of Concussed. Chain 2. If there are at least 2 or more creatures within your weapons range when this jutsu is cast you can instead force all creatures in range to make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save they take your [Weapons damage] + 2d12 and gain 2 ranks of Concussed. On a successful save, they take half damage and gains 1 rank of Concussed.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Earth Shatter
jutsu.description: You wind up a powerful overhead swing and send it straight into the ground crackling the earth. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a Strength saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 3d8 and being Dazed, Bruised, knocked Prone on a failed save or half as much damage and are only Bruised on a successful save. If you have Fury, you can spend it to increase your Chain rank to 3, regardless of your current Chain rank. Chain 2. Increase the size of the cone to 25-feet. Chain 3. You slam your weapon into the ground at your feet, releasing that kinetic energy outward affecting everyone in a 20-foot radius. All Creatures within a 20-foot radius centered on a point of the space you are occupying, that is standing on the ground must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they suffer this jutsu's damage and other effects. After casting this jutsu you can leap to a space you can see within 20 feet. This movement does not trigger attacks of opportunities.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Burning Impacts
jutsu.description: You move with purpose and your weapon follows a predestined path. Select up to 3 spaces you can see within range. You move into one of the chosen spaces and strike at a creature within your weapons range at that space leaving ripples in the air and surrounding gasses as your weapon ignites upon impact. Make one melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 7d6. Repeat this for each of the chosen spaces, once. If you score a hit with at least one of these attacks, the target must make a Dexterity saving throw, gaining 1 rank of Burned on a failure. Chain 2. Select one additional space to move to, attacking a creature within your weapons range. Chain 3. If you score a critical hit, you regain the chakra cost of this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Moonbane's Wrath
jutsu.description: You imbue your weapon with the fury of the moon itself, looking to smite all who stand before you. Make 4 melee Taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Weapons damage] on each successful hit. Record the number of successful hits a creature you hit at least twice with this jutsu must make a Constitution saving throw or suffering the effects listed based on the number of times you were hit. 2Hits: Affected creature is Dazed and Falls Prone. 3 Hits: Affected creature gains becomes Bruised, is Dazed and falls Prone. 4 Hits: Affected creature is Staggered, Dazed and falls Prone.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Onibi
jutsu.description: You make a powerful trust with your weapon, attempting to create a large, gaping, cylindrical hole in a target. Make a melee taijutsu attack, dealing your [weapon's damage] + 6d12 bludgeoning damage on a hit. Then, all creatures in a 30 foot long, 5-foot-wide line originating from the target creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save all affected creatures gain 2 ranks of Weakened and are knocked Prone. If you have Fury, you can spend it to make the original target make the Dexterity saving throw as well. Chain 2. The original target is pushed back in a 30-foot line ending their movement Prone. Chain 3. If you score a critical hit, you can cast a Bukijutsu with a casting time of 1 Action, immediately after the conclusion of this jutsu's effect. If you do not cast a Jutsu using this Action by the end of your turn, you gain a rank of Fury as if under the effects of Binding Fury Stance.

jutsu.name: Warriors Pace
jutsu.castingTime: 1 reaction when a creature would be knocked back.
jutsu.description: You immediately match steps with the opponent, locking them in to a deadly waltz with you. You can move with them as they move, ending your movement within a 5-foot space that could hold you. At the end of the movement, you make a melee Taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d8.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Dragon's Roar
jutsu.description: You unleash all of your pent of fury into an endless flurry of attacks. Make 3 melee taijutsu attacks. On hit, deal your [Weapons damage] + 3d12. Each time you score a hit against the same creature increase the next Taijutsu attack against them critical threat range by +2, up to a maximum of +4. This jutsu's maximum critical threat range is +4. Each time you score a critical hit with this jutsu you release a roar that shakes everyone to their core. All hostile creatures that can see and hear you within 40 feet must make a Wisdom saving throw gaining 2 ranks of Demoralized on a failure. If you have Fury, you can spend it to make this Jutsu's critical threat range +6, instead of +4. Chain 3: If this jutsu scores a critical hit, All creatures who make their saving throws make them with disadvantage.

jutsu.name: Skyforce
jutsu.description: Description: (To cast this jutsu, the target must be airborne) Fuel your weapon with sapping chakra and strike your opponent in their abdomen. Make a melee taijutsu attack against an airborne target. On hit they take your [Weapons damage] +5d8. Chain 3: The affected creature must make a Strength saving throw, being pushed 60 feet into the air, as you leap after them, making another melee taijutsu attack. On a hit, you push them back to the ground, as they take double the fall damage they normally would and fall Prone.

jutsu.name: Binding Fury: Juggernaut
jutsu.description: Once you get started there's no stopping your momentum. At the beginning of each of your turns, you can cast this jutsu. If you do, you gain a rank of Fury as if under the effects of Binding Fury Stance. If you do not spend your Fury as part of casting a Bukijutsu before the end of the current turn, you suffer harsh and echoing feedback, taking 4d8 Chakra damage. If you do spend your Fury, you suffer no feedback.

jutsu.name: Blunt Strike
jutsu.description: You ready and bludgeon the ammunition used with your chakra, aiming for your target's core striking at the center of their chest. Make a ranged taijutsu Attack using your weapon, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 3d6 as bludgeoning damage. On a hit, the target must succeed a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the target is Dazed Chain 1: If the affected creature would make a concentration check they suffer a -2 penalty to the check.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank, you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increasing the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Burst Fire
jutsu.description: You ready several attacks before unleashing all of them out in front of you. All creatures in a 30-foot cone originating from you, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save you deal your [Weapons damage] or half as much on a success. Chain 1: Creatures who fail their saving throw have their movement speed reduced by 10 feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Carpet of steel
jutsu.description: You ready a stack of your weapons and scatter them across the ground. Select a point you can see up to 30 feet away. You fill a 15-foot cube originating from that point with bladed or sharp tools. The area becomes difficult terrain and creatures that move while inside the area suffer 4 Piercing damage for every 5 feet they move within the area. Spaces that have already been traversed are no longer difficult terrain and no longer deal damage if moved through again.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, the damage is increased by +2.

jutsu.name: Dizzy Dance
jutsu.description: You launch a burst of your choice of weapons around yourself, attempting to hit all creatures surrounding you. All Creatures in a 20-foot radius sphere centered on you must succeed a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] and are Dazed on a failed save, and half as much damage and no additional effects on a successful one. Chain 1: A creature that fails their save has their movement speed reduced by 10 until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Falling Heaven: Divide
jutsu.description: Classification: Hijutsu By Coating your weapon in Chakra, and creating an extremely powerful spin you sharpen the edge just enough to split the air and even sound. Make a Ranged taijutsu attack, dealing [Weapon Damage] + 3d4 on a hit. Chain 1: On a hit, the affected creature must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, until the end of their next turn, for every 5 feet they move, they take 1d6 slashing damage as razor thin wire slices into them.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 2d4

jutsu.name: Falling Heaven: Split
jutsu.description: Classification: Hijutsu You release a collection of thrown weapons that cover a wide range piercing through everything and one in their path. Creature in range must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapon Damage] + 1d12 on a failed save or half as on a success. Chain 1: Creatures who fail their saving throw are knocked prone and are disarmed of any item they are holding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Falling Heaven: Rain
jutsu.description: Classification: Hijutsu Description: You launch the thrown weapons into the sky before your weapons collide bouncing off of each other as they rain downward in a cascade of dangerous steel. Select a point you can see within range. All creatures in a 15-foot radius centered on this point must make Constitution Saving throw to weather the rain of steel. On a failure they take your [Weapon Damage] + 1d6 and gain 1 rank of Bleed. On a success they take half damage and suffer no effects. Chain 1: Creatures who fail their saving throw are grappled in place until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Falling Heaven: Storm
jutsu.description: Classification: Hijutsu You launch your weapons that are lined with your battle wires surrounding a target creature before you pull back snapping the wire, constricting them. Target creature must make a Strength saving throw, being Restrained for the duration, on a failure. Affected creature remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, breaking free on a success. Chain 1: You treat the target creature(s) as the center of a 5-foot radius assault. All creatures within the affected radius must make their saving throw against this jutsu's effects.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1

jutsu.name: Flashing Streaks
jutsu.description: Description: You ready yourself to attack with your weapons at high speeds and attaching a Flash Tag to your ammunition. Make a ranged taijutsu attack targeting a creature you can see in range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 2d6. Regardless of a hit or miss, the affected creature, and all creatures within 10 feet of it, must make a Constitution saving throw as the Flash Tag detonates. On a failed save, affected creatures gain a rank of Dazzled. Chain 1: Increase the size of the affected flash range to 15 feet, making all creatures within 15 feet of the target creature make their saving throw vs jutsu effect.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d4.

jutsu.name: Kiss of the Moon
jutsu.description: You send out your attack in a high arc that disappears from your opponent's eyes and falls as if from the moon itself. They must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save they lose track of this shot as it homes in on them from the sky, dealing [Weapons damage] + 2d10 or half as much on a successful save. Chain 1: You can select one additional creature as the target of this jutsu.
jutsu.higherLevels: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Pain Barrage
jutsu.description: You leap in the air and spin while striking all targets in the area. All creatures, in a 10-foot cube centering on a point you can see within 30 feet, must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save select creatures takes 2d12 piercing damage or half as much on a successful save. You then land in an unoccupied space you can see within the range of this jutsu. Chain 1: Creatures who failed their save, become Weakened until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Pinning Shot
jutsu.description: You make a series of ranged attacks designed to pin your enemy in place in a way of your choosing. Make a ranged taijutsu Attack, using your weapon of choice dealing your [Weapons damage] + 1d10 and forcing the target creature to make a Strength saving throw, being Restrained on a failed save. Remakes their saving throw at the end of each of their turns, ending the Restrained condition on a success.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of creatures you can target by +1.

jutsu.name: Push Shot
jutsu.description: You perform a flurry of attacks, that forces their targets back. Make two ranged taijutsu attacks. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 1d8. A creature you hit must make a Constitution saving throw, being pushed back 10-feet on a hit. Chain 1: A creature who fails their saving throw also suffers a 10-foot movement speed penalty, until the end of their next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Rundas Ammo
jutsu.description: Grabbing ahold of your weapon and infusing it with your chakra allows you to make shots that make follow up shots have the luck of Hittite. For the duration, each time you roll an Ammunition Die as part of a Taijutsu attack, you can choose to instead reduce the size of your ammunition die by 1 step. If you do, the affected creature that you deal [Weapon damage] to becomes Fortune-Marked until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Shadowed Shot
jutsu.description: You throw your weapon as if it was a single shot, but in its shadow hides another. Select a creature in range and make a ranged Taijutsu Attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] on a hit. The target creature must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failure they fail to see the second attack hiding in the shadow of the first, taking your [Weapons damage] or no additional damage on a success. Chain 1: Creatures who fail their saving throw gain a rank of Bleeding. At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Shot Put Crash
jutsu.description: You perform a single shot meant to pierce through defenses. Make a ranged taijutsu Attack against a creature you can see within range dealing your [Weapons damage] + 2d6. Constructs and Structures are Vulnerable to this jutsu's damage. Chain 1: This attack gains a +2 bonus to its critical threat range against constructs and Structs.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Takeminakata's Ammo
jutsu.description: Grabbing ahold of your weapon and infusing it with your chakra allows you to make shots precise enough to avoid droplets of water during a storm while still hitting their target. For the duration, each time you roll an Ammunition Die as part of a Taijutsu attack, you can choose to instead reduce the size of your ammunition die by 1 step. If you do, the affected creature that you deal [Weapon damage] to becomes War-Marked until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Tyger Claws
jutsu.description: You make your attack so that it strikes at an odd angle. Make a ranged Taijutsu Attack against a creature in range with a +1 bonus to its critical threat range. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + 3d8 Chain 1: If you score a critical hit, the affected creature gains 2 ranks of Bleeding. At Higher Ranks: For every rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d8. If this jutsu is cast at B-Rank or higher, increase the bonus to critical threat range to +2.

jutsu.name: Bite of the Viper
jutsu.components: W (Any ranged/Thrown), NT (Poison Kit or Poison Tag), M
jutsu.description: Description: You coat your ammunition in a toxic poison and minor explosion meant to disable a group. Make a ranged taijutsu attack against a creature in range, dealing your [Weapons damage] +4d6 poison damage. Regardless of a hit or miss, the affected creature and all creatures within 10 feet of it, must make a Constitution saving throw as the Poison detonates. On a failed save, affected creatures gain a rank of Envenomed. Chain 1: Creatures who failed their saving throws begin to cough and hack at the poisonous gas in the air becoming unable to speak or form Hand Seals (HS) until the end of their next turn. Chain 2: A creature who already has ranks of Envenomed makes their save at disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above D-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Collateral Point Strikes
jutsu.description: By forcing your chakra into one shot of your ammunition, you can cause it to splinter into multiple shots. Choose up to three creatures you can see in range. Make a single ranged taijutsu attack comparing the result to all select creatures AC. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] +2d6 and each affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining a rank of Bleeding on a failed save. Chain 1: This attack gains a +1 bonus to its critical threat range if the target has temporary hit points, and a +2 bonus if they have a Jutsu based bonus to AC. Chain 2: A creature who failed their saving throw gains an additional rank of Bleeding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-rank increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d4 and max by 1d4.

jutsu.name: Cypress Impact
jutsu.description: You take your weapon as you rapidly Fire a swarm of shots into the sky before they begin to rain down up to your weapons range away, in a 15-foot radius sphere centered on a point of your choice. Each missile is tethered to you as your chakra is used as a binding chain. Creatures in range must make a Dexterity saving throw taking your [Weapons damage] + 2d8, being Restrained by your chakra tethers pinning them in place. A Restrained creature can make a Strength saving throw, breaking free on a success. Chain 1: Creatures who fail their saving throw are cut and sliced by the raining shots, gaining a rank of Bleeding. Chain 2: A creature who fails this saving throw by 5 or more has their arms bound as well, losing the ability to form Hand Seals (HS), while Restrained.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Falling Heaven: Cross
jutsu.description: Classification: Hijutsu You perform an enhanced version of Falling Heaven: Divide launching 2 Shuriken with either hand forming a cross as it cuts through anything to reach its objective. Make two ranged taijutsu attacks, dealing [Weapons Damage] + 2d6 on each hit. If both attacks are successful against the same creature they must make a Dexterity saving throw, becoming Blinded until the end of their next turn on a failed save, as their face is slashed. Chain 1: These attack gains a +1 bonus to its critical threat range if the target has temporary hit points, and a +2 bonus if they have a Jutsu based bonus to AC. Chain 2: A creature who failed their saving throw gains a rank of Bleeding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Falling Heaven: Protect
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, that you take when you or an allied creature within range take damage.
jutsu.description: Classification: Hijutsu You spin your weapon in front of you while coated in your chakra creating a spinning shield. Roll your [Weapons Damage] + 2d6, reducing the triggering damage by the result. You can then lash out, retaliating against the offending target. Make a ranged Taijutsu attack against the triggering creature if they are within your weapons range. On a hit, you deal [Weapons Damage] + 2d6. Make an additional attack targeting the same creature if you are in Chain rank 2 or 3.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and reduce damage you take and increase the damage you deal retaliating by an additional 1d6.

jutsu.name: Lethal Momentum
jutsu.description: You use your chakra to spin your weapon at a lethal tempo. Your weapon gains the unique Piercing property. [Weapon damage] you deal with this weapon ignores DR (damage reduction) a creature has. Additionally, if you cast a Bukijutsu with this weapon, the bonus damage the Bukijutsu adds also, ignores DR a creature has.

jutsu.name: Neith's Ammo
jutsu.components: W (Any ranged/Thrown) M, CS, NT (Any Explosive)
jutsu.description: Grabbing ahold of your weapon and attaching explosives carefully infused with your chakra allows you to make precise shots tagging their target with explosive force. For the duration, each time you roll an Ammunition Die as part of a Taijutsu attack, you can choose to instead reduce the size of your ammunition die by 1 step. If you do, the affected creature that you deal [Weapon damage] to becomes Ra-Marked until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Retreating Shot
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage.
jutsu.description: After you take damage from another creature, you quickly retreat and you reset your positioning. Move up to 15 feet to a space you can see, that can hold you and then make a ranged taijutsu attack, dealing your [Weapons damage] + 3d6 and forcing the target to make a Strength saving throw, reducing their speed by 15, on a failed save. Chain 1: Increase the distance you can move to your movement speed. Chain 2: Attacks you make against a creature while engaged with them are not made with disadvantage.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Ripping Lunge
jutsu.description: You lunge forward while striking your opponent to maximize the impact power of your shot. Select a creature and move up to 20-feet closer to them, and make a ranged taijutsu attack against them. On a hit you deal your [Weapons damage] + 2d10 and force them to make a Constitution saving throw, being knocked Bruised on a failed save. Chain 1: A creature who failed their saving throw is also pushed 10 feet into a direction of your choice, except upwards. Chain 2: On a successful hit, another allied creature can spend their reaction to cast a Taijutsu with the Finisher keyword that has a casting time of 1 Action, targeting the same creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Squall's Fury
jutsu.description: You Fire multiple projectiles into the sky which then fall down like rain upon your enemies. Choose a point you can see within range. All creatures within a 15-foot cube originating on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, they take your [Weapons damage] + 2d6, Pierce 4 DR. Chain 1: You instead Pierce 6 DR. Chain 2: On a failed save affected creatures, cannot reduce damage they take until the end of their next turn, as your flurry of projectiles sunders their defenses.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Surprise Attack
jutsu.description: As a requirement for casting this jutsu, you must target a willing creature within 5 feet who knows Advanced Transformation. You coordinate with your ally, as they transform into a weapon of your choice and you launch both them and another weapon at your target, but your ally is hidden in the shadow of your real weapon attack. Make a ranged taijutsu attack at disadvantage, dealing your [Weapons damage] on a hit. Regardless of a hit or miss, your ally is able to surprise your target. By spending their reaction, your ally can move into a space of their choice, within your weapons range and then make either a weapon attack or cast a jutsu with a casting time of 1 action. This attack is made at advantage and the target creature is surprised against this attack.

jutsu.name: Tanuki's Trickery
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when a creature you can see would make a ranged attack.
jutsu.description: You attack with your weapon with knowledge for how they will hinder your targets. When you would see a hostile creature making a range attack, you attack with your weapon, making a ranged taijutsu attack. On a hit, you select a new valid target for the triggering creatures attack other that the caster themselves. If a jutsu makes a specification in regards to the casters allies or hostile creatures, you ignore that distinction as a part of this jutsu' s effect.

jutsu.name: Wrecking Ball
jutsu.description: You attack with your weapon with such ferocity, it is if a wrecking ball erupts forward. All creatures in a 30-foot lone, 5-foot-wide line must make a Dexterity Saving Throw. On Failure they take your [Weapons damage] +2d8 and are Pushed to the end of the jutsu's range, into a space that can hold them. On a success they only take half damage and no additional effects. Chain 1: Creatures with ranks of Weakened must make their saving throw at disadvantage. Chain 2: On a successful hit, another allied creature can spend their reaction to cast a Taijutsu with the Finisher keyword that has a casting time of 1 Action, targeting the same creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Yoichi's Focus
jutsu.description: You focus your mind and eyes on a target of your choice. Make a ranged taijutsu attack, targeting one creature you can see dealing your [Weapons damage] + 3d12. This attack has a +1 bonus to critical threat range. Chain 1: If you score a critical hit with this attack, the affected creature also gains a rank of Bleed. Chain 2: If you score a critical hit with this attack, all creatures within 5 feet of the original target, takes half of the damage dealt to the target as a result of the shot exploding.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above C-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Air Snatcher
jutsu.description: You Fire your weapon with enough force to rip the air out of your opponent. Make two ranged Taijutsu attacks, dealing your [Weapons damage] +2d6. damaged creature reduce their speed by 15 feet until the beginning of your next turn. Striking the same creature twice instead restrains the affected creature in place until the end of their next turn. Chain 2: On a successful hit, the affected creature also has disadvantage on their next Constitution Saving Throw before the beginning of your next turn.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost by 3 and the damage by 1d6.

jutsu.name: Apollo's Ammo
jutsu.description: Grabbing ahold of your weapon and infusing it with your chakra makes each shot a veritable tool is destruction. For the duration, each time you roll an Ammunition Die as part of a Taijutsu attack, you can choose to instead reduce the size of your ammunition die by 1 step. If you do, the affected creature that you deal [Weapon damage] to becomes Apollo Marked until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Artemis's Ammo
jutsu.description: Grabbing ahold of your weapon and infusing it with your chakra makes each shot something that rarely misses its mark. For the duration, each time you roll an Ammunition Die as part of a Taijutsu attack, you can choose to instead reduce the size of your ammunition die by 1 step. If you do, the affected creature that you deal [Weapon damage] to becomes Artemis Marked until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Arrow Rain
jutsu.description: When you cast this jutsu you must spend one ammunition die that is at least a d4 in size or greater. You prep as many shots as you desire and Fire them in an arc that then begin to rain down overwhelming all within range. Select a point you can see within range. All creatures within a 10 feet radius of the select point must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + 2d8. Creatures who fail their saving throw by 5 or more are pinned to the ground, being knocked Prone and Restrained. A creature Restrained in this way can spend their action to make a Strength (Athletic) check vs your Taijutsu save DC to escape, ending the Restrained condition. Chain 2: You instead reduce your ammunition die size by 1 step, instead of spending the whole die.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Binding Shot
jutsu.description: You launch a set of thrown weapons wrapped in Battle Wire at an enemy, intended to use them as a much more lethal bola. Target an enemy within range, make a ranged taijutsu attack. On a hit the target takes [Weapons damage] + 2d10. The target then must make a Dexterity saving thrown, being Restrained on a failure and no effects on a successful save. A creature who begins its turn Restrained by this jutsu gains 2 ranks of Bleeding. A creature can remake the save at the end of their turns. Chain 2: You can choose to instead; select a point you can see in range. All creatures within 5 feet of the chosen point becomes targets for this Jutsu's attack. Compare the result vs the AC of each creature in range dealing damage and applying the affects as normal.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d10.

jutsu.name: Breach-N-Clear
jutsu.components: W (Any ranged/Thrown) M, NT (1 Breaching tag).
jutsu.description: Sometimes, you don't have time for decorum as you attach breaching tags to your weapon and Fire it at a structure or construct. Select a Construct or Structure within range, make a ranged Taijutsu attack, dealing you [Weapons damage] + 6d6 Fire and 6d6 Bludgeoning on hit. Constructs and Structures are vulnerable to this Jutsu's damage. Chain 2: You can choose to instead target a creature with this jutsu. If you do, reduce the bonus damage dealt to 2d6 for each damage type.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this Jutsu above B rank, increase the cost of the Jutsu by 3, and the damage by 1d6 of each type.

jutsu.name: Fangs of Medusa
jutsu.components: W (Any ranged/Thrown), NT (Poison or Poison Kit) M, CM
jutsu.description: The chthonic enemy of the moon's hatred swells within you; it's seething rage like poison to your chakra. Make a ranged taijutsu attack toward a target within range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapons damage] + 4d8 poison damage and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 2 ranks of Envenomed. Chain 2: You can choose to detonate your attacks ammunition on contact with the target of your attack. If you do, when you score a hit with this jutsu, the affected creature becomes consumed in a massive burst of poison, erupting and covering a 15-foot radius cloud that bends around corners and can fit through cracks and tiny gaps. All creatures in the affected radius must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 2 ranks of Envenomed on a failed save.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B-rank, increase the cost by 3. If this jutsu is cast at A rank, you may gain the Full Moon benefits on a Half Moon. If this jutsu is cast at S rank, you may gain the Full Moon benefits on a Crescent Moon, and this jutsu deals an additional 2d10 damage.

jutsu.name: Fangs of Python
jutsu.components: W (Any ranged/Thrown), NT (Poison or Poison Kit), M, CM
jutsu.description: The chthonic enemy of the sun's hatred swells within you; it's seething rage like poison to your chakra. Make a ranged taijutsu attack toward a target within range. On a hit, you deal your [Weapon's damage] + 2d12 necrotic damage and the affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw being Dazed on a failed save. If the affected creature fails their save by 10 or more, they instead being Petrified for 1 minute or until they take damage, whichever occurs first. Chain 2: A creature instead becomes Petrified if they fail by 5 or more.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above B rank, increase the cost by 3 and damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Tendon Shot
jutsu.description: You take a quick assessment of the enemies' movements, their fighting styles, do they use kicks? Punches? Weapons? All of them can be disabled if you know where to strike, and you do. Make a ranged Taijutsu attack against a target within range, on hit, deal your [Weapons damage Die] + 8d4. On hit the target must also make a Constitution saving throw, on a failure, you've pierced a tendon or nerve relating to their fighting style, roll a 1d4+1. The affected creature has disadvantage on that many Taijutsu and/or weapon attacks. Chain 2: A creature instead becomes Petrified if they fail by 5 or more.
jutsu.higherLevels: For Rank you cast this jutsu above B-rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3, the die size of the 1d4+1 by 1, and the damage by 1d4

jutsu.name: Burst Shot
jutsu.description: You perform powerful attack with enough force to penetrate steel, blasting through your enemy. Make a ranged taijutsu attack against the target, dealing your [Weapon's damage] +3d10 and all creatures in a 20-foot line behind the target must make a Dexterity saving throw, or take 3d10 damage of the same type your weapon deals on a failed save, or half as much on a success. Chain 2: Increase the length of the Line to 40 feet.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 2d10.

jutsu.name: Ullr Ammo
jutsu.description: You raise your weapon and combine the Yin and Yang Chakras within yourself before tethering the combination to your weapon. For the duration, each time you roll an Ammunition Die as part of a Taijutsu attack, you can choose to instead reduce the size of your ammunition die by 1 step. If you do, the affected creature that you deal [Weapon damage] to becomes Skadi Marked until the end of your next turn.

jutsu.name: Armor Pierce
jutsu.description: You prepare a full power shot, putting all of your Strength behind it. This attack cannot be made at disadvantage and ignores a creatures Temporary Hit Points dealing damage directly to the targets hit points. Make a ranged taijutsu attack dealing your [Weapons damage] + 4d12.If you score a critical hit, reduce the target creatures DR (damage reduction) by 6 until they spend an Action to repair it. Chain 2: This attack gains a +2 bonus to its critical threat range. Chain 3: When this jutsu is cast, you can select up to 2 additional creatures within 30 feet of the original target as you ricochet your shot between them. On a successful attack, remake your attack with this jutsu targeting the second creature applying its effects on a hit. If the second attack scores a hit, then remake your attack with this jutsu targeting the third creature applying its effects on a hit.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank, increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 1d12.

jutsu.name: Counter Shot
jutsu.castingTime: 1 Reaction, which you take when you take damage as a result of an attack from a creature within your Weapons Range.
jutsu.description: You take the attack head on in an attempt to lock the opponent in perfect targeting range, preventing them from dodging. Immediately after you take the damage, you are able to cast 1 Bukijutsu with a casting time of 1 Action at no additional cost of B-Rank or lower. The target creature cannot take a Reaction until after this jutsu's conclusion. Chain 2: Increase the rank of the Jutsu you can cast to A-Rank. Chain 3: You can cast up to two C-Rank Bukijutsu targeting the same creature.

jutsu.name: Deadly ranged Connection
jutsu.description: You perform a series of quick attacks with enough force to penetrate steel, blasting through your enemy. Make four ranged taijutsu attacks against a target within range dealing your [Weapon's damage] + 1d8 on a hit. Chain 2: All attacks made with this jutsu have a +1 bonus to its critical threat range and rolling a 1 or 2 on your ammunition die does not reduce its size. Chain 3: Each attack inflicts 1 rank of Bleed on an affected creature.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the number of attacks by +1.

jutsu.name: Shadow Eclipse
jutsu.description: You Fire your weapon with such a high arc that it eclipses the sun or moon, using the shadows generated to mask its approach. When you cast this jutsu make your ranged taijutsu attack and on a hit, determine how many turns (up to a max of 3 rounds) before the arrow strikes, prolonging your adversaries dread. This jutsu's base damage is [Weapons damage] + 4d12. For every round beyond the one you cast this jutsu in that you delay, this jutsu increases in damage by 2d12. The shot will finally land and strike its target after the declared number of rounds at the beginning of your turn on that round. Chain 2: Select up to 3 targets for this jutsu, making a single attack comparing the result to each of their AC and applying its effects on a hit. Chain 3: For every round this jutsu's damage is delayed, on a hit the affected creature gains 4 ranks of Bleed when the damage is applied.

jutsu.name: Sniper's Focus
jutsu.description: You take a relaxed stance drawing your weapon back and preparing for a full force attack. You spend your turn preparing this attack until the beginning of your next turn. You cannot take a bonus action or reaction after using this jutsu. At the start of your next turn, you Fire with full force. All creatures in a line 5 feet wide and 100 feet long originating from you must make a Dexterity saving throw at disadvantage, taking [Weapons damage] + 6d10 damage of your weapon's type.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this jutsu above A-Rank increase the cost of this jutsu by 3 and the damage by 2d10.

jutsu.name: Twinshot
jutsu.description: An advanced variation of the "Hidden Shadow Shot" you prepare Two strikes with your weapon feigning that they are aimed at the same person. Your shots collide mid-air, sending them in different directions meant to strike different targets. Select two targets, and make one ranged taijutsu attack targeting both comparing the result to both of their AC. Both targets must make a Perception check versus result of the attack roll, on a failure they are both unable to gain the benefits of Temporary hit points or damage Reduction as a result of a Jutsu due to being caught off guard by the sudden split. On hit, chosen enemies take you [Weapons damage] + [Weapons damage] + 2d8 damage. Chain 2: Affected creature must make a Constitution saving throw, gaining 5 ranks of Bleed on a failed save. Chain 3: If this jutsu targets creatures with ranks of a Physical or Sensory condition, you make your attack with Advantage. If you score a critical hit with this jutsu, you can recast it targeting different creatures.
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, the damage by 1d8.

jutsu.name: Dragon-Strike
jutsu.description: You aim your weapon and coat it in a twisting chakra that and then becomes a pair of dragons that spiral around each other when you Fire, expanding until the weapon is completely obscured. All creatures in 15 feet wide line with a maximum length equal to your weapons Range, originating from you, must make a Dexterity saving throw taking [Weapons damage] + 7d10 on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Chain 3: After firing all creatures who fail their saving throw has their movement speed reduced to 0 until the beginning of your next turn and you can shift your Chain rank to any value other than 0 if you choose.

jutsu.name: Starstream
jutsu.description: A delicate and precise technique, the caster must carefully plan the arrangement of the shuriken, and carefully string them up with battle wire before swinging them precisely into a star-shaped pattern around them, warding off attacks and providing a deadly flourish of steel. When this jutsu is cast, you may maneuver the storm of steel to strike a creature within the radius, making a ranged taijutsu attack, dealing [Weapons damage] + [Weapons damage] + 4d6 on a hit. While concentrating on this jutsu, any hostile creature entering this radius for the first time on a turn or beginning or ending their turn within its radius must make a Dexterity saving throw, taking your [Weapons damage] + [Weapons damage] + [Weapons damage] on a failure, or half as much on a success save. Chain 3: For the duration, yourself and any allied creature of your choice within the radius of this jutsu, are considered to have Partial Cover against ranged attacks
jutsu.higherLevels: For each rank you cast this above A-Rank, increase the cost by 3, and the attacks damage by 1d6

jutsu.name: Instant Eclipse
jutsu.components: M, NT (2 weapons Scrolls with a Thrown weapon Sealed inside)
jutsu.description: You grasp two of the scrolls Sealed with ammunition into them and unfurl them in a double helix formation as you jump 60 feet into the air. The Sealed ammunition creates a blanket of steel above your opponent, enough to block out the sun. All creatures in a 30-foot radius originating from a point of the space you occupy, excluding you, must make a Dexterity saving throw taking 16d4 piercing damage and gain 4 ranks of Bleed on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful save. After this jutsu's casting, both scrolls are destroyed and the weapons instead are unsalvageable. Chain 3: When this jutsu is cast, you can select any number of creatures to avoid striking as they are precisely avoided by the hail of steel.

jutsu.name: Scattershot
jutsu.description: You load all your ammo into a single attack, looking to cause as fide spread destruction as possible. All creatures in a range of this jutsu, must make a Dexterity Saving Throw taking [Weapons damage] + 6dx on a failure and half as much on a success. This Justus damage die is equal in size to the ammunition die spent as part of its casting. Chain 3: Instead of spending the full stack, you reduce its size by 1 step.

jutsu.name: Example Jutsu Name
jutsu.description: Its hawter than an Amaterasu!
jutsu.higherLevels: Double Amaterasu??
